text: Feels like I'm home. Our family loves the swimming pool. Very nice place,  shops can reach on foot. Niki is very accommodating. Will recommend this place..

This is a hidden gem in the city. Great overnight stay. The host was excellent and very friendly. The rooms very clean and modern. Swimming pool in the backyard was wow! I definitely recommend this place for a short break in Athens.

If you beleive this review has been helpful for you, please don’t forget to press the 👍 button. Thank you.

Very nice people. I was there just to visit my sister who is renting the apartment. I am living in greece, so I have seen a lot of apartments. The owners are the most sweet people I have met. And the apartment is so clean and beautifull.
Amazing appartment full equipped.
The best place in Athens!

A simple campsite with great cleanliness and friendly people.  toilets are cleaned every day.  workers are available all the time, and in the evening they also have a security guard.  Getting to the city center is quite simple, because there is a bus station right next to the camp and there are plenty of taxis as well.  we paid €14 for a taxi from the camp to the acropolis.   We recommend it

Total lack of hospitality and respect for a bicycle camper.
The campsite was almost completely empty. And yet I should have made a reservation. I'd never heard that before.  There was only one night available on this empty campsite!
There is always a place for bicycle campers It is an unwritten rule.
I was assigned a spot of 2 square meters. Because it was not level, I moved a small meter. Then a  witch from One Flew over the Cuckoos Nest came and told me to just follow the instructions. I packed my things and left.

The campsite is located in a remote area, but there are buses stopping in front of it that can quickly take you to the center.
The service areas are extremely clean and the staff is very kind, friendly and always ready to help with information about the tourist attractions of the city.There is a supermarket and a fruit shop very close to the campsite.
I would love to visit the campsite again.

The camping looks good, but no WiFi available.  We left the camping because of the attitude of the lady that ran the place. Not helpful at all. We were basically told to shut up while she was talking, and if we did not like, we could go elsewhere.  Which we did.

Our experience when we left the campsite after 1 night in Athens and 11 days of other places in Greece was : either the owner is not Greek or something else is not ok with owners of this campsite… Strict, rude, really not polite… Simply not Greek… Campsite clean, facilities ok. But as already written… The owners of the campsite should think, how to work in tourism… 90% empty and we weren’t able to prolonge a space for 2-3 hours on a different parking space… We simply had to see more of Athens and we didn’t know if we will be back in campsite till strict official check out… We would like to pay also for a parking place / no go…

The apartment is clean but I recommend to also get an insecticide.
The place is very well located and the neighborhood is very good - not in a tourist area so not many english speakers but it feels safe.

It was clean and in a very good area ... In 2 minutes the Metro and shops around ... You could easily find parking ... The only thing that spoiled our mood was the sofa that was holey and you couldn't sit down and enjoy to watch TV ... If the sofa is changed, it will be ok!!
nice locations ... clean space, comfortable rooms, ideal for families, helpful owner..

We visited this property twice.
On the 3rd floor it was fine...that's why we went back only to stay on the 1st floor...there was a broken sofa with springs outside.. .dirty kitchen and utensils..clogged drain in the bathroom and in the bedroom there was no TV.. .due to the fact that anything can happen in human contexts we did not mention in the comments neither siphons nor the issue of cleanliness but only the broken sofa which was so damaged to the point that we had a nervous laugh.. despite this in the next reservation we made because the location is convenient for us, we asked to stay on the 3rd floor but it wasn't possible and they told us that they don't know which room we will get into until the last moment... and we accepted it. However, because we made these comments for the better service of all of us and no because we had some reason to blame the accommodation, a gentleman called us and aggressively and in a bad tone demanded that we cancel the reservation. when we asked him why he has this unprofessional behavior, he answered because our comments are not valid. so we asked him if he really has saw the sofa and admitted that it was indeed broken and changed. Well, our comment, which I emphasize, was negative, but not unreasonable and in no case aggressive, as other visitors mentioned, and you were the reason why the person in charge took the unprofessional initiative to call us by phone to tell us to cancel the reservation. .
Cozy, clean, and close to everything! very kind owner!! Beautiful balcony you are happy to sit outside even though the street below is very central! we will definitely prefer it again!
Flawless

The house was very clean and big for a family. Have all necessary and nice view. The owners was very friendly and make us feel like was our house. Have a private-safe parking for a car. Thanks Paul and Anastasia for the hospitality.

My family and I stayed at this accommodation for a total of three weeks over 4 different times.The hosts Anastasia and Pavlo were amazing and went above and beyond for all their guests and made us feel at home and part of their family as the moment we met them. The rooms were clean and spotless and air conditioning was in every room. The room sizing was excellent for my family of 5 and the beds were very comfortable. We highly recommend any one or any family that's looking for accommodation in Athens to stay at this property as it is in an excellent location with transportation all around, as well as restraunts, bars and shops and most importantly they offer a free Carpark for your vehicle. We will deffinantly  be going back to this accommodation when we visit Greece again.

I had the most wonderful experience during my stay at My Home In Greece.

The name of this place, "My Home In Greece," truly lives up to its reputation.

The apartment was nothing short of perfection, and it's evident that the hosts, Pavlos and Anastasia, have meticulously thought of and catered to every detail to ensure the utmost comfort and relaxation for their guests.

Pavlos and Anastasia were not just hosts; they were the epitome of warmth and hospitality. Their availability for any request at any time made our stay even more enjoyable. It's apparent that their dedication to hospitality and guest care is unrivaled, and it was a genuine pleasure to meet them and be their guests.

I can confidently say that whenever I find myself in Athens again, I will undoubtedly choose to stay at My Home In Greece. I hope that day comes soon, and I'm already looking forward to it.

A heartfelt thanks to Pavlos and Anastasia for making our stay so memorable and enjoyable. ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

I stayed here for two weeks. Before I will tell you all about these wonderful people let me just say that the apartment is great, all the listed facilities are at place and in good shape. Now to the main issue - these people are amazing, absolutely angels. They are so kind, always wanting to help in every little thing. They were there for us in so many ways, they took us places by car so we would not take public transportation, they took me personally to a doctor and stayed with me so there would not be any language gaps issues, they gave us the feeling that we are family from the first moment and acted like one through  all our stay and even when we got back home. I really can't find the words to express and describe my gratitude and love. We were very lucky to meet Anastasia an Pablo, we earned friends for life. I hope one day I could help and
host them at least they did us.

This place is truly home in Athens! Pavlos and Anastasia are simply amazing people.
I'll start by saying that the apartment is new, modern, spacious, ventilated, beautiful design, very clean, very well equipped kitchen. The apartment has a washing machine so you can take less clothes from home. All rooms have air conditioning and an air purifier. The location is very quiet, grocery store and restaurants within walking distance and so is the metro.
Pavlos helped us a lot, explained and drove us to get to know the surroundings of the apartment as well as to the city center, he explained about the important places so that it was easy for us to find our way around, on the last day he took us to the car rental agency and showed us other places that we would not have found on our own.
I highly recommend coming to stay with Pavlos and Anastasia, their level of hospitality exceeds all imagination and expectations. We felt like we were on a summer vacation at our good friends house and we are already looking forward to returning to them on our next vacation in Athens!
Clean room with beautiful, modern decor that radiates warmth!!! The location is close to the metro, supermarkets and coffee shops! I would choose it again!!
Flawless
Lovely hosts quiet rooftop bedsit fully equipped kitchen great views rooftop entertaining area.cant wait to stay again
I liked it very much! Everything was beautiful!
Everything was perfect! Wonderful view! Everything clean.
Everything is wonderful!!! 🙏

The hotel is very very good, I can't seem to understand some of the bad reviews. The reception was great and friendly the rooms were spacious and quiet. Our room window was across the train station and we could barely hear the trains go by. Amenities were sufficient and the breakfast was really good. The price and the location are excellent only 5 minutes away from the electric station that takes you everywhere in Athens.

This hotel would not even deserve 1 star, because our stay was catastrophic. We had booked in March, a little more than 2 months in advance, to be sure that we would have a room available. When we arrive at our room, we quickly realize that there are several problems in it; Out of the 4 lights in the room, 3 of them didn't work, the light in the bathroom illuminates so little that we had to take our shower with the curtain open, and even then, the light was extremely low. Our air conditioning didn't seem to work, our toilet was clogged without us even using it, we only had one electrical outlet for the whole room and our great view of the city (as mentioned in the booking), was actually a view of the other rooms, inside the hotel. When we expressed our dissatisfaction to the employees at the reception (it didn't look like the description of the room we had booked at all), we were lent a power strip and assured that they would try to find a solution + that they would contact us. For the air conditionner, they did lend us a remote for it, labelled ''Room 612''. It wasn't our room. BUT they did told us that they were overbooked. (It doesn't make any sens as they lend  us something from an other room) The next morning, still no news, we went to the reception for a follow up (our toilet was still clogged, almost a day after our arrival). We told them our dissatisfaction (again) and that we wanted to know what was going on with their "research". The rude gentleman at the reception started by telling us that the view from the room is not automatically on the Acropolis and that there is the city all around the hotel, so that it was not a problem (the problem is that we see the inside of the hotel) He completely denied that it was mentioned "city view" in the room reservation and did not believe us,  despite being shown the booking page. After a heated exchange, this man told us that it was NORMAL to have a room like this, because we had booked it on a third party site, so 50% cheaper! He also said that the hotel is a "TripAdvisor Recommendation" and that it is a 4-star hotel (clearly he doesn't care about reviews). I can't believe that an employee could talk to his customers like that and have such a condescending tone.
*Breakfast wasn't that good, when there are leftovers, they keep them and reheat them the next day (the omelettes and pastries were hard)*
We will never go back to this hotel again and we do not recommend it to anyone.

I would not stay there again.
Elevator / lift  only starts from first floor, after about 18 stairs !! Good luck if you have luggage.
Old property, need a major update.  AC is pretty weak in ALL rooms. Rooms are old, at times smelly  and not well kept at all.  Not a 4 star hotel at all. May be a 2 star level ?

Rooms are OK, but quite basic. AC and wifi work well.
Buffet breakfast was good with a good selection. Also not too much noise from outside or street.
Main advantage of this hotel which is not in a touristic area of Athens, is the location: some 15 min walk to Liosion bus station.
One point that needs improvement: we only found one outlet, to which the fridge is connected …
Anyway a good value for money hotel.

It is a hotel that does not have many advantages except that it is centrally located and has transportation advantages.

The breakfast is not bad, at least there are a few varieties.
The rooms are a bit old and need to be renovated, but the cleanliness is sufficient.
It is suitable for one or two day stays.

Great hotel! Large rooms and modern infrastructure. Our room had AC units in every room, and the apartment was virtually spotless.

The restaurant is a bit hot during day, but quality of food and service easily compensates for that.

There is an X93 bus stop to the airport about 500m from the place, making it a good place to wait for the flight.

We stayed four nights in October at Lak Nirvanas Homes in a two bedroom apartment. The apartment was very nice, clean, and large, with two large balconies with nice views and a large open kitchenette-dining-living area. The kitchen had a refrigerator, stove, coffee press, and basic cookware, dinnerware, and utensils (no microwave). There is an elevator, and a spiral staircase that can be a bit narrow and steep. The building and room felt safe and secure. The attached restaurant (Reception) was very good and served food and coffee all day, which can be delivered to the rooms. The staff was friendly and accommodating.  The only thing that keeps me from giving 5 stars is the location. It is not a bad area, but the hotel is surrounded by gas stations, car washes, and other automotive type businesses, and there is a lot of traffic noise day and night. There is a Lidl grocery store right down the street, and other stores and restaurants a short walk away, but I wouldn't call them super convenient. The nearest Metro stop is approximately a half mile away, but there are several bus routes that stop close by that can get you to the Metro or suburban railway station quickly.

The staffs are so kind and helpful. The room is really clean, modern and has a relaxed ambience. Moreover, the access from city center or airport is good enough(from airport, you can use X93 city bus). I highly recommend this accommodation for your stay in Athens.

The apartments are modern and very comfortable. The reception service is also very nice and the staff is friendly and responsive. We only stayed for one night, but we would gladly return if our travel bring us back to Athens.

July 2016: we were in the apartment at the top of the building; the apartment overlooked a large well-furnished terrace with table and chairs where you can eat outside.
The apartment was clean and modern, with a well-appointed kitchen, two bathrooms and a very large living room.
It is not located in the city center, it takes about 20 minutes to reach the subway and another 15 minutes to the city center.

Staying at Ma Madison No. 1 has been an absolute dream. The hosts have been super helpful and made us feel welcome and at home in a new country. They provided excellent service including a full guide to the neighborhood and city attractions. They quickly answered any questions we had and the home was spotless. Highly recommend staying with Yannis and Rena!

I really like this Hotel. I stayed there few times. Very clean rooms, safe and peaceful area to stay. Very reasonable price, free car parking in front the building. Very friendly and helpful staff. Big supermarkets next to the building, just few minutes to city centre. Great location peaceful surrounding atmosphere. I was very pleased with my stay. I would like to be back for a longer visit in the future. ❤❤❤👑👑👑☺️☺️☺️☺️

Be careful, this place is a trap. I am pretty much sure those who wrote good reviews for this place are either friends with the owner or are employees faking accounts. No need to write much but enough to know that:
1- rooms are not as in the photos.
2- price is too high, considering this could not fit in any category of a comfortable place in booking.
3- the location is industrial, surrounded by mechanical areas and the place itself is noisy.
4- an employee asked me impolitly not to write this review and he will bring the owner number who is in Dubai. As expected, the employee disappeared.
5- finally, the place fits for a solo traveler spending an overnight willing to pay no more than 30 euros max.

I am not used to harsh criticism, but this place deserves an exception. Just bad!!

Tale care with the pictures, this place feels like a work in progress, ill start with the positive: beds are comfy as are the pillows. They did let us do a late check in.

The rooms are very small, and the double bed is a little over a single - not great if travelling in a couple.

We had to request a room change after checking in as our room had no natural light or air flow, the bathroom door had just been painted and the fumes could still be smelt. No curtain on the shower either.

After changing to a room with a small window it was still very tight but bearable.

The area is close to the car mechanics but near the metro to get into the centre.
For a similar price I would recommend getting a flat instead

We stayed here for one night. The girl at reception desk was nice but unfortunatley our room couldnt be open cuz the lock didnt work. When we came back a bit later a guy a the reception desk who replaced the aboce mentioned female receptionist was very unfriendly and not the kindest. He wanted to get rid of us asap. When we came in the room we were shocked. We booked bedroom 2 people but this was hardly for one. The bed wasnt big enough for 2 adults, there was no space to leave our suitcases since the spaces between the wall and the bed were only for one person to pass through. We literally had to stretch around like spiders to get to the bathroom. In the bathroom...well...there was no warm water so we had to shower with ice cold one and let me just say we came from a ferry and bus trip and we were exhausted and couldnt wait to have a nice shower. Well that didnt happen. Also the pictures on site dont show that some of the rooms dont even have windows which ofc ours didnt have. All in all it was not worth the price. It felt claustrophobic, too small and hardly even for one person not two. It was  clean and new though but i would never go back.

The best choice we could’ve made! Great location, clean and spacey rooms, quiet neighbourhood. Ahmed was the most considerate, polite and kind host. We enjoyed our stay and will surely come back again!
Great apartment right next to metro station
Nice, clean and fully equipped apartment with very good internet and smart TV. From the subway Ag. Eleftherios is 2' away and with direct access to EO for Thessaloniki and Corinth. I recommend it!!
Beautiful and fully equipped apartment in a very convenient location (close to the train and next to a main road)

Great apartment! Beautiful, clean and cozy. We stayed there a couple with two kids. The apartment is close to the metro, the transportation is very easy. Free parking is available on the street. Athens is a great place to travel in with kids.

This is a wonderful apartment just 2 minutes from the Metro station, 9 minutes ride to the ancient district, safe area day and nights, a large super-market at the adjacent building, coffees and restaurants all around, and the apartment itself - just paradise, not less !
Nice clean apartment, good facilities. Located in a good area within walking distance to many shops, restaurants and bars. Only 2 minutes walk to the metro and 10 minutes into city centre.

Wonderful apartment!

Location - just by the subway with many coffee shops nearby and supermarket as well.

Highly recommended!

Most beutifull apartment. Very comfortable cause and clean. Fully equipped with  all necessary facilities.
Very close to metro and quiet environment

🌟🌟🌟🌟 4/5
The apartment was really cozy and had a nice, comfortable feel to it. However, the location wasn't the best—it's a bit away from the main attractions and conveniences. The sofa was a bit dirty, so it might be time for a replacement or a good clean. Aside from that, I enjoyed my stay overall. It’s a decent option if you're looking for a cozy place to relax!

Lovely apartments - couldn’t fault our stay at all. Very secure and clean apartments with downstairs gym, we also opted for the room with the garden hot tub. No front desk but was super simple to access property upon arrival. Property manager was very helpful and quick to respond to any questions we had within minutes.

Also a great location - only a short walk to the acropolis & Plaka area or 20 min drive to the beach. Would highly reccomend if you’re staying in the city centre of Athens 🇬🇷

Location is very convenient with multiple stores near by and the metro stop is right there. Hardware in the rooms have some normal wear but overall very nice experience! Loved the big balcony and rolling shutters in the bedroom.

Few years ago I was one of the first guests. It was perfect then.. 5***** and 10 on Booking.com. but after coming back several times I can see there is a lack of maintenance throughout the whole building and the rooms. It s a pity,  because now I have the feeling it has become just a milking cow.  Won t stay there again
Rooms are well designed and equipped. Lovely TVs in each room & showers. But need maintenance and better cleaning.

We stayed at the beginning of May for 3 nights. Very good impressions, ideal for couples but also spacious for families. Very clean and the owner very kind and hospitable.
Easy parking outside the apartment building. Access to the center is very easy with the electric car.
I highly recommend it!

We were very pleased! Maria welcomed us warmly, and we immediately felt at home. The apartment was very clean and comfortable. The internet was fast and convenient for telecommuting. Convenient location, close to the center.

Very nice apartment, with modern and minimal decoration, clean and comfortable with a spacious room, a dining room in the living room where we had dinner and a beautiful terrace for our breakfast. The hostess was very kind, friendly and helpful. We appreciated all the facilities and I highly recommend it and will definitely I prefer it again..

Our room window was across the train station and we could barely hear the trains go by. Amenities were sufficient and the breakfast was really good. The price and the location are excellent only 5 minutes away from the electric station that takes you everywhere in Athens.

Excellent accommodation, with beautiful decoration! Comfortable with all the amenities you could need. It has a parking space and a large terrace. The owners are kind and helpful, we will definitely prefer it again.

It is a fantastic apartment. In a wonderful, new building with access via a pre-sent code. The staff is very friendly, prompt, always ready to help. The house itself is located 350 meters from the metro, a maximum of 5 minutes walk and 5 stops to Monastiraki Square. It is really very charming with beautiful interior, modern design, large bright rooms, 2 balcony, equipped with everything you could need. There is also a gym in the building. With their help, we also booked transfers (one way by metro from the airport to the center costs 9 euros, and our transfer cost us 44 euros in total, which was absolutely acceptable for a group of 4 people).It is possible to leave luggage in lockers. I really recommend this apartment, you will not regret choosing it 🙂🙂❤️

Great apartment at a very reasonable price. Service was extremely fast and efficient.
The facilities are excellent too, especially the gym is better than in many hotels.
I would definitely come back here at any time.

Great apartment! Beautiful, clean and cozy. We stayed there a couple with two kids. The apartment is close to the metro, the transportation is very easy. Free parking is available on the street. Athens is a great place to travel in with kids.

This is a wonderful apartment just 2 minutes from the Metro station, 9 minutes ride to the ancient district, safe area day and nights, a large super-market at the adjacent building, coffees and restaurants all around, and the apartment itself - just paradise, not less !
Nice clean apartment, good facilities. Located in a good area within walking distance to many shops, restaurants and bars. Only 2 minutes walk to the metro and 10 minutes into city centre.

Wonderful apartment!

Location - just by the subway with many coffee shops nearby and supermarket as well.

Highly recommended!

Most beutifull apartment. Very comfortable cause and clean. Fully equipped with  all necessary facilities.

“I recently stayed at this hotel for two nights and couldn’t be happier with my experience. The hotel itself is beautifully maintained and impeccably clean, with a design that creates a welcoming and elegant atmosphere. Its location is fantastic—just a short walk from the hotel to train station and bus stop Every corner around the hotel offers something to enjoy, from great restaurants to shopping spots, making it an ideal place for both relaxation and exploring.

The staff was incredibly helpful and attentive, making me feel right at home. The food served at the hotel was delicious. My room was spotless, and the bed was exceptionally comfortable, ensuring a restful night’s sleep. Overall, this hotel offers an outstanding blend of convenience, comfort, and quality service. I would highly recommend it to anyone visiting Athens!”

Stayed here for 3 nights. Ideally situated in the middle of athens only a short walk to the train station. The hotel was very clean and all the staff were extremely friendly and helpful at all times. The roof top bar and pool had amazing views of the city and was the ideal place to watch the sunset. Highly recommend the cocktails. A great base for exploring the city. Highly recommend.

Fantastic hotel with amazing staff. The service and attentiveness of the reception staff made our stay perfect. So helpful and courteous at all times. The room was lovely and pristinly clean.
We really enjoyed the pool bar and sun loungers in the evenings, and the cocktails were great.
Highly recommend and hope to return!

Great breakfast with a lot of vegetarian and gluten free options. Pool was nice and on a roof bar with great food and service. Only small downside was the location which was far from city center but has a close metro station (3 minute walk) with 20 minute ride to center. In addition jacuzzi and massage could not be enjoyed by a couple because they were for one person at a time. Nevertheless very recommended and great value for money.

Excellent service speed. Whatever we asked for, if they did have it, got sent to our room quickly. The staff were generally friendly with good manners.

The room is quite small for a 5-star hotel. Not many facilities to use — just a small gym and pool. The pool is the smallest I’ve seen in all the hotels I’ve lived in with a pool.

The breakfast was no good either. It might only be a personal preference but I was happy with all the breakfasts provided by other hotels, except this one.

It’s around an-hour bus trip to the places around the National Garden. Glad the bus stop is very close to the hotel.

We stayed at the beginning of May for 3 nights. Very good impressions, ideal for couples but also spacious for families. Very clean and the owner very kind and hospitable.
Easy parking outside the apartment building. Access to the center is very easy with the electric car.
I highly recommend it!

We were very pleased! Maria welcomed us warmly, and we immediately felt at home. The apartment was very clean and comfortable. The internet was fast and convenient for telecommuting. Convenient location, close to the center.

Very nice apartment, with modern and minimal decoration, clean and comfortable with a spacious room, a dining room in the living room where we had dinner and a beautiful terrace for our breakfast. The hostess was very kind, friendly and helpful. We appreciated all the facilities and I highly recommend it and will definitely I prefer it again..

Staying at Ma Madison No. 1 has been an absolute dream. The hosts have been super helpful and made us feel welcome and at home in a new country. They provided excellent service including a full guide to the neighborhood and city attractions. They quickly answered any questions we had and the home was spotless. Highly recommend staying with Yannis and Rena!

Unfortunately, there were bed bugs in the room and the living room. It caused us sleeplessness, itchiness and an unnecessary amount of stress. The apartment would have been okay without that factor. But the neighbourhood is really bad... lucky there are buses and supermarkets nearby!
The best service better than airbnb

Very nice accommodation but lack of kitchen tools. For example a breakfast cup for 4 people. Otherwise quite clean. The area is not among the best in Athens, but it is close to the metro and bus stops and a nice supermarket is right in front.
Very nice apartment for a long or short stay, the manager is very attentive

The campsite was almost completely empty. And yet I should have made a reservation. I'd never heard that before.  There was only one night available on this empty campsite!
There is always a place for bicycle campers It is an unwritten rule.
I was assigned a spot of 2 square meters. Because it was not level, I moved a small meter. Then a  witch from One Flew over the Cuckoos Nest came and told me to just follow the instructions. I packed my things and left.

The campsite is located in a remote area, but there are buses stopping in front of it that can quickly take you to the center.
The service areas are extremely clean and the staff is very kind, friendly and always ready to help with information about the tourist attractions of the city.There is a supermarket and a fruit shop very close to the campsite.
I would love to visit the campsite again.

The camping looks good, but no WiFi available.  We left the camping because of the attitude of the lady that ran the place. Not helpful at all. We were basically told to shut up while she was talking, and if we did not like, we could go elsewhere.  Which we did.

Our experience when we left the campsite after 1 night in Athens and 11 days of other places in Greece was : either the owner is not Greek or something else is not ok with owners of this campsite… Strict, rude, really not polite… Simply not Greek… Campsite clean, facilities ok. But as already written… The owners of the campsite should think, how to work in tourism… 90% empty and we weren’t able to prolonge a space for 2-3 hours on a different parking space… We simply had to see more of Athens and we didn’t know if we will be back in campsite till strict official check out… We would like to pay also for a parking place / no go…

The experience at Live on Top was one of the most intense and special experiences of my life!  The excursion to Pauliani offered us a magical two days and it certainly won't be the last. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for something different!

Very close to the Attiki metro stop, about 10 minutes away, and 2 minutes away there is a large supermarket and many bars and bakeries, as well as a pharmacy right next to the gate. The apartment is comfortable, the building has an elevator and the rooms have air conditioning and a large space with a good built-in wardrobe and very comfortable beds. The kitchen is also very well equipped, there is even a washing machine and everything you need to hang clothes on the balcony. The only drawbacks are the mosquitoes and that the apartment does not have much power of light, you cannot use the washing machine and oven at the same time or it will break. Otherwise it is very good.

Comfortable apartments to accommodate seven with children or a group of up to 6 people. Quiet and cozy place. 100 m to the Agios Nikolos metro station, which allows you to be in the historical center of Athens in 10-15 minutes.
Very simple apartment, but has all of the basics and the owner is lovely and attentive! Only a very short walk from 2 metro stations making is really accessible

If you are considering this hotel and have children with you, read this first.

We needed a hotel at a reasonable distance from the airport because we had a long journey ahead of us with our children. So we decided while driving to book a room at this hotel. We needed to sleep 6 hours before we had to leave again.

We arrived at the location late at night and there were people in the streets giving us nasty looks as we tried to find a parking spot. Once we found a place to park, we felt unsafe in the area. The first thing that happens is that a man comes up to my wife and says something in his language while licking his mouth.

When we arrived at the entrance, which is the most beautiful part of the entire hotel, we were greeted by a very pleasant receptionist.

He said that the area is not safe at night. We were given the room key and a control for the air conditioning (which didn't work at first), and were sent up into the world's smallest elevator.

The first thing that greeted us at the room door was the door lock/door handle hanging loosely from the door.

The room had decent beds, but the rest felt very indelicate. The room smelled of sewage, it was extremely worn all over and the bathroom had a cockroach jumping around in the shower.

We heard a lot of noise from other guests. it took time before we were able to sleep and we got maybe 3-4 hours of sleep. We just wanted out and away from this place.

We also parked in the middle of a market that set up on the corner, which locked us in for the morning. Fortunately, there was a nice fellow who helped us out.

There was an incredible amount of queues at 7 o'clock and it took us almost an hour and a half to get to the airport.

We had a stressful and horrible experience.

The first day I arrived, the cleaners did not leave clean towels (see pics), did not thoroughly clean the basin, there is a drain that smells like sewage and there is a chair on the balcony that shouldn't be there-especially if you are checking in with a child. The waters are turned without notice and water pressure in the shower is not always great. This was reported to Reception and the drains were slightly fixed but the smell is worse in the evening (I had to cover the drain and burn incense sticks in the bathroom and leave the balcony door open). Until the third day, the cleaners stopped cleaning my room until check-out. I decided not to report it just in case they are prejudice and contaminate my products in my room so I left it but I complained about the water pressure. Receptionist are ok. I booked this hotel so I walk to my daughter's family home and put my head down. If you want to put your head down, maybe it's OK. But if want full hospitality, this is not the place. If you want a drink, they offer a bottle of water for €1 and no extras. Please think what you want from your travels before booking here. The good thing about the hotel, you have many shops and restaurants plus access to transportation.

The hotel is quite simple and modest, it’s ok to stay for a couple of days.
The staff is very friendly and helpful,the speak English well:)
I (a young woman) was in Greece all alone and my luggage was lost, so the staff helped me to call the airport and find out all the information, they calmed me down and my bags arrived just in time directly to the hotel!
So if you are reading this, a huge THANK YOU one more time !❤️

Julia from Moscow
September 2023

This hotel is one of the bad one After taking online payments from us and going to the hotel, the money was charged again. They said that they would provide water for drinking, but when we asked for water, they told us drink water from the bathroom.

The staff were pleasant but the rooms were in a sad state. The area, once part of the great metropolis now is an area you shouldn't walk at night. Also, though I made the reservation through an app and it showed as paid, when I arrived there was no reservation and I had to pay extra
It's a residential area
Ok good an
Everything is fine
Beautiful

I really like this Hotel. I stayed there few times. Very clean rooms, safe and peaceful area to stay. Very reasonable price, free car parking in front the building. Very friendly and helpful staff. Big supermarkets next to the building, just few minutes to city centre. Great location peaceful surrounding atmosphere. I was very pleased with my stay. I would like to be back for a longer visit in the future. ❤❤❤👑👑👑☺️☺️☺️☺️

Be careful, this place is a trap. I am pretty much sure those who wrote good reviews for this place are either friends with the owner or are employees faking accounts. No need to write much but enough to know that:
1- rooms are not as in the photos.
2- price is too high, considering this could not fit in any category of a comfortable place in booking.
3- the location is industrial, surrounded by mechanical areas and the place itself is noisy.
4- an employee asked me impolitly not to write this review and he will bring the owner number who is in Dubai. As expected, the employee disappeared.
5- finally, the place fits for a solo traveler spending an overnight willing to pay no more than 30 euros max.

I am not used to harsh criticism, but this place deserves an exception. Just bad!!

Tale care with the pictures, this place feels like a work in progress, ill start with the positive: beds are comfy as are the pillows. They did let us do a late check in.

The rooms are very small, and the double bed is a little over a single - not great if travelling in a couple.

We had to request a room change after checking in as our room had no natural light or air flow, the bathroom door had just been painted and the fumes could still be smelt. No curtain on the shower either.

After changing to a room with a small window it was still very tight but bearable.

The area is close to the car mechanics but near the metro to get into the centre.
For a similar price I would recommend getting a flat instead

We stayed here for one night. The girl at reception desk was nice but unfortunatley our room couldnt be open cuz the lock didnt work. When we came back a bit later a guy a the reception desk who replaced the aboce mentioned female receptionist was very unfriendly and not the kindest. He wanted to get rid of us asap. When we came in the room we were shocked. We booked bedroom 2 people but this was hardly for one. The bed wasnt big enough for 2 adults, there was no space to leave our suitcases since the spaces between the wall and the bed were only for one person to pass through. We literally had to stretch around like spiders to get to the bathroom. In the bathroom...well...there was no warm water so we had to shower with ice cold one and let me just say we came from a ferry and bus trip and we were exhausted and couldnt wait to have a nice shower. Well that didnt happen. Also the pictures on site dont show that some of the rooms dont even have windows which ofc ours didnt have. All in all it was not worth the price. It felt claustrophobic, too small and hardly even for one person not two. It was  clean and new though but i would never go back.

The best choice we could’ve made! Great location, clean and spacey rooms, quiet neighbourhood. Ahmed was the most considerate, polite and kind host. We enjoyed our stay and will surely come back again!
Brand new apartment with modern design, luxurious facilities providing a great view of Athens! Convinient spot and close to transportation means! Highly recommended!
Great stay! The apartment was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described. The location was perfect for exploring the area, and the host was responsive and helpful. Highly recommend!
Amazing experience10/10 amazing apartment, super clean ,stunning view, jacuzzi you feel like you are in the sky .. The host, it’s very helpful anytime we can’t wait to come back thank you!!
Very beautiful house! I really enjoyed the jacuzzi and the sauna. Plus the view was breathtaking!!!
I had a great time with my girlfriend in the jacuzzi watching the marvelous view from the balcony. Imagine to do the same!!!

A really comfortable and convenient apartment, for short-term and long-term stays.
Very well equipped, clean and tidy.
Our communication with the host was easy and prompt.
The location is central and convenient, close to markets and very well connected to all public transport.
I stayed there with my family (5 people) for a week and we all felt like we were staying in our own home.
We will definitely come again.
Best place ever. Very beautiful apartament,very clean,everything you need,and the best host ! Close to everything. We will come back here 100%.

Excellent location near two metro stations and with the train from the airport with x93 we arrived comfortably!!!!
Fully equipped apartment...we loved the big balcony with the barbecue.
We stayed happily 4 people. Excellent service
It's been a year that I stayed for a month with my family (ages 3.5 and 1 year). Everything perfect, we only had our clothes and everything else was there.

Immaculate apartment very well equipped close to the red and green metro and train lines, we stayed as a family of 6 people, safe area, I highly recommend it, we loved the large
terrace with barbecue

This is a brand new hostel that has an industrial chic feel to it. The hostel is super clean, spotless. The staff are friendly and helpful. My room was very comfortable and the bathrooms were excellent. I would not hesitate to recommend Athens Hawks Urban to any traveler.
The location is 4-5 metro stops from the main tourist areas of Athens, which I prefer. The hostel is in easy walking distance of the metro. I felt perfectly safe in the neighborhood, Sepolia.

A great value for money hostel. Almost brand new. Very clean and tidy. Very good rates. A little distance to city centre but reasonably quiet at night time. Good standard of breakfast, coffee and bar. Comfortable beds with excellent shower room. If you want no-frills stay well recommended!!

we stayed 5 days. at a very good price.
the room was quite good. the hotel is new, clean, in a quiet and excellent location. just 4-5 minutes on foot from the metro stop. customers respect each other and the lobby looks like a library!
breakfast is also offered, which I would describe as basic with an excellent quality-price ratio.
the staff is simply amazing, kind and always willing to step in to help with any problem or provide any information.
low-cost parking is also available.
accessible to wheelchair users.

Had perfect 2 week stay! Clean room and facilities, friendly staff, fast wifi and a good kitchen, too.
It's not in the city center but in a calm area where you have everything you need with a metro station close by

Had to deal with bed bugs instead of enjoying my vacation, the hotel might look clean from the outside but  for the bed bugs, I had to buy spray and cream from the pharmacy and I couldn't sleep because my body was itching the whole night despite the uncomfortable pillow and mattress.
Also, locker, towels and laundry is not for free
I had to spend extra money to clean my "clean" clothes because of the bugs
And on pharmacy
Worst experience and I can't wait to check out and never come back.

Stayed at this Apartment for 3 nights. Very well designed and furnished . Manos was especially caring and responsive. Helped in many ways to make our visit memorable. Had so many cafes , bakeries and supermarkets in walking distance .
We stayed here for four nights, and would thoroughly recommend H Experience to anyone looking to stay in Athens

Whether in Greece for business or vacation, The H Experience is one of the best concepts to turn to for your stay. I’ve tried a handful of their apartments and look forward to checking out the rest. Super clean, super design, super service. I highly recommend!

This is an amazing apartment; we stayed for a month.  It is very nicely decorated and very clean.  The beds are extremely comfortable, and the walk-in shower is amazing! The property only consists of two apartments; and we had the entire top floor to ourselves. The owner and staff were very responsive and provided clean linens weekly.  It is a convenient walk to the metro as well as private, 24-hour guarded parking that is included.  The only downside is the property sits directly next to the metro line.  It is loud if this bothers you.

A great place to stay in Athens.. beautifully furnished for a very comfortable stay.. a short walk to the metro station and couple of stops to all major attractions..
The attention to details and the hospitality  of the host is incredible and the readiness to ask any questions we had.
Thank you Evi for everything and hope to see you soon again

🌟🌟🌟🌟 4/5
The apartment was really cozy and had a nice, comfortable feel to it. However, the location wasn't the best—it's a bit away from the main attractions and conveniences. The sofa was a bit dirty, so it might be time for a replacement or a good clean. Aside from that, I enjoyed my stay overall. It’s a decent option if you're looking for a cozy place to relax!

Lovely apartments - couldn’t fault our stay at all. Very secure and clean apartments with downstairs gym, we also opted for the room with the garden hot tub. No front desk but was super simple to access property upon arrival. Property manager was very helpful and quick to respond to any questions we had within minutes.

Also a great location - only a short walk to the acropolis & Plaka area or 20 min drive to the beach. Would highly reccomend if you’re staying in the city centre of Athens 🇬🇷

Location is very convenient with multiple stores near by and the metro stop is right there. Hardware in the rooms have some normal wear but overall very nice experience! Loved the big balcony and rolling shutters in the bedroom.

Few years ago I was one of the first guests. It was perfect then.. 5***** and 10 on Booking.com. but after coming back several times I can see there is a lack of maintenance throughout the whole building and the rooms. It s a pity,  because now I have the feeling it has become just a milking cow.  Won t stay there again
Rooms are well designed and equipped. Lovely TVs in each room & showers. But need maintenance and better cleaning.

Great hotel! Large rooms and modern infrastructure. Our room had AC units in every room, and the apartment was virtually spotless.

The restaurant is a bit hot during day, but quality of food and service easily compensates for that.

There is an X93 bus stop to the airport about 500m from the place, making it a good place to wait for the flight.

We stayed four nights in October at Lak Nirvanas Homes in a two bedroom apartment. The apartment was very nice, clean, and large, with two large balconies with nice views and a large open kitchenette-dining-living area. The kitchen had a refrigerator, stove, coffee press, and basic cookware, dinnerware, and utensils (no microwave). There is an elevator, and a spiral staircase that can be a bit narrow and steep. The building and room felt safe and secure. The attached restaurant (Reception) was very good and served food and coffee all day, which can be delivered to the rooms. The staff was friendly and accommodating.  The only thing that keeps me from giving 5 stars is the location. It is not a bad area, but the hotel is surrounded by gas stations, car washes, and other automotive type businesses, and there is a lot of traffic noise day and night. There is a Lidl grocery store right down the street, and other stores and restaurants a short walk away, but I wouldn't call them super convenient. The nearest Metro stop is approximately a half mile away, but there are several bus routes that stop close by that can get you to the Metro or suburban railway station quickly.

The staffs are so kind and helpful. The room is really clean, modern and has a relaxed ambience. Moreover, the access from city center or airport is good enough(from airport, you can use X93 city bus). I highly recommend this accommodation for your stay in Athens.

The apartments are modern and very comfortable. The reception service is also very nice and the staff is friendly and responsive. We only stayed for one night, but we would gladly return if our travel bring us back to Athens.

July 2016: we were in the apartment at the top of the building; the apartment overlooked a large well-furnished terrace with table and chairs where you can eat outside.
The apartment was clean and modern, with a well-appointed kitchen, two bathrooms and a very large living room.
It is not located in the city center, it takes about 20 minutes to reach the subway and another 15 minutes to the city center.
Excellent experience and great people and atmosphere. Mrs Anna Fonsou and the rest of the talented actors were so nice and very welcoming! Thank you so much!
Warm and smiley people, cared environment and theatre history to discover 🥰🥰
Poor actors are well treated there
Gd
Great place and great people. Great work by Mrs. Anna Fonsou. Well done!

Staying at Ma Madison No. 1 has been an absolute dream. The hosts have been super helpful and made us feel welcome and at home in a new country. They provided excellent service including a full guide to the neighborhood and city attractions. They quickly answered any questions we had and the home was spotless. Highly recommend staying with Yannis and Rena!

Great apartment! Beautiful, clean and cozy. We stayed there a couple with two kids. The apartment is close to the metro, the transportation is very easy. Free parking is available on the street. Athens is a great place to travel in with kids.

This is a wonderful apartment just 2 minutes from the Metro station, 9 minutes ride to the ancient district, safe area day and nights, a large super-market at the adjacent building, coffees and restaurants all around, and the apartment itself - just paradise, not less !
Nice clean apartment, good facilities. Located in a good area within walking distance to many shops, restaurants and bars. Only 2 minutes walk to the metro and 10 minutes into city centre.

Wonderful apartment!

Location - just by the subway with many coffee shops nearby and supermarket as well.

Highly recommended!

Most beutifull apartment. Very comfortable cause and clean. Fully equipped with  all necessary facilities.
Very close to metro and quiet environment
Exceptional communication, convenient location and good value for money! The host was always available and willing to help.
I stayed at the property for 3 days while renovation work was completed on my house and it was very comfortable and clean. I even had Netflix. Very direct access to transport. Well done
Great hospitality I would choose it again for sure!!
Very good!
Great place for luxury time-spending
a 5 star experience every time
Love it 100% awesome
The best food and the best bits
Amazing

Everything was just great. The apartment was very comfortable, big, clean and near to the metro.
The apartment was fully equipped with everything you need for a short or even longer stay.
There is a grocery shop around the corner and also some restaurants.
Hosts were very friendly and helpful.

The ladies in the lobby were extremely helpful and nice to us. Unfortunately, that doesn’t save the experience. We got in quite late and the area was not the most friendly. The hotel room was small and felt old. The walls were very thin and it was (too) easy to hear what the neighbors were up to. I’m going to spare you the details and allow your Imagination to do the rest of the work. I’ll just say that it isn’t a family hotel.
Great hotel, next to a lovely park. It is easy to get to downtown Athens by bus right next to the hotel, and/or Metro from the Metro line two bus stops away. Lovely room, and great staff!

Unbeknown when I booked, it's not in the most savoury of areas (mostly non-Greek) but the suites with a jacuzzi are an absolute bargain, set in boutique rooms that echo a bygone era of luxurious decadence. Unique ceiling artwork with concealed lighting and plush design make it easy to overlook the occasional loose fitting. One will need to get a bus or tram into town, though there are restaurants and an English-language cinema (plus open air screening option) within a few minutes walk and bargain basement shops give way to mid-range designer clothes shops as one wanders down Patison street.
Good location. Good service. Clean rooms. If you book a room,  request to stay in room #402. It has a Good balcony to host a party.
One of the best hotels in Athens, close to almost everything you want. The receptionist, Vilma, was very helpful and gave us some valuable tips and suggestions for places to visit and to eat.

Bit out of the centre of Athens, metro is about 10 minutes away, parking is possible next door (paid, leave your keys), rooms are  mixed bunch. We stayed here twice during our trip to Greece. The first room we had was reasonably modern, but don’t expect a view. There even was a window into the interior of the hotel. The second room was older, extremely noisy, not enough outlets, smelly and small bathroom. Hope for a renovated room.

We had a good time at the hotel! I dont know about the other rooms, but our room was modern and clean and we even had a balcony. The room service was very nice and cleaned every day. The breakfast is simple but good. We saw two different men who worked at the reception and both of them were very friendly and helped us every time we had a request :)
The breakfast was probably the worst thing about this hotel. Very little variety, and I got a raw egg once, so be careful. The overall experience was okay, but nothing more.

It's a great place if you are on a budget and super close to transit.  About 15 min bus to Plaka and Monastiraki. All rooms have terraces, which is nice and they are generally clean. The bathrooms could use a spruce up and they didn't have a safe in the room for our passports. You can see the Parthenon from the roof.

Good hotel in an area well connected to the center. It is not very close to the touristic heart of Athens, but there are busses and trolleys (super close to the hotel) that take around 15 minutes to Syntagma or around it, as well as 10 minutes walk to the metro connecting the area with the city center. Excellent service! Clean and quiet - with the exception of some cars noise in the night which was OK for us. Basic decent breakfast, but there are various shops and bakeries in the area to eventually supplement that, including a nice coffee shop across the street. The rooms are quite large, several have balconies, and are cleaned every day which is refreshing. The hotel has 24h staff, which is good. Has an elevator, and a small terrace on its rooftop on the 5th floor, which offers a lovely view over Athens.

The hotel is very very good, I can't seem to understand some of the bad reviews. The reception was great and friendly the rooms were spacious and quiet. Our room window was across the train station and we could barely hear the trains go by. Amenities were sufficient and the breakfast was really good. The price and the location are excellent only 5 minutes away from the electric station that takes you everywhere in Athens.

This hotel would not even deserve 1 star, because our stay was catastrophic. We had booked in March, a little more than 2 months in advance, to be sure that we would have a room available. When we arrive at our room, we quickly realize that there are several problems in it; Out of the 4 lights in the room, 3 of them didn't work, the light in the bathroom illuminates so little that we had to take our shower with the curtain open, and even then, the light was extremely low. Our air conditioning didn't seem to work, our toilet was clogged without us even using it, we only had one electrical outlet for the whole room and our great view of the city (as mentioned in the booking), was actually a view of the other rooms, inside the hotel. When we expressed our dissatisfaction to the employees at the reception (it didn't look like the description of the room we had booked at all), we were lent a power strip and assured that they would try to find a solution + that they would contact us. For the air conditionner, they did lend us a remote for it, labelled ''Room 612''. It wasn't our room. BUT they did told us that they were overbooked. (It doesn't make any sens as they lend  us something from an other room) The next morning, still no news, we went to the reception for a follow up (our toilet was still clogged, almost a day after our arrival). We told them our dissatisfaction (again) and that we wanted to know what was going on with their "research". The rude gentleman at the reception started by telling us that the view from the room is not automatically on the Acropolis and that there is the city all around the hotel, so that it was not a problem (the problem is that we see the inside of the hotel) He completely denied that it was mentioned "city view" in the room reservation and did not believe us,  despite being shown the booking page. After a heated exchange, this man told us that it was NORMAL to have a room like this, because we had booked it on a third party site, so 50% cheaper! He also said that the hotel is a "TripAdvisor Recommendation" and that it is a 4-star hotel (clearly he doesn't care about reviews). I can't believe that an employee could talk to his customers like that and have such a condescending tone.
*Breakfast wasn't that good, when there are leftovers, they keep them and reheat them the next day (the omelettes and pastries were hard)*
We will never go back to this hotel again and we do not recommend it to anyone.

I would not stay there again.
Elevator / lift  only starts from first floor, after about 18 stairs !! Good luck if you have luggage.
Old property, need a major update.  AC is pretty weak in ALL rooms. Rooms are old, at times smelly  and not well kept at all.  Not a 4 star hotel at all. May be a 2 star level ?

Rooms are OK, but quite basic. AC and wifi work well.
Buffet breakfast was good with a good selection. Also not too much noise from outside or street.
Main advantage of this hotel which is not in a touristic area of Athens, is the location: some 15 min walk to Liosion bus station.
One point that needs improvement: we only found one outlet, to which the fridge is connected …
Anyway a good value for money hotel.

It is a hotel that does not have many advantages except that it is centrally located and has transportation advantages.

The breakfast is not bad, at least there are a few varieties.
The rooms are a bit old and need to be renovated, but the cleanliness is sufficient.
It is suitable for one or two day stays.

I really enjoyed my stay at Petaluda, it was just right for me. Izabella and Manolis are lovely people and great hosts who gave all directions for arriving, it's around a 15 minute walk from Victoria station. For the budget price you're paying, it's perfect. The place is cosy, charming and clean with access to a shared kitchen and bathroom that were always very clean, I only ran into some guests once with a friendly hello but besides that you have your privacy. The room is totally fine and spacious, and I had my own private balcony with a view over the rooftops and streets. Bed was comfy enough for me!

There are people in other reviews complaining about the area being "dangerous" but I didn't feel this, Athens has it's gritty charm many places and I like that, the local people are fine and friendly but I guess some people are frightened by a little graffiti and diverse communities... Go pay €150 per night in Monistraki if that's a problem for you.

Manolis and Izabella also kindly let me check out an hour later and I really appreciated that, when I need to I'll stay again for sure! Thanks. See you again

This is a great hostel for travellers with small budget.  The hosts are very friendly and kind natured and willing to accommodate requests within their capacity. They don’t stay on premises, but if you call them, they will be happy to come to the place and open the front door when you first arrive to check-in.
The property itself is clean and quiet, with 2 common bathrooms and a kitchen for 5 guest rooms in total.

The street facing rooms may sometimes have traffic noise.

The owner was super lovely and made us feel very welcome. The bathrooms are shared, but there are two bathrooms for the four rooms here, so you won't have to share woth with many people. The bathrooms were also really nice and clean, and so were the rooms. Air conditioning worked well, beds were comfortable and we really enjoyed our stay.

I had such a positive experience at Iza's place. I turned up at dinner time with the wrong booking dates. Iza quickly whipped up a room ready for me last minute and managed to secure me the room for the 4 nights I originally needed, in the middle of busy summer! Talk about looking after you. She was so caring and made sure I was relaxed and comfortable. I felt like I was being welcomed by family to clean and comfortable home. I cried from the gratitude I felt!
To the other comments about the area - I am a solo female traveller and walked around late at night with no issue. There are amazing businesses right downstairs and all around owned by wonderful people. There were families playing football in the park late at night to give you a sense of the area.
Thank you so much Iza! I will be back in the future :)

Loved it! Room was spacious (had a nice, quiet balcony) and the entire place was pristine. Pretty good breakfast, there’s a shared kitchen where I could keep my food in the fridge. Great value for money!
Very clean and big apartment, very close to the underground, very friendly landlord. Quiet area, shops nearby.
Metro nearby
Wonderful and stylish rooms to let with great atmosphere , mostly made by the owners. Good value for money. Highly recomended.
Location is ok, it's more like air BnB. It have kitchen and wash machine which is useful.
Its nice
Cool

Very close to the Attiki metro stop, about 10 minutes away, and 2 minutes away there is a large supermarket and many bars and bakeries, as well as a pharmacy right next to the gate. The apartment is comfortable, the building has an elevator and the rooms have air conditioning and a large space with a good built-in wardrobe and very comfortable beds. The kitchen is also very well equipped, there is even a washing machine and everything you need to hang clothes on the balcony. The only drawbacks are the mosquitoes and that the apartment does not have much power of light, you cannot use the washing machine and oven at the same time or it will break. Otherwise it is very good.
Great

This was fantastic value for the price. The man that runs the rooms is incredibly helpful and informative. He described many places to see and eat and purchase groceries. He went out of his way to try to help me find other accomodation when he was booked out and even graciously drove us to these new premises free of charge. I i have never experienced such  magnificient service before. He made us feel very welcome .

nothing wad too much trouble for him.
Absolutely stunning what one can get for such price. The host is one of a kind as well. Beyond helpful and courteous.

Very good. It's cheap, clean, and the owner, Mr. Taki, is friendly. The location is also quite good. Airport pick-up service was 20 euros. Highly recommended. You can walk to the bus terminal heading north. This would also be an advantage.
Nice area

Athens Hive is a fantastic hotel! The rooms are spotless, spacious, and very comfortable. The staff is incredibly friendly and helpful, always ready to assist with anything you need. The location is ideal, close to major attractions and public transportation. I will definitely choose it again for my next visit to Athens!

Building is new and clean, rooms are spacious and cosy. It takes just 8 minutes to reach the Attiki metro station that provides direct connections with the most important places such as Monastiraki Square, Syntagma Square or Pireus Port. In the room you will find well equipped kitchen (basic dishes, toster, kettle, fridge, cooker), bathroom (towels, shampoo, conditioner, shower gel, toilet paper and even hair dryer included) and bedroom with a TV, wardrobe and air conditioning (that saves your life during the summer). The whole building is surprisingly quiet. The host is really lovely, she left a welcome gift in the room (cakes, water and juice), she quickly responses for the messages and is always willing to help, don't forget to ask her about restaurant recommendations :)

everything was very good.  apartment clean and exactly like in the photos.  additionally, a welcome cookie, water, coffee, tea and sugar in the apartment were a very nice surprise.  we spent a very nice time in the apartment.  Thank you very much and we wholeheartedly recommend it.  location close to the subway, bus stops.  a supermarket next door.  great pubs in the area.  host very polite and helpfull helpful.

New apartment type hotel. Lovely staff and generally not bad for its price but the cooking facilities are quite limited (no chopping boards, knife, microwave etc) and also the whole place gets really cold (there’s an air con in the bedroom but) and shower often has no hot water.....and there’s no lift so it could difficult if you have walking issues or heavy luggage
The best place for renting

Comfortable apartments to accommodate seven with children or a group of up to 6 people. Quiet and cozy place. 100 m to the Agios Nikolos metro station, which allows you to be in the historical center of Athens in 10-15 minutes.

If you are considering this hotel and have children with you, read this first.

We needed a hotel at a reasonable distance from the airport because we had a long journey ahead of us with our children. So we decided while driving to book a room at this hotel. We needed to sleep 6 hours before we had to leave again.

We arrived at the location late at night and there were people in the streets giving us nasty looks as we tried to find a parking spot. Once we found a place to park, we felt unsafe in the area. The first thing that happens is that a man comes up to my wife and says something in his language while licking his mouth.

When we arrived at the entrance, which is the most beautiful part of the entire hotel, we were greeted by a very pleasant receptionist.

He said that the area is not safe at night. We were given the room key and a control for the air conditioning (which didn't work at first), and were sent up into the world's smallest elevator.

The first thing that greeted us at the room door was the door lock/door handle hanging loosely from the door.

The room had decent beds, but the rest felt very indelicate. The room smelled of sewage, it was extremely worn all over and the bathroom had a cockroach jumping around in the shower.

We heard a lot of noise from other guests. it took time before we were able to sleep and we got maybe 3-4 hours of sleep. We just wanted out and away from this place.

We also parked in the middle of a market that set up on the corner, which locked us in for the morning. Fortunately, there was a nice fellow who helped us out.

There was an incredible amount of queues at 7 o'clock and it took us almost an hour and a half to get to the airport.

We had a stressful and horrible experience.

The first day I arrived, the cleaners did not leave clean towels (see pics), did not thoroughly clean the basin, there is a drain that smells like sewage and there is a chair on the balcony that shouldn't be there-especially if you are checking in with a child. The waters are turned without notice and water pressure in the shower is not always great. This was reported to Reception and the drains were slightly fixed but the smell is worse in the evening (I had to cover the drain and burn incense sticks in the bathroom and leave the balcony door open). Until the third day, the cleaners stopped cleaning my room until check-out. I decided not to report it just in case they are prejudice and contaminate my products in my room so I left it but I complained about the water pressure. Receptionist are ok. I booked this hotel so I walk to my daughter's family home and put my head down. If you want to put your head down, maybe it's OK. But if want full hospitality, this is not the place. If you want a drink, they offer a bottle of water for €1 and no extras. Please think what you want from your travels before booking here. The good thing about the hotel, you have many shops and restaurants plus access to transportation.

The hotel is quite simple and modest, it’s ok to stay for a couple of days.
The staff is very friendly and helpful,the speak English well:)
I (a young woman) was in Greece all alone and my luggage was lost, so the staff helped me to call the airport and find out all the information, they calmed me down and my bags arrived just in time directly to the hotel!
So if you are reading this, a huge THANK YOU one more time !❤️

Julia from Moscow
September 2023

This hotel is one of the bad one After taking online payments from us and going to the hotel, the money was charged again. They said that they would provide water for drinking, but when we asked for water, they told us drink water from the bathroom.

The staff were pleasant but the rooms were in a sad state. The area, once part of the great metropolis now is an area you shouldn't walk at night. Also, though I made the reservation through an app and it showed as paid, when I arrived there was no reservation and I had to pay extra
Horrible ,when I went to the camp the food wasn't good
It's a residential area
Ok good an
Everything is fine
Beautiful

Good if you’re travelling on a budget, but stay at your own risk. Hotel is located at a somewhat dodgy area and the room was also quite old. Not sure why but the TV turned on by itself at midnight. AC was really cold tho, I had a comfortable sleep regardless.
The AC was noisy, carpet dirty, and our shower door exploded while opening it. There was a cute white cat outside the window which made the experience a bit better.

The service and cleaning service was great! However, the room looked like it needed some maintenance. A new clean carpet is needed. Also, my plan was to come with a car, but i decided to come to Athens by train. This turned out perfect for me because the hotel advertised “having parking” but it didn’t. There was no parking on the street or near the hotel. Overall, it is close to the city…20-30 minutes walking and it is next to a police station (which i felt safe) and the hotel service completed my requests.

Worst and dirtiest room we have ever stayed in. Beware and do not book this hotel. The location is fine and central enough to walk to all the sights if you are good on foot (approx. 45 min.).
But there were blood spots on the carpet, hair in the bed and really weird substances all over the furniture and floor. Also the toilet had spots of dried bodily liquids on the seat. Also the receptionist weirdly met with some girls in their room after his shift. Yes it’s cheap but even for this low price it’s a scam. We actually tried to change rooms, but the other room was no better. In my opinion there is no way the other positive reviews can be real. Don’t be fooled!

1. Takes time for hot water to arrive on the shower
2. The blanket is way too small
3. Freezing cold in the room. There is an AC but i could not turn it to heating (i can say the staff could have helped me if i ask, just chose not to because putting many layers of clothes fix this). The first night i woke up at 5.30 because of the cold and could not sleep in that weather. The next nights i put 3 layers of clothes on me while sleeping
4. Once after the room service woman cleaned me room i smelled ciggarets smell in there. Did not let her in since then
5. One of the reception guy is nag. He imsist of giving him the key every time i leave the room to go outside, so i have to get my key at the reception every time i enter. The other receptionists dont do it, he is the only one, and he insisted even after i told him he is the only one keeping my key "for security purposes". He also have me wait to get my signature after i extend my stay, while the day before when i extend my stay no signature was taken from me from the other receptionsit. This guy ruined my experience in this hotel. All the receptionist need to have the same work procedures, and not every one do what he wish or think is right.

Only good thing about this hotel is the price, but you can find other hotels with good price that do not have so much issues.

Respose to response-

2. When checked in I was not informed that I need to leave the key in reception every time I leave. As I mentioned- no receptionist did that except for the nag one.

I will rate it with 5 stars, although a 4.5* would have worked, but I don't have the possibility to give half-measures, and I don't want to give it 4 :). There are also some minuses mentioned below, but overall the accommodation is very ok, and the price was good.
The apartment is spacious, nicely decorated, new furniture, it looks exactly like in the pictures, that's why I didn't even take pictures inside. The owner is very helpful, he answers any questions immediately, he helps you with information. The kitchen is equipped with everything you need, if you want to cook, what it doesn't have in return is a wine cork :). The bed is very comfortable, the linens are of medium to high quality.
The distance to the metro is about 10 minutes on foot, there are 2 metro stations that are about the same distance, but I recommend better to go in the opposite direction of the metro, in front of the block go up where there is a main street and on the left there is a bus station, from here you can take the bus, so you avoid the route on foot to the subway, which is a bit dubious, the area is quite dirty, full of garbage on the street. Of course it's ok to walk to the subway, but I for one would not go alone, there are many people of different nationalities who were not exactly civilized (noisy, quarreled loudly). I was really looking at how nice the blocks are, with the marble inside the block, it's a pity that it is so dirty and that it is mostly inhabited by quite uncivilized foreigners.
Overall, the accommodation is ok, with a very good quality/price ratio, anyway you don't stay in the apartment all day.

As minuses:
-The apartment smells of sewage as soon as you enter, but after you air it out a bit and turn on the water, that smell goes away, I recommend closing the bathroom door well in the evening, and opening the window in the morning.
- The noise from the stairwell, the apartment is right next to the elevator and it was noisy, but with a little background music you could sleep
- The lack of a corkscrew for opening wine bottles, you can manage without one, but it would be nice to have one.
- The pillows are very hard and big, I noticed that in Greece this is how we find pillows, and in Thassos, Lefkada, Halkidiki, also big pillows, that's why we take pillows from home, but in Athens given that we came by plane without luggage after us, we had no way to take pillows. It is a good and cheap option
- The area where the apartment is located
- The dumpsters in front of the block and the fact that the garbage truck came twice a day and made a lot of noise, those who picked up the garbage were arguing, I didn't understand why and with whom they were arguing.
It has been recommended to me by several people who have been satisfied... Next time I will visit it myself.

One of the many Hospitality Centers in the area.
The building was a half-board hotel before it passed into the hands of the Municipality.
I don't know which of the two the residents would prefer, but from the outside at least it looks like decent accommodation, clean and well-kept, maybe more so than the neighboring apartment buildings!
I believe and wish that inside is just as clean, offering a few hours of peace to visitors.

text: Exceptional communication, convenient location and good value for money! The host was always available and willing to help.

Because I booked the room and booked for two friends, they picked up us from the airport.
The breakfast is good with suitable price.

Truly a great spot! I was originally booked for 4 nights, stayed an extra three after. Great value, very nice rooms with aircon and great housekeeping. Neighbourhood has some nice streets not too far, they will point you to the nice spots. Many public transport options. Owners are super helpful and friendly, also great to talk to. Note, owners changed since April this year so some of the old reviews no longer valid! They are really wanting to improve the place.

The rooms are very basic but clean. Unfortunately our room smelled like smoke and you can gear the street very well from the room which is not quiet. But the service is really good, very nice breakfast. They were very friendly and accommodating. The location is very central!

Nice place, everything is clean and the people working here really nice. It is well placed to go to the Liosion Station (KTEL bus). Only problem : the noise, you can hear almost everything that happen in the corridor and the stairs.
Friendly staff, very clean, quiet and comfortable hotel. Very good location in the center of Athens and close to the bus stop, metro and supermarket. highly recommended!
great airbnb appartments offered
Love it
