🌟🌟🌟🌟 4/5
The apartment was really cozy and had a nice, comfortable feel to it. However, the location wasn't the best—it's a bit away from the main attractions and conveniences. The sofa was a bit dirty, so it might be time for a replacement or a good clean. Aside from that, I enjoyed my stay overall. It’s a decent option if you're looking for a cozy place to relax!

Lovely apartments - couldn’t fault our stay at all. Very secure and clean apartments with downstairs gym, we also opted for the room with the garden hot tub. No front desk but was super simple to access property upon arrival. Property manager was very helpful and quick to respond to any questions we had within minutes.

Also a great location - only a short walk to the acropolis & Plaka area or 20 min drive to the beach. Would highly reccomend if you’re staying in the city centre of Athens 🇬🇷

Location is very convenient with multiple stores near by and the metro stop is right there. Hardware in the rooms have some normal wear but overall very nice experience! Loved the big balcony and rolling shutters in the bedroom.

Few years ago I was one of the first guests. It was perfect then.. 5***** and 10 on Booking.com. but after coming back several times I can see there is a lack of maintenance throughout the whole building and the rooms. It s a pity,  because now I have the feeling it has become just a milking cow.  Won t stay there again
Rooms are well designed and equipped. Lovely TVs in each room & showers. But need maintenance and better cleaning.

The interior of this apartment was nice, which was the only positive. We almost did not get out of the car when we arrived at the apartment because the neighborhood was so seedy and uninviting to say the least. Barred windows and graffiti on the entirety of all buildings surrounding this place. There was a big metal door that we had extreme difficulty locking and unlocking. If we did not have two men with us, we would never have been able to get in and out. No response from the owner when we called about that.  Blue Ark offered to arrange a tour for us through Athens. A driver came to pick our group of 6 up at 8:30 AM as arranged. First  we picked up a woman introduced as our tour guide. We stopped for a few minutes for the changing of the guards at the Parliament building and then the driver took us to the foot of the Acropolis. There the tour guide said we had to go in on our own to get our tickets and then read the plaques as we walked through the Acropolis. She could not enter with us because she forgot her tour guide badge . We then proceeded to walk up the hill and stand on line in the heat for 35 minutes only to find out that entry to the Acropolis is time stamped. So instead of getting into the Acropolis at 9:30 the time that we were dropped off there, we had to call the driver back because our time of entry was not until 11:45 AM. These tickets could have been purchased online and any reputable tour guide would know that and also be aware that there are lines to get the tickets and entry times. When they returned to get us, we requested that we stop for a sandwich because now we were going to be out much longer than anticipated . This was scheduled to be a 4 hour tour and the cost for six of us was €290. By the time we sat in over an hour of traffic to get sandwiches  we had to eat them in the car so that we could get back to the acropolis for our entry at 11:45 a.m. That ended our “tour”.  The driver and tour guide refused to come back to pick us up after we went through the Acropolis on our own because the 4 hour tour time was going to expire at 12:30, before we were out of the Acropolis. We paid them €290 in cash and then had to pay €60 for two cabs back to the apartment. Both Blue Ark and the car service company Fidelis Executive Transfer adamantly refused to provide any compensation to our group for this One Way ride to the Acropolis.

From the moment we arrived, Akis made us feel at home.  The place was perfect for our party of six. Very relaxing after a day of travel and walking around Athena. It is rare to find a place that is exactly as advertised. The sauna is exquisite as are the esthetics.  It's in a good location just a few stops on the metro or bus and you are downtown near the Acropolis.
Comfortable

Excellent house! One of our best stays in Athens so far. Everything was perfect. An old mansion renovated! It is modern while maintaining the glamor and style of the mansion. Very large house, with comfortable spaces, careful decoration, many facilities and with excellent cleanliness. The sauna makes the difference!! Initially we had some hesitations about the area, but in the end it didn't create any insecurity issue for us. There is a private parking and a supermarket nearby.
The owner, particularly kind and hospitable, welcomed us in a very good mood and patiently provided us with all the information we needed.
We look forward to visiting again!

Just perfect.. The best stay ever. We will definitely prefer it on our next trip!!! The host was willing to help us with anything we needed. The house is huge and spotlessly clean.  Akis, until the next time!!!! Thanks for all..

Amazing place to stay!! Top quality and staff is amazing! Very good communication on WhatsApp.

Definitely coming back soon!! Our favourite stay in Athen!!

Up to standard accommodation. The jacuzzi is worth it after a day visiting Athens
Rooms are modern and spacious for a holiday.
Located near metro (350m), 3 supermarkets and a bakery next door for a fresh breakfast.

It is a fantastic apartment. In a wonderful, new building with access via a pre-sent code. The staff is very friendly, prompt, always ready to help. The house itself is located 350 meters from the metro, a maximum of 5 minutes walk and 5 stops to Monastiraki Square. It is really very charming with beautiful interior, modern design, large bright rooms, 2 balcony, equipped with everything you could need. There is also a gym in the building. With their help, we also booked transfers (one way by metro from the airport to the center costs 9 euros, and our transfer cost us 44 euros in total, which was absolutely acceptable for a group of 4 people).It is possible to leave luggage in lockers. I really recommend this apartment, you will not regret choosing it 🙂🙂❤️

Great apartment at a very reasonable price. Service was extremely fast and efficient.
The facilities are excellent too, especially the gym is better than in many hotels.
I would definitely come back here at any time.

Bad experience when we checked in on Friday evening (on a heat wave day) and found the master bedroom's Air-conditioning not working. No one was available to assist that evening and promised to have it fixed the next day. Next day I contacted them to have it repaired while we were out and came back to find the Air-conditioning still not fixed. Paying soo much to stay 2 nights without Air-conditioning!! Wouldn't recommend it if they don't know how to deal with emergency situations and resolve customer's complaints. Never again ;(
Brand new apartment with modern design, luxurious facilities providing a great view of Athens! Convinient spot and close to transportation means! Highly recommended!
Great stay! The apartment was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described. The location was perfect for exploring the area, and the host was responsive and helpful. Highly recommend!
Amazing experience10/10 amazing apartment, super clean ,stunning view, jacuzzi you feel like you are in the sky .. The host, it’s very helpful anytime we can’t wait to come back thank you!!
Very beautiful house! I really enjoyed the jacuzzi and the sauna. Plus the view was breathtaking!!!
I had a great time with my girlfriend in the jacuzzi watching the marvelous view from the balcony. Imagine to do the same!!!

Great apartment! Beautiful, clean and cozy. We stayed there a couple with two kids. The apartment is close to the metro, the transportation is very easy. Free parking is available on the street. Athens is a great place to travel in with kids.

This is a wonderful apartment just 2 minutes from the Metro station, 9 minutes ride to the ancient district, safe area day and nights, a large super-market at the adjacent building, coffees and restaurants all around, and the apartment itself - just paradise, not less !
Nice clean apartment, good facilities. Located in a good area within walking distance to many shops, restaurants and bars. Only 2 minutes walk to the metro and 10 minutes into city centre.

Wonderful apartment!

Location - just by the subway with many coffee shops nearby and supermarket as well.

Highly recommended!

Bit out of the centre of Athens, metro is about 10 minutes away, parking is possible next door (paid, leave your keys), rooms are  mixed bunch. We stayed here twice during our trip to Greece. The first room we had was reasonably modern, but don’t expect a view. There even was a window into the interior of the hotel. The second room was older, extremely noisy, not enough outlets, smelly and small bathroom. Hope for a renovated room.

We had a good time at the hotel! I dont know about the other rooms, but our room was modern and clean and we even had a balcony. The room service was very nice and cleaned every day. The breakfast is simple but good. We saw two different men who worked at the reception and both of them were very friendly and helped us every time we had a request :)
The breakfast was probably the worst thing about this hotel. Very little variety, and I got a raw egg once, so be careful. The overall experience was okay, but nothing more.

It's a great place if you are on a budget and super close to transit.  About 15 min bus to Plaka and Monastiraki. All rooms have terraces, which is nice and they are generally clean. The bathrooms could use a spruce up and they didn't have a safe in the room for our passports. You can see the Parthenon from the roof.

Good hotel in an area well connected to the center. It is not very close to the touristic heart of Athens, but there are busses and trolleys (super close to the hotel) that take around 15 minutes to Syntagma or around it, as well as 10 minutes walk to the metro connecting the area with the city center. Excellent service! Clean and quiet - with the exception of some cars noise in the night which was OK for us. Basic decent breakfast, but there are various shops and bakeries in the area to eventually supplement that, including a nice coffee shop across the street. The rooms are quite large, several have balconies, and are cleaned every day which is refreshing. The hotel has 24h staff, which is good. Has an elevator, and a small terrace on its rooftop on the 5th floor, which offers a lovely view over Athens.
Great

The apartment is in a great location - Kipseli is a charming district, close to everything. You can quickly reach the most important attractions, such as the Acropolis and Plaka, and there are plenty of shops, cafes and restaurants in the area.

The apartment was clean, stylishly decorated and fully equipped, which made me feel at home. An ideal place for both short and long stays. I really liked how the owner, Anna, took care of all the details and was extremely helpful at all times. Thanks to her, the stay was even more pleasant.

If you are planning a visit to Athens, I highly recommend Anna Apartments - great location, comfort and excellent service! I will definitely come back on my next visit to Greece.

My reservation was canceled les than 24 hours before arrival by the owner of this apartment and few minutes later I saw it in booking with higher price. I did screen shots and informed booking.
So if you don’t want to land in Athens and not have the place to stay I highly recommend to avoid this apartment.

Great location, first class hospitality and stunning, spacious Penthouse. Very nicely decorated. Spacious private Jacuzzi just next to the master-bedroom with breathtaking views of Athens. Many restaurant options nearby. Extremely safe place away from crowded, noisy and polluted areas. Exceeded expectations by far.

It is supposed to offer services to old people but it is worse than a prison. They did not allow me to stay longer than 20 minutes while visiting my grandmother there. Even in prisons there are yards, but there is nothing there.
Its very nice

The care of the elderly by the girls working there is superhuman because the staff is not enough. The owner and manageress are condescending with no good manners and no willingness to listen to your old man's problems. I wouldn't recommend a sane old man to go there and he is self catering there is no activity during the day. The worst of all is that due to a lack of staff and no involvement of the owner in the business, you cannot see your man on Saturday afternoon or all Sunday (which are the most reasonable hours for anyone who works) to have time. Also, the food is catering.
Apparently only for the elderly with dementia or the bedridden!

Unfortunately it has zero rating.
We entrusted my father with dementia and Parkinson's and limited mobility (he was walking with P before entering this miserable structure) to Iasis so that my mother could rest. In total he stayed there for 3 weeks. The 1st time we visited him he had wounds on his wrists and hands ankles from the binding and 1 pantyhose hanging (with this they bound him) from the wheelchair they brought him (which had no footrests),
After we made a fuss the next few times he had bandages so that the wound could not be seen.
On the last visit we went to see him, he had a fever of 38.4, which we understood was not noticed by any of the supposed nurses.
As a result, they told us that he was allowed to be hospitalized and they threw him to us.
My father was dead for 2.30 hours due to severe dehydration, he had one foot in the grave. They didn't even give him water. The owner of the Spatharis center doesn't even answer the phone or call back.
This structure must be closed.
It is inappropriate. I have an opinion from a public doctor about all this and of course videos and photos.
Result
My father passed away in November 4 months after staph and aspiration caused by lying down because he was constantly tied up. The worst part was that 4 months later he still had the scars on his legs and arms and he left with them.
Shame!!!

The manageress was always rude, she opened the door for us and didn't even say good evening.
To make an appointment it was always very difficult, he told us that they were booked. Whenever we went a little earlier or later there was no appointment, we didn't see anyone.
Also the owners were rude and uncooperative.
Luckily we moved our man to another structure and escaped.
Clean, basic room but everything I needed, with a great location for walking my course. Lots of places to eat near by and great connection to the airport via metro

Clean and tidy
Close to required amenities
It's a very nice budget friendly hotel that is within walking distance of a metro station. It also has guest parking although somewhat limited.

Thank you so much for your great services

I definitely recommend it either if it’s for short or long - term staying.

Located in the beginning of Attiki in the beautiful municipality of Haidari.

Easy access to Public transport, Buses, Metro, and a wonderful location near the town centre where you can find restaurants, bars, shops, e.t.c

Safe Parking with roof available if you have a car.

The owner and the staff are very kind, willing to help the visitors with their accommodation, and other little things that someone who is visiting for the first time that are non-hotel related.

5 stars from me

Friendly place, kind family business. Covered and secure parking. Close to main road, relatively quick access from highway. Good choice for car travellers

Simply the best! They do what they love with a smile and passion. Careful in every detail and with the most positive vibe! They make the best memories!
We look forward to the next outing!

The liveontop guys are fantastic! As for their equipment and organization, perfect! The experience will remain engraved on us! Our first time with a roof tent. You don't expect such convenience. In 5 minutes you are ready to lie down! We look forward to our next excursion.

I have accompanied the children on two trips so far and the experience was truly unique! If you don't experience it, you can't understand how beautiful it is. Nice vibes, beautiful scenery, lots of delicious food and good sleep.
As for Kostas & Tasos, I have only the best to say. I highly recommend them and will definitely use them again!

The experience at Live on Top was one of the most intense and special experiences of my life!  The excursion to Pauliani offered us a magical two days and it certainly won't be the last. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for something different!

The location is very convenient with easy access, private parking and discreet entrance.

The service is generally good. We were a little bummed that we had to order from outside - due to the kitchen being closed due to renovations - but ok.

The prices are good for the category and its facilities.

The experience room we got was very good. Big, neat, good sound insulation, offered for comfortable play.

Overall, it is a very well cared for situation that is worth the effort and money to experience.
"Perfect space, extremely decorated. Except he was so clean that in the bathroom my bottom popped on the glass of the dressing table."

Amateurism at its best, after contacting them by phone because no one responded to the e-mail contact, we proceeded to reserve a room after 8 hours they called me to tell me that the reservation is not valid because the room has been reserved for a week .... Your conclusions !!
The cleanest and most luxurious you can find in the city.. 💎
Comfortable and discreet parking, large luxury rooms spotlessly clean and bathrooms that would be the envy of even five-star hotels.

Very comfortable apartment... very clean... well done!!! it has everything inside a house where someone lives permanently... it deserves a full quiet area, I wish it was available for one more night... very economical.

Very nice for the price, extremely clean and overall very neat. New air conditioner and TV, with the necessary means. The only somewhat negative thing was the distance from the meter without means of transport. Otherwise very positive experience and very comfortable.
Close to the subway, clean, spacious

A very good location very close to the metro. There is a bus stop next to the house. Supermarket, bakery and butcher at 50 meters. Easy to find parking. The house is comfortable, spacious, beautifully decorated. Large TV with many channels, very good internet connection. It has an office for work. The hosts young guys cheerful, friendly with impeccable service.
Very nicely decorated and comfortable house! People are very welcoming and smiling!

I stayed for 5 days there and for the short time I stayed it was TOP!!!. The hosts are very good guys and hospitable. The best thing was that they cared about me and were willing to help me in whatever I was having trouble with. Just TOP!!!!
Beautifully decorated house, warm and friendly environment, kind and welcoming people, convenient location!
The place is excellent, the children are incredibly kind and the location is very convenient. We felt like at home.

This is a brand new hostel that has an industrial chic feel to it. The hostel is super clean, spotless. The staff are friendly and helpful. My room was very comfortable and the bathrooms were excellent. I would not hesitate to recommend Athens Hawks Urban to any traveler.
The location is 4-5 metro stops from the main tourist areas of Athens, which I prefer. The hostel is in easy walking distance of the metro. I felt perfectly safe in the neighborhood, Sepolia.

A great value for money hostel. Almost brand new. Very clean and tidy. Very good rates. A little distance to city centre but reasonably quiet at night time. Good standard of breakfast, coffee and bar. Comfortable beds with excellent shower room. If you want no-frills stay well recommended!!

we stayed 5 days. at a very good price.
the room was quite good. the hotel is new, clean, in a quiet and excellent location. just 4-5 minutes on foot from the metro stop. customers respect each other and the lobby looks like a library!
breakfast is also offered, which I would describe as basic with an excellent quality-price ratio.
the staff is simply amazing, kind and always willing to step in to help with any problem or provide any information.
low-cost parking is also available.
accessible to wheelchair users.

Had perfect 2 week stay! Clean room and facilities, friendly staff, fast wifi and a good kitchen, too.
It's not in the city center but in a calm area where you have everything you need with a metro station close by

Had to deal with bed bugs instead of enjoying my vacation, the hotel might look clean from the outside but  for the bed bugs, I had to buy spray and cream from the pharmacy and I couldn't sleep because my body was itching the whole night despite the uncomfortable pillow and mattress.
Also, locker, towels and laundry is not for free
I had to spend extra money to clean my "clean" clothes because of the bugs
And on pharmacy
Worst experience and I can't wait to check out and never come back.

Amazing location, near the port of Spetses!!
Absolutely satisfied with the prices and the facilities of the hotel!!
Very good with a clean pool and the important thing is the child who owns it is very helpful and willing
Brand new apartment with great hosts. Very clean and well equipped. Good access to train station and center of Athens.
Great experience! Convenient location near the center, brand new, spotlessly clean and the hosts are wonderful! I will definitely visit again. VFM

Beautiful apartment, comfortable and very clean.
Immaculately decorated and in a very good location.

Smooth, easy self check in with pass code given 2 days before arrival. Contemporary design, small kitchenette was excellent! filtered water dispenser and Nespresso machine. No elevator so you have to carry luggage through stairs if rooms are on the upper floors. Overall superb location, safe local neighbourhood. Downtown Athens is only a couple of stops from Attiki station nearby.

Our stay was amazing! The room was spacious for a two-guest stay, very clean and organized. It was modern and aesthetically pleasant, making our night even better. The best part was the extremely soft and comfortable queen size bed. I would recommend it to anyone looking a place to spend the night with their loved one.

The rooms and interior design was very stunning compared to how the outside looks. You can hear conversations from the other rooms. Took us a while to figure out the water heater situation since the last person that used the room left the switch on. It was cheap at least.
Good brand new hotel. Very cozy and bright) The service predict all my needs. The location is good and near underground station. Everything was comfortable and delight!

Very clean. Lots of room and light. LOVED the soap in the shower.
A bit of walking from the metrostation.

Everything was just great. The apartment was very comfortable, big, clean and near to the metro.
The apartment was fully equipped with everything you need for a short or even longer stay.
There is a grocery shop around the corner and also some restaurants.
Hosts were very friendly and helpful.
Lovely apartment, nice, clean and cozy. Totally recommend!! I really enjoyed the stay.

Absolutely Fantastic stay. Lovely apartment that was surprisingly quiet for so central a location. The owners went well above and beyond the call of hospitality,  I cant thank them enough. Well recommended!
We really enjoyed our stay at the apartment, it is very clean, nice and cozy. Totally recommend!

We needed the hotel for an emergency (by the way we were of family of 5) and they told 60 euros at first, but when we said we would take it, they increased the price of up to 81.5 euros.

Not just that, but the room was horrible, not clean and smelt like this weird smell. The air-condition didn't work because of how old it was, and the bathroom had previous paper towels of people's waste in the toilet bin.

One of my worst experiences in my life I wouldn't recommend it.

Good location as its very close to the metro station.
The rooms arent very clean. The bedsheets are either stained or have holes in them.
The toilet is small and not great either. Shower is very small and the curtain is very short which leads to the whole bathroom floor getting wet.
There is a lot of noise from outside if you keep your window open. Every night of our stay the trasb would get picked up and that was very loud.
The noise also comes from appartments in the neighbouring buildings.
From our room we faced an appartment where the people made noise untill very early in the am,music or loud talking.
However for us its was okay and we managed to get a good sleep and start rather fresh every day.

The staff is quite friendly  but really can't do much to the dilapidating place. The room was very stuffy
The showers are very small and one has to use a hand held shower head. I had a problem of ants all over the room. Though it is near the train station and bus station, the neighbourhood just gives of an unsafe vibe.
The little  bar fridge was a nice touch though. Only stay if really in a tight situation.

Really unfriendly staff. I could not understand what they where saying because their English was to bad. The girl at the enterance started screaming at me. Really unfriendly welcoming. Bad dirty rooms. Insane this hotel still exists. No breakfast like stated.

During my stay I was keen to sightseeing for a 3-day trip thus, I have chosen a cheap accommodation in the outskirts of Athens.

Pro: The Hotel totally met my expectations and the reviews all around the web. The location of the hotel is nice, very close to one of the metro stations (5 mins walk only). The room was clean & tidy, while the staff was helpful and all of them spoke well English.

Cons: I chose a room with bathroom facility: the bathroom is well equipped but extremely small, and the showering place is very little... The water always went out to the floor. The breakfast is okay, but there is not a wide range of variety of foods.

Very nice apartment and a very friendly host. For example, the host brings you clean towels if you need some. The apartment is clean and the nearest metro station (Victora) is a 5 minute walk, so the location is also pretty decent.

Better than sleeping out on the streets. But absolutly not recommendable because of different reasons. Loud and annoying traffic all the day (no sleeping). And not the safest part of Athens especially in the evening and night.
It's the best place to stay for a few days. Near downtown. Nice apartment and big. I strongly  recommend you.
Very comfortable place with a lot of benefits like air conditioning and good help if needed, also fully equipped
The apartment isn't bad, otherwise I would never come to Athens again, we were robbed on arrival, we're not the only ones apparently.... Bad experience..

The rooms you see are the single rooms in the hotel. That part seemed nice. We rented an apartment and it was really trash. It's a complexe apart from the hotel. Shower head has nothing to hold on to. Hole in the floor where the drain is. Bathroom door couldn't shut and handle was loose. Held by a small 1 inch lock with a hole in the door. Beds were extremely stiff. Exposed wires everywhere. Outlets hanging. Main entry door to the room is secure though. That's the only positive.
€150 x night, plus €7 for the breakfast (breakfast at home is much richer than that), not even an espresso available, only from the machine. The rooms are horrible. Never again!

Great price for what you get. Ariston reception staff were amazing and kind. Friendly and professional. Thanks also for the free bottle of water!

Only constructive feedback would be to please remove the metal object in the shower of room 36 as this cut me whilst showering.

Apart from that, amazing staff and a really good price for the service. Close to the metro also.

Thanks again.

Great Location & very clean and tidy. Would have been a fantastic hotel if only our night would have been nicer. Maybe we were just unlucky with our room, but the AC only worked while we were in the room. Thus when we arrived after a day out in Athens, the room was a cozy 27 Celsius, way too hot to sleep. Cooling it down proved challenging, however, as the AC was directly above the bed and projected its chilly wind of blizzard directly onto our bodies. This plus the noise from the roof top restaurant directly above us and the very hard bed that would have made any monk jealous, made it quite hard to sleep.

Very overpriced for what it was - small basic room, noisy from other guests, basic amenities, not in a great area. Redeeming features - room was very clean, small balcony was nice, and the staff were very kind and helpful.
Horrible apartment...
Excellent apartment. Excellent professional approach. Comfortable house
Very beautiful apartments

Only mins walk to the Larissa Train Station. Rooms are ok except there was persistent smell of cigarette. You can get hot water from the reception at the ground floor. And bonus: they allow you to leave your luggages for storage if you need to get away for a while.

The room was cheap. We payed €65 per night but even this felt too much for what we got. The only good thing about this place is that it’s close to the Athens Central Station.

The walls were paper thin. When I say paper I mean single ply see thru tissue paper. The mattress was the worst possible combination of a concrete slab and a cardboard box. The bathroom was useable but tiny and the provided shampoo and soap were astoundingly bad. The room, bathroom, and hotel infrastructure in general felt very dated.

The only good things I have to say is that the staff was friendly, our room was ready immediately, and the place was relatively clean.

Perhaps worst of all, was the rest of the clientele at the Hotel. We were awoken multiple times between 11:30pm and 1am by doors slamming. Not just closing forcefully, but ridiculously loud and hard slams. One after another after another. Then, at 5:45am, we were awoken by a shouting match between the two guests in the room above us. Obviously this aspect is out of the control of the hotel, but it’s something to keep in mind when considering the price of the room.

Good location, but the bathroom was beyond dirty, the air vents were closed shut with duct tape, later it turned out that there were cockroaches in the room. We asked to get changed into another, cockroach-free room, but that side not happen, we checked out after 2 nights and moved to a different hotel. There was no sorry, no assistance, no refund, nothing. We suspect the receptionists do not speak English, all our inquiries have been ignored. Avoid, if you can.

Extremely clean room. Clean bedsheets , clean towels, the balconies is a plus and bigger plus is the metro in 2 minutes and the huge supermarket opposite. The price also was very reasonable. But that's it. Don't expect something more than this

1. The rooms were very old and even had fungus in the bathrooms
2. We were charged 3 Euros per room per night as Tax (which in all other Hotels across Greece is 3 Euros)
3. There were cockroaches in the room
4. Locality was very deserted after 8PM

Overall for the prices being charged, other Hotels were far better.
Wonderful and stylish rooms to let with great atmosphere , mostly made by the owners. Good value for money. Highly recomended.
Location is ok, it's more like air BnB. It have kitchen and wash machine which is useful.
Its nice
Cool

Very close to the Attiki metro stop, about 10 minutes away, and 2 minutes away there is a large supermarket and many bars and bakeries, as well as a pharmacy right next to the gate. The apartment is comfortable, the building has an elevator and the rooms have air conditioning and a large space with a good built-in wardrobe and very comfortable beds. The kitchen is also very well equipped, there is even a washing machine and everything you need to hang clothes on the balcony. The only drawbacks are the mosquitoes and that the apartment does not have much power of light, you cannot use the washing machine and oven at the same time or it will break. Otherwise it is very good.

0 stars
We left our luggage here for 2 days and half our belongings were STOLEN!!!
Sketchy area and sketchy people around it. They said they “locked up” our suitcase and showed me where, so that only means staff was who rummaged through our suitcase and stole my belongings.
They stole my shoes, my hair brush, my clothes, my husbands clothes, our personal items, ALL of our Athens souvenirs. The list goes on and on. The property manager said the cameras do not show where the suitcase was stored and refused a refund through third party and never responded to my whats app request for one. I am disgusted and feel so violated by this. I would never stay here again or recommend some to. To think I’m extorting them for a free stay is insane. I want to warn others to beware.

Faisal was great from making sure we made it to giving tips on where to go and how to get there. The metro is like a 5 minute walk. And the blue line for hop on and off is 1.3 kilometers we walked in 18 minutes with no issues. I forgot to let them know I had rented a vehicle and Faisal message me every day if we could use the space or not since I didn't recerve in advance, but not to worry I was able to park at front safely I spend 4 days in Greece and when I come back I will definitely get back to Alekos to stay.

After initial misunderstanding as to the apartments we reserved and not being able to find our reservations, the host cleared things up with my sister and the owner and let us stay in some other apartments and then transferred us to the apartments we booked, the next day.

Clean apartments that come with a bottle of water in the fridge, a table and chairs, microwave, hot plates to cook, couch,TV, clean towels, and it's air conditioned. It's also in a quiet neighborhood which is good. They empty the trash cans almost every day. The host let us washed our clothes as well which was nice, since my husband didn't being enough clothes.

The reason I am ranking it the way it is, is because the metro is 10 to 20 minutes away, depending on the speed of your party members and not out front like some of the other hotels / apartments. Depending on the taxi person they might not want to come get you from these apartments. We also came during their Easter so when we arrived most everything was closed for two days so we ended up going to Plaka to get food so have no food recommendations
Receptionist very nice. Will advise you on something. Rooms on the 4th/5th/6th floor very large. Rooms below are smaller but also cool. I recommend this place to stay to everyone!
It is in a residential area but near the metro. It has an elevator. The beds are firm but I prefer firm beds especially when traveling. Market and restaurants are within walking distance.

I really enjoyed my stay at Petaluda, it was just right for me. Izabella and Manolis are lovely people and great hosts who gave all directions for arriving, it's around a 15 minute walk from Victoria station. For the budget price you're paying, it's perfect. The place is cosy, charming and clean with access to a shared kitchen and bathroom that were always very clean, I only ran into some guests once with a friendly hello but besides that you have your privacy. The room is totally fine and spacious, and I had my own private balcony with a view over the rooftops and streets. Bed was comfy enough for me!

There are people in other reviews complaining about the area being "dangerous" but I didn't feel this, Athens has it's gritty charm many places and I like that, the local people are fine and friendly but I guess some people are frightened by a little graffiti and diverse communities... Go pay €150 per night in Monistraki if that's a problem for you.

Manolis and Izabella also kindly let me check out an hour later and I really appreciated that, when I need to I'll stay again for sure! Thanks. See you again

This is a great hostel for travellers with small budget.  The hosts are very friendly and kind natured and willing to accommodate requests within their capacity. They don’t stay on premises, but if you call them, they will be happy to come to the place and open the front door when you first arrive to check-in.
The property itself is clean and quiet, with 2 common bathrooms and a kitchen for 5 guest rooms in total.

The street facing rooms may sometimes have traffic noise.

The owner was super lovely and made us feel very welcome. The bathrooms are shared, but there are two bathrooms for the four rooms here, so you won't have to share woth with many people. The bathrooms were also really nice and clean, and so were the rooms. Air conditioning worked well, beds were comfortable and we really enjoyed our stay.

I had such a positive experience at Iza's place. I turned up at dinner time with the wrong booking dates. Iza quickly whipped up a room ready for me last minute and managed to secure me the room for the 4 nights I originally needed, in the middle of busy summer! Talk about looking after you. She was so caring and made sure I was relaxed and comfortable. I felt like I was being welcomed by family to clean and comfortable home. I cried from the gratitude I felt!
To the other comments about the area - I am a solo female traveller and walked around late at night with no issue. There are amazing businesses right downstairs and all around owned by wonderful people. There were families playing football in the park late at night to give you a sense of the area.
Thank you so much Iza! I will be back in the future :)

Loved it! Room was spacious (had a nice, quiet balcony) and the entire place was pristine. Pretty good breakfast, there’s a shared kitchen where I could keep my food in the fridge. Great value for money!

Athens Hive is a fantastic hotel! The rooms are spotless, spacious, and very comfortable. The staff is incredibly friendly and helpful, always ready to assist with anything you need. The location is ideal, close to major attractions and public transportation. I will definitely choose it again for my next visit to Athens!

Building is new and clean, rooms are spacious and cosy. It takes just 8 minutes to reach the Attiki metro station that provides direct connections with the most important places such as Monastiraki Square, Syntagma Square or Pireus Port. In the room you will find well equipped kitchen (basic dishes, toster, kettle, fridge, cooker), bathroom (towels, shampoo, conditioner, shower gel, toilet paper and even hair dryer included) and bedroom with a TV, wardrobe and air conditioning (that saves your life during the summer). The whole building is surprisingly quiet. The host is really lovely, she left a welcome gift in the room (cakes, water and juice), she quickly responses for the messages and is always willing to help, don't forget to ask her about restaurant recommendations :)

everything was very good.  apartment clean and exactly like in the photos.  additionally, a welcome cookie, water, coffee, tea and sugar in the apartment were a very nice surprise.  we spent a very nice time in the apartment.  Thank you very much and we wholeheartedly recommend it.  location close to the subway, bus stops.  a supermarket next door.  great pubs in the area.  host very polite and helpfull helpful.

New apartment type hotel. Lovely staff and generally not bad for its price but the cooking facilities are quite limited (no chopping boards, knife, microwave etc) and also the whole place gets really cold (there’s an air con in the bedroom but) and shower often has no hot water.....and there’s no lift so it could difficult if you have walking issues or heavy luggage
The best place for renting
Great and spacious apartment in a great location. It has everything you need in a quiet neighborhood. The host is wonderful, he explained everything to us and was there for all our questions.

My family and I had a great stay at this apartment. It was  and equpped with everything we needed. The host was very accommodating and quick to respond to any questions we had. We would definitely stay here again!

Booked this apartment online and the listing states free parking,not true.When I told the owner by email that I could not stay there because I had a rental car I had to park and there were tow away  signs, he sent me an automated email with paid garage instructions and areas in Athens to avoid.Also the area it is in is not the safest looking,people on drugs walking around and such.Then after I contacted my bank the owner called me directly by phone and asked me to get the money back I just disputed because he had bills to pay.
This is an update on this "host" through booking.com,this individual decided he did not like the review I left so decided to slander me on the response,Do Not Book Anything from this person,I won't name names but he has another listing on another booking site.Google has been notified of the harassing behavior.
Comfortable, clean and bright apartment, located next to the metro and train station, with central attractions within walking distance.

Ugly, dirty place.
1. Cockroaches (karaluchy!!!) - if you never leaves at slums it's a good place.
2. Air condition don't work (It was very old making biger noise than cold and installed only in bedroom). At living room was two dirty fans.
3. Kitchen was dirty and has only one spoon.
4. Owner makes many rules wich was send before camig eg. disable hot water because electrisity was broken.
5. Entrance to the building stick and is totally broken.
6. We ask owner to cancel rent after one night because we disgusted cockroaches (karaluchy) but he say apartment is ok and payment policy ... then I say then I write all at comment.

All disadwantages was at other opinion.
Only nice photos! Congratulations to photographer. God job.

The Penthouse is excellent and has everything for a nice stay in Athens. It's well located, close to the Acropolis and near the metro and subway station. It was only missing a microwave but other than that, the place was excellent and strongly recommended for couples or groups of 4. Sotiris, the manager is a great person as well and always helpful
Great view

Good value for money
It could be more careful and entertaining
The location is a little outside the tourist area.

Lovely lovely!!! Employees were so kind and helpful, the hotel is just two stops away from the center so it's less pricey and quieter but not too far at all. The room itself is sweet and I had a nice balcony to sit on and get some fresh air. Very happy with my stay here! :)
The staff was really kind and helpful, the neighbourhood is silent and easily accessible by metro.

The room is very comfortable with excellent water pressure and plenty of hot water.  It would appear that they have just done a remodeling.
I had to check in late, and the desk was very professional and understanding.  He was also helpful in pointing out places of interest in Athens.  The location is on a quiet street and off the beaten path.  I stayed here 4 nights and will would return.

Very clean and nice rooms.
No elevator. Very quiet place.
All the staff of the hotel are very kind and thay give you hot and friendly feelings.
It is very near to the underground train that goes directly to the airport and the city center.

Good service,its close from train station
and all Market,im thankeful 🙏✅

The staff is helpful and friendly. The apartment itself is not bad, even if it lacks the right details that can make the difference. It is penalized by the condominium (which needs a good refresh), and by the area, which is noisy both from the outside and from the adjacent apartments

Very nice apartment.
Equipped and clean.
The area is a bit ugly.
Far from the center and full of hostile people.
The apartment is very sweet
Luck, luck
Very simple apartment, but has all of the basics and the owner is lovely and attentive! Only a very short walk from 2 metro stations making is really accessible
Brother NONO

If you are considering this hotel and have children with you, read this first.

We needed a hotel at a reasonable distance from the airport because we had a long journey ahead of us with our children. So we decided while driving to book a room at this hotel. We needed to sleep 6 hours before we had to leave again.

We arrived at the location late at night and there were people in the streets giving us nasty looks as we tried to find a parking spot. Once we found a place to park, we felt unsafe in the area. The first thing that happens is that a man comes up to my wife and says something in his language while licking his mouth.

When we arrived at the entrance, which is the most beautiful part of the entire hotel, we were greeted by a very pleasant receptionist.

He said that the area is not safe at night. We were given the room key and a control for the air conditioning (which didn't work at first), and were sent up into the world's smallest elevator.

The first thing that greeted us at the room door was the door lock/door handle hanging loosely from the door.

The room had decent beds, but the rest felt very indelicate. The room smelled of sewage, it was extremely worn all over and the bathroom had a cockroach jumping around in the shower.

We heard a lot of noise from other guests. it took time before we were able to sleep and we got maybe 3-4 hours of sleep. We just wanted out and away from this place.

We also parked in the middle of a market that set up on the corner, which locked us in for the morning. Fortunately, there was a nice fellow who helped us out.

There was an incredible amount of queues at 7 o'clock and it took us almost an hour and a half to get to the airport.

We had a stressful and horrible experience.

The first day I arrived, the cleaners did not leave clean towels (see pics), did not thoroughly clean the basin, there is a drain that smells like sewage and there is a chair on the balcony that shouldn't be there-especially if you are checking in with a child. The waters are turned without notice and water pressure in the shower is not always great. This was reported to Reception and the drains were slightly fixed but the smell is worse in the evening (I had to cover the drain and burn incense sticks in the bathroom and leave the balcony door open). Until the third day, the cleaners stopped cleaning my room until check-out. I decided not to report it just in case they are prejudice and contaminate my products in my room so I left it but I complained about the water pressure. Receptionist are ok. I booked this hotel so I walk to my daughter's family home and put my head down. If you want to put your head down, maybe it's OK. But if want full hospitality, this is not the place. If you want a drink, they offer a bottle of water for €1 and no extras. Please think what you want from your travels before booking here. The good thing about the hotel, you have many shops and restaurants plus access to transportation.

The hotel is quite simple and modest, it’s ok to stay for a couple of days.
The staff is very friendly and helpful,the speak English well:)
I (a young woman) was in Greece all alone and my luggage was lost, so the staff helped me to call the airport and find out all the information, they calmed me down and my bags arrived just in time directly to the hotel!
So if you are reading this, a huge THANK YOU one more time !❤️

Julia from Moscow
September 2023

This hotel is one of the bad one After taking online payments from us and going to the hotel, the money was charged again. They said that they would provide water for drinking, but when we asked for water, they told us drink water from the bathroom.

The staff were pleasant but the rooms were in a sad state. The area, once part of the great metropolis now is an area you shouldn't walk at night. Also, though I made the reservation through an app and it showed as paid, when I arrived there was no reservation and I had to pay extra
My wife in shock after blocked her room and no elecrtricity in this apt.

Don’t take this appartement if you don’t want to come infront of the building and stay there waiting with no body answering during 2h !!!

The guy reply me when we arrive at the harbor, I’d told him that we’ll arrive in 30min.. we spoke about the appartement .. he even ask me the adresse of which appartement he wasn’t sur about it !

But then .. when we arrive there no body answering any more !! Waiting there at the door building tired after long trip ! We go somewhere else ..

Comfortable apartments to accommodate seven with children or a group of up to 6 people. Quiet and cozy place. 100 m to the Agios Nikolos metro station, which allows you to be in the historical center of Athens in 10-15 minutes.
Horrible ,when I went to the camp the food wasn't good

Everything was just great. The apartment was very comfortable, big, clean and near to the metro.
The apartment was fully equipped with everything you need for a short or even longer stay.
There is a grocery shop around the corner and also some restaurants.
Hosts were very friendly and helpful.

Smooth, easy self check in with pass code given 2 days before arrival. Contemporary design, small kitchenette was excellent! filtered water dispenser and Nespresso machine. No elevator so you have to carry luggage through stairs if rooms are on the upper floors. Overall superb location, safe local neighbourhood. Downtown Athens is only a couple of stops from Attiki station nearby.

Our stay was amazing! The room was spacious for a two-guest stay, very clean and organized. It was modern and aesthetically pleasant, making our night even better. The best part was the extremely soft and comfortable queen size bed. I would recommend it to anyone looking a place to spend the night with their loved one.

The rooms and interior design was very stunning compared to how the outside looks. You can hear conversations from the other rooms. Took us a while to figure out the water heater situation since the last person that used the room left the switch on. It was cheap at least.
Good brand new hotel. Very cozy and bright) The service predict all my needs. The location is good and near underground station. Everything was comfortable and delight!

Very clean. Lots of room and light. LOVED the soap in the shower.
A bit of walking from the metrostation.
Nice clean rooms and lot's of space
Truly professional and most helpful
Recommendation!

We visited in 2018, everything was perfect, the metro was under the windows, the air conditioning was turned on before going outside so that the apartment would be cool later, I advise you, I think we will come here again! Good memories

Unfortunately, we can't recommend it at all. It's an aging building that has already been marked "access prohibited" on the outside by the building authorities. Handing over the keys was very stressful. At 6 p.m. I informed Homm that when we arrived at the apartment (website hidden by Airbnb) someone would bring the key over straight away, was the answer. 30 minutes later I wrote to Homm again because there was still no one there. ... The colleague would park and be there in 2 minutes, the answer. Almost 20 minutes later a young man came with the key. We waited for the key for almost an hour in 30 degree weather, in the outside entrance of the building that was marked with ribbons by the building authorities. We booked the Breathtaking Seaview homm Studio in the building from (Phone number hidden by Airbnb) to (Phone number hidden by Airbnb), we only stayed 1 night. Apartment in great need of renovation. Very loud from outside at night (motorcycles, screaming people...) and in the apartment we unplugged the refrigerator at night because it ran like a tractor. At sunrise the apartment is flooded with light because the blinds are missing or broken. Relaxation -0. The bathroom was small, really very small (my husband, 1.83 tall and 80kg, barely fit in the shower cubicle. I wrote to Homm directly in the morning and informed them that we couldn't stay there and had booked somewhere else. With the request that they I was only supposed to charge me for one night and transfer the money back for the remaining nights. I paid (Phone number hidden by Airbnb) € for this accommodation and got NOTHING back. Because the communication between Homm and me was very difficult and that was also the case If I didn't answer at all, I tried Airbnb support but unfortunately without success. The apartment is described as.... Stunning Homm studio with sea views in Glyfada. I... I would describe the apartment as very uncomfortable and stressful The host Homm is a tourist rip-off and dubious. The only thing that is true and really very nice is the view with a sea view

After missing a flight I needed a simple overnight in Athens and this fit the bill.

Hotel : 2* hotel where people smoke - and you can smell it everywhere, so one star off for that

Room: totally reasonable for the price. Small room facing the inner courtyard. Last room left that night. Room decorated with mirrors to make it seem less cramped. Aircon worked well but I ended up going with an open window to help air out the cigarette smell

Service:  I called from the airport, the English-speaking receptionist held the room for me. Reception open 24 hrs/day. Extremely friendly and helpful staff that night and next day.

Location: perfect for my needs. 10 min walk from Athens Central Station, Direct train to/from airport, a lot more comfortable than the metro.  It is a slightly sketchy district where you just need to pay attention a nd have your wits about you.

I had an excellent stay at the Athens Lydia Hotel. The staff were welcoming and helpful, the location near Attiki Metro Station was perfect for exploring Athens, and major attractions were easily accessible. My room was clean, comfortable, and well-equipped, with great soundproofing for a peaceful stay. Overall, superb service, a convenient location, and cozy accommodations made my stay very enjoyable. Highly recommended!

Not the most comfortable bed.  Old building.  Staff are very friendly and work hard to keep the place clean.  Not really a nice area but 3-5 min walk to a metro stop for green and red lines.  Food places to eat nearby.  Pretty good bakery next to the metro stop Aitiki.  Several bus stops nearby. No parking.  24 hour front desk.  When looking for the right place at the right price within walking distance of a metro line and not extremely far from downtown... it was a decent balance.  Maybe a little overpriced - but not bad.  Depends what you are looking for.  The naked lady paintings on the walls are a litttle odd but it's Europe.  I believe all the rooms are smoking but it's minimal smell inside the room I stayed in. A/C works well.

Everything you need when transiting. One draw back is the rooms are smoking, so the smell and the thick air through the walls and furniture really made the air unpleasant. Especially through the night. Best service and safe with 24-hour service. Not sure about showering as there were no curtains or doors, so I did a sponge bath. One or two Inevitable cockroaches

I stayed at the Lydia in May 2022. It's a simple and basic hotel which is clean, safe and has the things you need. Staff are friendly, attentive and helpful. Your belongings are safe in their rooms. The hotel is literally only minutes walk away from the Attiki metro and gives access to the Greater Athens Area. You can see the Acropolis at night from your balcony if you are on the top floor.  Its is also very affordable and has many amenities nearby. I will definitely stay there again.
AC, clean room, bottle of water with every stay over cleaning. 3’ from metro. Amazing host.

Spent a few days here and everything was awesome. Very good located (Atiki metro station is nearby) and well equipped, tidy  apartman. Our host Faisal was a very friendly gentleman. Surely recommending this place to stay in!
Will be perfect if there's a lift, as people with leg problems will find this apartment inconvenient because of its steps & staircase.

Really good location, super clean, quick to respond to queries, very accomodating. In high season it is a bit noisy, due to bikes outside so maybe bring ear plugs, so took off o w star only because of the noise, otherwise, could not fault ur. As apartment was spacious and comfortable. Clean, safe and convenient. I would definitely recommend. And relatively close to the centre. We enjoyed staying there.

It was unbelievably noisy, just below the window there was a busy street and people on motorbikes kept me up all night. And also, most of the time there is no one at the reception, if you need any help you are on your own. Another reason for the bad experience is that we were charged more than they initially said, but we realized too late to solve it. The one star i gave is for the cleanliness of the apartment, that is good.

Great apartment! More beautiful than in the photos. Renovated with the best materials. With small touches of love throughout the place, for example cotton swabs, pepperoni, olive oil, fruit and a welcome drink. Very close to the electric, it has parking spaces on the street. And Mrs. Vasia very kind, willing and a person as bright as her home. He waited patiently for us to check in, and gave us extra time to check out.
Brand new apartment with great hosts. Very clean and well equipped. Good access to train station and center of Athens.
Great experience! Convenient location near the center, brand new, spotlessly clean and the hosts are wonderful! I will definitely visit again. VFM

Beautiful apartment, comfortable and very clean.
Immaculately decorated and in a very good location.

A really comfortable and convenient apartment, for short-term and long-term stays.
Very well equipped, clean and tidy.
Our communication with the host was easy and prompt.
The location is central and convenient, close to markets and very well connected to all public transport.
I stayed there with my family (5 people) for a week and we all felt like we were staying in our own home.
We will definitely come again.
Best place ever. Very beautiful apartament,very clean,everything you need,and the best host ! Close to everything. We will come back here 100%.

Excellent location near two metro stations and with the train from the airport with x93 we arrived comfortably!!!!
Fully equipped apartment...we loved the big balcony with the barbecue.
We stayed happily 4 people. Excellent service
It's been a year that I stayed for a month with my family (ages 3.5 and 1 year). Everything perfect, we only had our clothes and everything else was there.

Immaculate apartment very well equipped close to the red and green metro and train lines, we stayed as a family of 6 people, safe area, I highly recommend it, we loved the large
terrace with barbecue

The location is on a super busy street and it’s very noisy, even with closed windows. We booked this for three people but it was only appropriate for two people. Even though there was a foldable singe couch in the living rooom, it was very uncomfortable.

The good: New apartment, good facilities and quite clean. There’s everything you need, full kitchen, washing machine, lift, balcony, air-con and heating. I’ve had good experience with the communication too - you can contact them using WhatsApp. Check in is simple too, just contact them and get the password for key locker. 15 minutes walk to the centre, and a supermarket nearby.
The bad: The location is on a busy road, so lots of traffic noise day and night. Also the neighbourhood is not the best(although very convenient), but I suspect most areas inside the city are similar.
Summary: It’s a good place if you stay on a higher floor (4th or 5th) or not facing the road, then the noise issue will be much better. Also it’s an apartment not a hotel, so everything is self-service.

Love the apartment, the location, great communication.   If you stay here chk out the mini mart 4 doors down.  Say hi to Rhona, wonderful helpful lady.  Elizabeth told us about it could not have been better.

This was the woese hostel I have ever booked, very disappointing.
I've stayed 6 weeks and they do not provide any cleaning services at all ( no cleaning sheets , toilet paper, towels for kitchen etc.) I didn't knew that. I gave a single star cause otherwise don't won't let me post my review but don't worth not even this one. Shame !!!!😡

The WYZ is great accommodation, maybe the location is a little not so luxurious, but inside everything is fine, instructions was so easy to get into entrance with code , then there is a locker for the main key.
Inside it is clean and Cousy, there is washing machine, espresso, LED TV, AC, dishes, hot water, refrigerator, couch, chairs, big closet, the only missing thing is microwave, but I guess they won’t mind to bring it if I asked.
Even the metro station is about 3-5 minutes walking away.

Very pleased with WYZ Aprathotel
No AC unit! don't come here during the summer

Unfortunately it was not a good experience....the owner was renovating the apartment and there were more negative points,
1) we were not alone as we should have been but there were people sleeping inside the apartment and consequently we could not use either the kitchen or the small garden.
2) only one bathroom in poor condition also used by the workers
3) fridge full of food that wasn't ours and therefore we couldn't use it
4) while we were there at 5pm the owner went into the garden with other people to have an aperitif
6) upon returning in the evening around 1:00 am we found a person eating in the kitchen regardless of our presence and we were forced not to use a service we paid for
5) the newly painted rooms with a strong smell of paint and lockable shutter
broken... so we had to sleep with the smell and without recycling air due to the acrid smell.
We knew we were in an apartment with
privacy but in reality it was a ridiculous situation and the lady didn't even inform us of the presence of people in the house and of only 1 bathroom
And paid €135 for one night via booking.
The location is good and the cleanliness is good
Super

Stayed at this Apartment for 3 nights. Very well designed and furnished . Manos was especially caring and responsive. Helped in many ways to make our visit memorable. Had so many cafes , bakeries and supermarkets in walking distance .
We stayed here for four nights, and would thoroughly recommend H Experience to anyone looking to stay in Athens

Whether in Greece for business or vacation, The H Experience is one of the best concepts to turn to for your stay. I’ve tried a handful of their apartments and look forward to checking out the rest. Super clean, super design, super service. I highly recommend!

This is an amazing apartment; we stayed for a month.  It is very nicely decorated and very clean.  The beds are extremely comfortable, and the walk-in shower is amazing! The property only consists of two apartments; and we had the entire top floor to ourselves. The owner and staff were very responsive and provided clean linens weekly.  It is a convenient walk to the metro as well as private, 24-hour guarded parking that is included.  The only downside is the property sits directly next to the metro line.  It is loud if this bothers you.

A great place to stay in Athens.. beautifully furnished for a very comfortable stay.. a short walk to the metro station and couple of stops to all major attractions..
The attention to details and the hospitality  of the host is incredible and the readiness to ask any questions we had.
Thank you Evi for everything and hope to see you soon again
Excellent experience and great people and atmosphere. Mrs Anna Fonsou and the rest of the talented actors were so nice and very welcoming! Thank you so much!
Warm and smiley people, cared environment and theatre history to discover 🥰🥰
Poor actors are well treated there
Gd
Great place and great people. Great work by Mrs. Anna Fonsou. Well done!

My wife and I have stayed at the Athens Hotel Iris twice. Once in 2022 and now in 2024 at the start of our honeymoon journey in Greece. I only have great things to say about this establishment. It has a family owned feel to it, both times the staff seemed to care about our stay. Clean rooms, air conditioned, breakfast is traditional. I definitely suggest this to anyone who is planning to stay in the Athens area either overnight or for a few days.

The first time we visited, we were close to many touristic views within walking or short cab ride distance which made it easy and fun to plan.

The second time we used the hotel as a night layover for a different flight. The taxis in Athens coincidentally had a strike the morning that we wanted to return to the airport (30minutes away drive from the hotel). The staff were very accommodating and provided us a shuttle service. The driver told us, “I will get you there no matter what”.

Excellent choice and when we visit Athens again we will be back.

This hotel is very close to Larissa Metro Station & Athens Centrail Railway station. Area sidewalks are very narrow but the walk is minimal. The hotel itself looks newer than the surrounding buildings. It is tastefully decorated inside and out and is also kept very clean. The elevator is very functional but small and has a push- door. The only down side I found during my stay was the wifi - it had good speed but kept dropping and requiring a reconnection.

Service is where this hotel really shines. It's reception was courteous and  knowledgeable about Athens. They were always willing to assist and were very pleasant to deal with.
Very welcoming place. Many thanks to Julia at the reception who gave me tips to make most of my visit in Athens!
The room was adequate for what you paid. The close location to the rail and metro was why I stayed here. The staff were helpful and friendly

The rooms and bathrooms by U.S standards are very small, but functional and clean. The website states the rooms are soundproofed but I could hear everything going on outside at all hours. We stayed for one night after being up for over 4o hours of travel so I would probably find somewhere quieter if you are really tired. The continental breakfast lacked as well. I would stay here again though if I was well rested. Very polite and friendly staff.
Great rooms for affordable prices, with a lovely cafe right underneath
Examining choice. Very good service from the owner

The accommodation is recommended for a city trip for people who don't necessarily want to live in the center but in a typical neighborhood of Athens. Good facilities, short distances to public transport and the location on a traffic-calmed street are a big plus. Athens is a noisy city and you can still hear it in your accommodation, but you quickly get used to it. We are always safe
felt and the communication with the host was great.

And already the second time I go to this apartment with Airbnb, my son has always booked it for me! It is a very nice, spacious and clean apartment... the first time it was impeccable in terms of cleanliness and nothing was missing such as supplies, napkins, toilet paper, hairdryer, etc., while this time we went, the cleanliness and supplies left a little 'to be desired
The apartment has everything you need to spend a few days in Athens. The location is a bit bad, quite far from the center and little feeling of security at night.
Beautiful apartment, spacious, dark and climbing stairs
Kaya S

Thanks for making our stay better! Very beautiful and warm apartment and impeccable cleanliness. Very convenient location for access to the center of Athens, as it is next to the electric station. We will definitely prefer you again!
Excellent choice!!! Thank you....A house close to everything with all amenities and spotlessly clean. I don't think anyone would want anything more on their vacation.

Well done! Thank you for everything... Only good words about our stay... First of all, spotlessly clean apartment in a great location very close to everything. But above all I want to mention your flexibility in checking out without any charge, extremely rare since we travel often. Definitely our first choice when we visit Athens again👏👏👏

This is a brand new hostel that has an industrial chic feel to it. The hostel is super clean, spotless. The staff are friendly and helpful. My room was very comfortable and the bathrooms were excellent. I would not hesitate to recommend Athens Hawks Urban to any traveler.
The location is 4-5 metro stops from the main tourist areas of Athens, which I prefer. The hostel is in easy walking distance of the metro. I felt perfectly safe in the neighborhood, Sepolia.

A great value for money hostel. Almost brand new. Very clean and tidy. Very good rates. A little distance to city centre but reasonably quiet at night time. Good standard of breakfast, coffee and bar. Comfortable beds with excellent shower room. If you want no-frills stay well recommended!!

we stayed 5 days. at a very good price.
the room was quite good. the hotel is new, clean, in a quiet and excellent location. just 4-5 minutes on foot from the metro stop. customers respect each other and the lobby looks like a library!
breakfast is also offered, which I would describe as basic with an excellent quality-price ratio.
the staff is simply amazing, kind and always willing to step in to help with any problem or provide any information.
low-cost parking is also available.
accessible to wheelchair users.

Had perfect 2 week stay! Clean room and facilities, friendly staff, fast wifi and a good kitchen, too.
It's not in the city center but in a calm area where you have everything you need with a metro station close by

Had to deal with bed bugs instead of enjoying my vacation, the hotel might look clean from the outside but  for the bed bugs, I had to buy spray and cream from the pharmacy and I couldn't sleep because my body was itching the whole night despite the uncomfortable pillow and mattress.
Also, locker, towels and laundry is not for free
I had to spend extra money to clean my "clean" clothes because of the bugs
And on pharmacy
Worst experience and I can't wait to check out and never come back.
Nice decoration, comfortable, air conditioning and convenient kitchen, close to Larissa station.

Magnificent apartment with modern renovation! There is everything you need for life, down to the smallest detail, even a first aid kit. All household appliances are new. There is an elevator. Everything is very clean. Quiet, calm area. Very convenient location. The price is reasonable. Thanks to the owner for the nice bonuses!

Very kind and helpful hosts, it is perfect for 2 people. I would totally suggest it to anyone who want to explore Athens. It is in a small walking distance from metro station and Athens center. Can't wait to go back!
Very nice design with attention to detail. Cosy and really practical near the city center and commute. Hosts extremely helpful!
The apartment is excellent! Spotlessly clean, fully equipped and right in the center of Athens! Great people and very kind! I highly recommend it!!!
Very nice and clean apartment! In a good location! I highly recommend it!
The people are scammers the room was dirty wretched let alone hot water towels dirty… Broken shutters and windows…

Wonderful!!!
Very clean rooms with everything you need!!
The cleaning lady very good and kind helped us with everything we needed.
The hotel is very nice, the rooms are spotlessly clean and the cleaning lady is very kind and perfect in everything!

Awesome apartment. Super clean, spacious, comfortable and modern. AC in perfect conditions.
Good location, easy to enter. With a huge balcony to chill.
The bed was also really good.
Well taken care by the host.
You can work, rest, and enjoy.
I am coming back for sure to this place.

We preferred the apartments to host a group of foreign partners for a seminar that our company held in Athens.
The rooms were excellent, the service perfect, our guests were completely satisfied!
Thank you very much for everything. We will definitely prefer these rooms again!
Very close to the metro .. very good hospitality, clean space, everything in the apartment was perfect, we will definitely prefer it again!
Very beautiful and comfortable accommodation in an excellent location and very close to the meter. I highly recommend it

I was very pleased with the accommodation.!!
Thanks to the host who was very helpful and kind to us .👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻

Walking in, it's great. Looks spacious and has potential. You have dreams and you have hopes. Then, your world crumbles to the dark abyss.
Too many things are broken or missing.
The light bulbs are nonexistent, something in the bathroom is dripping and there are no plates, forks, spoons, knifes or forks.
Promises were made. They have not been kept (eg missing TV).
The photos are very misleading and we are very disappointed. Our hearts have been crushed into pieces, just like the ceiling will be like in a couple of hours.
Also, the light switch for one bedroom is located in a different bedroom, which is just ridiculous.
The only good thing about the appartement is the big living room/kitchen (since it is empty) because you can have all the dance battles you want.

Do not rent here. This place is not worth €300 for 4 nights.

The pictures look nothing like the place. The apartment is a mess. Everything is either broken or missing. Also there is a lack of privacy since there are no curtains. We have no cutlery and the fridge isn't working either.

We had such an amazing stay here! The apartment is huge (THREE BEDROOMS) with very nice interiors, new modern furniture, state of the art home appliances and sunny. Located in a quiet street, we enjoyed our morning coffee at the terrace that offers a lovely view. Very clean spaces, comfortable beds, tvs with Netflix app and good air-conditioning. The price was a steal! Definitely VALUE FOR MONEY!!! We will visit again for sure!!

Very big, so close to the metro in very good location that had everything around, big super market, restaurants, small shops! Very easy check in procedures, very nice communication with the host that was very kind and helpfull! This big apartment in so cheap price that they offer you everything was super good and ill choose it in the future again!
Very close to the metro and huge super market with 24/7 shops around! Its very big with amazing view at Acropolis! Next time i will book again for sure! Staff very kind

Excellent customer service. This hotel has the most amazing staff ever. They deal with any issues you may have swiftly, always with a smile and genuine concern for you. I really would like the reception staff, the breakfast staff and the rooftop staff to be congratulated for their professionalism. The rooms are comfortable and the bathrooms are massive. The only negative is the bed which is two small beds pushed together like in most hotels in Europe. I am a big guy so I would always end up in between the two beds :-(  The breakfast was really good and varied. Lots of choices! Location is perfect.

Went there on my birthday and the front staff has upgraded me to a premium room (park view) with free breakfast. The pool, restaurant are great and you are free to use the gym and sauna after checkout. I would say this is definitely a highlight or my birthday trip and the staff was really friendly - also the apple pie in the restaurant was so good!

We loved our stay here, everything was perfect! The rooms are super clean and nice, the hotel is gorgeous, the location fantastic, the rooftop bar amazing, the breakfast is a nice buffet, and the staff is wonderful! Everyone we interacted with was so pleasant! I actually have family in Athens so, whenever I'm back, I'll be staying at this hotel for sure! Everything was lovely!

A good hotel with a beautiful outside rooftop.

The staff is superb, polite and with a sense of humor.

Rooftop restaurant had some nice finger foods and snacks.

The hotel itself is showing its age, though. One of the elevators is not working. The AC in the room is very noisy. The decor in the room is kind of dark and outdated.

Linens and towels were clean.
Good coffee and tea selection.
Great view from our room.

Might not be worth the price for some as it is expensive.

Overall, not a bad hotel but also has areas to be improved.

Nice hotel, very helpful staff and good location opposite the Park.  Had a superior room with a view of the acropolis from the large balcony.  Unfortunately let down by the south facing balcony which was exposed to the sun all day and way too hot to use.  No umbrellas or awnings or any shade whatsoever.  The couch exposed to the sun was severely damaged.  Wouldn't stay in this room again.

The ladies in the lobby were extremely helpful and nice to us. Unfortunately, that doesn’t save the experience. We got in quite late and the area was not the most friendly. The hotel room was small and felt old. The walls were very thin and it was (too) easy to hear what the neighbors were up to. I’m going to spare you the details and allow your Imagination to do the rest of the work. I’ll just say that it isn’t a family hotel.
Great hotel, next to a lovely park. It is easy to get to downtown Athens by bus right next to the hotel, and/or Metro from the Metro line two bus stops away. Lovely room, and great staff!

Unbeknown when I booked, it's not in the most savoury of areas (mostly non-Greek) but the suites with a jacuzzi are an absolute bargain, set in boutique rooms that echo a bygone era of luxurious decadence. Unique ceiling artwork with concealed lighting and plush design make it easy to overlook the occasional loose fitting. One will need to get a bus or tram into town, though there are restaurants and an English-language cinema (plus open air screening option) within a few minutes walk and bargain basement shops give way to mid-range designer clothes shops as one wanders down Patison street.
Good location. Good service. Clean rooms. If you book a room,  request to stay in room #402. It has a Good balcony to host a party.
One of the best hotels in Athens, close to almost everything you want. The receptionist, Vilma, was very helpful and gave us some valuable tips and suggestions for places to visit and to eat.

Very nice apartment and a very friendly host. For example, the host brings you clean towels if you need some. The apartment is clean and the nearest metro station (Victora) is a 5 minute walk, so the location is also pretty decent.

Better than sleeping out on the streets. But absolutly not recommendable because of different reasons. Loud and annoying traffic all the day (no sleeping). And not the safest part of Athens especially in the evening and night.
It's the best place to stay for a few days. Near downtown. Nice apartment and big. I strongly  recommend you.
Very comfortable place with a lot of benefits like air conditioning and good help if needed, also fully equipped
The apartment isn't bad, otherwise I would never come to Athens again, we were robbed on arrival, we're not the only ones apparently.... Bad experience..
Horrible apartment...
