Had a lovely stay, room was spotless and had everythjng i needed and a large balcony. I needed a desk to work at and was immeduately moved to a room of my choice. The receptionists were always friendly and helpful,and i was allowed to stay late after checkout as i had a late flight. Only issue is that the rooms are close and if your neighbors are noisy you may hear them. Area is very convenient and has great coffee shops and buses to all required areas. Will be back

Not a 4 star hotel. Hotel is new and pictures look nice. Neighbourhood looks ugly and rooms are very small. Breakfast is poor - fruits from the can, industrial ham, no eggs, juice is a syrup. I just had a black coffee but paid for a full 4-star-hotel breakfast. Breakfast is served only from 7 to 9 a.m. View from our executive room was a broken facade of a building which was 3m away. Not inspiring.

There is no sign. The name is different than here. There is no location on Google. I had to search for the address for hours and could not reach anyone. It is ok to stay for the price but it is not clean enough. Do not have high expectations. Smoking was done in my room until 4 am and there is no reception to complain to. This is not a facility, it has been turned into an apartment hostel and the man is not around. They did not even look at my passport.

If you know, you know.  Possibly the best place in all of Athens.  The owner is a character and a hard ass, so stay on his good side.  DO NOT BOOK ONLINE.  Just show up and ring the bell, if he has a room and he like you you will have a good time.  Quite possibly the strangest place I have ever stayed, but I met such wonderful people, with incredible stories, so genuine and kind.  The owner is a true sweetheart. I stayed for a week and could have stayed for months.  The balcony is beautiful and wraps around the whole place connecting all the rooms.

I enjoyed staying at Thanasis Place. Andreas, the owner was very nice to me, a good friend. The location is great, just in front of the bus stop that takes you to the city center and main archeological sites.

The place has a good price/quality ratio in my opinion. The owner was nice with me, we even had a couple of beers and talked about life, he has a big personality. I was worried about the comments that mentioned bedbugs, but didnt find any and  didnt get any bites nor did any of the guys that were stying at that time, and found some bags under the bed with pruducts against bedbugs, so i guess they took care of that.

We hadn't read the reviews until we already booked and i was scared BUT we stayed here twice. One night at the start of our trip and one night at the end. Our first stay was smooth and easy, no issues at all. Though other people staying there seemed to have some confusion about changing rooms and one girls stuff was moved rooms without her knowing.
Our second stay was less smooth, we arrived at around 22.00 knowing we had half an hour to check in but we kept pressing the button without being let in. Eventually I contacted the whatsapp number through which I received slow replies asking many questions. We were let in by other guests long before I got any solid answers from anyone as to whether someone was going to check us in. Eventually the manager came and upgraded us to a private room which was nice.
The next morning I was stuck in the room! The doorknob had broken and there was no way to open the door (I don't think that this was anyones fault) I contacted the whatsapp number and a few calls later, threw the keys over the balcony to the manager so he could let me out from the other side of the door.
I had to checkout but kept my bags there for the day and upon returning had to wait an hour again to be let in.
We did not experience any bed bugs and the manager was a little intimidating at first but not unreasonable and once he got a conversation going he was friendly and fine.
Overall not a horrible experience, just inconvenient and disorganised. Nothing special but it does the job. Would not reccommend staying here if you have strict or inconveniant schedules though.
Spacious apartments..highly recommend!
Excellent condition apparent very close to the metro station,very friendly staff and quick response! Good prices also I recommend for everyone who needs something secure and comfortable to stay.
Amazing apartment, comfortably furnished and carefully decorated! The location is ideal and at an affordable price!
Excellent apartment, excellent hospitality, Mr. Konstantinos
Beautiful apartment with everything you need in a central area!

Stayed in this beautiful and cozy apartment for a few days while visiting Athens. The hosts were amazing and always present to lend a helping hand while profoundly discreet. Since I work remotely, it was a pleasant surprise to find all the amenities I needed to crunch some numbers during the day while enjoyed the local life during the night. Located in a central quiet neighborhood of downtown Athens in a walking distance from main metro stations. The F&K apartment really made my stay in Athens a trip to remember. Definitely advisable!!!!
Excellent accommodation, comfortable environment, adequately designed.!!!
Very nice apartment clean and neat, in a good area near the center and easy parking!! When I come to Athens again I will definitely stay there again!!

Great accommodation in one of the best districts of Athens. Super clean, it has everything you need. Whatever question we had, the owners/administration was replying very quickly. Nice bars, restaurants, coffee places around the area. Very close also to Lykavitos hill for walks and concerts there. Highly recommended!
We stayed for 2 nights and really loved the place. It was very clean, well-designed and in a good location. The check-in and check-out instructions were also clear.
This apartment is very nice, clean and quiet. I'd be happy to recommend it.
Thé apartment is lovely clean and tidy. Great location. Safe neighborhood with many shops, restaurants and coffee shops in walking distance.
Perfect place to stay. Beautiful furnishing with good taste and excellent location nearby the heart of town.

The rooms were very comfortable and cozy with plenty of space, great bathrooms and comfortable beds installed with a safe for all your important stuff.
The service was pretty good no complaints, the employees were very nice and useful so no problem here.
The location isn't the best it's just the center of Athens so you can't expect much but it might also have just been the room I was in.

Such a wonderful hotel. I'd describe it as comfortable, cool and friendly, and in a great location. The decor is super nice, and the beds are very comfortable. The people working there are lovely, always keen to have a chat and a drink together. The locaiton is great too, in the alternative neighbourhood of Exarchia, which is super friendly and cool with some great restaurants, bars and cafes, and only a short walk from the centre. I would not hesitate to stay there again.

Incredibly kind and nice hosts. The rooms are nice and are cleaned every day. The attitude of the personel is unseen,  really hospitable and helpful.  At first we were a bit concerned about the stories about Exarchia, but when we went there it revealed that this is not the truth. Really nice places to eat. Just be careful late at night otherwise it is great neighbourhood with its own charm.

The staff was super friendly and always responsive with good suggestions where to go and what to visit. Room are big enough and clean,  and there was everyday housekeeping. Reservation is needed to use the parking infront of the hotel.
This place is very good . Ne and my friend stay here and we have a good experience.  The rooms are New and very clear. Really a good hotel in the heart of Athens.  Thanks 😊
Would totally recommend!

The apartment is exactly as in the photos, and better I would say. Its premises are spotlessly clean and it is new. The view from the balconies is excellent. Perfect choice for a couple, as it meets all the requirements for a romantic evening! I highly recommend it!
Immaculate home and hospitality. Recently renovated with lovely balconies and goddesses.Ideal for couples.Highly recommend.
Very nice apartment. Spotlessly clean, recently renovated and with awesome goddesses. I recommend it
Great apartment with a fantastic view! ❤️

Wonderful Apartment with a wonderful balcony at night it is a privilege to enjoy the spacious, comfortable and modern view. A fantastic location that allows you to easily move anywhere in the City of Athens.
Spectacular view is a dream especially at night a dream view everything is new a wonderful L-shaped balcony super spacious
Nice and comfortable
Very bad. The photos are not correct and there is no reception or anyone

Very fair price and the roof-top terrace for breakfast or a sundowner (BYOB) is defined an asset.

The breakfast is good, particularly local dishes like humus, feta, jams, eggs, bread etc. We only didn’t like the coffee at all, but you find that later in the day in town.

In the shops around you can buy a cool beer to enjoy on the terrace and there are some very nice restaurants and bars outside.
Some nights were quiet, Saturday night definitely not, so you better bring ear plugs.

Stayed here a few weeks ago. The staff were great and very friendly. Got so much vital information on how to get around. Can't thank them enough.

Room service was great and was clean every time we returned. The rooftop terrace has a great view of Athens and the Parthenon - it was a great place to relax, especially at night when the lights were on.

Conveniently located place. Short walk to Omonoia station. Some great cafes and eateries within a 5 minute walk from this place - Cafe Boheme for the pasta and Rizes for the coffee and pastries.

Stayed here for 5 days, very sweet staff, perfect location and very good and comfortable rooms! When we would arrive late at night the staff would walk with us to our room to put on the hallway light so we could find the lock of the door easier, very sweet!

Will stay here again next time for sure

We stayed in a nice room with personal terrace, ac, fridge and bath with (rain)shower, sink and toilet for a good price (roughly 40€ per person per night for a 7 night stay in a double bedroom with a double bed). The door to the terrace and the window in the yoilet alsi had mosquito nets. The terrace has an amazing view over athens and you can access it at all times (also with a really small elevator with 250 kg maximum weight and really small doors) and you can also get breakfast on it from 8 to 11 am for 9€ per person. The personell is very friendly.
The Hotel is located in the quarter Εξαρχεια (Exarcheia), wich is often considered the anarchist quarter of athens. Even so it isn't  dangerous in any way and I never felt unsafe but as a high percentag of inhabitants are university students it can be a bit louder even at later times. Exarcheia is apart from that renown for it's cafés and bars. I can recommend "Mystic Pizza and Pasta", an Italian restaurant with quite some vegetarian options and with optional vegan cream for pasta, vegan cheese and whole grain pizza dough for less gluten and "Black Salami", a sandwich café. You can reach the city center by foot in around 25 minutes.
The hotel is unfortunately not 100% barrier free as the streets leading to it are fairly steep you have to climb a small step to enter the main entrance to building one, where the reception is and where you can then access the elevator wich unfortunately is really small and has small doors (building 2 doesn't have rooms for wich you don't have to climb some steps to reach).

An amazing hotel with great rooftop view and kind receptionists. Everyone was very helpful, the rooms were cleaned every single day and the tasty rooftop breakfast had a great variety of locally sourced foods. Would really recommend to try the breakfast! The hotel felt cozy like home. Rooms were inexpensive but we got a very high standard ones with a nice bathroom. It's in a nice area, surrounded by a park. We loved it! Thank you so much for taking care of us during our stay!

A great apartment, Sofia who manages the building was always available to help us with everything, even in things that are not necessarily related to the apartment itself. Highly recommended!
It is a bit far from the center 15 minutes walk but many good bars and bakeries on the way. I will return for sure

A wonderful city break in a great location. Easy to get around and clear instructions from the get go. The building is very safe (multiple coded doors to enter) and the apartment was much bigger than I expected. Really great price, highly recommend.

The hotel is located in a very nice neighborhood with a lot of bars and restaurants. The flat was truly beautiful and very clean. The kitchen was fully equipped and there is a washing machine. We felt very comfortable and safe there. Thank you very much!

The apartment stands out, located at a hill. The rooftop balcony was amazing. The apartment itself is nice as shown in the photo. 1 bedroom, 1 livingroom with a sofa convertible to bed. The wifi is nice and reach out the roof top.
On Saturday there is fruit market in front of the premise. The location is in a walking distance from the landmarks of Athens. Having a elevator is also a plus.We did not know that the location is at a hill. We did not come by taxi, so we have to climb up the hill. The neighborhood is a bit dirty with a lot of vandalism. I think it is everywhere in Athens. The smart TV is large, but sometimes there is a trouble connecting with Youtube and sometimes the remote control is not perfect.

Really good value for money. The bed is comfortable and the rooms quiet. Since you’re partway up Stefi Hill the veranda affords a very good view of Athens (I was on the fourth floor). The rooftop area an even better one. An exceptional butcher is diagonally opposite the entrance (I would highly recommend the Greek rib-eye). A supermarket is a minute away. 30+ restaurants, cafes, bars etc within 5-10 minutes walk. Kitchen has a very good oven. 12 minutes walk away you have The Clumsies bar and restaurant. Athens is a night city (I swear they run on Duracell) so if you want to see more local life and less tourist life go out after 10pm or later). The Seven Jokers bar is 20 minutes walk away. Balthazar Bar and Restaurant 30 minutes walk. Plaka is 30 minutes walk away. Walking might seem the slower option but wait times are measured differently in Athens compared with say, London and you’ll get to see Athens for what it truly is. A city of contradictions where the locals are well educated, have a better education compared with most countries, are proud of their community and of their culture and are not silent if they perceive a social injustice. Use google lens to read the graffiti and you’ll have a better understanding of what drives young adults. I thoroughly recommend ABR Suites (I’ve stayed at two of their locations) and will keep on returning to them when I’m next in Athens. Also have drinks at Palatine bar around 20 minutes away. The tourists haven’t hit there yet. I find October - February the best months to go to Athens because most tourists walk at the speed of an elephant.

Amazing convenience with cafes, small stores for our essentials. About 25 minutes walk to the heart of Athens where you can find Flea Markets, big fashion brands, the Acropolis & other Museums.

Good to travel with kids, quite place. Strong WIFI connection. No issues for Uber drivers pick ups!

Though it would be nice to have someone to clear our trash once we place it outside our rooms? Maybe. But overall great experience, good price & nice location, recommended for sure!

Apartments hotel, without a room service or a reception. Airbnb style. Very good and comfortable apartment with an equipped kitchen and with a balcony. A rooftop opened for all guests. The location is good and central with many restaurants and coffee shops. Good value for money in my opinion

I booked it after reading the good reviews, but unfortunately it was a GF bedroom and basement kitchenette and sofa ,
It was a bad experience , floor and walls very dirty as much as the bed covers , doors are not sound proofing especially during the arrive and exit of any guest.

Excellent 5 star stay!  The rooms are clean, well-kept and equipped (kettle, smart TV iron, microwave, air conditioning, heating plate, fridge, hair dryer).  Apartments close to the center, opposite there is a small grocery store, a few steps away there is a large AB store.  There is a terrace on the roof with a beautiful view.  The staff is very nice, understanding and helpful!

Pleasant, light room with basic amenities including kitchenette. Despite my room fronting the road, it was quiet…. even with window kept open.
Plenty of places for coffee and food dotted about the neighbourhood. Smallish supermarket 2 minutes up the hill. Amazing bakery 4mins in one direction for bread/sandwiches and amazing bakery 3 mins in another for delicious croissants +++
The neighbourhood has a lot of character.

The description of the room was misleading; we did not expect to stay on the basement level. On the plus side, the apartment is neat, nicely decorated, and well equipped. Also: there are lots of restaurants in the area and a park nearby. Depending where you want to be in Athens, be aware - this place is a long walk, almost an hour, from Acropolis and Monastiraki.

Very nice place to stay a few days in Athens. A few shops and nice restaurants around, close to bus 230 that takes you to Acropolis in 25’, 12’ walks from the metro line M2, 30’ walk from Panatheaic stadium… so pretty great place. Inside all is great and cosy, very modern and nicely maintained. Air conditioning was a must to have to take some rest! Our host nicely communicated when we had trouble with the automatic key entrance system. Perfect 👌

We stayed with Elliot for 4 days and 3 nights at the end of June and it was a WONDERFUL experience. First off, we arrived in Athens from a cruise ship early in the morning but the check-in time for Elliot was not until 3PM. We were worried that we would have to lug around a considerable amount of luggage for the morning so we reached out to see if there were any options (I.e. early check-in, luggage storage etc). The hotel was very responsive to our request and although they could not do early check-in, they did suggest that we could drop off our luggage at their sister hotel, The Modernist, and someone would tag and watch it for us as the Elliot does not have a concierge. This was a very good option for us and our experience with the staff at The Modernist was excellent (see my review for that hotel as well!!). Once check-in time arrived, it was smooth sailing as we were provided with all the passcodes to enter the building and the unit. The elevator took some getting used to but once we figured that out it was a pretty cool experience as well. The unit itself was well kept and spacious. All amenities were working as expected and the free cappuccino pods were a nice touch. Location of the hotel was excellent with many options around for food, drinks, coffee and most importantly, gelato!! There is also a supermarket nearby so we were able to purchase food and cook a meal or two ourselves, although the eating options nearby are just too good to miss!! This is a self-service hotel so there is no room service, room cleaning or concierge. This was preferable for us but for some this might be a drawback. Lastly, the area the hotel was located in was relatively quiet at night.There is a police station just a few streets away and we suspect that this is why it's so quiet as the officers seem to always be outside the police station, perhaps acting as a visual deterrent for anyone who might be up to no good!! This was a big plus for us as we are a family with young children who prefer quiet when they sleep.  We would definitely stay at the Elliot again if we were to go to Greece. Honestly, nothing bad to say about this place, even the price was very reasonable. Thanks again for your hospitality Elliot :)

I enjoyed my stay at Elliot so much that I extended it by a few nights! The apartment was clean and new with everything I needed for a comfortable stay.

The team is so friendly and helpful and offered some great suggestions for things to do in Athens.

The area has an edgy vibe with lots of great places to go out. I was able to walk to the centre and to sights.

I would be happy to return.

We stayed with my wife and baby two nights at Elliot and it was amazing, they provided everything we needed and more for our stay. Really cool place and perfect neighborhood. Will come back 100% next time we are in Athena.

While passing through Athens, I stumbled upon this hidden gem by chance. It turned out to be the perfect choice for anyone needing a convenient, short stay during a transfer. The apartment is cozy, clean, and comfortable—everything was just right. Located centrally yet tucked away in the basement of a building, it offers a cool and quiet retreat. The host was incredibly friendly and quick to respond to all my questions. Overall, the service was excellent, and I highly recommend it for anyone looking for a pleasant and hassle-free stay in the heart of the city.

This hidden germ is in walking distance of Athens! Very  clean and comfortable setting and we
will visit again!

I recently had the pleasure of staying at this wonderful hotel, and I must say, it was an unforgettable experience! The staff were incredibly kind and attentive, going above and beyond to ensure that every need was met. One of the highlights was the stunning rooftop pool, which offered breathtaking views of Athens—truly a perfect spot to unwind and soak in the beauty of the city. I wholeheartedly recommend this hotel to anyone seeking a delightful stay with exceptional service. It’s a gem that should not be missed!. special thanks for the courtesy of Maria and Spiro at the reception.

Apartment hotel with big rooms and nice pool in a nutshell . Supermarket at the hotel is an advantage . 15 min from the “center” I think 4.5 fit the hotel .
There are enough comments but I wanted to comment on a few of them .

Cleanings: no issue on our end but I guess it’s per person experience.

Breakfast: we didn’t book it and it cost 13 euro per person for it to deliver to your door . It’s incl the regular stuff and it sounds very expensive but there is a coffee and bakery outside the hotel .

Pool : saw some comments that it was close and without a pool bar . We were at peak season and it was open , no pool bar it’s true but again you have supermarket at the hotel .

Cockroaches : I saw one comment and not sure where it comes from . For us the hotel was super clean and high quality facilities

Mixed Experience at Panorama Project Athens

We recently stayed at Panorama Project Athens and had a mixed experience. The hotel's location is a highlight, providing authentic Athens right on your doorstep. However, there were several downsides that impacted our stay.

Upon arrival, we found the towels to be dirty, and no top sheet on the bed and a broken safe which beeped incessantly until they ripped the battery out. Our room wasn't cleaned daily we put the request light on only to come back and find it turn off and room not done but the battery back in the beeping safe! our room, which was supposed to have a view, instead overlooked other people's rooms. The shower setup was particularly frustrating, as you had to hold the shower head to take a shower—an inconvenient and awkward arrangement.

The pool area, although wonderfully cold and refreshing, had seating that needed a thorough cleaning. Breakfast was another letdown; there was no choice given, and we were never asked if we wanted coffee or orange juice. Who doesn’t want coffee in the morning?

Overall, while the location is excellent and the pool pleasant, there are several areas in need of improvement to make the stay more enjoyable.

Hotel is in a good location. Not too far of a walk from Athens centre. Mini market downstairs is a definite plus. Breakfast, although we didn't get it is €13 per person per day which sounds pretty expensive as food in Athens from the many many bakeries and cafes is very cheap.

The room was clean and tidy albeit with a few scuff marks on the walls from suitcases etc. Nice and sizeable too. Beds aren't dressed with a duvet, just a top sheet folded up on the end that you put on yourself. There was what looked to be a blanket in the cupboard however who knows how long it's been since it was washed last.

Parking charges were a surprise as €15 per day (this charge was not mentioned at all on the booking.com advert which definitely should be as this could add up a big extra cost very quickly, a bit deceiving).

Staff were friendly and helpful so can't be faulted there.

Really nice and modern hotel!! Was really nice to start the day with a swim on the rooftop and to watch the sunset from there. It is true that of you look in the distantie you have a view of the acropolis but honestly dont book this hotel if you really want a direct vieuw cause in my opionion its a little bit of a stretch.

The Athens Zafolia hotel was chosen by my tour group. The hotel is located in the heart of Athens. Very easy to get to all major areas of interest. Dining easy to find, and the staff was very accommodating. We had a few doorman to help with our luggage. When we needed directions, the desk staff was very helpful, and provided a map. The pool was on the roof, and my one complaint was no shade. We stayed during the heatwave in June '24. They even closed the Acropolis, it was THAT hot. I couldn't stand to be even in the water during that time without a place to find some shade. Other than that, the breakfast was great. Good selection, great coffee and juice. Hotel staff were very friendly. The rooms and bathrooms could use some updating. Although, they were very clean. For the time we stayed, it was very nice.

Everything is quite above average except location is off the tourist area. The room is quite spacious which is a plus. However, It will take 20 min taxi (10 Euro) to reach the Plaka area. There's not much shopping or restaurant choices nearby.
...After reading the hotel feedback on my post, I apologize for my wrong perception that the hotel is not in city center.

Close enough to the metro and still close enough to some sites.. customer service was pretty bad. Experienced racism. So, our group of 11 (6 rooms) booked extra days stay after our tour ended.  Our group, along with other members of the tour company arrive early.  All the other members,  who happen to be white got checked in early,  except our group, who are  black ladies were told we could not until 3pm. Despite other groups  coming in after us and also getting checked in. A member of our group went to the desk three times and was refused. They made us wait until exactly 3pm to check us in. Needless to say there was no one else left to be checked in after us. However there was one lady there who helped us with directions to the metro and also called us cabs when we requested.  So sorry I forgot her name. Please keep her there. I would not recommend this hotel to my black friends... my white friends maybe.

40 euros from Airport to this hotel on the outer rim of the city perimeter. No doorman to help with luggage - reception was perfunctory. Room neat enough but dusty floor. Bathroom has issues. 2 old lifts labour bringing a couple with a suitcase each up. Breakfast buffet is as expected in 3 star hotel. Don’t try dinner at the restaurant where waiters sneer at anyone not understanding Greek & joke with those who do. Expensive.  Interesting shopping precinct up 2 blocks. Can’t really recommend this place. Totally understand why Greece is in economic decline. Beware of taxi drivers, restaurants & shop keepers none of whom are grateful all want tips for no service. The pool was closed.

Comfortable, relatively inexpensive, half hour walk from Syntagma Square. Slightly faded/well-worn feel to the place e.g. room key cards  needed replacing 3
times in 48 hours. Pool on top excellent facility. Extremely dull, central casting breakfast buffet - more fuel than delicious!

Last month my daughter and I stayed at the hotel twice. In the first instance the room was small and had a foul smell on entering.
The next time we were put up in a better room. The staff at the reception was very helpful.
The break fast was excellent. Wonder why we need reservation for the pool even when no guests were in. Ofcourse the pool was very small.
Overall our stay was very good so thanks to the team. Appreciated eco-friendly water dispenser.

Located in a quiet neighborhood, this is a good, low-tier hotel. Rooms were clean and nicely decorated, but they did not appear 4-star. Right next to the hotel are a few shabby buildings that spoil the view. The staff were very warm and hospitable. However, the food needs improvement.

The front desk employees are phenomenal. Both men were very helpful & polite. Our family stayed there for 2 nights last week. The rooftop is beautiful! We were able to reserve the cabana and were treated like stars. The food and drinks were great. The rooms are comfortable but I don’t think we stayed in the updated rooms that are featured but we also checked in earlier and were accommodated. The linens for the bunk sofa bed were questionable. Overall, we were happy with our stay & our girls enjoyed their pool.

Stayed here for 4 nights and it was an enjoyable stay. Location was a little bit out from the main hub of Athens (about 3 stops on the very east to use subway). A day ticket was 4.10euros so pretty cheap to get around so didn’t really mind the location. Not a huge amount to see around the hotel although there are some very nice restaurants and a fantastic cake and ice cream shop close by which is open 24 hours!!

Room was pleasant and had recently been refurbished. Air con was good thankfully. I have read a few comments about the amazing breakfasts which I think was overstating it a little. Don’t get me wrong, the breakfast was good with a good variety but I’m not sure I would say it was amazing so don’t get too excited.

A great feature of this hotel was the rooftop bar which has a small pool and a beach theme with loungers, cabanas and actual sand. It was great to have a day off from walking the city and relax. Again, I have read a couple of negative comments about having to pay for the use which isn’t quite correct. You are requested to spend a minimum amount at the pool bar which starts at 25euros which I don’t think is unreasonable.

The staff were all excellent and very welcoming. If I was staying in Athens again, I would definitely stay here again.

Quality breakfast and nice breakfast area, great rooftop pool although a bit unclear whether hotel guests can freely use it because its based on "reservations" while nobody turns up for them. Friendly staff. Value for money, book direct from hotel site, it was cheaper. Felt like a safe area and quiet location, 10 min walk from subway stations.

Upon entry we thought the decor was lovely,  service was great as well.
However the rooms are average
The walls are thin, found it very noisy from hallway noise.
Access to the pool was blocked by furniture  and you had to look frustrated walking around the restaurant to get outside. Just ridiculous.
We ate at the restaurant and food was good, serving size was on the small side.
The service was terrible. If I didn't get up and go to the bar they would have forgotten our wine order.

The location we found to far from Athens
The view from the roof is not the Acropolis, so don't be fooled. Still a lovely Outlook, but there is much better to be found.

The welcome to the car from the lady responsible should be way better and doesn't reflect the ethos that the hotel tries to give. The bar staff was overwhelmed with ordered and got my first and second drink wrong. Ordering a lovely rum, that I returned and then I got it back right but there was cork residue in the drink. Bar staff where lovely and helpful but it's the little things that matter on that level. Overall...great view...a must if you're visiting Athens and stay in that area.

The room was a good size, clean and comfortable but we had an east facing room that became an oven quickly in the morning and was noisy due to traffic at night. The lifts were a problem especially when everyone was leaving at the same time and we were on the 7th floor. There are 4 lifts but only 2 servicing our floor.  On the last morning they could not fit everyone in the breakfast area as various tours were leaving at the same time so we were shuffled to another area where service was slow and staff disinclined. However all that aside for a short stay it was worth the money and we enjoyed our stay.

Great place, very friendly and helpful staff.
Enjoyed my stay, I'm planning on returning again when I'm either on business or potentially even a short holiday break.

The rooms are large and have very good air conditioning as well (important during the hotter months).

I'd like to thank the staff for a pleasant stay.

Nice and well-maintained hotel with spacious, clean rooms. Staff nice and polite. Beautiful view from the windows of the city panorama. At the very top there is a swimming pool and a bar which I recommend visiting at least once. What more could you want... well, you can... the choice of food for breakfast is modest and above all, terribly disgusting coffee... probably instant and of the worst quality!!! You have to change that (I hope someone from the staff reads this review ;)

Room is very spacious. Bed is a problem: if if you lean against the wall, the bed slides and creates gap at the back and youbcan fall. The wooden flooring was making too much noise. Staff was very helpful though. Not close to popular places. Taxi takes quite some time to reach.

I only stayed here for one night, but it was fine.

Pros:
- clean
- extremely kind front desk staff. I never encountered one that was less than accommodating!
- shower was warm and water pressure good
- rooms kept cool
- good, quiet breakfast. The selection was small, but enough!
- elevator. Small but I’m glad there was one!

Cons:
- beds not so comfortable. The sheets were horrible.
- not super close to much (walkably)
- no complimentary waters in the room
- phones don’t work, so I had to walk down to the front each time I needed something or asked a question

Overall, it was a fine experience, but I may try something new next time!

This is a real gem - the rooms are a good size, we had a room with a balcony and enjoyed watching the street scene below. The breakfast is great - the seating is a bit limited so you can sit at sofas in the lobby if there is no space. The wait staff clean tables quickly. The elevator is pretty small - if you are claustrophobic it would be hard to use the elevator. The front desk staff are incredible. They are so professional and helpful and resourceful. We were travelling with touring bicycles and they helped us organize a van shuttle to pick us up at the airport with our oversized bike bags. They also helped organize a van shuttle to get us out of Athens on start our bike tour on quieter roads. Everyone was great and we must mention Christine/Kristina for her exceptional care of us right from when we made our reservations to when we arrived.
Hotel is close to the city center.  There are restaurants in walking distance.  The front desk staff, Charles and Demetris was so helpful and pleasant to talk to.

I visit Embassy Hotel with my family,  at Christmas time, the location is perfect,  the breakfast tasteful and my children loved the cakes and pancakes.  Excellent and always smiling staff.  The hotel has beautiful view to the Lycabetus hill and Athens city. Nice restaurants at the area and the metro station only 3 minutes away. Quite and safe location.
Parking space available !!!!!
See you very soon ....Dimitri, John, Christina, Spiro, Anastasia..... and all the mates thank you for the wonderful services 😀

I have use this hotel many times for business.

Old fashioned rooms, quite small.
Toilet has always a bad smell from drains and there is absolutely no soundproofing. You hear the lift working and your neighbours, coughing, speaking and whatever. Even window panes has no soundproof so the big road which is in front of hotel, is behind your ear, waking you up if you sleep like a bird.

I’m looking forward not to staying here again

The hotel is pretty spacious, very very lovely and friendly and efficient staff. Food is very good even though hotel food is not always good. The rooms are good , bathrooms big and clean. It was very pleased to stay here for two weeks. Definitely a 10/10

This was my first time at this hotel and the front desk was very helpful. The service for the gentleman and for the lady who worked at noon was particularly worthwhile. Food very amazing and very tasteful the lady there was very kind and also for the room service also breakfast was amazing, A little bit that bothers me to put 4 stars because you can hear the wall next to you when the other person is talking and put some music and loud tv.

Nice hotel placed in a good area. The room was ok, a small bathroom with a small shower cabin. The main problem is the very thin walls. I heard the neighbors snoring, using the bathroom, talking on the phone. Breakfast was very good. The employees are nice to guests.

The week that we stayed there has left great memories. Spoke fluent English which was a bonus for us. Magnificent breakfasts with specialty dishes. Very positive staff who were always happy and helpful.
Super
good place
Super

The reception doesn't speak Greek..(only broken English...)
It's more like a hot spot, than a hotel... I don't think I need to say anything else... if you're brave enough to find a room (rare), double-lock it at night, for better or worse... more ghetto than a hotel..
The fact that the reviews are almost all in Arabic... says it all.. shame because it used to be decent...

Previously, it was an ordinary hotel like any hotel, but now the European Union has rented it to refugees only to families who have health problems because the place is close to the hospital, and after completing treatment, they move them to homes.

Very nice place located 7 minutes walk from the center of Fira, 10 minutes from the bus station, very efficient among other things. The room is essential but in the positive sense of the term: the room is tidy and cleaned every morning by the cleaning lady who changes the towels. There is also a mini fridge. The bathroom is small but it doesn't matter in the end. The room overlooks a path equipped with tables, where it is possible to have breakfast. The staff is super welcoming and efficient. There is also a small swimming pool in which you can stay until 8 pm. if I'm not mistaken.
The price is rock bottom for the services offered and for the place.
I will definitely go there tomorrow when I return to Santorini
The owner, his mother and all people that works at the hotel is completely helpful and I felt like if I was at home during my stay there.

The place overall is ok, but wouldn’t want to return there.
Good(fine): a lot of space for sleeping; there is AC in every bedroom; fully equipped kitchen; good WiFi connectivity; near the metro station; you can book day in day.
Bad: absolutely terrible ventilation windows and tunnel! (you literally can hear everything from other floors), there wasn’t any litter bin in the kitchen or in any room except the bathroom; and the building and street are dirty.
In total, this place is not too bad, but maybe for it’s price it is perfect

Good size apartment, reactive host, near metro station, 3-4 metro stops from city center, near cafes, supermarkets, gyros eating places. Bathroom can be improved. Toilet doesn't flush well, shower is unmovable and water was spraying onto the shower curtain rather than onto you.
Air bnb, nice apartment.
Fantastic!!!!! Everything perfect!!! Thanks a lot..

Everything is fine. We contacted the owners. They were waiting for us. We found parking on the same street (and the minibus had a long wheelbase), free of charge. They rang the wide glass door of the front door (A1). Then we went up the stairs to the 2nd floor. The apartment is clean. Internet is good. Attention! Do not open the ventilation window in the shower!!
They charged me 100% even I have canceled a week before arrival. Complete rip off! Never again
Perfect place, fantastic design! The most comfortable choice for staying in Athens.. Just 7' from metro station you will definitely love this place
Perfect apartments, have everything you need and more. Quite and cozy.

Location is very safe as it is very near the US Embassy in Athens, Greece. There's a grocery store, nice restaurants and walking distance to the main road where tour picks ups are done.  It is very safe to walk at night and early morning. The service is excellent as the gorgeous owner attended to all our needs. She was very helpful in everything. We were a family of four and our room was big enough for us 4. Place is very clean; room was cleaned everyday. Towels and toiletries are well provided for. I highly recommend this place because of its great location, excellent service and cleanliness. I will stay here again if I have another chance to visit Athens. I miss this place already.

Truly a gem of a hotel located near the U.S. Embassy in Athens. Hard to beat the value of this little boutique hotel and the amazing Valeriya who will assist you with anything you need. Rooms are clean, nicely appointed and are serviced as often as daily - your choice (many apartment hotels at this price point will only clean your room 1X per wk). Just a couple blocks from the metro and two metro stops from the center you are close enough to enjoy downtown, but far enough away for a break - which makes the Andromeda perfect for longer stays. While there isn’t laundry in the room, there is an excellent laundry mat about five blocks away and you can also have the hotel take care of it for an exceedingly reasonable price. Lots of cafes, bakeries and restaurants in the neighborhood - as well and several grocery stores. Again - you really can’t beat the value. Highly recommend!

Very cute place, large suite, very quiet and safe area. The apartment are quite nice decorated, it’s not a 5 Star award winning design, but for the budget absolutely fair and much better taste that I have seen in aother places in Greece. Very friendly stuff and excellent little fish restaurant around the corner. Good location

The stay was lovely, loved the breakfast and their fantastic staff (Valeria is the most gorgeous manager I ve met) . The place was  clean and beautiful!   Just 3 minutes walk to the subway. The hotel is surrounded by many good restaurants and bars! We really enjoyed the stay. Highly recommended!

The best place I've stopped in Athens ,nice apartment and comfort location. But the best thing about this hotel is the service. Valeria's general manager is always ready to resolve any issues and help.

A nice place for a short stay un Athens. The manager is very friendly, the location is close to The Athena Towers. It is obvious that the owner is doing every thing to make you feel comfortable: tea, cofee and sugar is offered from the house. After I made the booking the manager emailed me and he was at the agreed time at the location to hand me the keys. Very eager to see us pleased with our stay.
Good location! The apartment you can find everything like home. Fully equipped kitchen. Very kind host. Sure we will visit again.
Just perfect... great
Great
Very nice, comfortable and functional. We were very pleased. When an issue arose our hostess resolved it immediately. We will go again for sure.

We loved the apartment and it's location. Makis is a wonderful, very helpful and attentive host. We had a great time in Athens and look forwarding to visiting again in the near future. Makis thank you for all your help and great advice!
Constructed and furnished having paid attention to the last detail. All the apartments of Divine complex are absolutely immaculate.
Great location, super close to the metro station, Clean, modern design and an amazing host. Defiantly my number one to go place next time

Wonderful hosts, great location, clean and tidy.
We will definetely come again
Extraordinary apartment ,excellent location,polite and friendly owners

We stayed as a group of 5 for three nights in the Pnyx apartment. The apartment was beautiful, very clean and very big. We had a small balcony, there were a variation of hair styling tools, a washing machine and a dishwasher.
The host provided some olive oil, salt and pepper, tea and instant coffee. There was also a nescafe capsule machine which we didn't use.
There is a big supermarket in walking distance, the metro line 3 is 12 min by walking.
There are many coffee places around here.

Check-in and out was with pin codes and very smoothly.
Towels very provided as well.
Thank you for this amazing stay!!

I would like to express my sincere thanks and appreciation for our wonderful stay in the wonderful apartment. The apartment was large and clean, the rooms were spacious and comfortable. We also thank the hostess for leaving useful instructions and directions that helped us a lot during our stay. We greatly appreciate your quick response and willingness to help at any time. It was a wonderful experience, and we will be happy to come back again in the future.
Great location and interior design. Can do better with the noise insulation especially towards the front road given the traffic

We stayed there for 5 nights. Perfect for families with two children. It is a bit far from historical center, near to the stadium of Panathinaikos FC, but with Metro it is only 3 stops, and bus takes about 25 min. The appartement was super clean and modern. We enjoyed it a lot. Special thanks to the very friendly and helpful host (Ofeliya), which grant us late check-out as we had a late evening flight.
Excellent accommodation in a very good location for several people in Athens

We booked in good faith.  However, the apartment building cellar is connected to a parking place for motorbikes, the entire complex fills up with exhaust fumes.  It leaks into the apartment, only opening the windows and doors was effective at dispelling the fumes.  It's situated just off a main thoroughfare, which is convenient but noisy - and of course, the apartment heats up.
The balcony was flooded, blocked from draining, so we couldn't sit outside.  Although the apartment was surface clean, plates had old food on them and I started noticing more small things that weren't hygienic - and then the internet crashed.  By this point we had a headache from the fumes and wanted to cancel and leave.
We called the owner, 2 men turned up that couldn't smell anything, (they must work in a sewage facility to have such lack of smell), and only offered that we could contact the cleaning company.
This apartment is unhealthy, and the owner is unhelpful.  Due to their reaction, I don't think this is the first complaint they've had, they were prepared.  Since we checked reviews before we booked, I'm posting this as a warning.  It's not so much the cleanliness, that's an easy fix, it's not being able to breathe clean air!
We're out of money and had the stress of finding new accommodation and a hotel for the night. Luckily our new apartment owner and even the hotel with the late book in, were  a lot more helpful and kind.
It is not clear exactly what services it provides.

Zeus Luxury Business Suite
Super clean, easy to reach, comfortable and with the loveliest hosts apartment

The reservation process was uncomplicated, and the hosts were very forthcoming to answer any questions or information prior to our arrival.
A few days before our arrival the hosts created a WhatsApp group chat to facilitate the communication, and arrange the details about their pick-up service.
Getting there: the apartment is both by car or train easy to reach. There is a train station from the M3 line close to it which allows an easy access from the airport and to the main tourist destinations.
Apartment location:  the apartment is in the suburbs, however due to its proximity to the underground station it is easy to reach all major tourist attractions like the Acropolis (around 25 minutes from door to door).
The neighborhood is lively but not loud, and you can observe the locals going about their daily business and get a feeling how it is to live there. Everything you need is around the corner like drugstores, supermarkets, restaurants, cafes, hairdressers ..... everyone is very friendly and do their best to speak English.
Checking in:  before arrival our hosts gave us the pin number to the keys' safe outside the building. Then you go down a flight of stairs ( about 5 steps) and you find the apartment on the ground floor directly by the entrance. When we got in we found a cozy, squeaky clean, modern and pleasantly decorated place. The color of the walls, furniture and textiles are all matched with care and love, and very instagrammable ( if you're into it). Since the apartment is on the ground floor and well protected from sunlight and heat it is pretty cool inside and I can imagine it is really pleasant during summertime. The place is both equipped with radiators and air conditioning.
The check in procedure was pleasant and overall we had an excellent experience with our hosts.
The rooms: everything was spotless, bedsheets were the brightest white and smelled fresh. The overall cleanliness and hygiene of the whole place is excellent.
When you walk in you have a spacious room with the living and dining are as well as hooks to hang the jackets and a built in closet.
Everywhere you find notes with the Wifi password, how to heat the shower's water ...
To the left you can find a small narrow, however fully equipped kitchen. We stayed there for ten days and were perfectly able to prepare our meals. They have a good range of kitchen appliances with a microwave oven and a capsule coffee machine, but no oven.
Straight ahead you can find a small corridor with a spacious bathroom to the left and a spacious cozy bedroom to the right.
The shower has an overhead rain shower and enough room to move and relax. It also includes a washing machine and a dryer.
The bed in the bedroom can be split up into two single beds.
I slept on the couch and it was very comfortable and sturdy which was great for my back.
I had to work there for a few days and managed to do so comfortably in the dining area as well as on the couch. The internet connection was stable and quick ( about 5G).
Altogether we had a great experience with the apartment and in the city. Our hosts with all the information and support they offered played a central role and had a great impact in our time there. We definitely recommend it.
A huge thanks to Michael and Madeline for your kindness and time! We hope to see you again!!!
Amazing, great location, Vangelis gave us recommendations for amazing places. I highly recommend it and if I return to Athens at another time I will come back here.
Very good place to stay in Athens...fair price, clean, tidy, near the metro and very helpful hosts!! Efharisto!!
Very well located and in a good neighborhood. I like the accommodation is new and clean. Host is very kind. Thanks!!!!
Very nice apartment in a very neat apartment building, also in a very good spot a few meters from the meter, I recommend it without a second thought!!!
GutaKeba

Wonderful service all around from Chris and  co. The apartment was perfect and confortable. Tons of useful information, including a map, was provided. They helped us with our bagage logistics. The shuttle service to and from the airport  was professionnal, and communications were smooth. I highly recommend. They are the best !!! Efkaristo poli !

%100 would recommend this place.
Great location easy transport from airport and all the must see places. Plus it’s in a quiet and safe neighborhood.
Great check in system and really clean and comfy rooms.
The breakfast in their arranged restaurant was really delicious too. I’d recommend you to go to one of the restaurants across the street at night too they have great food and drinks.
The owner/receptionist was a really sweet person, great hospitality and he recommended some great places to eat and visit.

Great location, very comfy bed, clean and modern room. Very helpful and friendly owner. He helped us move the booking to the next day after we missed our flight due to unforeseen circumstances. A real gem in Athens as the name suggests. Breakfast at Everest was good too, very abundant, leaving you enough for a takeaway lunch as well. Very convenient 2 minute walk from a metro stop that brings you either into town or to the airport. Good value for money.

Cosy & friendly!
We really enjoyed our 2 nights stay in ATHENIAN GEM.
Centrally located,  just 40 ( !!!) meters from AMPELOKIPI Metro station...one minute walking distance!
Lots of restaurants & cafes just on the other side of the road .
MEGARON HALL is 5 minutes by foot.
George, the owner , was always ready to walk the 'extra mile ' to help us and give any information needed.
Room was spacious, clean and tidy, with all necessary amenities!
We will be back!!!
Fantastic room with plenty of natural light and spacious balcony. Great quiet and safe location with lots of choices for dining. Thank you for your hospitality.

The location of the hotel is great (next to Ampelokipoi Metro Station), which makes it accessible to/from the port of Piraeus, Athens Int. Airport and to all must-visit places in Athens. Rooms are beautiful, comfortable, sunny and clean. We also experienced an exceptional customer service from the staff,  and we highly recommend it, if planning a business trip or a city break in Athens.

I stayed only one night, coming from Kefalonia, the next day I left very early. The very kind host showed us where to park the car. Clean apartment, equipped with good taste, decorations and good quality appliances, located near the city center
Lovely apartment close to the tube and the city center. Clean and tidy, with comfortable bed and modern equipment. The owners apart from very helpful and polite, they have a good taste in decoration
Very nice apartment, safe, clean, warm, renovated. It has everything anyone needs and is in a very good location right next to the metro. We will prefer it again!
Nice apartment, in a good area near the metro.. it was clean and quiet at night... worth it
Excellent beautiful and warm space. The hosts are very friendly and willing, capable of turning a simple stay into a unique and unforgettable experience...

An excellent apartment in a phenomenal location, 7 minutes' walk from the M3 metro station, which is two stops from Syntagma Square. The apartment is fully equipped, it has everything you need. Two large bedrooms, two bathrooms, living room, kitchen and terrace. Comfortable beds and pillows. There are towels, toiletries, iron, hair dryer, toaster, microwave... Everything you can think of that you need for a comfortable stay is here... Aleksandra has thought of everything👍 This is definitely the most beautiful and the most equipped apartment I've been in so far, all recommendations from me.

In general, we loved everything about the apartment. It is as spacious as it seems in the photos. It has two bedrooms with a double bed (one of them with a bathroom), another large bathroom, a very complete and very spacious American kitchen, where you can find at your disposal a drip coffee maker, another capsule coffee maker, microwave, dishwasher and all the necessary utensils for cooking, and although it may seem like a minor thing, the fact that you find things as basic as ground coffee, sugar, oil, salt , etc. makes your stay easier if you want to cook, in our case we only had breakfast and dinner, but it was very good for us.
And as a cherry on top of the treatment received from Alexandra, she allowed us to leave our luggage in the apartment before check-in so we could move more freely around Athens and when we arrived at the apartment we found a bottle of very cold water in the refrigerator, You can imagine how grateful we were with temperatures of 40⁰C on the street.
It is without a doubt the best vacation apartment we have ever been in.
Super Apartment with all amenities. Good central location and quiet neighborhood. Supermarket and restaurants nearby.

Enjoyable stay in a very comfortable apartment, spotlessly clean, fully equipped with everything one needs and tastefully decorated. The location was ideal, close to many attractions and with easy access to the metro and other public transport.  The host very friendly, helpful and always willing to help. We really enjoyed every moment here and would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a great stay experience!

Beautiful small studio downtown, next to the metro station  on the Airport line. All listed amenities, provided.
Great location and amazing view.
Sofia is an excellent host.

Tiny studio apartment, new and incredibly clean. Located on the last floor 5, on the roof of the building.  The highlight is the large balcony overlooking the city and the surrounding hills.  Downstairs there is a cute bistro to drink wine in the evening, in addition to a supermarket, around many bakeries, cafes and restaurants and also a number of hairdressers, I plan shades and color.
Sofia, a charming woman, welcomed us with a greeting and a smile.
Very beautiful house with a very good view

An amazing tiny rooftop apartment with a gorgeous view.
Highly recommend
Had an amazing holiday here. The host was very helpful and friendly. Thank you so much.
So cute and comfortable!

Nice place. Spacious clean. Good contact with the owner.
Only two months of cons:
Quality breakfasts to prepare yourself and only one key to the apartment (I didn't ask for an additional one)

Very nice apartment!
Bravo to the owner, everything was neat and with good facilities!
Absolutely amazing and outstanding property. The property owners are very friendly and cooperative. Wonderful experience so far.
Excellent rooms with exceptionally warm and helpful hosts! 100% recommended!!
Best apartments and best hosts in town
Nice place but foos not really good, would not return again
Clean, cosy in a great position!

Rooms are very modern and the suite is very big and clean. Can’t fault any of this! One of the lights over the bath flickered. Balcony was large and great view over the city. Well stocked kitchen. However, if on the balcony the main road is busy and it’s still a 15-20 minute bus/taxi to central parts (eg Plaka/Acropolis/Zeus Statue etc)

We spent 1 night there and there are some areas to improve: 1) The sound proofing doesn’t work too well during the night so it’s a bit noisy with the traffic nearby (I think it’s a main road with quite many vehicles). 2) The bed sheet and towels had stains on it even though they were newly changed. Probably some persistent stains that were hard to wash off by laundry. It will be good if the cleaning staff can check this more carefully beforehand. 3) There is no reception which can be good and bad at the same time. One saves time for checking in and out. But on the other hand, it’s hard to get service during night. We couldn’t manage to get new towels and bed sheet in our case.

Some good points: 1) The location is good. You can find subway, cafes, supermarkets, etc quite nearby (walking distance). 2) The room is new and modern. Equipments are in mint conditions. 3) There is a chat service via which you can get immediate responses from the host.

Enjoyed staying here.

Super nice interior and beautiful view. Good communication with the host.

Nice location near the metro and restaurants.
Very nice and clean room. Great experience in the heart of Athens
It is a very nice place and very pleasant, very friendly and clean, I will definitely come again
The apartment was nice and very clean.The staff was very helpful.  Unfortunately, the location was noise because too close to a big road.

Rooms are pretty nice and the place overall feels like a home instead of a hotel. We came at 8pm although latest check in was at 9pm and nobody opened the door since it was through buzzer. So we had to wait for the owner of the hotel to come and hand us the keys (30 minutes). Other than that it's a good place to take public transportation, walking distance from the metro and many busses run on the road in front of
This place has contacted a broker company that gives fake positive reviews. Do not trust this place
achieved through advertising. they make comments for money
Very good place

Stayed in this beautiful and cozy apartment for a few days while visiting Athens. The hosts were amazing and always present to lend a helping hand while profoundly discreet. Since I work remotely, it was a pleasant surprise to find all the amenities I needed to crunch some numbers during the day while enjoyed the local life during the night. Located in a central quiet neighborhood of downtown Athens in a walking distance from main metro stations. The F&K apartment really made my stay in Athens a trip to remember. Definitely advisable!!!!
Excellent accommodation, comfortable environment, adequately designed.!!!
Very nice apartment clean and neat, in a good area near the center and easy parking!! When I come to Athens again I will definitely stay there again!!

New apartment, spotlessly clean and conveniently located. Comfortable in size. 2 minutes from the Panormou metro and is surprisingly convenient for commuting to the center and the airport. Completely impersonal check-in with detailed instructions on how to get the keys from the box at the entrance.
A view of an ugly street, an unequipped bathroom, missing plates and utensils in the kitchen, a cockroach crawled into our bathroom and terrible wifi
Brand new one-room apartment, fully equipped!!! Totally satisfied!!!
Excellent condition apparent very close to the metro station,very friendly staff and quick response! Good prices also I recommend for everyone who needs something secure and comfortable to stay.
Amazing apartment, comfortably furnished and carefully decorated! The location is ideal and at an affordable price!
Excellent apartment, excellent hospitality, Mr. Konstantinos
Beautiful apartment with everything you need in a central area!

Olive Villa Rentals was great from the first message I sent. Very quick to respond and very helpful in planning our journey. Also the ongoing support during our stay was fantastic and greatly appreciated. Highly professional and great experience.

The villa was amazing (Villa Bliss) and everything we hoped for with beautiful accommodation, well maintained property, sensational views and great amenities.

We rent a villa in Spetses every year, and villa Calisti is by far the best villa we have ever stayed on the island.

We spent a few days in July, and the villa is brand new, with amazing views and a big swimming pool (a rare find for Spetses).

The location is only a 5 min walk from Dapia, and the villa was super clean and spacious for our group (group of 10).

We made the booking through Olive Villa Rentals, and the service provided was outstanding.

I had the pleasure of staying at the wonderful Villa Marelia on the island of Spetses, and it was truly a great experience. The house is beautifully furnished and offers a fantastic seaview. The rooms are spacious, the beds are comfortable, and there’s air conditioning throughout the house, which was very refreshing given the warm temperatures.

On relaxing days, we spent a lot of time by the large pool, which had plenty of space for all my friends and me to lounge comfortably. The kitchen and living room are also tastefully designed, and cooking together was a lot of fun.

The host was extremely friendly and accommodating, and communication with her was smooth and easy.
From friends i know about an existing waterproblem on the island of Spetses, which made me worrying a bit. Nonethless i found out the the villa has a water tank for these circumstances. After all the water in the house worked flawlessly at all times.

The beaches on the island are stunning, with crystal-clear water perfect for swimming and relaxing. The culinary experiences on Spetses were also excellent. Overall, it was a fantastic holiday that I highly recommend and i can recommend everybody a stay at the Marelia villa. I will come again.

I recommend Olive Rentals without any reservation !  They were very present and effective at all stages: before, during and after our stay.  very very responsive, always.  Dimitris and Nantia did everything to make us happy and it was a perfect success. Great holidays in a very beautiful villa. I will deal again with Olive rentals !

Villa Delia near Panormos Bay was absolutely beautiful.  The terrace with seaviews all around was the highlight of our trip to Greece.  The house was in terrific shape and the owner was so friendly and welcoming, helping us whenever we needed it.  All the rooms have a sea view.  We loved being able to walk to Panormos for dinner.  Pyrgos, also close by, was our favorite town on Tinos.  The villa is very private and allows for plenty of relaxation if you want to enjoy the pool and outdoors. We would love to use Oliva Villa Rentals again.  Tinos was our favorite place during our recent trip to Greece.

Just avoid it. The worst thing from the lack of cleanliness, noise, rough construction, non-existent help from the host is his argumentative behavior. Unfortunately, I read her comments and unacceptable answers later
Nice owner, no noise, relaxing apartment. Would suggest. Also isn’t too expensive, great value.
Fantastic, absolutely nothing to complain!

Excellent apartments, clean, bright, organized with many amenities, balcony, internet, smart TV, washing machine, kitchen with many utensils, toaster, microwave, kettle, coffee maker, slippers, towels, nice pillows-mattresses! Easy access to subway and nearby supermarket!
And also a great host! I suggest it!
Exactly 1 minute from the house, the underground parking of the president hotel is available for a fee (the first 2 hours 5 euros each subsequent 0.50 euros)
Large apartment in a central location. The rooms are very good. The second bathroom needs a renovation. The kitchen needs improvements. Otherwise a good experience

To date I have communicated by phone 3 times with the team of Booking partners and especially Mr. George, Mrs. Melpomeni and a little while ago with Mr. Lefteris.
EXCELLENTLY TRAINED, SWEET, FRIENDLY, and most importantly willing to help as they did 100%.
Thanks guys, keep up the good work. I enjoyed every minute we talked. Have health.

Excellent budget hotel. Excellent location. Incredibly easy airport bus access. Front desk was staffed, even at 6am. Great price for a family of five. The family room had a large bed, a twin bed, a sofa made up as a single bed, and a comfortable cot.
Grocery (AB) was next door, and a short walk to amazing souvlaki at Souvlaki Μπαρμπαθωμάς, and desserts at ΖΑΧΑΡΟΠΛΑΣΤΕΙΑ ΚΩΝΣΤΑΝΤΙΝΙΔΗΣ.
The shower was handheld and didn't have a shower curtain.
This hotel is just great I can't tell something else! It has nice service it is very clean big and nice and it is perfect for short days!
The room was clean, there is an elevator. Good hotel for short stays.

I stayed in this hotel for 5 days when I came to Athens for a scientific congress. My room was clean and i had a great balcony. The hotel staff was really friendly, kind and helpful. Great location with easy transportation conditions. The hotel’s area is a very safe. There are many cafes within walking distance. Thanks for everything.  Highly recommended!

Please make sure this hotel is a budget hotel. Considering the price, I'm quite satisfied with this hotel. The elevator is very small, and I can say it is cute^^ It has private parking garage behind the hotel. All the staffs are very kind and warm-hearted. You can feel the Greek-style hospitality.

Upon entry we thought the decor was lovely,  service was great as well.
However the rooms are average
The walls are thin, found it very noisy from hallway noise.
Access to the pool was blocked by furniture  and you had to look frustrated walking around the restaurant to get outside. Just ridiculous.
We ate at the restaurant and food was good, serving size was on the small side.
The service was terrible. If I didn't get up and go to the bar they would have forgotten our wine order.

The location we found to far from Athens
The view from the roof is not the Acropolis, so don't be fooled. Still a lovely Outlook, but there is much better to be found.

The welcome to the car from the lady responsible should be way better and doesn't reflect the ethos that the hotel tries to give. The bar staff was overwhelmed with ordered and got my first and second drink wrong. Ordering a lovely rum, that I returned and then I got it back right but there was cork residue in the drink. Bar staff where lovely and helpful but it's the little things that matter on that level. Overall...great view...a must if you're visiting Athens and stay in that area.

The room was a good size, clean and comfortable but we had an east facing room that became an oven quickly in the morning and was noisy due to traffic at night. The lifts were a problem especially when everyone was leaving at the same time and we were on the 7th floor. There are 4 lifts but only 2 servicing our floor.  On the last morning they could not fit everyone in the breakfast area as various tours were leaving at the same time so we were shuffled to another area where service was slow and staff disinclined. However all that aside for a short stay it was worth the money and we enjoyed our stay.

Great place, very friendly and helpful staff.
Enjoyed my stay, I'm planning on returning again when I'm either on business or potentially even a short holiday break.

The rooms are large and have very good air conditioning as well (important during the hotter months).

I'd like to thank the staff for a pleasant stay.

Nice and well-maintained hotel with spacious, clean rooms. Staff nice and polite. Beautiful view from the windows of the city panorama. At the very top there is a swimming pool and a bar which I recommend visiting at least once. What more could you want... well, you can... the choice of food for breakfast is modest and above all, terribly disgusting coffee... probably instant and of the worst quality!!! You have to change that (I hope someone from the staff reads this review ;)

Very nice place located 7 minutes walk from the center of Fira, 10 minutes from the bus station, very efficient among other things. The room is essential but in the positive sense of the term: the room is tidy and cleaned every morning by the cleaning lady who changes the towels. There is also a mini fridge. The bathroom is small but it doesn't matter in the end. The room overlooks a path equipped with tables, where it is possible to have breakfast. The staff is super welcoming and efficient. There is also a small swimming pool in which you can stay until 8 pm. if I'm not mistaken.
The price is rock bottom for the services offered and for the place.
I will definitely go there tomorrow when I return to Santorini
The owner, his mother and all people that works at the hotel is completely helpful and I felt like if I was at home during my stay there.

Stayed 2 nights August 14th family of 4
The hotel is situated in a prime location with easy transportation. The staff at the front desk were very friendly and welcoming, and they provided us with all the information we needed for our stay. Room was very spacious, clean and beautifully decorated. By far the most comfortable bed I have slept in.
Fantastic breakfast served in the morning.
Every staff member we interacted with went above and beyond to ensure our stay was enjoyable.
For the price, this hotel offers excellent value for money. The combination of the location, amenities, and service makes it well worth the cost. Overall our stay at the hotel was fantastic. We would highly recommend this hotel to families, couples looking for a romantic getaway or business travellers. Looking forward to staying here again in the future. Also forgot to mention transportation included to the airport.

If you wanna stay at a hotel that has no ac in a 100 degree weather this is your place!!! Had them come look at it first night said it would be fixed the next day. Next night still no ac asked for another room and was told hotel was completely full. Breakfast was slim to nothing. I would not recommend to anyone. Much better hotels around!!!

This was a late booking the night before we left Greece, but I would stay here again with no issue. Nice rooms, easy check-in and the breakfast the next morning was good. One of the best parts about this hotel was that they have their own dedicated parking for an additional 8 Euro (well worth it if you have tried to find adequate parking in Athens).

Not recommended at all!! Ridiculous breakfast. Green light is always on in the room above the bed.. the most stupid thing ever when you're supposed to sleep..
Waste of money. There are much better places for less and better quality.
Don’t be fooled by the pics , hotel is surrounded by old buildings with no view , Athen in general is an overrated and not a beautiful city to visit
They charged me 100% even I have canceled a week before arrival. Complete rip off! Never again

The place overall is ok, but wouldn’t want to return there.
Good(fine): a lot of space for sleeping; there is AC in every bedroom; fully equipped kitchen; good WiFi connectivity; near the metro station; you can book day in day.
Bad: absolutely terrible ventilation windows and tunnel! (you literally can hear everything from other floors), there wasn’t any litter bin in the kitchen or in any room except the bathroom; and the building and street are dirty.
In total, this place is not too bad, but maybe for it’s price it is perfect

Good size apartment, reactive host, near metro station, 3-4 metro stops from city center, near cafes, supermarkets, gyros eating places. Bathroom can be improved. Toilet doesn't flush well, shower is unmovable and water was spraying onto the shower curtain rather than onto you.
Air bnb, nice apartment.
Fantastic!!!!! Everything perfect!!! Thanks a lot..

Everything is fine. We contacted the owners. They were waiting for us. We found parking on the same street (and the minibus had a long wheelbase), free of charge. They rang the wide glass door of the front door (A1). Then we went up the stairs to the 2nd floor. The apartment is clean. Internet is good. Attention! Do not open the ventilation window in the shower!!

Haris is an amazing host! He will gladly go out of his way to accommodate you! He will check-in and greet you in person, has immediate  response times and will generally tend to most of your needs.
Goes without saying that the apartments are spotless and newly renovated.
Definitely recommended....hence all the 5-star reviews!!

We chose to stay at Harishouse after searching for an apartment close to the city but needed something more peaceful than the city centre. If you are looking for a clean, beautifully designed modern place to stay, then this is an apartment for you. Much to our surprise was the fully equipped kitchen and living areas. A real value for money, will definitely  be staying here on our next visit to Athens.
Harry is an awesome host, very helpful and kind. The room has literally anything you might need clean and airy. Very close to markets. I fully recommend it.
Excellent location, think Haris is one the most super host there is...for sure ill visi for second time~adv super clean rooms~vfm
Clean and comfortable room in a quiet neighborhood near the children's hospital.  Lord Haris served us as many times as we needed him. Me and my family were very pleased and I highly recommend it!!!

A nice place for a short stay un Athens. The manager is very friendly, the location is close to The Athena Towers. It is obvious that the owner is doing every thing to make you feel comfortable: tea, cofee and sugar is offered from the house. After I made the booking the manager emailed me and he was at the agreed time at the location to hand me the keys. Very eager to see us pleased with our stay.
Good location! The apartment you can find everything like home. Fully equipped kitchen. Very kind host. Sure we will visit again.
Just perfect... great
Great

We had a wonderful time on this beautiful island, Maraki with her wonderful smile and her service, made us feel at home, her hospitality was wonderful and whatever information we wanted about the island she was willing to inform us, we are leaving with the best memories and we can't wait to come again!!!❤️😘

Amazing host! Great apartment for a small family!

For context, my wife and I moved to Athens for a couple months with our 3 small kids (4 and under) to have our 4th child in Athens. We were looking for a resonably priced apartment that would suit our growing family. When we saw this had 2 bedrooms with 3 beds for our kids in the 2nd room, we jumped on it.

The apartment itself is freshly remodeled. All the appliances are new, the paint and cabinetry are sleek and modern, and we appreciated the interior design choices. While the dense urban location within Athens limits natural light, the blackout windows and ample lighting make up for this. There is plenty of storage in both bedrooms, which we greatly appreciated. The patio out back was great for our kids to play when the weather was warm. The refridgerator/freeze is MASSIVE and was helpful because we cooked a lot of meals while there. The bathroom is spacious and the hot shower has a nice shower head. We enjoyed the artwork on the walls as well that was made by the owner's mother, which brings me to the owner...

Vasiliki and her husband Jad were so kind to our family. From the moment we arrived, they did everything they could to make us feel comfortable. If we needed something, they provided it. They never made us feel like we were an inconvenience (and with 4 small kids, we could have been!) and regularly dropped off things for us to help us out. They even brought us some delicious Greek holiday treats!

While the apartment itself is small and it isn't ideally located, it's not far from the Panormou subway station (5-7 minute walk) and from the A5 bus stop which goes to Syntagma Square. There isn't any parking on site but we usually found street parking nearby without any problems. With the birth of our 4th child we quickly outgrew the apartment, but we were grateful for the time we had there. I highly recommend for a family of 4 or 5.

Good location. Iron machine, washing machine hairdryer. Nice room and kitchen and big balcony.
Kitchen stuff maybe needs little more things cutting board, knife wooden spoon. 🙂 But definitely deserve 5 stars.

Comfortable apartment for 1/2 people with literally all amenities and at a very affordable price compared to the competition. Immediate service. I will prefer it again and recommend it to others. Access by OASA to and from the center (Constitution). The only "disadvantage" is the relative "bubble" due to L. Mesogion, which is tolerable.
