In all other fields, I have nothing to say that is not worthy. 5/5
Great apartment, has everything you need for a comfortable stay. Clean, in a good location next to hospitals. Excellent communication and service. I recommend you to choose it.
Second time we chose Elvita Apartments and we were extremely pleased!
The apartment in Ampelokipis near Errikos Dunan on the top floor very good. Clean, quiet, central and easily accessible from main roads 10✔️

Definitely a wonderful experience. I have not been expecting, that for this price , in the middle of the summer season, you can have such a nice place to stay in such a nice area of Athens.
We stayed for 1 night only , but we will be definitely returning to Kriel Suits next time we will be in Athens.
The rooms are very nice, clean , cozy, nicely decorated, clean bathrooms, clean sheets, very confortable, restaurants and bars everywhere at a 1-2 min walk .
Just like in the photos they provide.
It's just like a small apartment.
Super nice 🔝

The room was very newly refurbished and clean, was good for one night layover. It could fit 3 people but due to small bathroom might not be very comfortable for longer stays. It was great for late evening check in, very clear instructions were given and help by the hosts prior my arrival. My only advice is to clean the shower better because it was a bit mouldy and it's quite small, bigger guys would struggle to use it. I highly recommend for short stays and late check-in.
Fantastic stay at Kriel Suites! Modern, spotless suites in a prime Athens location, near hospitals. Made a difficult time for my family very pleasant. Highly recommend!
Spacious and comfortable, great beds and pillows. Decorated with style. Lots of cafes around and walkable to anywhere.
No cleaning during stay. Very small room. Bathroom not like on picture. Bad reachability of management.

New apartment, spotlessly clean and conveniently located. Comfortable in size. 2 minutes from the Panormou metro and is surprisingly convenient for commuting to the center and the airport. Completely impersonal check-in with detailed instructions on how to get the keys from the box at the entrance.
A view of an ugly street, an unequipped bathroom, missing plates and utensils in the kitchen, a cockroach crawled into our bathroom and terrible wifi
Brand new one-room apartment, fully equipped!!! Totally satisfied!!!
Nice owner, no noise, relaxing apartment. Would suggest. Also isn’t too expensive, great value.
Fantastic, absolutely nothing to complain!

Excellent apartments, clean, bright, organized with many amenities, balcony, internet, smart TV, washing machine, kitchen with many utensils, toaster, microwave, kettle, coffee maker, slippers, towels, nice pillows-mattresses! Easy access to subway and nearby supermarket!
And also a great host! I suggest it!
Exactly 1 minute from the house, the underground parking of the president hotel is available for a fee (the first 2 hours 5 euros each subsequent 0.50 euros)
Large apartment in a central location. The rooms are very good. The second bathroom needs a renovation. The kitchen needs improvements. Otherwise a good experience
Nice service
Clean, nicely decorated, and affordable.
Affordable luxury and a wonderful stay experience, in a super-convenient location, for everything, in Athens! Thanks!
The apartment was nice and very clean.The staff was very helpful.  Unfortunately, the location was noise because too close to a big road.

Rooms are pretty nice and the place overall feels like a home instead of a hotel. We came at 8pm although latest check in was at 9pm and nobody opened the door since it was through buzzer. Other than that it's a good place to take public transportation, walking distance from the metro and many busses run on the road in front of

Very good place

The perfect place to stay! I've been visiting this place the last 4 years, at least twice per year and it is PERFECT! It is the best place to meet new people, have fun and party as well! The owners there are too friendly and awesome except one, who thinks he is a singer (but he is not). After the first hour though you will love him as well. I am so excited when I visit this place, highly recommended!

This place is amazing! Everybody is cheerful all the time and they sing for no reason! They will order food for me and get me around the town. They even get me to their office while working! Amazing, 5/5 would stay on their couch again!!! You haven't seen Athens...no scratch that..Greece!..no scratch that..LIFE! You haven't seen LIFE if you have yet to sleep on that couch!
Amazing apartment, spotlessly clean and tasteful. Easy access, 2' from Panormos metro. I could not forget the kind and helpful owner. I highly recommend it.
Flawless
Comfortable hospitality, all of them very helpful, thank you very much!

Excellent hostels!
Well done colleagues for the effort
Easy access, cleanliness, large TV, air conditioning, it has nothing to envy from many rental rooms or hotels.
Very admirable effort by SX to create these hostels extremely comfortable, airy, spacious and very clean...if there was access to the Mediterranean through the closed gate, that would be great....
Great rooms

An excellent apartment in a phenomenal location, 7 minutes' walk from the M3 metro station, which is two stops from Syntagma Square. The apartment is fully equipped, it has everything you need. Two large bedrooms, two bathrooms, living room, kitchen and terrace. Comfortable beds and pillows. There are towels, toiletries, iron, hair dryer, toaster, microwave... Everything you can think of that you need for a comfortable stay is here... Aleksandra has thought of everything👍 This is definitely the most beautiful and the most equipped apartment I've been in so far, all recommendations from me.

In general, we loved everything about the apartment. It is as spacious as it seems in the photos. It has two bedrooms with a double bed (one of them with a bathroom), another large bathroom, a very complete and very spacious American kitchen, where you can find at your disposal a drip coffee maker, another capsule coffee maker, microwave, dishwasher and all the necessary utensils for cooking, and although it may seem like a minor thing, the fact that you find things as basic as ground coffee, sugar, oil, salt , etc. makes your stay easier if you want to cook, in our case we only had breakfast and dinner, but it was very good for us.
And as a cherry on top of the treatment received from Alexandra, she allowed us to leave our luggage in the apartment before check-in so we could move more freely around Athens and when we arrived at the apartment we found a bottle of very cold water in the refrigerator, You can imagine how grateful we were with temperatures of 40⁰C on the street.
It is without a doubt the best vacation apartment we have ever been in.
Super Apartment with all amenities. Good central location and quiet neighborhood. Supermarket and restaurants nearby.

Enjoyable stay in a very comfortable apartment, spotlessly clean, fully equipped with everything one needs and tastefully decorated. The location was ideal, close to many attractions and with easy access to the metro and other public transport.  The host very friendly, helpful and always willing to help. We really enjoyed every moment here and would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a great stay experience!

Beautiful small studio downtown, next to the metro station  on the Airport line. All listed amenities, provided.
Great location and amazing view.
Sofia is an excellent host.

Tiny studio apartment, new and incredibly clean. Located on the last floor 5, on the roof of the building.  The highlight is the large balcony overlooking the city and the surrounding hills.  Downstairs there is a cute bistro to drink wine in the evening, in addition to a supermarket, around many bakeries, cafes and restaurants and also a number of hairdressers, I plan shades and color.
Sofia, a charming woman, welcomed us with a greeting and a smile.
Very beautiful house with a very good view

Just avoid it. The worst thing from the lack of cleanliness, noise, rough construction, non-existent help from the host is his argumentative behavior. Unfortunately, I read her comments and unacceptable answers later

Ideal apartment on the third floor. Spotlessly clean, very neat with all amenities. In a very good spot, right next to a metro stop.
Price very reasonable.
The communication with the owner was immediate and flawless.
I highly recommend it and will use it again on a future trip

An amazing tiny rooftop apartment with a gorgeous view.
Highly recommend
Amazing, great location, Vangelis gave us recommendations for amazing places. I highly recommend it and if I return to Athens at another time I will come back here.
Very good place to stay in Athens...fair price, clean, tidy, near the metro and very helpful hosts!! Efharisto!!
Very well located and in a good neighborhood. I like the accommodation is new and clean. Host is very kind. Thanks!!!!

Great hotel, at a very convenient location!
Rooms are beautifully decorated with attention to detail. Staff is eager and helpful. Room service is impeccable and available 24 hours.
Free parking is an additional value.
Recommended for short stay at the premises ! AAA+++

Nice and comfortable rooms.
Little bit of noise from the street but not bothering too much.
Jacuzzi available in the rooms.
Breakfast is served in the room and it is satisfying.
Good working wifi connection.
Staff is very accommodating and helpful.
Only drawback: the nearest metro station is about 15' minutes walk.

Adults only.
A new hotel, clean and equiped, which major bussines is day use (hence only 4 stars).
Free parking.
Best service.
Recommended.

5/5 -> Clean room, big jacuzzi, great breakfast.
3/5 -> service, landscape, location
2/5 -> Elevator broken for 2 days

Variation for normal lightning would be great option.
The most luxurious room and the most attentive and helpful staff. The best ever stay anywhere

We stay here every year. The room we get with a kitchen and 2 rooms in one is fabulous! The balcony is huge. The kitchen is nice and the showers are neat. The AC works very well, and that is key! The service is great but there is nobody there from 9 pm to 9 am, I believe . They leave 4 extra pillows in the room, and the mattresses are the best we have slept on in all of the hotels we have stayed at! There's a full refrigerator with snacks and drinks! They are charged to the room but it's not too expensive.  There is a washing machine in the room as well not sure if it's a 2 in 1 with a drier. Its not loud at night like other parts of Athens where you can't sleep because all the noise. We slept great! Can't wait to be back next year!

Nice rooms, great service! Very friendly!  They were so helpful holding our bags since we came in on a cruise mid morning.  We dropped the bags, and they held them until almost 7pm for us! I would highly recommend!

Update: The breakfast was AMAZING!! It was full of delicious local foods! SOOO amazing! Thank Newel Psychiko for an amazing stay! 👏

Amazing service, beautiful design of the rooms and building, well planned and designed, great breakfast. Calm residential area location in a walking distance to Katehaki metro station. Many thanks to entire crew and especially to Niki, Rena and other folks who helped to make our stay so special.

Absolutely loved this small hotel. Very modern interior with great attention to detail.  Massive rooms and very well equipped.  The staff were very helpful and spoke very good English.  Would definitely stay here again.

Great hotel
Completely new. Very minimalistic and practical.
Not too many rooms - so no noise.
People are super nice.
Breakfast is ok. Enough choices to find something to eat. Good coffee (not filter sh*t) orange juice is freshly made…
The only “less nice” thing is the location.
It’s in the middle of  residential streets - not really in the center. But you have a metro at walking distance - about 15min. - about halfway between the airport (20 min) and center city
Really recommend it.

Zeus Luxury Business Suite
Super clean, easy to reach, comfortable and with the loveliest hosts apartment

The reservation process was uncomplicated, and the hosts were very forthcoming to answer any questions or information prior to our arrival.
A few days before our arrival the hosts created a WhatsApp group chat to facilitate the communication, and arrange the details about their pick-up service.
Getting there: the apartment is both by car or train easy to reach. There is a train station from the M3 line close to it which allows an easy access from the airport and to the main tourist destinations.
Apartment location:  the apartment is in the suburbs, however due to its proximity to the underground station it is easy to reach all major tourist attractions like the Acropolis (around 25 minutes from door to door).
The neighborhood is lively but not loud, and you can observe the locals going about their daily business and get a feeling how it is to live there. Everything you need is around the corner like drugstores, supermarkets, restaurants, cafes, hairdressers ..... everyone is very friendly and do their best to speak English.
Checking in:  before arrival our hosts gave us the pin number to the keys' safe outside the building. Then you go down a flight of stairs ( about 5 steps) and you find the apartment on the ground floor directly by the entrance. When we got in we found a cozy, squeaky clean, modern and pleasantly decorated place. The color of the walls, furniture and textiles are all matched with care and love, and very instagrammable ( if you're into it). Since the apartment is on the ground floor and well protected from sunlight and heat it is pretty cool inside and I can imagine it is really pleasant during summertime. The place is both equipped with radiators and air conditioning.
The check in procedure was pleasant and overall we had an excellent experience with our hosts.
The rooms: everything was spotless, bedsheets were the brightest white and smelled fresh. The overall cleanliness and hygiene of the whole place is excellent.
When you walk in you have a spacious room with the living and dining are as well as hooks to hang the jackets and a built in closet.
Everywhere you find notes with the Wifi password, how to heat the shower's water ...
To the left you can find a small narrow, however fully equipped kitchen. We stayed there for ten days and were perfectly able to prepare our meals. They have a good range of kitchen appliances with a microwave oven and a capsule coffee machine, but no oven.
Straight ahead you can find a small corridor with a spacious bathroom to the left and a spacious cozy bedroom to the right.
The shower has an overhead rain shower and enough room to move and relax. It also includes a washing machine and a dryer.
The bed in the bedroom can be split up into two single beds.
I slept on the couch and it was very comfortable and sturdy which was great for my back.
I had to work there for a few days and managed to do so comfortably in the dining area as well as on the couch. The internet connection was stable and quick ( about 5G).
Altogether we had a great experience with the apartment and in the city. Our hosts with all the information and support they offered played a central role and had a great impact in our time there. We definitely recommend it.
A huge thanks to Michael and Madeline for your kindness and time! We hope to see you again!!!
It is not clear exactly what services it provides.

Rooms are very modern and the suite is very big and clean. Can’t fault any of this! One of the lights over the bath flickered. Balcony was large and great view over the city. Well stocked kitchen. However, if on the balcony the main road is busy and it’s still a 15-20 minute bus/taxi to central parts (eg Plaka/Acropolis/Zeus Statue etc)

We spent 1 night there and there are some areas to improve: 1) The sound proofing doesn’t work too well during the night so it’s a bit noisy with the traffic nearby (I think it’s a main road with quite many vehicles). 2) The bed sheet and towels had stains on it even though they were newly changed. Probably some persistent stains that were hard to wash off by laundry. It will be good if the cleaning staff can check this more carefully beforehand. 3) There is no reception which can be good and bad at the same time. One saves time for checking in and out. But on the other hand, it’s hard to get service during night. We couldn’t manage to get new towels and bed sheet in our case.

Some good points: 1) The location is good. You can find subway, cafes, supermarkets, etc quite nearby (walking distance). 2) The room is new and modern. Equipments are in mint conditions. 3) There is a chat service via which you can get immediate responses from the host.

Enjoyed staying here.

Super nice interior and beautiful view. Good communication with the host.

Nice location near the metro and restaurants.
Very nice and clean room. Great experience in the heart of Athens
It is a very nice place and very pleasant, very friendly and clean, I will definitely come again

We came under very stressful circumstances and walked around for hours until we finally ended up at the inn, and in the midst of the covid-19 crisis in Athens, it was a small blessing. The kind, friendly staff made our stay in the city infinitely better.

It's small and clean, but I wish that they would secure the beds to the floors somehow, since they slide away from the headboard at the smallest squirm at night. Other than that it was quite cozy and quiet, which was much appreciated after a whole day of traveling.
Nice hotels. Two days stay in Athens, the landlady is very nice, telling us many useful information.
the best
Very nice bless
Good hotel

We booked in good faith.  However, the apartment building cellar is connected to a parking place for motorbikes, the entire complex fills up with exhaust fumes.  It leaks into the apartment, only opening the windows and doors was effective at dispelling the fumes.  It's situated just off a main thoroughfare, which is convenient but noisy - and of course, the apartment heats up.
The balcony was flooded, blocked from draining, so we couldn't sit outside.  Although the apartment was surface clean, plates had old food on them and I started noticing more small things that weren't hygienic - and then the internet crashed.  By this point we had a headache from the fumes and wanted to cancel and leave.
We called the owner, 2 men turned up that couldn't smell anything, (they must work in a sewage facility to have such lack of smell), and only offered that we could contact the cleaning company.
This apartment is unhealthy, and the owner is unhelpful.  Due to their reaction, I don't think this is the first complaint they've had, they were prepared.  Since we checked reviews before we booked, I'm posting this as a warning.  It's not so much the cleanliness, that's an easy fix, it's not being able to breathe clean air!
We're out of money and had the stress of finding new accommodation and a hotel for the night. Luckily our new apartment owner and even the hotel with the late book in, were  a lot more helpful and kind.

The accommodation is perfect, I visited it with my family and we were completely satisfied.
Fairly clean space and with all amenities.
Also the owners are absolutely friendly and easy to understand.
I highly recommend it!!

Ideal apartment on the third floor. Spotlessly clean, very neat with all amenities. In a very good spot, right next to a metro stop.
Price very reasonable.
The communication with the owner was immediate and flawless.
I highly recommend it and will use it again on a future trip
Comfortable hospitality, all of them very helpful, thank you very much!

Excellent hostels!
Well done colleagues for the effort
Easy access, cleanliness, large TV, air conditioning, it has nothing to envy from many rental rooms or hotels.
Very admirable effort by SX to create these hostels extremely comfortable, airy, spacious and very clean...if there was access to the Mediterranean through the closed gate, that would be great....
Great rooms
Perfect for children.. Fresh air.. Coffe and snacks. Open area
It's a nice place to take your dogs for a walk or hangout with your friends, family, or boyfriend/girlfriend. It's really quiet and clean and I hope that it will remain just the way it is or better

Nice flat Park with paved paths and big green lawn. Family friendly place, good for daily excursions and biking, with a small area equipped with ramps for tricks. Has a cafeteria offering refreshments. Trees offer place for resting from the sun.

Nice big open area with a couple of art venues. There are very few (if any) public facilities available, like toilets. Also, there is no proper walkway for pedestrians to use to reach the park but too many too many cars which isn't very safe especially for children.
Best place in the area to have a walk or use the  outdoors free gympark. Great place for children also.

I recently booked a luxury camping experience through this website, and I have to say, it was fantastic! The platform was easy to use, making it simple to find and select the perfect destination for my getaway.

Overall, I highly recommend this website for a seamless luxury camping experience. The user-friendly platform, helpful customer support, and enjoyable accommodations made it a memorable trip. I look forward to booking with them again in the future!

Campsaround introduced me to the wonderful world of glamping, and I'm amazed! As someone who didn't know what glamping was before, I was pleasantly surprised by the luxurious accommodations and incredible experience. The website is user-friendly interface provided seamless navigation and effortless booking. If you're new to glamping like I was, Campsaround is the perfect place to dive into this unique and delightful adventure! I totally recommend it.
Very useful website, easy to use, with a variety of options that can please any taste you might have. Overall, a reliable platform for fans of glamping.
I have already booked two of my vacations from Campsaround. With the quick response that I had from the platform and the camping, I will surely book my summer vacation for a third time !!
Everything went smoothly for my booking. I love the fact that I can book online all camping in Greece! Thanks

We stay here every year. The room we get with a kitchen and 2 rooms in one is fabulous! The balcony is huge. The kitchen is nice and the showers are neat. The AC works very well, and that is key! The service is great but there is nobody there from 9 pm to 9 am, I believe . They leave 4 extra pillows in the room, and the mattresses are the best we have slept on in all of the hotels we have stayed at! There's a full refrigerator with snacks and drinks! They are charged to the room but it's not too expensive.  There is a washing machine in the room as well not sure if it's a 2 in 1 with a drier. Its not loud at night like other parts of Athens where you can't sleep because all the noise. We slept great! Can't wait to be back next year!

Nice rooms, great service! Very friendly!  They were so helpful holding our bags since we came in on a cruise mid morning.  We dropped the bags, and they held them until almost 7pm for us! I would highly recommend!

Absolutely loved this small hotel. Very modern interior with great attention to detail.  Massive rooms and very well equipped.  The staff were very helpful and spoke very good English.  Would definitely stay here again.

Great apartment, stylishly furnished and with everything you need for your stay. If you do not want to drive around Athens, it is easily accessible. There is a large terrace with views. On the ground floor of the building you have a grocery store and a bakery next to it. In one block you have a barista coffee shop. Within 5 minutes walk you have a shopping mall with restaurants, and most importantly, plenty of parking space on the street.
Very nice appartment.... Big patio with a amazing view over Athens....and a very good bed to sleep in!!!
Clean and cozy. Easy parking in front of the building.

Very nice house, fully secure and in a quiet neighborhood. 15 minutes walk from metro, next to shops, boulevard and mall. Honestly, the house is overcrowded, it lacks nothing..it has all the comfort and equipment of a normal house. And the owner is wonderful... I couldn't be more satisfied. Thanks for everything!

I had booked 3 weeks.. I called him to check in a few days later than the reservation and he didn't pick up.. when I actually paid normally he canceled my reservation and I didn't stay a day..

I agree sir you did me a favor to put the dates a little later but don't say I'm lying when I called you to ask you to check in a little later (within the dates I had already booked) and you didn't pick up
not very good when they charge you a price for a room with breakfast, to offer you a cake and a coffee for breakfast. that's not professional at all
Good location if you want to be close to Pireaus port.  Very hectic trrafic, no parking. Room is ok for a short stay. Breakfast enough for a quick snack, conyinental option.
Perfect 👌
Little hotel, no parking, just at the road,  so its very noisy there, old fashen designs, no big mirrors in the rooms...  But a lot of towels, always they have hot water, polite service
No parking, mediocre rooms, not recommended unless you're in too much of a hurry and you're close by

Very nice house, traditional, comfortable with a very clean yard as well as very kind and helpful hosts
We will definitely go again

Very nice accommodation. The preparation of the groom for our wedding took place there. Spacious, impressive space, fully equipped kitchen/bathroom, spotlessly clean and very beautiful view on the roof outside the house. The weather and the space were also very favorable for the photographs, apart from the procedure. Thank you very much :)

Very beautiful house, we prepared our wedding with very impressive decorations that the owner of the house helped us with. It has an amazing view, three very comfortable bedrooms, a very beautiful and fully equipped kitchen and a huge terrace with sunbeds!!

If it had more stars I would have put it. The house is excellent and the view is stunning. Especially at night the Acropolis looked magical. Although very clean and very nice and pleasant decoration. Mrs. Angeliki and Mr. George are great hosts. I highly recommend it. I will definitely visit again!

The house is beautiful, fully renovated and comfortable for large groups or families. Mrs. Angeliki was very kind and helped us with everything we needed. I will definitely visit her again and I am waiting for her in Corfu!!!
We were very pleased with the accommodation, it was beautiful and very clean and quiet place🙂Thank you for the hospitality

I was expecting an electronics store :(

Overpriced products
Clay products at zero cost and god prices
All at the altar of art!!
A wonderful artist and an amazing woman.
Unacceptable!

I vacationed with my family in this "hotel", last year in August. The accommodation itself is very good. However, the reason I gave the lowest rating is that we had a very unpleasant experience with the owner of the "hotel". Namely, although I arranged everything directly with the owner, although I called two days before arrival and received an email that the room would be ready at the agreed time, when we arrived (and we were traveling with a 10-month-old baby), we received a short notice that is our room occupied until the next day and that we can spend the night in accommodation in the immediate vicinity!?! We agreed to it because with a baby in Greece in August, we didn't even want to try to find another accommodation. And maybe I wouldn't even write all this if another group of guests didn't have the same problem during our stay there. At the same time, the owner's attitude about the whole situation was that this often happens because it is the season and there is a lot of interest!?! The owner himself did not find it necessary to formally apologize, let alone anything more... During check-out, when the husband went to settle all the expenses, he had another unpleasant contact with the owner, who shouted that we had no right to be angry, that he has the right to do as he wants, that if we don't like it, we never have to come again, and he didn't even say goodbye when he left. And although I would have more to write, I think I have said enough for some future guests. We have been vacationing in Greece for years, I have always arranged accommodation directly with the owners, and this, unfortunately, was our first negative experience....

In the room was quite space, bed was comfortable and staff was nice. Now the cons. Quite a lot of mosquitos there, but service has electric device againts them, so no problem. Moreover In the room were little ants and this is quite bad, because sleeping with mind of beeing bitten by this isnt so nice. And finally the placement of the hotel is bad, outside of the hotel was quite ugly and brakfast box definitely doesnt worth the money spent.

Worst hotel experience I have had. The room had recently been smoked in and they refused to move us to another room. The front desk guy was very nice but the manager refused to speak to us. Definitely do not stay here
We booked a non smoking room and when we arrived it smelled so strongly of cigarette smoke. They did not have any other rooms available and wouldn’t refund us. Such a sad experience.

We stayed here for two nights prior to a cruise. The price was very reasonable so we weren’t expecting much. We arrived to the hotel VIA their car service which was amazing! We got to the hotel just to be met with the friendliest staff you could find. We went to our room which we absolutely loved and had everything we needed, along with a great view of the Acropolis. We also used their car service for a 5 hour tour of Athens as well as to get to the ship. It was all worth every penny. The only negative things there were was the breakfast, and possibly the surroundings. Some. May love the breakfast however the offerings just weren’t to my liking. The Surroundings initially make you think you’re in a rough area, however I don’t believe you really are. I felt safe the entire time and even walked 1.9 Kilometers to the center for food and browsing. We plan on staying here The next time we come and would recommend this to anyone. We absolutely loved this place.

Nice enough place, a bit dingey in appearance though. The staff is truly lovely and there's a coffee, wine, spirits bar in the lobby. Sadly not a place for folks with cat allergies, they have a pet cat that lounges on everything in the lobby and there's no enclosure for luggage keeping.
Really a decent place to say, great size rooms just not my ideal.

Gazi Hostel was one of the best hostels I’ve ever stayed at. George, the owner, really helped me feel at home and well looked after!
Conveniently located a 6 min walk from the train station with heaps of food places around. Very central.
There are 11 beds spread out over the whole space and I felt like I had heaps of room and it was very quiet.

The place was immaculately clean, beautiful modern bathroom with beautiful tiles. Little kitchenette and outside area made it feel cosy and a lovely quiet environment to come back to after a long day of sightseeing. I definitely can’t wait to come back to Athens and will be booking my stay at Gazi if I can!

Gazi hostel was very good. The owners and worker is very laid back. It's a nice place to meet other travellers. And the water is hot, wifi is good and there's free coffee every morning . Also the bed is comfortable. It's in a great location next to good restaurants, and the metro station. I walked to the Acropolis from there
Definitely worth the stay. Thanks guys
The staff is very friendly and smiling.

Really nice room, absolutely fitting for 2 people! Everything was clean and nice. The only small things we saw/ noticed were: the air conditioner didn’t work that well, there was a weird smell coming out of the bathroom and the ceiling was cracking (the paint).
The apartment had a really big balcony with clothing lines and given clothespins, really good because we could hang it there and it would dry in no time. The room has 2 balcony doors, which made it easier to ventilate the room.
The way to the apartment is really nice too, we could just use the elevator, which was really necessary because it was way to hot to walk the stairs every time.

It's a hotel that matches the price you pay for it. It's about a 30-minute walk to the city center. The hotel was clean, with a soft bed and towels included. The only drawback was a cigarette smell upon arrival, but it disappeared after airing out the room. The room has air conditioning, a small kitchen, a table, chairs, a TV, a wardrobe (a bit small for two people), a bed, and nightstands. The bathroom also has a washing machine. During our 10-day stay, we had an issue with the electricity once, but it was resolved the same day. Towards the end of our stay, we had a minor issue with a neighbor who played loud music at night, but after reporting it to the host, the problem was immediately resolved. I want to highlight the prompt, quick, and hassle-free communication with the owner, who was always available and responsive to our inquiries. Regarding the location, at first glance, it might not seem very friendly, but we had no safety issues. By the end of our stay, I even started to feel at home.

OVERBOOKING AND LAST MINUTE CANCELATION
Unprofessional, petty owner! I had booked the room for 3 days for a concert that i was attending 4 months in advance. When I called the morning of the reservation to ask on how to get to the room, a very rude man told me that the kichen was set on fire! and I couldn't stay there and when I ask for compensation he said he did nothing wrong and was simply giving me my money back.
However, when I called booking they informed me that the owner claimed an overbooking case and no damage was reported to the premices. Lying unreliable host.
STAY AWAY!
Nice clean apartment with basic equipments. Metro station is in about 15 minutes.

Generally an ok hotel, the bed was covered by 2 sheets that didn't completely fit and had to be resettled if you moved incorrectly. The size was very nice and the kitchen was also pretty good. The location is close to one of the metro stations, and is also a ~15-30 minute walk to whatever you want to see in the downtown area.

My partner and I stayed 3 nights at the hotel and took a standard room.  The room was large and the bathroom was spacious.  The room and the hotel are very clean.  The hotel is in an excellent location, a 10-minute walk to Monstraki Square.  The breakfast is good, provides exactly what is needed.  There is also a restaurant on the roof of the hotel but we did not eat there.  The service of the hotel employees is simply amazing.  From the very beginning when we arrived how they welcomed us and took our things to the room, and during the days they gave recommendations.  Really amazing and wholehearted service.  Amazing hotel at a very affordable price.

Amazing hotel, great service they helped us with everything we needed to know about the city, they took our bags and gave us great wine, u feel more then just welcomed when you enter the hotel and the guys in the reception where the nicest i’ve seen in a hotel ever. the rooms are amazing with huge bed and bathroom, great breakfast. Worth the price for 100% amazing price for what we got and we will come back here for sure!
Thank u guys for making our trip in Greece amazing and remembered keep the great job u guys are amazing!

The person who helped us bring in our bags and retrieve our bags from luggage storage was amazing. He works harder than everyone else here and definitely deserves a raise. Made our experience 110% views were great too!

I stayed in a couple hotels while in Athens and this was not my favorite. Located by China Town, it is located in a very rundown part of the city.

The staff is super nice, the breakfast was small but had something for everyone, and the air conditioning worked great in the room.

The room was nice. The bathroom however had a tub with shower (but no door/barrier to block the water) and a toilet inside with another shower that if you used, would make the floor around the toilet all wet.

The Best. Everyone was great, helpful, respectful, and willing to accommodate. The hotel is located close to the majority of  everything. The restaurant food was superb and these 2 ladies are the best. Also, the breakfast on the bottom floor to die for and the  ladie that takes care of it ...wow. The best I ever have. Clean, and a big variety of food. I am glad we picked the room with breakfast included. Btw, elevator and fitness room and a quiet seating room by the garden.

What a gem outside the heart of Athens.  The accommodations were spacious with a kitchen. The apartment was great, but the hospitality was amazing.  Alex gave us directions on how to see all the sites by using the Metro. He recommended cafes to eat at, and he gave us tips on how to travel around the area.  This was a wonderful start to our month long vacation.

We were VERY satisfied with this accommodation. The owner was extremely friendly and helpful both in advance and in the location. The apartment is just a few minutes away by metro from the Acropolis, and you can use the rooftop jacuzzi and sunbeds to watch the Acropolis itself anytime you are "home". That is definitely unrivaled! The area has some bakeries, cafés, restaurants, and a supermarket, so that is great too. Even though a train and traffic come and go by the accommodation, you cannot really hear it; it's very serene inside. The apartment is very clean, spacious, and beautiful. Its only downside is - much like almost everywhere in Greece - that you are not allowed to flush the toilet paper, so it has to go in a bin. But the owners did everything they could to make yourself as comfortable as possible, including a lot of food already in the fridge and on the counters that you can eat for breakfast or whenever. And a very generous amount of toiletries too! 10/10 would go again and I recommend it wholeheartedly!

This place was probably a luxury place as the name claims, couple of years ago but not anymore!
In the apartment everything is old and it creaks, beds and mattresses needs to be changed as you barely can turn yourself during the sleep without waking up everyone in the apartment. The bathroom needs renovation as the water seems to be leaking everywhere. Apart from the fact that you can see Parthenon from the 5th floor of the building and the very nice host Alex, nothing to positively rate for this accommodation! The windows are so dirty you can barely see the tram track outside (ya, nothing else to see).
Definitely not what I was expecting from a 9 plus rating! This a poor 6!
Reviews are for apartment 301.

Amazingly friendly service and an incredible value stay in Athens. It is truly a luxury experience and the staff go above and beyond. Super convenient location as well just short walking distance from many major attractions in the city and just moments from the metro station.

We stayed at 47 Luxury Suites on June 6, 2024.  I was travelling with 3 other women, and we booked a 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom suite for one night before flying to Crete.  The suite had everything we could hope for – air conditioning, lots of room, comfortable beds, high quality linens.  The kitchenette was fully equipped with coffee, coffee maker, cutlery, dishes, fridge, stove, and microwave.  Alex and Sotiris were very helpful and responsive.  They arranged a driver to pick us up at the airport and gave us access to our suite as soon as we arrived.
The rooftop area with a view of the Acropolis was perfect after a great dinner at a restaurant Alex had recommended.  We walked everywhere, including to the Acropolis, and used the nearby train to get to the airport the next day.

Had a really nice and spacious apartment with a cozy backyard for enjoying morning coffees. Only one of the apartments has access to the backyard though, the others have a balcony.

There is no reception at the place, so call or sms the owner in advance to get keys. Also, since these are apartments there is no breakfast served. But they provide some basics that should keep you fed for a few days. And there is a supermarket less than 3 min away where you can get everything you need.

Brilliant. Would 100% recommend. Nice and spacious, comfortable bed. Cake, bread, eggs, butter & water were left for us. Apartment was nearby a couple of bars (no noise problems), supermarket, bakery, pharmacy etc. 15 minute walk from central athens.

Just reading some of the other reviews and I'm a little confused if they stayed in the same place. I don't really do Hostels that much, but in this case my travel arrangements required me to do so. If you come to Athens, I highly recommend this Hostel because...
1. The 3 members of staff that I interacted with were all helpful and supportive.
2. Breakfast is part of the price which takes away a lot of hassle of sorting it out for yourself - you get coffee, tea, orange juice, milk, cereal, bread / toast, cake, honey, ham, cheese, eggs...I mean what more do you want, this is enough.
3. The room I stayed in, the bed was clean and privacy curtains covered the whole cubicle, I stayed for 5 nights and asked for new towels and bedding after  3 nights which they did no problem. The bathrooms are in the room, but there are extra toilets off the common room area.
4. Bag of laundry was 5 Euros and done in 4 hours - brilliant!
5. Location: You are 100 metres from the Metro. Oh yes, you are in an area with a few bars etc, so there will be extra noise at night - but 50% you have been out enjoying yourself anyway, so it doesn't matter.
FINALLY..the whole Hostel had an ambience and positive personality about it. I stayed 5 nights and the common room area is also where the reception is, so you met new people coming in and out all the time and it was easy to start chatting with fellow travellers. Every other person I met seemed happy and contented.
SO, come to Athens and come to ICONIC - you will not be disappointed. 😊😊😊

We had to last minute book accommodation in Athens and were pleasantly pleased with our choice. Iconic is a great choice for the price you pay.

The lady on reception was very helpful with top places to visit around Athens. She was very accommodating and friendly, as were the rest of the staff on through the 24 hour reception

A good spread was put out for breakfast each morning and the terrace was a good vibe. The hostel is located in a cool neighborhood, yes the bars go late but we slept like babies (just remember earplugs)

As for previous reviews about bedbugs, good measures are put in place to prevent/control this issue.

Also a bonus being able to store our bags in storage for the day! I recomend this place for backpackers and anyone on a budget :)

The hostel is run by some really nice people, in the fun Gazi area. However, there are bedbugs. And not a few. Please do something radical about it.
The kitchen could need some improvement, for example two of four stovetop plates and the oven didn't work.
The breakfast is very basic. It ends at 10. I could have used  breakfast until 11, as could other guests. There is no gluten-free bread, although that is also not common in Athens. The closest supermarkets are 15 minutes walk away.
Overall cleanliness was fine.
I would stay there again if I were sure to get a bug-free room.

I know that the rooms are shared, and I was actually looking forward to meet some fun people, but Iconic had other plans for me. As I entered the room, I was dismayed by the bad odor. The room stinked, to put it nicely. A minute later I understood why, as my roomate-to-be entered. His clothes were torn from head to toe, and he had almost no teeth. A homeless, I presumed. As much as it is a sad case, I was not expecting that Iconic Athens Hostel caters to that kind of guests.

The staff was not eager to accomodate a room change for me, and initially told me that they were completely booked, which a visit to Booking.com quick disproved. After a very long wait, I was finally offered a different room. The card was broken, the bedding had punctures in it, and I have had enough of their poor sanitary conditions and rock bottom standards. I left and got a much better accomodation somewhere else.

When I approached the management suggesting that we leave this unfortunate event behind us by them refunding me what I paid and didn't use, and me deleting this review, the rude lady accused me for blackmailing them... They then went ahead and lied to Booking.com that I actually stayed in the property, so that I would not receive any compensation from Booking.com. Of course I've recorded a video of my self check out, so they're out of luck.

I guess I shouldn't have expected acceptable standards of service at a hostel that is this poorly ran.

As promising as it looks online, I do not recoemmend Iconic Athens Hostel for any traveler, even as a last resort accomodation. Even for free. You might as well sleep in the streets for a similar experience. Thanks for reading, and take care.

If you like noise until 6 am, dust and dirt everywhere and a breakfast that's basically toast and butter, then Ikonic should be your first choice. One of my roommates found bedbugs, too. Management seemed rather unconcerned, but considering the overall run down condition of what once must have been a nice Hostel, small wonder. Its saving grace was that it was very cheap.

Herve was a fantastic host - we stayed for 2 weeks in May 2022 during the Spring season.

The 2 level penthouse apartment is amazing - it’s in a modern new building and has been professionally styled and furnished.

Whilst the kitchen was well stocked and had a huge bench to dine on we hardly ate at home as there are so many amazing food and drink places within a few minutes (we consistently ate out).

The highlight is a massive balcony on Level 7 with an amazing view of the Acropolis and the greater Athens - whilst the pictures showing the place are fantastic - they don’t do it enough justice.  We spent a lot of time having drinks with friends  in the late afternoon and evening and if you like to tan the early morning sun is amazing (it’s private and you can be in your swimmers).

The small Level 8 balcony is perfect for a night time drink and chill session - it has even better views (if that’s possible).

We also found the bedroom light out shutters very useful - as it was already hot in May we lived the siesta life (afternoon nap and late night dinners).

The proximity to the subway is very useful - circa 200m away.  We consistently used the subway to get around (it’s efficient, clean and very effective).  It’s on the Airport line which is a bonus - much easier than dealing with the traffic.

We hope to next time stay in winter at Hervé’s place to experience the winter nightlife which is centred around Gazi and Kerameikos.
The worst hotel experience I have ever had. The room wreaked of cigarette smoke and they would not let us move or refund us

Arrived late night, staff was waiting for us. The apartment was a few blocks away from the hotel reception, in fact google maps was taking us to the apartment and not to reception. Luckily the clerk caught us before we walked by. Elevator in the apartment building couldn’t handle both of us and our luggage. Luckily it was set to return to the bottom floor if it had a problem. We walked up the three flights of stairs but sent our luggage in the elevator. The room was comfortable and clean with good AC and a great shower with plenty of hot water. There was a small kitchen with cutlery and dishes. We walked to the M3 in the morning to head to the airport.

Adorable, friendly, extremely accommodating and reasonable. Maria was a sweetheart that greeted and registered us. She's an asset to McQueen and a gracious representation of Greek hospitality.
HIGHLY recommend these apartments/hotel

Not recommend. The area is full with garages. The apartment itself was OK but at the same price we could have something better in a better location. The first room we got was smelly from cigarettes and the AC was not that strong
Very kind and helpful person.
Nice place
Excellent apartment, fully equipped and spotlessly clean! It is also ideally located, very close to the metro station. The owner was very kind! I will definitely prefer it again on my next visit!!

Excellent stay in Athens in this beautiful apartment with all the interior amenities, the geographical location close to the main sites and the warm welcome from our host. Thank you very much. Place to recommend
Very beautiful apartment, perfectly decorated, it provides you with everything you need and something more to spend a beautiful vacation in winter and summer!!!! I would go again for sure!!!!
Very good environment. Very clean, comfortable, quiet and easy to find parking... We highly recommend it!!!

Thank you very much for hosting us in your place!

the space is exactly as shown in the photos, with an incredible view of the Acropolis from the living room and from the private rooftop (exterior space)!

Clean and comfortable apartment, very friendly hosts gave us recommendations for the area!

we highly recommend it and will definitely be back!

This loft apartment is a unique experience for demanding visitors. Great design and excellent equipment. A nice surprise at the third layer where an outdoor heated private pool exist with view of acropolis/parthenon. 3 min walking form Metaxourgio subway station. Many restaurants and bars in the area.

Perfect! Stayed there with same friends for a few days..it actually is in the centre of the city! Good places to eat  and have drinks all around and all u need is in walking distances.the loft on the inside  is absolutely amazing .i definitely wanna enjoy the swimming pool in the summer
The best accommodation experience I’ve ever had! I highly recommend it for travellers who seek quality, luxury and the best view of Athens!
Space is very nice and the amazing view from the pool
Extraordinary apartment with the beautiful view of the Acropolis from the private pool!!!!!!!

Do not expect much of a suite, or of luxury for that matter (at least not in the basic room category), as it is rather small and minimalistic. But fair for the price, it's been clean and comfortable, and with modern design. Check-in was easy and convenient.
Strangely, the staircase (although apparently in perfectly fine condition) was closed. Balcony leads to the street which is rather noisy.

New air conditioned room with nice design bathroom. Big comfortable bed and functional kitchen. Nice feature: no keys. Entry by code.
Close to railway, but no noise at night.
Metro station right around the corner - goes directly to city center and airport.
Absolutely great - highly recommended
Beautiful!

Ideal apartment for holidays in Athens. We only stayed 1 night but we would have liked to stay much longer.

The apartment is very well located, in a quiet and safe neighborhood, close to many restaurants, cafes and shops.

Less than 2 minutes walk from the metro (airport-Piraeus blue line), it’s super convenient! 1 stop from Monastiraki and 2 stops from Syntagma. We expected to hear a little noise given the proximity of the metro, but ultimately it was quiet because the metro does not run at night.

We had the standard apartment. The decoration of the apartment is pretty, modern and refined. It’s comfortable and the space is well used. It's big enough for a couple for a few nights.

We enjoyed the private balcony located at the front of the building.

There is no lunch included but there are several markets, grocery stores and cafes nearby.

We did not meet any employees on site because access to the building and the room is granted electronically. You have to download an application and the phone serves as an access card. Very easy to use.

In short, I am satisfied with having chosen this accommodation because I shopped for accommodation in Athens for a long time and my choice fell on this one. He met our needs very well. The big advantage is the very reasonable cost. This apartment will definitely be one of my accommodation options during a future trip to Greece.
Value for money!!!!!
A tidy and spotlessly clean apartment in a very convenient location!! You can even see the Acropolis from the balcony!!

Great rooms, a very good value for money. The people who run the place are generous and kind.
The area has some bars very close and a young vibe. Very recommended!

A great value for money!

Our room was spotlessly clean and offered a good night's sleep thanks to the perfect location—central yet surreptitiously quiet. Shower was great (that coconut soap was a nice bonus!) and we even had a pretty large fridge, extra toilet paper and a hairdryer, although we didn't use them. There's also a 24/7 rooftop area with Acropolis view for the guests at the 4th floor, that we look forward to using next time!

A small tip: our nightstand lamp didn't work due to a burnt out bulb. Checking for malfunctions like this can be a good addition to the maid's checklist. But that wasn't anything serious.

I would like to thank the Navitas team!

Rooms are very nice and clean. Small but very good function. The bed is very comfortable.
There is one contact via WhatsApp. You can ask all what you need and get the Codes for the doors.
The location is direct near to bars. They are loud until 3am. But it’s nice to go out. Drinks and food is near by. Also a mini market.
I would recommend this place and wanna come back, if I stay again in Athen.
Best regards
Sebastian

They were really nice to communicate but the room was really small and noisy, located far from the main tourist attractions. We haven’t got enough toilet paper or basic equipments for apartment (like kettle or cutlery) although we asked. The internet wasn’t good. This is out of season, and you can rent another hotel apartment that will be more value for money.

Hostel personnel is kind and friendly. Rooms are quite good but little tight. Only problem is outside noise from bars that cannot be dampened. You have to wait untill 2 am to be able to sleep. They are really loud outside 🙄. Again, inside, everything is fine.
Nice staff! Room with a decent kitchen. Everything ok👍

Overpriced products
Clay products at zero cost and god prices
All at the altar of art!!
A wonderful artist and an amazing woman.
Unacceptable!

Great owner (Dimitry),kind, helpful and responsive. His tips made our stay very pleasant.
Rooms are tidy and clean with all the necessary equipment.
Extremely comfortable location , close to the centre without the fass. Metro station 2 minutes walk, as well as buses.
Some nice restaurants and night clubs in close proximity.
Next time in Athens, will definitely stay there again.
Thank you very much, Dimitri!

Everything was great! Dimitry helped us find the right train, and he met us at the station and guided us to the apartment. The apartment was very spacious, and had a good location within walking distance of lot of interesting sights and central, busy citystreets. Dimitry planned a route for us to take to the Acropolis, with a lot if interesting detours, with restaurants and other places, we might not have found otherwise.

Excellent, wonderful!!
Located in the Central District but on a quiet street... And 2 blocks from there is one of the bustling nightlife centers of Athens - the Gazi district- filled with restaurants, bars and nightclubs

And one short two minute metro ride away, is truly the heart of Athens - Monastiraki Square

the apartment itself is very cute, on the first floor and completely equipped with everything you need for your stay.

But the best thing of all in this apartment is the owner himself - Except for maybe sending a Rolls Royce to pick you up ,he is basically a one stop shop A-Z almost concierge  that you normally find in 5-star hotels. Once you make the reservation, he starts streamlining to you important information that can make everything once you land and during your stay much easier, more comfortable and clear...information like what trains to take, Cost of passes, important stores, Restaurants, more and less important attractions and Etc.

And during your stay he's always available for you for any questions, needs and more.

For example, I personally had a logistical problem during my stay Because of my return flight , and he went out of his way to help me solve it.

I highly recommend this place and I will definitely be back here next time i will be in Athens

Everything was absolutely perfect. Dimitris picked us up from the airport and for a very reasonable fee took us to the apartment (we were the first guests in his newly refurbished apartment). Already in the car he gave us a cold bottle of water and in the fridge at the apartment there were some more bottles. The bed was super comfortable, shower great, air conditioning was working and since the bedroom was facing a courtyard (shared with the next door apartment- with a private table and chairs)there was almost no street noise audible. The flat was well equipped (even a hairdryer) and absolutely spotless. Dimitris gave us lots of tips and was very attentive. He went beyond our expectations and even driven us to the train station the next day. Can’t thank him enough for making our one night stay in Athens so memorable. The location is very nice with authentic cafes near by and 1 min to metro station going directly to the airport and 1 stop to all the archeological sites ( Dimitris also send us beautiful walking route to the center-20 min).
Definitely highly recommend Gazi apartments and Dimitris as the most wonderful host! Thank you for all!!!

Fantastic stay in Athen!
We got a appartment which looked a bit different than the fotos but absolutely nice (we loved sitting on the terrace, looking to the Akropolis).
-Great service/availability/informations
-really clean,
-Coffee, Water, Wine and wineglasses in the fridge
-good bed
-fanatastic Communication
-close to Monastiraki Place, Metro 2 minutes,…
Highly recommended looking for someone of a central, low-cost, clean and no-frills accommodation in Athen.
Dimitris is a extraordinary host, we felt really welcome and Mrs Zoe is such a lovely Lady!!! Couldn‘t be any better.
ευχαριστώ!
efcharistó!

I had an amazing stay at Plexi Space in Athens! From the moment I arrived, the staff was super friendly and welcoming. Big thanks to Helena and everyone else who made my stay so great.

The hotel’s rooftop is awesome, with a nice pool and views. My room was just the perfect size, really comfy, and quiet, with modern decor that made it feel nice and cozy. The bed and pillows were so comfy too!

Location-wise, it’s perfect. All the main attractions are super close, whether you're into exploring the history or just soaking in the local vibes. Lots of cafes and restaurants. Everything is just a short walk or drive away.

Honestly, I had such a great time staying here and would totally recommend it to anyone visiting Athens. If you're looking for comfort, modern touches, and killer views, this is the spot!

Absolutely loved Plexi Space! So clean and modern and beautiful. The rooftop pool was stunning. Views and sunset of there were great, and even a tiny view of the Acropolis.
Host was gracious enough to check us in late (1900) and in the morning helped up schedule a very early morning taxi for the next day.
Comfortable bed, beautiful furnishings, and decor. I'll definitely be back when in Athens next!

We had a fabulous time staying here for my wife's 60th birthday trip. Fantastic room with walk through shower, comfortable bed and spotlessly clean.
Elena the Manageress was wonderful and us a real Gem. Pool on the roof is a godsend when it roasting outside. Highly recommended!!
Thanks Elena for making our stay so wonderful. Mark and Jo x

I stayed 5 nights at this Plexi space from 24 may to 28 May 2024! This is one of the best accomodations i have ever stayed in Europe! Great value for money, the building amd art deco is very tastefully done. The room is 5 star quality, place smells great from the moment you enter. The ceilings are high and its super spacious and so new! Never disapoints. Everything about this accomodation is fantastic. The hosts take great care of you, especially Elena Natsiopoulou, she is amazing and so is George. They checked in with me, and asked if i needed anything at all for my stay. Very family like, and so caring amd kind. I arrived early but they managed to get me the room by noon, room was spic and span! It was like W hotel! I was so happy i made this choice to stay here! Fantastic hosts, fantastic stay and i will always choose Plexispace if i go back to Athens! Thank you so so much ❤️🙏🏼
Great hotel, free parking, pool that you can do lapse in and extremely quiet place. Right behind it a great square with a lot of action.

Mold, Not Clean, AirCon Not Working, Awful!

This has been one of my worst experiences staying at an apartment.

Problems:  Air Condition
I contacted the property letting them know the AC was not working in bedroom on Sunday at 10:30am. They didn’t get back to me until 5PM letting me know they would try to send someone there. I waited there from 5-8:30pm until they told me they couldn’t.  Monday came and then nothing - they didn’t try to fix it, they didn’t try to call me, they didn’t even call the platform I booked it on.
Kitchen
There was black mold in the refrigerator and the kitchen was not prepared - the utensils were broken and there was no garbage to throw things away.
There was also no paper towels to clean things up with.
The dish sponge was old and disgusting.

Remotes:
The batteries were dead in the remotes and that was a challenge trying to turn things on/off.

Area: The hallway was terrible - the smells as other descriptions said was awful.
Because it is street level you can hear all the noises.
When people were coming and going - you could hear the front door slam shut and it would echo through the apartment.

Wifi
The wifi needs to be reset every 4-5 hours and it was slow. Can not handle media calls.
Very nice apartment.!! With very friendly and always available host.!!
The place is near everything and easy to get to.
Perfect!

Apartment with weaknesses... All the good reviews don't correspond to reality, I'd like to add a few current pictures so everyone can get their own impression.
The location is relatively good, about 300 meters from the metro and the area is otherwise quite busy and pleasant. The apartment itself is relatively dark, the bathroom is almost disgusting but the rest is quite nice. There are 2 air conditioners in the apartment, one in the living room, the other in the bedroom, they work great. The processing and handover of the apartment also went smoothly. I would also like to point out that it wasn't entirely clean; we found hair in the bathroom from previous guests...

LUXURY, at a great value & locally centralized to the entire dining and nightlife that Athens hast to offer!
They rolled out the red carpet for me; airport pickup, dining & nightlife recommendations, Takis (my new friend) greeted me, helped w luggage, and walked me through the high end details of this gorgeous penthouse!

Panoramic views, retractable sky dome and a terrace like you wouldn’t believe 🤩

This is one of those MUST stay places in Athens.
Extremely friendly and professional, I highly recommend them. (Treated me like familia)

i would like to share the poor experience i had with owner of this prpertie, i was supose to visit athens in nov 19 due to locjkdowns , had to postpone and owner insist on cancelation payment, i postponed and again face lockdown, this time when i postponed from januar to february 2020 , owner demanded suplement as high season, i was eager to come to athens and i will do it soon, finally i canceled the reservation owner charged me 50% almost 200 euros, in this times this is not a way to behave.

Excellent!
I would highly recommend it!

Very convenient location.
Even you can find free parking around.
Apartment is very modern, clean and well maintained, equipped with small kitchen.
Downside there is no microwave owen, which would be nice to have, and if your windows are looking backside, clubs sound might be disturb you.
Acropolis is 30-40 min by walk.
Metro is 2 minutes.

I recently stayed at Athenian Spirit in Gazi, Athens, right next to the metro station and it was absolutely amazing! The minimalist design and chic style impressed me from the moment I arrived. Everything was spotlessly clean and the sense of hospitality was exceptional. The service from the reception was outstanding, always ready to assist with a smile. The views from the terrace were stunning, adding an extra touch of magic to my stay.

Athenian Spirit feels like a small house, complete with a kitchen, dishes and a sink, making it perfect for longer stays. The rates are great and you have access to everything, with the metro just 32 seconds away on foot. This hotel is the perfect choice for anyone visiting Athens and looking to enjoy their stay in a modern and convenient location. I highly recommend it to everyone!
Perfect location. The room was spacious and very clean. The staff very helpful. There are a lot of coffee shops,bars and restaurants around and the metro station is a 4 min walk from there.
Great place to stay, and yes whilst the nightclubs are loud on normal nights it is very quiet. Close to the station which makes getting around very easy, highly recommend
Very nice room, clean. Cleaning only once every three days. Had to ask for clean towels and coffee. Location is nice close to restaurants and metro-station

+ I really appreciate the pro and friendly support of the staff, moreover they were always prompt to answer my questions.
+ the flat itself is outstanding, most of all the studio with yellow bricks.
+ very well equipped flat with any kind of electronic appliance.

- this area is very quiet by day, almost "dead quiet", but people start to hang around at 8pm, and in the weekends their are still around till 6am! There are a couple of bars downstair with drunk guys shouting loudly, "gentlemen" that need to make noise with their car / motorbike to get noticed, others that are content to blast "music" very loud with car or portable speakers. Forget to sleep even with ear-plugs.
- internet speed is barely enough for video conferences.
Good value for money and good size apartment. There area is quite loud at night. A lot of clubs in the area.

A very nice apartment in the heart of Athens. A great welcome from Elena who knows how to receive and give you all the information. Nice location next to Gazi and metro station. The only small downside is occasionally the noise from the street.
Nice apartment. Well located. The welcome is perfect. Impeccably clean. I recommend. Thank you 🙏

Cosy, the manager was very friendly.
In the kitchen you have coffee and tea, everything is well organised, in the room you have a small private fridge.
A bit annoying is the train passing in front of the room, but only until 8pm if I remember correctly.

Comfortable and beautiful rooms, great location for seeing everything in Athens and a good neighbourhood. Accomodating and friendly hosts. Kitchen had everything you could need and including a great selection of tea and coffee and a pretty garden to drink it in.
I love it here private living shared kitchen with access to washing balcony private or upper view.  Management just à text away. Local neighborhood markets and restaurant.
The furniture and stuff is like from a flea market. It's clean, specious, well equipped, easy check-in.

Gorgeous accommodation, cozy , clean, really nice decoration and aesthetic! Near the city center and very convenient location for every destination!
As about the staff super friendly and polite ☺️
I highly recommend it!

The air conditioning is noisy and the walls are thin. However, for this price, you get what you are willing to pay for (around $40/night if I remember it correctly). The hotel is near the M3 station, which is a direct line to the center and to the airport as well. However, the neighborhood seems to be deserted (may be due to the period though)
Great value for money. Very basic apartments but clean. Good location in Gazi.
Fair price, clean room. If you’re looking for a cheap, nice, little room it’s just perfect.
Nice rooms and very good location

I received what was in the description. The small room, approx. 20 min walk from the tourist center, but it was decent, clean, ok for the price paid. Ghetto neighborhood, but no one bothered us. Check-in and check-out is done in someone else's presence, without a key, because the entrance to the building and the room is done with a code.

I needed a one night stay.  Booked hotel and was able to get room.  Thought new hotel would be great.  However the room was so hot and humid and still struggling to cool it down after an hour.  The worst part was when you pull back the sheets and two very large COCKROACHES jump out!   Checked in at 8 and left by 11:30! Contacted management and he refused to give a refund.  He just wanted to give a different room.  That was not acceptable.  They denied they have a bug problem, but if this was on the 3rd floor, I can only imagine what was on the lower floors!  If you don’t mind COCKROACHES, then it’s the place for you!

This place was cute and accommodated our group well. They are definitely new -- no breakfast provided yet, and there was a weird moment where the concierge wasn't sure they'd have an extra pillow for me (they did end up having them!) but it was fine. The area is on the edge of sketchy area - min a 15-20 min walk from the area where you'd probably go for dinner or from any of the sights. It wasn't bad for us but if you're hoping to be in the middle of everything, then try another spot.

a fairly new and quite modern 'hotel' or guest house, located about 50 minutes (by cab) from the airport, but being close to the metro line (4 min to Kerameikos station) makes it a convenient location to stay at.

rooms are spacious (we had the superior double with balcony & city view), bed comfortable, and the bathroom well equipped. there's no safe in the room unfortunately, and just an open wardrobe area.

maintenance and cleaning is ok, although we had some issues with clogging of the drains under the shower which caused some flooding.

the open shower concept is absolutely nonsensical as there's water everywhere, leading to unnecessary waste of towels.

overall, a decent option for 2-3 night stay.

Upon arrival we were greeted by a friendly staff member who explained everything to us. The suites are very spacious and nicely designed with a good eye for color, they feel bright, modern and livable. The hotel is very new, so there is a little but of construction going on, but it’s not noticeable in the room. Everything is perfectly clean, and the room has all equipment one expects. Good bars and restaurants as well as the train station are just within walking distance, you can see the Acropolis from the side streets. Just a perfectly pleasant location. Will come back next time!

The rooms are really modern and are equipped with all requirements one needs. The AC unit is really good and behind the apartments one can find the metro station. Also there is no issue with food as there are quite a few restaurants around, there is also a shop that is open all through the night selling food. I arrived at 1am and it was not an issue they gave me access to the door which I really liked and it was really easy to use.
Friendly stuff, beautiful rooms and all new. There is one thing, during weekends it’s difficult to sleep, because of the bars and clubs nearby. Earplugs helps me.

Excellent apartment in a modern and secure residence. Rarely seen such a well-equipped apartment. Very clean and functional, close to the metro, 15-20 minutes walk from places of interest in the city center. Very friendly owner/manager. In short, great experience, I highly recommend for your stay in Athens.

Amazing apartment!. With everything in it really. Well maintained, brand new, spotless. The hosts are welcoming and kind.
I recommend it without a second thought!

Fantastic place, absolutely loved it here, it's spotless and you have everything you need (toiletries, hair dryer, iron, ear plugs, towelling robes etc......).  I would definitely recommend the place for anyone that wants to visit Greece.  It's very central to everything, and a direct line from the airport.  Fabulous place to stay.

We spent an awesome time in Athens at the Iris Management Penthouse Condo.  It's located in an excellent location,  with restaurants and bars nearby as is the metro - just two blocks away.  The condo is a beautifully furnished penthouse with a view of the Acropolis from the balcony.  The condo owners are very helpful, informative and were a great source for recommendations.  We will definitely stay here again on our next visit to Athens.  Thank you Iris Management!!!

A perfect place.  Close to metro  and easy to get to all the tourist spots.  In a safe neighbourhood and close to great restaurants.  Place was very clean and beautiful.  Outdoor space was great to relax and enjoy a drink in the evening.  The hosts were great,  very responsive prior to and during our stay.

We had an absolutely amazing stay at the Iris House. The hosts were especially proactive and helped us nicely navigate what was our first visit to Greece. We had a few challenges with flight delays and having such attentive hosts to promptly answer any questions and offer guidance helped make our stay wonderful and most memorable. We will certainly be back again.

Do not book.

Jeff is unethical and will accuse you of causing damages to the Airbnb.

Do not ruin your vacation by booking this Airbnb.

Edit: please see below the “damage” we were falsely accused of. Again, do not book.

This is a stunning boutique hotel in a lovely part of Athens.  The rooms are beautifully decorated and have everything you could need; the balcony was spacious and the bed extremely comfortable. The staff were friendly and helpful; nothing was too much trouble. The breakfast was also delicious.  The area is funky with a buzzy, bohemian feel. There are lots of little cafes, bars and tavernas within a very short stroll.  The metro is nearby and makes for easy access around Athens.  I would most definitely recommend this hotel and the lovely neighbourhood.

I thoroughly enjoyed my stay at Loom Athens. It’s a lovely modern hotel, with a nice decor and has clearly been recently refurbished. Everything is nice and new and clean. The staff were really sweet and friendly. The location is also great, within walking distance of the city centre, in a cool young neighbourhood with plenty of nice restaurants and bars. It was also on a nice quiet street which is a plus. Highly recommended!

We have been delighted with our stay at the Loom hotel! We arrived before our rom was ready but we have been taken care of as we stepped in. The hotel is well located in Athens, in a vibrant neighbourhood. We loved the design and the comfort of the room. The breakfast was tasty too. We couldn’t ask for a better experience. Thanks so much!

Great breakfast and friendly staff. The hotel is within walking distance to all main attractions and close to the metro. I even walked back alone during the night and it felt very safe. Only downside is that the doors to the rooms are not very soundproof so you will hear everything that goes on outside your room. Other than that it’s a great hotel, recommend it!

An absolutely lovely hotel, a true gem! Set in a quiet (but very hip) neighbourhood not far from city centre, beautifully and smartly designed and on top of all that, very reasonably priced as well. The breakfasts are served right in the lobby, and have a nice personal touch - when was the last time you had your scrambled eggs done for you on the spot? Could not recommend highly enough!

We enjoyed our stay at Keramos! It was really quiet, clean and comfortable and the Kitchenette was well equipped. The room was connected to a communal patio which was a really great place to relax. The hotel was relatively close to the centre of Athens, Plaka and the Acropolis. Despite being close to the centre, the neighbourhood was really quiet. The key entry system was interesting and required an app on your phone, so make sure you have plenty of battery life when out and about. Overall, this was a great place and we would definitely stay again when visiting Athens!

We stayed here for 3 nights on the second week of July 2023. I actually had a lot of requests for changing our stay dates since our schedule changed a lot since I made the first booking, and they were very accommodating with all our schedule requests. Prior to our arrival they gave out detailed instructions on finding the place and checking in. We arrived in Athens too early for check-in, and they had a procedure for storing your luggage on your own, which we really appreciated. After a hot day walking around Athens we finally checked-in (an easy process) and we were very pleasantly surprised at how nice the room was. Everything we conceivably needed was provided, and we could cook and do laundry with no problems, should we wish to do so. The detergent tablet already preloaded into the dishwasher was a thoughtful touch, as well as having detergent available for the laundry washer. The body wash and shampoo provided were commercial brands (as opposed to the bulk types usually provided in hotels) which I really appreciated. The room was spacious, and they prepared the sofa as a bed for my daughter which she really appreciated. The living room/sofa bed arrangement included curtains so that the living room can be treated as a bedroom with privacy. The automated front desk also allowed printing wirelessly, which I thought was a really great touch as we needed to print some travel documents, and I have not encountered that type of service before without having to go through a person or even paying extra for the privilege. We had a great time staying here, and would stay here again should I have an opportunity to go to Athens again.

Several restaurants and at least one bakery and pastry shop was in the neighborhood, and the nearest metro station was only 15 minutes away by foot.

Well-designed, convenient, digital key, tourist guides, all you need for a few nights stay — at a very good price! Only thing I didn’t like was the water pressure in the shower was a bit weak.

Bit far from the main tourist area but there are good bars and fast food places nearby.

It was such a pleasant stay! We loved the beautiful and calm apartment, the area (so vivid, filled with cool places, music and nice people). Staff was really friendly and responded super fast to all our questions. Next time in Athens, the place to stay is already clear: KERAMOS Athens :) Thanks a lot for having us!

Excellent choice for my firts visit to Athens.
The studio was exactly as in the photos and had everything needed (even a washer-dryer!).  The bed was comfy.
