The breakfast is fantastic and so much food we couldn't eat it all, toast, yoghurt and granola, cooked breakfast (ish) and pastries, with coffee and juice.

The employee on the front (Soteria?) is absolutely fantastic, very friendly, will do anything for you and is a credit to the business.

My only criticism was on arrival we had a small stain on our sheets. It was quite noticeable. BUT they changed immediately and couldn't apologise enough

All in I would definitely recommend.

location make it an excellent choice for anyone looking to stay within walking distance of central attractions. Boasting ample space that can easily accommodate up to three couples or a large family, this home provides a comfortable and inviting atmosphere that is perfect for relaxation and entertaining. Key pickup is a breeze, and the landlord is always available to answer any questions or concerns. All in all, this is an ideal choice for anyone seeking a peaceful and hassle-free stay in a prime location.
The host was really pleasant and quite helpful. It directly hits you with the cozyness of a friendly lad's apartment where you can chill and enjoy small talk. Would definitely recommend it.

Canceled the booking claiming a "system error".

System error or not we have had to find something on the spot because of that.

EDIT:
I did not know till the next day. I was on sea around Sporades and the cellular range there is quite intermittent.
Michalis is da man ... Location and comfort canot get any better .. 11 outa 10 ....
Perfect!

Beautiful apartment placed in on of the best neighborhoods in Athens, kolonaki, near syntagma square. It's very stylish, clean, decorated with famous paintings and modern furniture. George, the host, was always warm and helpful, giving us tips about Athens. 100% recommended.

Very clean and nice place. Its fresh and you have everything you need in the apartment-and it all works as it should 😃 The building is nice, clean beautiful entrance 👍 near to everything- restaurants, historical places, metro station. Would definitely stay there again. Highly recommended. Thank you for making our stay in Athens so nice 👌

Close to the busy Evangelismos Metro (with excellent access to the city centre and easy to reach from the airport), this apartment on the ground floor was off the main road, so it was very quiet and peaceful. The rooms were large, the beds comfortable and the bathroom very nice. We were met by the host, who gave us a short tour of the apartment. We would definitely choose this apartment again if we planned to have a longer stay in Athens.

What a gem in the center of Athens!  The room was very comfortable, beautifully decorated and clean.  The subway (metro) was very close which was very convenient and only a couple of stops from the Acropolis and Syntagma square.

Our host Greg was very pleasant and responsive and speaks fluent English. We will definitely be back the next time we’re in Athens.  Thank you!

Excellent location, walking distance to Evangelismo metro station, mini market and good restaurants.
Family friendly property.
15min easy walk to downtown Athens and all the main tourist attractions.
Highly recommended place for staying in Athens.
Parking available for small car, not minivan.

One of the best places to stay in Athens.
Huge apartments, elegantly furnished, with all required comforts.
Wide rooms
Very fast wifi
Some plusses like complimentary wine, juice, all toiletries, possibility to use kitchen and laundry.
Easy staff
Moderate prices.
Many places for breakfast and dinner around.
Easily reached with the metro.
Only drawback: no parking and narrow streets around.
9

The hotel is very well located (30 min walk to the Acropolis) in the beautiful neighborhood of Kolonaki, full of dining options and a handful of bakeries, among other stores. Rooms are very comfortable, fully equipped, and very clean. The breakfast is fantastic, everything is fresh and locally sourced, even the honey. They prepare eggs to your liking on demand, and offer to squeeze a fresh glass of orange juice. All the food we tried was incredibly tasty, and to top it all, the service is exceptional: everyone is super kind, always willing to help with a smile on their faces. They even arranged for us to check in very early (11AM), AND offered us the chance to enjoy the breakfast service while we waited, free of charge. Truly amazing experience, highly recommended.

Amazing top to bottom.  Every single person working at Coco Mat clearly know that their job is caring for their guests.  It has been remarkable!!!  Clean and tidy room, fresh linens every day.  Friendly and completely professional staff.  Beautiful hotel in a lovely and bustling, pretty neighborhood full of good restaurants and nice shops. It has been remarkable.  Delicious, fresh breakfasts with fresh squeezed juice and eggs made to order with plenty of staff on hand to get whatever else you might need.   Amazing value.  Hotels in the US could take a lesson from this chain. Loving every minute here.

Excellent hotel in nice area of Athens with some nearby restaurants. Lovely rooftop for views including the acropolis and taking meals ordered via an app. Staff really helpful and polite. V comfortable and well designed room. Highly recommend.

We stayed at this rather nondescript establishment in Summer 2024. The hotel was somewhat difficult to find because of missing/ confusing signage.

Besides this little hiccup, the experience was great. We were early but the front desk staff quickly corralled our luggage and sent us on a quick excursion to the national gallery which was a few blocks away. In less than an hour, we were informed that our room was ready.

Our room was a larger corner suite to accommodate our family. The beds were comfortable. The decor was very modern and minimalist. The layout of the bathroom/ WC was a bit strange but workable.

When we were away, the rooms were restocked and cleaned promptly.

The free breakfast was quaint but adequate.

The location was great. Situated in a leafy, residential neighborhood with good restaurants. It was sufficiently far away from the tourist attractions to be quiet but close enough to get to them without difficulty.

The service was very friendly. We felt genuinely welcomed and attended to. They made sure to reserve a cab at 2 am for our departure. They took the trouble to prepare breakfast boxes for our travels.

We were pleasantly surprised. Would consider staying there again.

I loved my stay at the Coco-Mat. The whole staff was friendly, helpful, and hard working. I stayed there for 3 weeks because my mother was in the nearby hospital and they made me feel so welcome and they helped me through that tough time in so many ways I will be forever grateful. The breakfast is wonderful, the roof space is amazing and I would watch the sun go down with a view of the Acropolis. Rooms are clean, spacious, and beds are very comfortable. Easy to walk to so many places. Highly recommend.

Very friendly staff. Clean room in general.  But too hot. Had to turn on the ac to save ourselves from hell's gates! The handcuffs where fun, until my hubby started having trouble unlocking them. Overall, it was a fun experience.  The friendly staff deserves all the credits!
Love has no limits ... in love in bed and in wine and dish tasting there are no rules simply dream explore choose your own experience and enjoy recommented ❤
Hello I want to book my room with my wife and I on February 14 how much room rent one day
Too expensive for my taste
Super

The  hotel in a good place in athens, however, if you are looking for a confortable stay, or you are looking for a hotel for a work trip, this is not the best option that you can pick.
The hotel has no reception, that means that if you have to request something, it will be via e-mail, with a huge delays to respond, im writing this comment while i have requested an invoice for my stay period in the hotel, they took 1 week to give me an incorrect invoice, after requesting a correct one they gave me another incorrect invoice (they did it twice) , no they are not responding to my emails.
This was a simple request that most of 3 stars hotels does it automatically so you can imagine if you will have a problem in the room or something else.

We got a semi basement room and it was good. Very clean, great location. The only one downside was that the Internet was not the best in our room particularly. My friend stayed in other rooms and the internet was good. Beside that they respond very quick to any query you have on Wats app.

A 10min walk to the centre and great restaurants around. Clean and comfortable room. Perfect little mini kitchen was helpful w 1 year old. They also provided us with a crib for our daughter. Would definitely stay again!

Beautiful rooms. The complimentary wine and breakfast snacks were a lovely touch. A little traffic noise in our room from the street but that did not bother us much as our room was lovely prepared with everything we wanted. The location is so good with so many nice restaurants nearby and great shopping

Convenient accommodation for easy access to all the major archaeological sites, restaurants, nightlife ..and transport links. It takes 40mins via metro from the airport to the Syntagma stop then a brief 10min uphill walk to the property (or a short cab ride from the taxi rank at Synagma if you prefer).

The rooms are spread over three floors accessed via lifts or stairs and are nicely decorated, clean and well appointed.  The tvs have Netflix and, when we arrived, there was a bottle of wine waiting and a few other essentials.

During our stay I needed some help from the staff (who are not on site) via email. They proved to be extremely responsive, efficient and courteous..  excellent work guys!

All in all I would wholehearted recommend the Solonus suites to anyone looking for a no-nonsense short stay in Athens.

Really good place. Close to center, 10 minutes walk to Syntagma (all trains, buses go there to Airport). Perfect little kitchenette, good size bathroom. You need to turn on the boiler 20 min before you take shower. Good value for money. There is lift also. As a welcome you get one bottle of water, beer and orange juice. There is iron and dryer.
Clean: 10
Room size: 10
Service: 10
Cons: windows are looking in a wall. And the apartment is inside in another apartment which is divided in three bedrooms with bathrooms and kitchens. You can hear the neighbors from other apartments. So if you want total silence, I wouldn’t recommend it.
But the cars are not bothering.
Lovely and best airbnb house in Athens. Really recommended
Great location, clean and tidy! Great welcome package and friendly service.
Super!!!
Perfect suite even better than the photos, very good location and helpful and kind Laura!!! We will definitely prefer it again!!!

The Helios is the most amazing hotel with the most amazing staff. I especially want to thank ANGELES on reception who was outstanding our whole stay.  She was so professional and smiled every time we walked through the hotel.  Her assistance was always amazing. and she made our stayed so memorable. Thank you Helios for mooring such wonderful team members.
My best
Shane Hamill UK

I can’t say enough good things about this hotel. Hotel Frida has been one of the best things about our stay in Athens. We booked 6 nights and wouldn’t have minded staying 6 more. The folks who run the hotel are incredibly nice. The hotel is very clean, and a great bang for your buck. You can walk to almost anywhere you need to go, but it is a longer walk. We didn’t mind so much because we saw so much cool stuff, it was a great way to explore the city. Just for reference we spent a lot of time in the hip Exarcheia neighborhood (10 min walk), took a taxi to the Vouliagmeni beach (18 euros) and the Acropolis (10 euros or so) and walked to the Playce board game cafe (30 mins). It’s been a great trip, and having hotel Frida as a home base was a big part of why it’s been so great!

Nice, clean, affordable, silent good place, of you are looking for quite place to sleep after a long journey.
If you looking for socializing, this ain't a place.
Nice and clean hotel near the city center!
Amazin location and service. I had a great experience.
Cheap hotel, 20 minutes walk from the center.

This apartment is in a great location: with a metro station a few steps away & in easy walking distance from many must visit locations in Athens ... including museums & a variety of good restaurants & cafés.
The apartment is spacious, with 2 bedrooms and all the necessary amenities to make your stay comfortable.
The owner is also very friendly and helpful and ready to give you good suggestions to make your stay in Athens ... a pleasant one!
Although very good clean dance equipped full house is worth....
Comfortable house with direct access to the metro and center
Excellent apartment in a beautiful neighborhood!

Dear sir/ madam
I'm trying to reach you but unfortunately you don't answer my texts in WhatsApp
As you know and discussed with my sister on the phone we has a very vey bad time at your property and had to leave 48h after check in
We didn't use the house for entire time and ypu must refund the money as soon as it possible I didn't want to put a review and please do not make me feel i must do it
I'm waiting for the answer
Very good apartment! Easy check-in. Good location! I recommend it!
all wonderful ,I have stayed 4 times I recommend it!

Catastrophic. We rented the apartment in April and found it very dirty. Mold in the bathroom, filthy fridge, dilapidated kitchen. No table and chairs for eating. Fridge placed in the room. 80 square meters advertised, totally misleading. The owner agreed to refund us and after we booked elsewhere he changed his mind and no longer answers our calls. Scam, avoid.
Very comfortable apartment and absolutely helpful and friendly host!!
Apartment super well located.  Very bright, a real pleasure.

Spent one night, as i was in for a meeting in the area.  Pleasantly surprised.  Rooms are nicely designed.  Service was very friendly (checked in 3 hours early).  Location is in a very nice residential area (the prime minister lives nearby so don't be alarmed by the large number of policemen in the area).  It is located on a hill so be prepared to walk up a lot of stairs or steep roads to get there when walking around. Left early so can't comment on the breakfast.  Only negative - the bed mattress is very soft.  Solid 4 star, but value for money its a 5.

Great service and the view from the rooftop barpool area is amazing. Sadly the room was not very well maintained with stuck drawers blocking the mini-fridge and paint chafing. The pool is quite rundown but exists. Breakfast was nice with decent options. Overall not a bad place, made better by the helpful staff.

Friendly staff, helpful as needed (brought us an extra pillow at night) and were very kind upon check in. 20ish min walk to sightseeing areas.

Definitely wasn't the worst hotel I've stayed in but definitely not the best, and for the price I would have expected better. The site makes it seem much more luxurious and high-end than it really is.

The whole hotel smelled so strongly of synthetic perfumed cleaning products to the point where I could smell it from the street before we even walked into the hotel. I'm definitely sensitive to strong smells but it was almost unbearable and I instantly got a headache, and my partner even mentioned it (he doesn’t usually get bothered by smells). Woke up feeling badly from the chemicals.

The room was the same - strong smell and not the cleanest. At first glance it was fine, large room with separate sitting/TV area, however it was clear the room had a decent amount of wear and tear and hadn't been fixed in awhile. Not super clean, not the most comfortable bed, very odd bathroom that leaked, rusty.

We booked this hotel just for one night between airport travel from the islands and out of Athens, but if we'd been staying longer we would have found a different hotel.

I had high hopes for The Duke Hotel based on the advertising, but I was severely disappointed. The marketing paints a luxurious and welcoming experience, but in reality, it was far from that. The room was nothing like what was shown in the pictures—smaller, outdated, and lacked the amenities they promised. Customer service was also a nightmare. When I tried to raise my concerns, the staff were indifferent, unhelpful. No effort was made to address the issues or improve the experience. Overall, it was a waste of money and time. I wouldn’t recommend this hotel to anyone!

I stayed here for one night and found the service to be very lovely, all the staff were friendly and helpful.
The room was not very clean in my opinion and the whole place seemed to be a bit run down. The bar furniture upstairs and the pool seemed unkept. As well as just old build up in the rooms, I was inclined to wear my flip flops in the shower.
The internet didn’t work in my room either and there was very poor reception.
I booked this place as a treat to use the sauna but I didn’t even go, there was a strong smell down there and it looked very poorly maintained.
I personally wouldn’t say it is worth the price and I would not recommend if you appreciate a clean space.

Very humid basement apartment with insufficient aircon and a temperamental host. Not flexible in terms of check in time. Apartment locks you out if you forget your keys. On the plus a terrace in a small chimney annex, great location. Overall, not recommended unless it's very cheap and you are on a tight budget.
Ideal place for a holiday in Athens during a heatwave. Passio for peaceful meals.

Small apartment although in the semi-basement.
The plus side of the room is the small groove in the back with a large umbrella for shading and plenty of plants as well as pebbles between them...
Plus, it's next to the Evangelismos station... and the Evangelismos hospital...
We were also impressed by the price

Recomendo calorosamente o Hotel St. George Lycabettus Lifestyle Hotel a qualquer viajante que queira experimentar o melhor que Atenas tem a oferecer. Tenho certeza de que você não ficará desapontado. Mal posso esperar para retornar a este oásis de elegância e hospitalidade na minha próxima viagem a Atenas

Water 6 euros seems crazy to me..
We are not in Piazza San Marco in Venice!!!
Great location. Amazing view from the terrace. Fairly priced.
Very good hotel, clean and comfortable rooms and we have been very well attended and very very good location

The best of the best. I have stayed there lots of times, the rooms are all fully equipped, the area is fantastic and Andy, responsible for all the communication via Hellas Elements has been extremely helpful throughout each of my stays. I will be back soon!

The apartment is situated in safe, modern neighborhood with a lot of restaurants and shops nearby. The building is located at a small street, it is clean and tidy, however a little loud at night.
Our room was situated at the 4th floor with quite big balcony and amazing view for the city. The room itself was quite spacious. Kitchen was equipped with all you need for a small meal including cutlery, plates, cups and pots.
The whole apartment was very clean and well-prepared for the stay. Air conditioner was working very well maintaining the required temperature as set.
The only thing I would recommend would be to provide more soap and shower gel than just one little bottle.
Thank you for such a lovely stay!
Without a doubt, the most memorable stay in the heart of Athens. The host was really helpful providing us with info and tips to enjoy our visit. Would definitely recommend it

Modern, comfortable, clean and perfectly located apartments, in the heart of Athens! Everything you want to see or need all within walking distance! The staff is very friendly and helpful!
Will definitely visit again!
No hesitate for the next time. Thanks.

What a wonderful place to call home during a vacation to Athens. Location close to most important sites, stores, groceries, restaurants, transportation. Exceptionally clean and modern, well appointed, roomy and comfortable even with 6 people sharing the rooms. Konstantinos was there to meet us and gave a thorough walk through and explanation of the apartments features with offers of help for anything that we may need during our stay
We had a wonderful stay at your lovely apartment! Thank you!
Everything was perfect

The apartment is located in an excellent area, fully equipped and clean, Debbie welcomed us with lots of explanations and information. She was available for any question or request.
Very highly recommended apartment.
The location is exceptional. Everything you need is available in the apartment.

Its location is its best part. If you take the 2 bedroom, you would find it quite small and cramped, more like a business hotel. Their suites are great, much roomier and with a great view.

We stayed there for 1 night, took a suite and 2 bedroom. Coffee was great, since they had provided a brewing machine in the suite. They only provided basic toiletries, breakfast was just average. I also didn’t found the breakfast area staff quite unfriendly.

Overall, just good for 1 night.

Very clean and modern hotel. Great customer service. Convenient location to the metro and only a few stops from the Acropolis and other major sights. Great continental breakfast included and they hold your bags after checkout if you have a later flight.

We recently had the pleasure of staying at Golden Age Hotel . From the moment we stepped into the lobby, we was impressed by the modern, elegant, welcoming decor and the friendly staff.
Overall, we had a wonderful experience at Golden Age Hotel & we would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a comfortable and convenient place to stay in Athens.
Centrally located hotel in Athens, rooms are clean and well appointed. Shower was fantastic and breakfast was really good. Great value and definitely on the list for the next trip to Athens.
This hotel was fabulous.  So tastefully decorated.  Food was delicious.  Bed very comfy.       Couldn't fault a thing.  Highly recommend

We chose this hotel despite its location 3 km from the city centre, as the room was advertised as soundproof. Unfortunately, this wasn't the case. From the 4th floor, we could hear every noise from the street, to the point we thought the window might be open. It made it very difficult to sleep. Although we had requested a quiet room, we had to spend one night there before being moved to a quieter one the next day. The staff efficiently arranged for a room change the following day. Avoid room 406, as it faces the street and has poor window insulation, allowing significant noise from outside and heat loss. On a positive note, the reception staff were polite and helpful, and there's a car park right next to the hotel. The room was spacious. The metro station (blue "touristic" line) is 10 min. away.

I spent 2 weeks there. The part I loved the most was the staff: the waiters were kind and lovely with me; the service was optimally and the room has been cleaned several times. Moreover, the hotel has got many board games that I loved playing with my friends. I loved the place!
I spent two weeks at the Hotel. Staff is really nice and willing to help. I think cleaning could be improved. Send my regards to Giorgos.

I’ve spent 15 nights in this hotel and I really enjoyed this experience and the place although the rooms were too small to fit in 3 of us. Services were good and food was acceptable especially the large breakfast. I’ve also liked the tranquility of the people in this place. It deserves a lot.

Excellent location if you visit Athens! The staff was truly amazing trying to make your stay an unforgettable experience.  The hotel has an amazing breakfast buffet with lots of Greek delicacies. Thank you Stratos Vasilikos! We will be back soon!

Was put up here by an airline after a cancelled flight, so can’t really complain since I didn’t pay for this. But comfortable rooms, good facilities, and their version of room service is a great idea - a selection of local eateries offering some of their popular dishes available for delivery, with the reception calling you when it’s down there ready for pickup. Unfortunately, only down side is the walls are paper thin, so sounds from hallways and neighbouring rooms are clear as day. Good selection for (inclusive) breakfast, however mini bar options were pretty poor.

Highly recommend this hotel. Fantastic room, spotlessly clean, great staff and a lovely breakfast. Free mini bar and drink voucher for bar. Close to local amenities. Will be re booking next time we are in Athens

I recently had the pleasure of staying at Ilisia Hotel. From start to finish, my experience was exceptional. The staff was friendly, attentive and always ready to assist, the rooms were very comfortable and tastefully decorated, the location is conveniently located at the heart of downtown. I recommend it, it’s a hidden gem that combines comfort, convenience, and outstanding service.

Fantastic location, good rooms and big balcony’s with a table and chairs. My room was very cosy with lots of wardrobe space, tv, desk with usb plugs. This hotel impressed me the most because the staff were absolutely lovely and couldn’t do enough for you.

The staff are very caring and attentive.

Great breakfasts.

Stocked complimentary minibar is a nice touch.

Single rooms are a bit small, and rooms immediately next to the marble stairwell are a bit noisy.

Old style hotel, it has a bidet. Eating breakfast with a nice view of the city (not Acropolis) is the highlight. Located far from Acropolis next to the busy street, not in the tourist area, so you don't get the traditional Athens romantic feel. Gym is in the lower floor, creepy. Overall good full service hotel in the area where most hotels in Athens are locally run with limited amenity. Service is great.

Great location (connected to transportation and walkable).

Check-in experience was tremendous (Nikos and Harry were the best we've ever encountered - their recommendations made our trip phenomenal and we would have missed out without their advice)!

Don't miss their amazing breakfast - one of the best experiences for delicious food, ambiance, and view!

HIGHLY RECOMMEND!

Great hotel in the heart of Athens, close to Syntagma square and the prestigious area of Kolonaki.
Rooms were recently renovated and sparling clean.
Outstanding Service especially by Alexandros at Front Desk.
Breakfast buffet was delicious offering a wide variety of local and international foods. Terrace had a beautiful view.

The hotel was great, the service was nice, even when we arrived at 3 am. The shower was a bit weirdly placed and cramped in the corner of the bathroom. The breakfast on the rooftop was nice but not extraordinarily good. The location is great with a short walk to the metro station.
Great Hotel in a good location. Only 5 minute walk to Metro. Staff was great, especially Nikos who helped me with directions and we chatted a bit about basketball.

Last month my daughter and I stayed at the hotel twice. In the first instance the room was small and had a foul smell on entering.
The next time we were put up in a better room. The staff at the reception was very helpful.
The break fast was excellent. Wonder why we need reservation for the pool even when no guests were in. Ofcourse the pool was very small.
Overall our stay was very good so thanks to the team. Appreciated eco-friendly water dispenser.

Located in a quiet neighborhood, this is a good, low-tier hotel. Rooms were clean and nicely decorated, but they did not appear 4-star. Right next to the hotel are a few shabby buildings that spoil the view. The staff were very warm and hospitable. However, the food needs improvement.

The front desk employees are phenomenal. Both men were very helpful & polite. Our family stayed there for 2 nights last week. The rooftop is beautiful! We were able to reserve the cabana and were treated like stars. The food and drinks were great. The rooms are comfortable but I don’t think we stayed in the updated rooms that are featured but we also checked in earlier and were accommodated. The linens for the bunk sofa bed were questionable. Overall, we were happy with our stay & our girls enjoyed their pool.

Stayed here for 4 nights and it was an enjoyable stay. Location was a little bit out from the main hub of Athens (about 3 stops on the very east to use subway). A day ticket was 4.10euros so pretty cheap to get around so didn’t really mind the location. Not a huge amount to see around the hotel although there are some very nice restaurants and a fantastic cake and ice cream shop close by which is open 24 hours!!

Room was pleasant and had recently been refurbished. Air con was good thankfully. I have read a few comments about the amazing breakfasts which I think was overstating it a little. Don’t get me wrong, the breakfast was good with a good variety but I’m not sure I would say it was amazing so don’t get too excited.

A great feature of this hotel was the rooftop bar which has a small pool and a beach theme with loungers, cabanas and actual sand. It was great to have a day off from walking the city and relax. Again, I have read a couple of negative comments about having to pay for the use which isn’t quite correct. You are requested to spend a minimum amount at the pool bar which starts at 25euros which I don’t think is unreasonable.

The staff were all excellent and very welcoming. If I was staying in Athens again, I would definitely stay here again.

Quality breakfast and nice breakfast area, great rooftop pool although a bit unclear whether hotel guests can freely use it because its based on "reservations" while nobody turns up for them. Friendly staff. Value for money, book direct from hotel site, it was cheaper. Felt like a safe area and quiet location, 10 min walk from subway stations.

Horrible experience (business trip).
1. Rooms are not as depicted in the photos, are way more decadent (3 stars would be honest)
2. Receptionist doesn't spesk english. Hello? 4-stars hotel?
3. The day after I checked in, at night I casually run into the receptionist, who in a rude manner asks me repeatedly "will you pay?". The whole reservation was arranged booked and paid by the travel agency, who provided the credit card details to charge the money. After 2 hours calling the agency and someone else from the hotel who could speak english I could solve the issue.

The hotel isn't matching the expectations for what a 4 star hotel should be. The building is like  screaming 'welcome to the 70s', the furniture in the rooms is outdated, the balconies are big but the view consists of the TV antennas of the opposite buildings, the reception is closed between 11 to 8, but having said that,  the hotel is actually a good deal. Let's see...
The location is very central and easily reached via the subway.
The price is unbeatable for the area, especially for families with children.
Surprisingly, while the rooms display this mismatched furniture and totally lack of decoration, they do have a kitchenette and a jacuzzi!!!!!!!
Only if you experience the summer in the 40C Athens, you can appreciate what a bonus the jacuzzi really is!

The location was really comfortable for taking the bus or the subway. The room was really spacious. As it concerns the service, most of the time there was no one in the reception and we had to call into a specific number for service. I would prefer it if there would be someone on reception.

It is a typical Greek three stars hotel, so don't expect more. Could be cleaner, some things don't work or fall apart. But the staff was very helpful, the breakfast is much better than a "continental" Italian one, and I appreciated haveing a microwave and a kettle in my room. Thus, I give 4 starts to a 3 stars hotel.

I was very pleased with my stay at the Art Suites Athens Hotel. I have chosen it in the past more than once. The hospitality, clearness and kindness of the owners and staff makes me visit it again. One of the best hotels in terms of quality/price and location. Great deal!!!

Room is very spacious. Bed is a problem: if if you lean against the wall, the bed slides and creates gap at the back and youbcan fall. The wooden flooring was making too much noise. Staff was very helpful though. Not close to popular places. Taxi takes quite some time to reach.

I only stayed here for one night, but it was fine.

Pros:
- clean
- extremely kind front desk staff. I never encountered one that was less than accommodating!
- shower was warm and water pressure good
- rooms kept cool
- good, quiet breakfast. The selection was small, but enough!
- elevator. Small but I’m glad there was one!

Cons:
- beds not so comfortable. The sheets were horrible.
- not super close to much (walkably)
- no complimentary waters in the room
- phones don’t work, so I had to walk down to the front each time I needed something or asked a question

Overall, it was a fine experience, but I may try something new next time!

This is a real gem - the rooms are a good size, we had a room with a balcony and enjoyed watching the street scene below. The breakfast is great - the seating is a bit limited so you can sit at sofas in the lobby if there is no space. The wait staff clean tables quickly. The elevator is pretty small - if you are claustrophobic it would be hard to use the elevator. The front desk staff are incredible. They are so professional and helpful and resourceful. We were travelling with touring bicycles and they helped us organize a van shuttle to pick us up at the airport with our oversized bike bags. They also helped organize a van shuttle to get us out of Athens on start our bike tour on quieter roads. Everyone was great and we must mention Christine/Kristina for her exceptional care of us right from when we made our reservations to when we arrived.
Hotel is close to the city center.  There are restaurants in walking distance.  The front desk staff, Charles and Demetris was so helpful and pleasant to talk to.

I visit Embassy Hotel with my family,  at Christmas time, the location is perfect,  the breakfast tasteful and my children loved the cakes and pancakes.  Excellent and always smiling staff.  The hotel has beautiful view to the Lycabetus hill and Athens city. Nice restaurants at the area and the metro station only 3 minutes away. Quite and safe location.
Parking space available !!!!!
See you very soon ....Dimitri, John, Christina, Spiro, Anastasia..... and all the mates thank you for the wonderful services 😀

Very nicely located hotel. We had an apartment and double room. Both spotless clean. An apartment with a view, cozy and spacious rooms. There was no washing up liquid, a sponge or a cloth in the kitchen. That would be nice to have when you stay only for a short period of time. Only thing I did not like was breakfast. Eatable but not the best one.

Ideal for families that have 4-6members, decent breakfast with green dishes, close to the most posh area in Athens - near Kolonaki- , metro 5min walk.
I recommend as best option for those also that they like the ‘70-80s- decoration which gives a sense of quality and simplicity!!!
Fair price compared to other hotels around 🤓

Staying at Delice apartments was very pleasant, the apartments were very spacious with everything that you would need. They were cleaned well every day. The location was also excellent, very close to the Evangelismo metro station and only a stop or two to the centre of the city. Would definitely recommend!

Good hotel for a short stay near the metro in Athens.
Rooms are neat although very simple.
The breakfast is good but would need a few improvement touches to make it even better.
Overall the experience was very good although I would expect from a 4* hotel more amenities and a wider variety of products available for breakfast.

Best bedroom mattress I've EVER slept on! Staff were extremely nice!! They got us a taxi when we needed one and the taxi showed up on time! Room was huge! Very happy with Delice and if I'm ever in that neighborhood, I will definitely stay there again!!!

We stayed the Holiday Suites for 5 nights and were very pleasantly surprised at how nice it was! When checking in, we were offered and shown multiple rooms and choose a basement room with a small covered courtyard area. The room was extremely spacious and the AC worked well which was nice since Athens was in the middle of a hot streak. The staff was friendly and very accommodating. Would definitely stay again!
Wonderful rooms and great ac. Not a ton of hotels got cool enough for us, but this one was amazing!

Well, there are much better hotels in this area in the same price category. The rooms are okay, but little things like no drinking water available or hot water/air conditioning not working or working poorly ruins the stay a little. The food is not great, room service dinner arrived cold, the breakfasts were not included in our reservation, we tried it the first day and did not like it, but at the check out still got charged for all days for breakfasts we did not have 🤷🏻‍♀️ also tried to book the conference room, the staff is very polite but not so helpful for resolving the issues.

Room is clean and comfortable. Kitchen is with all the amenities in order to prepare something.
Breakfast is very good. Position is fantastic, very close to metro and to the city centre.
Gym organization is not comfortable because it is not present in the hotel and a closer hotel's Gym should be used.
Absolute wonderful place to stay. Would recommend to anyone. Looking forward to coming back

I have use this hotel many times for business.

Old fashioned rooms, quite small.
Toilet has always a bad smell from drains and there is absolutely no soundproofing. You hear the lift working and your neighbours, coughing, speaking and whatever. Even window panes has no soundproof so the big road which is in front of hotel, is behind your ear, waking you up if you sleep like a bird.

I’m looking forward not to staying here again

The hotel is pretty spacious, very very lovely and friendly and efficient staff. Food is very good even though hotel food is not always good. The rooms are good , bathrooms big and clean. It was very pleased to stay here for two weeks. Definitely a 10/10

This was my first time at this hotel and the front desk was very helpful. The service for the gentleman and for the lady who worked at noon was particularly worthwhile. Food very amazing and very tasteful the lady there was very kind and also for the room service also breakfast was amazing, A little bit that bothers me to put 4 stars because you can hear the wall next to you when the other person is talking and put some music and loud tv.

Nice hotel placed in a good area. The room was ok, a small bathroom with a small shower cabin. The main problem is the very thin walls. I heard the neighbors snoring, using the bathroom, talking on the phone. Breakfast was very good. The employees are nice to guests.

The week that we stayed there has left great memories. Spoke fluent English which was a bonus for us. Magnificent breakfasts with specialty dishes. Very positive staff who were always happy and helpful.

great alternative to a hotel, in the best place in Athens. Very calm and and easy access to any point of the city, thanks to the nearby Metro station. The prices in comparison to a hotel are very good. Some people may not like the place as the interiors haven't been renovated since the opening in the 70s. I personally love the rosewood elements, it's very authentic and vintage. The apartments are spacious, with a bedroom, a living room and a separate kitchen. The balcony is enormous, with an unobstructed view to the city and mount Emitos. In front of the hotel, there's a church and office building related to it. it's really quiet.

I stayed here while looking for a last minute booking after I had to extend my stay in Athens for 1 more day. Although the location was nice and the staff were friendly, I have to say I was a bit disappointed upon entering the room due to how old the room and furniture were...and I don't mean old as in vintage classic way. The carpet had stains accumulated from 20 years and the furniture/walls/kitchen/overall interior looked like a cheap motel from the 1960's. I made the booking based on the 4-star description I saw on Google. Little did I know, those were user review 4 stars and not classification of the hotel as a 4-star hotel.

It's has good position, but it's still 40min by foot to Acropolis. The biggest problem of this hotel - it's really old: hard to open or close balcony or windows and stuff like that. But it's nice place to crash for few nights.

Large apartment, clean, well-equipped and with 24-hour reception. The location is excellent, walking distance to two train stations, and to the city centre. A safe neighbourhood. I will stay here again.

Very old. No renovation since 19xx? However Room is very big and clean.wifi. Hot water. Kitchen. And balcony over look city. Location is OK. When we stayed may 1. No aircon it's hot daytime. Big problem for us.

Beautiful apartment set in one of the most stunning areas of Athens.  Definitely one of the most amazing apartments I stayed in whilst visiting Athens and definitely one of my favourite areas of Greece.  Booking and access was easy and the apartment contained everything I needed for my stay.  Loved it and would definitely stay there again.

Simply the best! Chic decorated, fully equipped, crystal clean apartment in a building of famous architects in the posh area of Athens (Kolonaki), near to all important sightseeing. Loved every corner of it!

Μodern luxurious apartment amazingly decorated and equipped, completely clean and provided with all necessary. Perfectly located in the posh neighborhood of Kolonaki, in 5-20 min walking distance from all major sightseeing of the city. Highly recommended!
Simply the best apartment of Athen's centre I have ever been! Amazing decoration, luxuriously furnished, fully equipped! Best ever!
Fabulous,highly designed,spotless clean and convinient apartment,in walking distance of all important sightseeing of Athens,plus the best host ever!We had a great time and for sure we will come back!

A doll house with all the comforts, very clean and neat, everything you need to relax and rest in a very good location. We felt like our home ... also the owner is extremely kind and discreet ... of course we would go again!!!!

Great apartment, well equipped only 7 minute walk to tube station and 2 stops to centre but we also enjoyed walking in.  Loved walking down to Iguaza in morning for a coffee, 3 mins.  Shop only 1 minute away.  Is a side street but feel as if staying in Athens not a tourist building experiencing local life.  Really close to lots of embassies so feel really safe walking around at night.  Owner really helpful and responsive.  Great value for money.

Dont be decieved by the pictures, although the rooms are very clean and look modern and good, the location is quite bad. Yes its our own mistake for choosing and we should have looked into it better, but the surrounding area is purely for the residents of Athens. It is very crowded by buildings and has almost no attractions or multicultural/ touristic restaurants. It is not bad for a person looking to stay a couple of nights as the location is safe (although being crowded and dull) but wouldnt recommend if looking for a special experience.

I stayed in the penthouse apartment for one night on a solo trip. The staff was extremely kind and accommodating. The apartment was large, super clean and I felt very safe and comfortable while traveling alone. It’s about a 7 minute walk from the train station and only 45 minutes total for the airport. I can’t recommend this place enough. Thanks to the lovely staff I got to chat with! You guys are awesome!

very nice apartments, lovely minimal decoration and quiet rooms, we had a good time and easy communication with the person in charge. Now we booked for the second time this apartment for my mother who is staying in Athens and their price was again the most compaetitive in the area. Thank you for the good service:)

Beautiful room decoration with well organized furniture. In the kitchen, all needed utensils are available. Also has a nice big balcony. We total 23 students  went from Germany and had great fun there.

Location is very safe as it is very near the US Embassy in Athens, Greece. There's a grocery store, nice restaurants and walking distance to the main road where tour picks ups are done.  It is very safe to walk at night and early morning. The service is excellent as the gorgeous owner attended to all our needs. She was very helpful in everything. We were a family of four and our room was big enough for us 4. Place is very clean; room was cleaned everyday. Towels and toiletries are well provided for. I highly recommend this place because of its great location, excellent service and cleanliness. I will stay here again if I have another chance to visit Athens. I miss this place already.

Truly a gem of a hotel located near the U.S. Embassy in Athens. Hard to beat the value of this little boutique hotel and the amazing Valeriya who will assist you with anything you need. Rooms are clean, nicely appointed and are serviced as often as daily - your choice (many apartment hotels at this price point will only clean your room 1X per wk). Just a couple blocks from the metro and two metro stops from the center you are close enough to enjoy downtown, but far enough away for a break - which makes the Andromeda perfect for longer stays. While there isn’t laundry in the room, there is an excellent laundry mat about five blocks away and you can also have the hotel take care of it for an exceedingly reasonable price. Lots of cafes, bakeries and restaurants in the neighborhood - as well and several grocery stores. Again - you really can’t beat the value. Highly recommend!

Very cute place, large suite, very quiet and safe area. The apartment are quite nice decorated, it’s not a 5 Star award winning design, but for the budget absolutely fair and much better taste that I have seen in aother places in Greece. Very friendly stuff and excellent little fish restaurant around the corner. Good location

The stay was lovely, loved the breakfast and their fantastic staff (Valeria is the most gorgeous manager I ve met) . The place was  clean and beautiful!   Just 3 minutes walk to the subway. The hotel is surrounded by many good restaurants and bars! We really enjoyed the stay. Highly recommended!

The best place I've stopped in Athens ,nice apartment and comfort location. But the best thing about this hotel is the service. Valeria's general manager is always ready to resolve any issues and help.

A nice place for a short stay un Athens. The manager is very friendly, the location is close to The Athena Towers. It is obvious that the owner is doing every thing to make you feel comfortable: tea, cofee and sugar is offered from the house. After I made the booking the manager emailed me and he was at the agreed time at the location to hand me the keys. Very eager to see us pleased with our stay.
Good location! The apartment you can find everything like home. Fully equipped kitchen. Very kind host. Sure we will visit again.
Just perfect... great
Great

This apartment is in a great location: with a metro station a few steps away & in easy walking distance from many must visit locations in Athens ... including museums & a variety of good restaurants & cafés.
The apartment is spacious, with 2 bedrooms and all the necessary amenities to make your stay comfortable.
The owner is also very friendly and helpful and ready to give you good suggestions to make your stay in Athens ... a pleasant one!
Although very good clean dance equipped full house is worth....
Comfortable house with direct access to the metro and center
Comfortable!!!
It convenient for me

Great house, renovated facilities, quality moments, true friendships, people with values ​​and ideals. At a time when young people today face difficulties and problems of orientation, where ideological confusion and value depreciation prevail. This particular boarding school with its staff is a real support for the young person who is preparing to spread his wings for the struggle of life. Many Congratulations!
Regarding the women's boarding school. I appreciate the help that was given to me while I was there. However, I think it is necessary for some institutions to be modernized!
I was there too, from 1995 to 1997 with Mr. Psaltakis, Panagiotis Alexandridis and........ Matoula in the kitchen.

Not just a place to stay!
They are our second family!
We loved our stay at this property!Everything was perfect! Georgia our host was very helpful from the minute we made the booking till our check out.We will come again soon.
Very cozy and beautiful place!

Lovely house and staff! The atmosphere is quiet and out of the way of the centre (45 min walk or 15 min bus ride). The place is clean and modern. The kitchen & common room is in the basement and you can reach it by elevator, floor -1!

The concert hall and national gallery are close by. The staff can be reached by texting, calling and email didn’t work so well. It could be clearer that it’s a self-check in without reception. The bathrooms are nice and clean, but we could use more hooks to hang towels and clothes. The AC was very cold because a guest changed it so a good solution would be that the hostel controls the AC and takes the remote, maybe.

The hostel is new but it was a nice stay, if they make their description clearer and add a few more things to the bathrooms it will be very good.

We were a group of 14 people and had the pleasure of staying at Hostel Hostelista. I can say with great enthusiasm that this hostel is also perfect for large groups!

The homely atmosphere of the hostel created a warm and welcoming environment where each one of us felt immediately comfortable. Stella, the warm-hearted manager of the hostel, personally took care of us and made sure that our needs and concerns were well taken care of.

The accommodations were spacious, clean, and comfortable, which was crucial for a group of our size. There was a fantastic common area where we all gathered, chatted, and cooked together.

Hostelista was definitely the perfect starting point to explore Athens. Its location was central and well-connected, making it easy for us to reach the major sights and attractions.

Our group had an unforgettable time at Hostel Hostelista, and we owe it all to Stella and her dedicated team. We can't wait to come back and experience another amazing time.

Thank you, Hostelista, for making our stay so special! We highly recommend you to everyone traveling to Athens, especially larger groups looking for a warm and inviting environment. You are simply the best!

This hostel was such a refreshing stay during our euro travels. Stelios, the guy who seems to be in charge, does a great job in giving this place a welcoming friendly vibe. everything we could have picked a problem about was fixed before our eyes or has people scheduled to instal things - as i believe this is a relatively new or newly renovated place. location is 10/10 we caught the bus from the airport to the main street not even a 5 min walk away. The best place for pitas right across the road and anything else you need almost at your doorstep. i would definitely say don’t hesitate to book this place!

This hostel made me change my mind about this type of establishments.

Nice and clean, with a great location in one of the safest areas in Athens due to its proximity to American embassy.

The hostel is located in a stylish mid-century Athenian building nicely and accurately restored!

Both the owners and the staff are so friendly and helpful and make you feel ease and comfortable.
I had a great stay and Stella who is managing the place is the best host ever!

Pros: great, safe location. Easy to walk to metro stations, local grocery stores, and a million restaurants and bars. Quiet, even at night on a weekend. Safe. Had laundry service. Had bottled water for purchase (.50), and tap was cold and safe too. Hostel manager very responsive. Housekeeping was very kind. Clean rooms, bathrooms, common areas, and fridge. Wifi was good and consistent. Easy entry with codes instead of keys or cards.

Cons: No community vibes. No consistent hot water for showers. Was walked in on private room.

To date I have communicated by phone 3 times with the team of Booking partners and especially Mr. George, Mrs. Melpomeni and a little while ago with Mr. Lefteris.
EXCELLENTLY TRAINED, SWEET, FRIENDLY, and most importantly willing to help as they did 100%.
Thanks guys, keep up the good work. I enjoyed every minute we talked. Have health.

We stayed in this marvellous apartment for a period of two weeks. This apartment is truly luxurious. The apartment is so tastefully decorated and thought has been given to every single detail. The bedrooms are so comfortable, crisp linen and towels, a large very modern and equipped kitchen. We could have stayed here forever. A true definition for a home away from home. Esmerelda is a very attentive and kind hostess. In the area you find a bakery, a supermarket and everything you need. I cannot recommend this place enough. We will be back for sure.

Amazing apartment with great accessibility to the metro. The neighbor also offers good choice of local cafes and restaurants.
The apartment itself is very spacious and comfy.
Fantastic apartment in the heart of Athens. Walking distance to the Metro train station.  Local shops bars and tavernas.  Would highly recommend this place to anyone travelling to Greece

Great location. Great apartment. Fabulous hospitality!

We had an amazing time and we'll definitely book again next time we're in Athens
Apartment very good and very comfortable, spacious. Transportation is nearby, convenient for visiting. Guests are listening. I recommend this accommodation

It’s really the best place in Athens
clean, beautiful place 🫶
Very comfortable and neat apartment equipped with everything you need. In the surrounding area you can find everything. The hostess was very friendly and helpful!

I am very pleased with my stay in this apartment near the center of Athens, it was what we needed, clean, beautiful, quiet and relaxing. Very friendly hosts! I will come again, thank you for the fast service!
A wonderful hospitality very close to the city center. I hope I can visit again.
Poly aneto diamerisma me ola ta aparaithta. Eykolh prosvash se sygkoinwnies.

Ok apartment. Extremely hot in the summer and the air only blows in the main living area, not the bedroom.  A key is needed to enter and leave the apartment. Same with the building.  Once you check out of the unit, and leave the key as instructed there is no way to get out of the building unless someone is coming in.
Very nice hotel, friendy stuff, nice location.
Nice and convenient place to go.
Excellent and clean I will choose it again !!!
Dot!!!

I have not encountered more inhuman behavior and treatment, rudeness and unprofessionalism from people! who manage these apartments.
I apologize for the rambling. First let me say that after 9 p.m. an additional 10 euro charge applies for check-in. So far one can say ok, even if this is not written anywhere.
I have been informing since noon that we are arriving late due to a change in the boat's schedule (it left 5 hours later than the schedule) at the last minute and while at first the person in charge does not inform me, later and when I was half an hour from the apartment at 10:30 p.m. she tells me verbatim " take a taxi because from 23:00 the check-in fee is 30 euros". We arrive at the apartment at 23:03, exhausted from a 13-hour journey, and a bodyguard at the entrance simply dismissively, mockingly and rudely closes the entrance and leaves us on the street.
In the end, they canceled our reservation themselves and simply left us on the street, took our money and simply ran away with lies.
Excellent experience.
Excellent experience!!!!!!

This is the 2nd time I stay there & definitely not the last. Great location, not in the middle of hustle & bustle yet close to everything. Other hotel’s reviews mentioned doggy streets, noise from the street or the next room but it was not the issue at all. Very clean & still brand new. The staff are very friendly & helpful. Value for money is great. This will be my hotel whenever I am in Athens

The bed (wood) was horrible, made noise at every turn. Mattress was horrible, the worst i experienced ever. We discovered the mattress was kept in place by wood boards (one which was almost broken), instead of a regular mattress holder. We slept very poorly. Also, there is noise from the street (scooters etc) and the construction acrosss the street (starts at 7 in the morning), ear plugs were absolutely necessary.
Bathroom is very small, 1 sqm, we are slim and couldnt' fit more than one at once.
There is no sign for the property entrance, but it can be figured out eventually.
Location is recently renovated and appliances are all new and shiny, nice kitchinette but no stove (strange since it did come with pots and pans)

Amazing apartment, very clean and cozy, staff was very nice and helpful, my family enjoyed the stay and we recomend it. It is not in the very center, but well connected through metro line. Parking available and free.

New and extremely clean rooms in the Center of Athens. Open space parking available. Location nice and quiet. Room was spacious with nice balcony. It would be perfect if there was a small table to eat or work with a laptop.

Brand-new apartments with high level of facilities. Well located  near the center (nearby of the underground stations) . We stayed there for 4 nights and i strongly suggest it. The staff was very kind and helpful
This is a one bedroom apartment located in central Athens. Nicely furnished. Good mattress. Very clean. Elevator.
Comfortable, clean, spacious and positive atmosphere. Nice suite with comfortable beds, complete kitchen, tv and even a massage chair. Great Place, I would definitely choose it again!

I had a terrible experience with 'Supreme Suite with balcony by Cloudkeys.' Despite confirming my arrival time and already having a prepaid booking, the staff suddenly refused to allow check-in after 9:00 p.m., demanding an extra fee and then canceling my reservation. This left me and my family, including a young child, stranded late at night. The complete lack of professionalism and hospitality was appalling. I strongly advise against booking with this property if you value reliable service.

We had a great time, everything went well, the structure was easy to find, the keys were very simple to find, thanks to the information you receive via Booking, new apartment with a wonderful terrace, clean, everything in order and attention to detail, television with Netflix in the language Italian for some Films, excellent solution for those who need a small, clean and comfortable new apartment. Beatiful!

In a very good location. You can find a bakery, supermarket, cafe, food, pharmacy right in the same block.
Small space, clean with heating and hot water. Large terrace for the warmer months.
I wish it had a cot for infants.

A wonderful apartment with a wonderful terrace and view, new construction, right below it has very nice bars and very close to the center. It is also a very neat apartment and very comfortable. Highly recommend, would definitely go again!
Fantastic terrace, new construction very close to nice bars and restaurants. Very friendly environment and very clean place. I highly recommend it
Excellent view, clean and well-kept space!! Very welcoming and pleasant hostess!!
I really enjoyed my stay here. Everything was clean and in good shape. Metro, bus and groceries are all accessible by foot in max 10 min.

Great little apartment. It is equipped with everything you need (hairdryer, coffee machine, fridge, washing machine). Equipped also with air-conditioned for the summer. It is clean and beautifully decorated. The neighborhood is quiet. On the same street walking distance you can find bakery , coffee shops and mini market. Reasonably priced for what it is. Metro (underground) station is walking distance about 450meters away. Problem free communication with the manager.
Nice place. Near is small supermarket and 600 meters to Ampelokipi metro station.
Although the apartment is very nice, neat and clean, in a good area, and with many traffic possibilities since you can go everywhere. And many options for food and coffee in the area
Neat and clean, the rooms are a bit small, but if you're planning on sightseeing, it's a very good place.  Close to the metro and public transport
Clean and spacious apartment, with all amenities.

I went to Athens for a work event with colleagues, 6 adults and one teenager. Even though we had prepaid our rooms for 5 days, from the start they didn’t want to give us the rooms we paid for (2 rooms and one apartment), they blatantly told us that 4 people will need to share one (normal sized) bed. We managed to sort this out (?! We had already paid for everything!) after more calls. After 2 days the maid barged in over my colleague, staying at c2, at 9 in the morning, when she was getting out of the shower in a towel! She started shouting to leave the room in that instant, obviously my colleague refused, then 2 more guys come screaming to get out now. They gave her 5 minutes to gather her things and then asked her to wait until 3 pm to get another room to move in… of course she tried to argue, but they were acting like she was the problem. Very nasty experience. Rooms are small, one toilet was wobbly, one apartment smelled like mold, staff is rude. Breakfast is not worth paying for.

We had a great experience. For our first time in Greece. The first day (Friday), we met the ladies. They were so helpful with food suggestions as we had a long flight and needed something quick. The breakfast we received was rolls, pastry, coffee, juice, and boiled eggs. We did not expect an American breakfast as we weren't in America.  The next day, we met Demetri, and he is exactly as described in other reviews. He helped us plan our day in the city and help us with the train. The location has plenty of really good places to eat if you're willing to walk 6-10 mins. Or stick close and go to the spot on the corner (pictures) they have excellent gyros, salads, and platters. Will be staying again.

Our stay at the hotel was terrible. The blackout curtain was broken and held up by tape. When my wife tried to pull it, it fell and almost hit her. We asked to move to another room, but the staff said they were fully booked. Instead, she just tried to prop it up and promised it would be fixed the next day – though that didn’t matter since we were only staying one night. To make things worse, she even asked us to leave a good review!

The shower was also leaking from the top, and the shower gel dispenser didn’t work, forcing us to use shampoo instead. The bed made annoying noises, and the air conditioner was directed right at the bed, blasting cold air in our faces. Turning it off made the room unbearably hot. Overall, it was a very unpleasant experience.

The apartment was cleaned sloppily, and even the covers of the couch were not cleaned. The apartment needs renovation. Most importantly, the photos on Booking.com did not accurately represent the apartment. The business owner should upload realistic photos of each room. We were expecting something different from what we found. The only positive aspect was the location/neighborhood. Otherwise, it was very disappointing.

Great modern boutique hotel on good bus and metro routes. Handy for shops,  restaurants, bars and cafes. It was recommended by my cousin. Room was lovely, clean and comfortable. He can order any food in. It is fairly close to the centre if you like walking. We were only there for 2 nights and as it was reasonably priced and had everything we needed, we would go back again.
A great place to stay in the center of Athens.The house is modern,cozy and clean.Definitely 5 out of 5 stars

Clean, efficient, cute & cosy, well serviced and above all, nice people !
Thanks for all!
Great location, cool and functional apartment!
Amazing studios strongly recommend

Very nice experience and perfect hospitality in the place from the owners! very good communication from the beginning of the reservation until the end when we left. Friendly and cozy room and most importantly cool with a comfortable sleep. We had everything we needed from shops nearby. We highly recommend it 😊 😊

My stay at the Athens Flower Apartment started with a warm welcome by Maria, the landlady. Although I arrived very late in Athens, she drove late that evening to the apartment to show me how everything worked and even to recommend me places to visit in the city, where to still have dinner at that time, etc.
The apartment was very clean and comfortable. I felt like I was home.
Maria sent me several messages throughout the week to check if everything was fine. I could not ever imagine a better stay in Greece. Ευχαριστώ!

Stayed for two nights.

Apartment in a strategic position, near the Megaro Mousikis stop of the M3 which leads directly to both the airport and Syntagma and Monastiraki. Very quiet one-way street. The apartment is equipped with air conditioning in the bedroom, the bed is comfortable; in the main room there is a well-equipped kitchen with kettle, coffee machine, dishes and induction plate. The bathroom is small but well kept and functional.
Above all, Maria was very kind even from a distance! Not being able to welcome us personally, he sent us all the instructions for entering, as well as information on restaurants in the centre, in the surrounding area and on means of transport.

(If I really have to find some small flaw, I would say: the shower curtain is just too short, so if you are distracted there is the risk of wetting the floor a little, and lack of a soap dish in the shower).
The decoration, cleanliness, treatment of the owner, and the location, it was close to all means of transport, the bus and metro from the airport one minute away.
I recommend this well-equipped accommodation.

Olive Villa Rentals was great from the first message I sent. Very quick to respond and very helpful in planning our journey. Also the ongoing support during our stay was fantastic and greatly appreciated. Highly professional and great experience.

The villa was amazing (Villa Bliss) and everything we hoped for with beautiful accommodation, well maintained property, sensational views and great amenities.

We rent a villa in Spetses every year, and villa Calisti is by far the best villa we have ever stayed on the island.

We spent a few days in July, and the villa is brand new, with amazing views and a big swimming pool (a rare find for Spetses).

The location is only a 5 min walk from Dapia, and the villa was super clean and spacious for our group (group of 10).

We made the booking through Olive Villa Rentals, and the service provided was outstanding.

I had the pleasure of staying at the wonderful Villa Marelia on the island of Spetses, and it was truly a great experience. The house is beautifully furnished and offers a fantastic seaview. The rooms are spacious, the beds are comfortable, and there’s air conditioning throughout the house, which was very refreshing given the warm temperatures.

On relaxing days, we spent a lot of time by the large pool, which had plenty of space for all my friends and me to lounge comfortably. The kitchen and living room are also tastefully designed, and cooking together was a lot of fun.

The host was extremely friendly and accommodating, and communication with her was smooth and easy.
From friends i know about an existing waterproblem on the island of Spetses, which made me worrying a bit. Nonethless i found out the the villa has a water tank for these circumstances. After all the water in the house worked flawlessly at all times.

The beaches on the island are stunning, with crystal-clear water perfect for swimming and relaxing. The culinary experiences on Spetses were also excellent. Overall, it was a fantastic holiday that I highly recommend and i can recommend everybody a stay at the Marelia villa. I will come again.

I recommend Olive Rentals without any reservation !  They were very present and effective at all stages: before, during and after our stay.  very very responsive, always.  Dimitris and Nantia did everything to make us happy and it was a perfect success. Great holidays in a very beautiful villa. I will deal again with Olive rentals !

Villa Delia near Panormos Bay was absolutely beautiful.  The terrace with seaviews all around was the highlight of our trip to Greece.  The house was in terrific shape and the owner was so friendly and welcoming, helping us whenever we needed it.  All the rooms have a sea view.  We loved being able to walk to Panormos for dinner.  Pyrgos, also close by, was our favorite town on Tinos.  The villa is very private and allows for plenty of relaxation if you want to enjoy the pool and outdoors. We would love to use Oliva Villa Rentals again.  Tinos was our favorite place during our recent trip to Greece.

Price - quality wise a good deal! Communication was clear and everything was as promised.

Please note, toilet & bathroom are very small, there was a beeping sound, and the street can be noisy, but none of it was too bad

Amazing apartment. Stylish, clean, spacious and with a nice balcony aswell. All the amenities you need and good service. They are helpful and quick to respond.

Best apartment I have rented for a long long time. Highly recommended.

Excellent property- we stayed there on three occasions, which is a testament to how we liked it the first time. We had the Penthouse apartment that had an amazing setup. The staff were very accommodating and extremely helpful in setting up transportation and special requests. Mary was amazing!
Dr Amesur

Pros:
- huge space, modern design. We took the executive suite.
- great toiletries set
- they changed our towels after 2 days (we stayed for 4 days)
- location is safe and good. A lot of restaurants and mini markets nearby. You can still walk in the late evenings

Cons:
- hispeed wifi is not hispeed wifi at all. We planned to work but couldnt since the internet connection was too slow.

Came across this hotel by chance and what a great choice it was! The room is brand new, made to the highest level, all details taken care of, and there's even a small parking garage that you can book in advance.
The room is spacious, clean, comfortable and the A/C is strong. The shower was great, Just a really really good room in a quiet and nice street. I will definitely stay there again next time I'm in Athens.

Spotless and spacious apartment in a beautiful location, close to the metro (2 min from Megaro Moussikis) and within walking distance of several good restaurants (eg Agora Select). Roof terrace with views of Lycabettus Hill. Breakfast not provided, but excellent baker at the metro entrance (Megaro Moussikis) serving all kinds of pastries, coffee and juice. Eat in or take away.
These apartments are "luxury apartments" - we stayed in 105, which was obviously a wheelchair accessible apartment. There were unfortunately a number of things we didn't like; the bathroom was actually a "wet room" - nowhere to put anything so everything (toothpaste, razor brush, creams, etc.) stayed on the desk section of the main room. The shower was a hand held shower with a manual mixer tap - so freezing/hot if anyone else flushed the toilet. Why they didn't invest a little more in a column with a thermostatic valve I don't understand. Water went  everywhere and we had to use a towel to stop it from coming out under the door. You will get your feet wet every time you go to the toilet if someone has used the shower. (maybe put a squeegee in the bathroom). In the main room, someone thought it was a good idea to hang a large TV screen from the ceiling at head height (there was already a TV in the living area!) so you bang your head every time you walk anywhere in the room. (stupid and unnecessary furnishings); at night you will need a face mask - the thermostat is right next to the bed and glows all the time - we couldn't find a way to turn it off.  In the corner of room the fuse box flashes blue and white and you feel like you're  next to a Christmas tree. Inside the wardrobe there is a safe for your personal items - but again, unlike other apartments we have rented, the safe is a small version and not big enough for a laptop.  Choose carefully the room and you'll be ok.

Excellent budget hotel. Excellent location. Incredibly easy airport bus access. Front desk was staffed, even at 6am. Great price for a family of five. The family room had a large bed, a twin bed, a sofa made up as a single bed, and a comfortable cot.
Grocery (AB) was next door, and a short walk to amazing souvlaki at Souvlaki Μπαρμπαθωμάς, and desserts at ΖΑΧΑΡΟΠΛΑΣΤΕΙΑ ΚΩΝΣΤΑΝΤΙΝΙΔΗΣ.
The shower was handheld and didn't have a shower curtain.
This hotel is just great I can't tell something else! It has nice service it is very clean big and nice and it is perfect for short days!
The room was clean, there is an elevator. Good hotel for short stays.

I stayed in this hotel for 5 days when I came to Athens for a scientific congress. My room was clean and i had a great balcony. The hotel staff was really friendly, kind and helpful. Great location with easy transportation conditions. The hotel’s area is a very safe. There are many cafes within walking distance. Thanks for everything.  Highly recommended!

Please make sure this hotel is a budget hotel. Considering the price, I'm quite satisfied with this hotel. The elevator is very small, and I can say it is cute^^ It has private parking garage behind the hotel. All the staffs are very kind and warm-hearted. You can feel the Greek-style hospitality.

We chose this hotel despite its location 3 km from the city centre, as the room was advertised as soundproof. Unfortunately, this wasn't the case. From the 4th floor, we could hear every noise from the street, to the point we thought the window might be open. It made it very difficult to sleep. Although we had requested a quiet room, we had to spend one night there before being moved to a quieter one the next day. The staff efficiently arranged for a room change the following day. Avoid room 406, as it faces the street and has poor window insulation, allowing significant noise from outside and heat loss. On a positive note, the reception staff were polite and helpful, and there's a car park right next to the hotel. The room was spacious. The metro station (blue "touristic" line) is 10 min. away.

I spent 2 weeks there. The part I loved the most was the staff: the waiters were kind and lovely with me; the service was optimally and the room has been cleaned several times. Moreover, the hotel has got many board games that I loved playing with my friends. I loved the place!
I spent two weeks at the Hotel. Staff is really nice and willing to help. I think cleaning could be improved. Send my regards to Giorgos.

I’ve spent 15 nights in this hotel and I really enjoyed this experience and the place although the rooms were too small to fit in 3 of us. Services were good and food was acceptable especially the large breakfast. I’ve also liked the tranquility of the people in this place. It deserves a lot.

Excellent location if you visit Athens! The staff was truly amazing trying to make your stay an unforgettable experience.  The hotel has an amazing breakfast buffet with lots of Greek delicacies. Thank you Stratos Vasilikos! We will be back soon!

Upon entry we thought the decor was lovely,  service was great as well.
However the rooms are average
The walls are thin, found it very noisy from hallway noise.
Access to the pool was blocked by furniture  and you had to look frustrated walking around the restaurant to get outside. Just ridiculous.
We ate at the restaurant and food was good, serving size was on the small side.
The service was terrible. If I didn't get up and go to the bar they would have forgotten our wine order.

The location we found to far from Athens
The view from the roof is not the Acropolis, so don't be fooled. Still a lovely Outlook, but there is much better to be found.

The welcome to the car from the lady responsible should be way better and doesn't reflect the ethos that the hotel tries to give. The bar staff was overwhelmed with ordered and got my first and second drink wrong. Ordering a lovely rum, that I returned and then I got it back right but there was cork residue in the drink. Bar staff where lovely and helpful but it's the little things that matter on that level. Overall...great view...a must if you're visiting Athens and stay in that area.

The room was a good size, clean and comfortable but we had an east facing room that became an oven quickly in the morning and was noisy due to traffic at night. The lifts were a problem especially when everyone was leaving at the same time and we were on the 7th floor. There are 4 lifts but only 2 servicing our floor.  On the last morning they could not fit everyone in the breakfast area as various tours were leaving at the same time so we were shuffled to another area where service was slow and staff disinclined. However all that aside for a short stay it was worth the money and we enjoyed our stay.

Great place, very friendly and helpful staff.
Enjoyed my stay, I'm planning on returning again when I'm either on business or potentially even a short holiday break.

The rooms are large and have very good air conditioning as well (important during the hotter months).

I'd like to thank the staff for a pleasant stay.

Nice and well-maintained hotel with spacious, clean rooms. Staff nice and polite. Beautiful view from the windows of the city panorama. At the very top there is a swimming pool and a bar which I recommend visiting at least once. What more could you want... well, you can... the choice of food for breakfast is modest and above all, terribly disgusting coffee... probably instant and of the worst quality!!! You have to change that (I hope someone from the staff reads this review ;)

Very nice place located 7 minutes walk from the center of Fira, 10 minutes from the bus station, very efficient among other things. The room is essential but in the positive sense of the term: the room is tidy and cleaned every morning by the cleaning lady who changes the towels. There is also a mini fridge. The bathroom is small but it doesn't matter in the end. The room overlooks a path equipped with tables, where it is possible to have breakfast. The staff is super welcoming and efficient. There is also a small swimming pool in which you can stay until 8 pm. if I'm not mistaken.
The price is rock bottom for the services offered and for the place.
I will definitely go there tomorrow when I return to Santorini
The owner, his mother and all people that works at the hotel is completely helpful and I felt like if I was at home during my stay there.

I have use this hotel many times for business.

Old fashioned rooms, quite small.
