Toilet has always a bad smell from drains and there is absolutely no soundproofing. You hear the lift working and your neighbours, coughing, speaking and whatever. Even window panes has no soundproof so the big road which is in front of hotel, is behind your ear, waking you up if you sleep like a bird.

I’m looking forward not to staying here again

The hotel is pretty spacious, very very lovely and friendly and efficient staff. Food is very good even though hotel food is not always good. The rooms are good , bathrooms big and clean. It was very pleased to stay here for two weeks. Definitely a 10/10

This was my first time at this hotel and the front desk was very helpful. The service for the gentleman and for the lady who worked at noon was particularly worthwhile. Food very amazing and very tasteful the lady there was very kind and also for the room service also breakfast was amazing, A little bit that bothers me to put 4 stars because you can hear the wall next to you when the other person is talking and put some music and loud tv.

Nice hotel placed in a good area. The room was ok, a small bathroom with a small shower cabin. The main problem is the very thin walls. I heard the neighbors snoring, using the bathroom, talking on the phone. Breakfast was very good. The employees are nice to guests.

The week that we stayed there has left great memories. Spoke fluent English which was a bonus for us. Magnificent breakfasts with specialty dishes. Very positive staff who were always happy and helpful.

Stayed 2 nights August 14th family of 4
The hotel is situated in a prime location with easy transportation. The staff at the front desk were very friendly and welcoming, and they provided us with all the information we needed for our stay. Room was very spacious, clean and beautifully decorated. By far the most comfortable bed I have slept in.
Fantastic breakfast served in the morning.
Every staff member we interacted with went above and beyond to ensure our stay was enjoyable.
For the price, this hotel offers excellent value for money. The combination of the location, amenities, and service makes it well worth the cost. Overall our stay at the hotel was fantastic. We would highly recommend this hotel to families, couples looking for a romantic getaway or business travellers. Looking forward to staying here again in the future. Also forgot to mention transportation included to the airport.

If you wanna stay at a hotel that has no ac in a 100 degree weather this is your place!!! Had them come look at it first night said it would be fixed the next day. Next night still no ac asked for another room and was told hotel was completely full. Breakfast was slim to nothing. I would not recommend to anyone. Much better hotels around!!!

This was a late booking the night before we left Greece, but I would stay here again with no issue. Nice rooms, easy check-in and the breakfast the next morning was good. One of the best parts about this hotel was that they have their own dedicated parking for an additional 8 Euro (well worth it if you have tried to find adequate parking in Athens).

Not recommended at all!! Ridiculous breakfast. Green light is always on in the room above the bed.. the most stupid thing ever when you're supposed to sleep..
Waste of money. There are much better places for less and better quality.
Don’t be fooled by the pics , hotel is surrounded by old buildings with no view , Athen in general is an overrated and not a beautiful city to visit
They charged me 100% even I have canceled a week before arrival. Complete rip off! Never again

A doll house with all the comforts, very clean and neat, everything you need to relax and rest in a very good location. We felt like our home ... also the owner is extremely kind and discreet ... of course we would go again!!!!

Haris is an amazing host! He will gladly go out of his way to accommodate you! He will check-in and greet you in person, has immediate  response times and will generally tend to most of your needs.
Goes without saying that the apartments are spotless and newly renovated.
Definitely recommended....hence all the 5-star reviews!!

We chose to stay at Harishouse after searching for an apartment close to the city but needed something more peaceful than the city centre. If you are looking for a clean, beautifully designed modern place to stay, then this is an apartment for you. Much to our surprise was the fully equipped kitchen and living areas. A real value for money, will definitely  be staying here on our next visit to Athens.
Harry is an awesome host, very helpful and kind. The room has literally anything you might need clean and airy. Very close to markets. I fully recommend it.
Excellent location, think Haris is one the most super host there is...for sure ill visi for second time~adv super clean rooms~vfm
Clean and comfortable room in a quiet neighborhood near the children's hospital.  Lord Haris served us as many times as we needed him. Me and my family were very pleased and I highly recommend it!!!

A nice place for a short stay un Athens. The manager is very friendly, the location is close to The Athena Towers. It is obvious that the owner is doing every thing to make you feel comfortable: tea, cofee and sugar is offered from the house. After I made the booking the manager emailed me and he was at the agreed time at the location to hand me the keys. Very eager to see us pleased with our stay.
Good location! The apartment you can find everything like home. Fully equipped kitchen. Very kind host. Sure we will visit again.
Just perfect... great
Great

Great apartment, well equipped only 7 minute walk to tube station and 2 stops to centre but we also enjoyed walking in.  Loved walking down to Iguaza in morning for a coffee, 3 mins.  Shop only 1 minute away.  Is a side street but feel as if staying in Athens not a tourist building experiencing local life.  Really close to lots of embassies so feel really safe walking around at night.  Owner really helpful and responsive.  Great value for money.

Dont be decieved by the pictures, although the rooms are very clean and look modern and good, the location is quite bad. Yes its our own mistake for choosing and we should have looked into it better, but the surrounding area is purely for the residents of Athens. It is very crowded by buildings and has almost no attractions or multicultural/ touristic restaurants. It is not bad for a person looking to stay a couple of nights as the location is safe (although being crowded and dull) but wouldnt recommend if looking for a special experience.

I stayed in the penthouse apartment for one night on a solo trip. The staff was extremely kind and accommodating. The apartment was large, super clean and I felt very safe and comfortable while traveling alone. It’s about a 7 minute walk from the train station and only 45 minutes total for the airport. I can’t recommend this place enough. Thanks to the lovely staff I got to chat with! You guys are awesome!

very nice apartments, lovely minimal decoration and quiet rooms, we had a good time and easy communication with the person in charge. Now we booked for the second time this apartment for my mother who is staying in Athens and their price was again the most compaetitive in the area. Thank you for the good service:)

Beautiful room decoration with well organized furniture. In the kitchen, all needed utensils are available. Also has a nice big balcony. We total 23 students  went from Germany and had great fun there.

We came under very stressful circumstances and walked around for hours until we finally ended up at the inn, and in the midst of the covid-19 crisis in Athens, it was a small blessing. The kind, friendly staff made our stay in the city infinitely better.

It's small and clean, but I wish that they would secure the beds to the floors somehow, since they slide away from the headboard at the smallest squirm at night. Other than that it was quite cozy and quiet, which was much appreciated after a whole day of traveling.
Nice hotels. Two days stay in Athens, the landlady is very nice, telling us many useful information.
the best
Very nice bless
Good hotel
Great place to stay

The house is very comfortable, spotlessly clean and renovated. Organized, everything you need was there, from electrical appliances to towels. Would definitely recommend!!
The only negative I could say is that you can't find parking easily. However, I was very satisfied and would definitely prefer it again.
Excellent service, spotlessly clean apartment with all amenities. Ok, the floor creaked a bit, but given the area, no big deal. I would prefer it again without a second thought.

Everything perfect! Thank you
Comfortable, even though we were a family of 5, spotlessly clean, tastefully renovated. Very good quality clothing.
Everything is fine! We will recommend it but we will also come again.
Some detail that would improve the stay would be some wall hangers or monks to hang clothes and jackets

Our experience at the venue exceeded our expectations
It covered our needs for the People's Hospital
And the Children's next door
Welcoming, clean, comfortable, functional, bright
I would also choose it for a multi-day stay
Excellent space, comfortable apartment and many amenities and in a central location!! Parking is quite difficult in the area!!
Very nice apartment and spotlessly clean.

Great apartment, clean, modern (excellent WiFi) and full with amenities, even a hair-dryer!
Very nice view to the park just in front of the building.
I also liked the location, it is 10min from the center of Athens with bus station a few meters away. The metro station is also close.
Mary is very polite and helpful, thank you for the hospitality!

The appartment was amaizing. Excellent value of money. MARY was very cooperative and kind. Every thing was better than in appears in photos
I do highly recommend this appartment. 👌
Great stay, kind hosts, comfortable space. Definitely a place I would stay again and again. Mary, thank you very much.

My stay in this apartment was 10'!!!! it is exactly as in the photos, comfortable, clean and fully equipped!! Mary and I had excellent communication! I highly recommend it and hope it will be available again on my next visit to Athens!

Honestly, if there were 6 stars, I would easily give it.
I used this particular accommodation, during my visit to Athens, in the context of some scheduled medical examinations, at the Laiko hospital.
First of all, let me mention what you find in a strategic point regarding the specific hospital, as well as the Children's hospital.
In an Athens that was baking from the heat, the apartment was cool because of the A/C, which it has.
It is also quiet, sunny, spotlessly clean and in a good location for MMM use.
Communication with the owner was excellent.
I think that even though the photos may not do it justice, it is clearly better in reality.
I recommend it unreservedly and I will definitely visit it again, when there is a reason to come back to Athens.
I recommend this well-equipped accommodation.

The accommodation is perfect, I visited it with my family and we were completely satisfied.
Fairly clean space and with all amenities.
Also the owners are absolutely friendly and easy to understand.
I highly recommend it!!
Perfect for children.. Fresh air.. Coffe and snacks. Open area
It's a nice place to take your dogs for a walk or hangout with your friends, family, or boyfriend/girlfriend. It's really quiet and clean and I hope that it will remain just the way it is or better

Nice flat Park with paved paths and big green lawn. Family friendly place, good for daily excursions and biking, with a small area equipped with ramps for tricks. Has a cafeteria offering refreshments. Trees offer place for resting from the sun.

Nice big open area with a couple of art venues. There are very few (if any) public facilities available, like toilets. Also, there is no proper walkway for pedestrians to use to reach the park but too many too many cars which isn't very safe especially for children.
Best place in the area to have a walk or use the  outdoors free gympark. Great place for children also.
Nice service
Comfortable hospitality, all of them very helpful, thank you very much!

Excellent hostels!
Well done colleagues for the effort
Easy access, cleanliness, large TV, air conditioning, it has nothing to envy from many rental rooms or hotels.
Very admirable effort by SX to create these hostels extremely comfortable, airy, spacious and very clean...if there was access to the Mediterranean through the closed gate, that would be great....
Great rooms

This is the 2nd time I stay there & definitely not the last. Great location, not in the middle of hustle & bustle yet close to everything. Other hotel’s reviews mentioned doggy streets, noise from the street or the next room but it was not the issue at all. Very clean & still brand new. The staff are very friendly & helpful. Value for money is great. This will be my hotel whenever I am in Athens

The bed (wood) was horrible, made noise at every turn. Mattress was horrible, the worst i experienced ever. We discovered the mattress was kept in place by wood boards (one which was almost broken), instead of a regular mattress holder. We slept very poorly. Also, there is noise from the street (scooters etc) and the construction acrosss the street (starts at 7 in the morning), ear plugs were absolutely necessary.
Bathroom is very small, 1 sqm, we are slim and couldnt' fit more than one at once.
There is no sign for the property entrance, but it can be figured out eventually.
Location is recently renovated and appliances are all new and shiny, nice kitchinette but no stove (strange since it did come with pots and pans)

Amazing apartment, very clean and cozy, staff was very nice and helpful, my family enjoyed the stay and we recomend it. It is not in the very center, but well connected through metro line. Parking available and free.

New and extremely clean rooms in the Center of Athens. Open space parking available. Location nice and quiet. Room was spacious with nice balcony. It would be perfect if there was a small table to eat or work with a laptop.

Brand-new apartments with high level of facilities. Well located  near the center (nearby of the underground stations) . We stayed there for 4 nights and i strongly suggest it. The staff was very kind and helpful
Comfortable!!!

Ok apartment. Extremely hot in the summer and the air only blows in the main living area, not the bedroom.  A key is needed to enter and leave the apartment. Same with the building.  Once you check out of the unit, and leave the key as instructed there is no way to get out of the building unless someone is coming in.

I went to Athens for a work event with colleagues, 6 adults and one teenager. Even though we had prepaid our rooms for 5 days, from the start they didn’t want to give us the rooms we paid for (2 rooms and one apartment), they blatantly told us that 4 people will need to share one (normal sized) bed. We managed to sort this out (?! We had already paid for everything!) after more calls. After 2 days the maid barged in over my colleague, staying at c2, at 9 in the morning, when she was getting out of the shower in a towel! She started shouting to leave the room in that instant, obviously my colleague refused, then 2 more guys come screaming to get out now. They gave her 5 minutes to gather her things and then asked her to wait until 3 pm to get another room to move in… of course she tried to argue, but they were acting like she was the problem. Very nasty experience. Rooms are small, one toilet was wobbly, one apartment smelled like mold, staff is rude. Breakfast is not worth paying for.

We had a great experience. For our first time in Greece. The first day (Friday), we met the ladies. They were so helpful with food suggestions as we had a long flight and needed something quick. The breakfast we received was rolls, pastry, coffee, juice, and boiled eggs. We did not expect an American breakfast as we weren't in America.  The next day, we met Demetri, and he is exactly as described in other reviews. He helped us plan our day in the city and help us with the train. The location has plenty of really good places to eat if you're willing to walk 6-10 mins. Or stick close and go to the spot on the corner (pictures) they have excellent gyros, salads, and platters. Will be staying again.

Our stay at the hotel was terrible. The blackout curtain was broken and held up by tape. When my wife tried to pull it, it fell and almost hit her. We asked to move to another room, but the staff said they were fully booked. Instead, she just tried to prop it up and promised it would be fixed the next day – though that didn’t matter since we were only staying one night. To make things worse, she even asked us to leave a good review!

The shower was also leaking from the top, and the shower gel dispenser didn’t work, forcing us to use shampoo instead. The bed made annoying noises, and the air conditioner was directed right at the bed, blasting cold air in our faces. Turning it off made the room unbearably hot. Overall, it was a very unpleasant experience.

The apartment was cleaned sloppily, and even the covers of the couch were not cleaned. The apartment needs renovation. Most importantly, the photos on Booking.com did not accurately represent the apartment. The business owner should upload realistic photos of each room. We were expecting something different from what we found. The only positive aspect was the location/neighborhood. Otherwise, it was very disappointing.

Great modern boutique hotel on good bus and metro routes. Handy for shops,  restaurants, bars and cafes. It was recommended by my cousin. Room was lovely, clean and comfortable. He can order any food in. It is fairly close to the centre if you like walking. We were only there for 2 nights and as it was reasonably priced and had everything we needed, we would go back again.

Just avoid it. The worst thing from the lack of cleanliness, noise, rough construction, non-existent help from the host is his argumentative behavior. Unfortunately, I read her comments and unacceptable answers later
Clean and spacious apartment, with all amenities.
I really enjoyed my stay here. Everything was clean and in good shape. Metro, bus and groceries are all accessible by foot in max 10 min.

Great little apartment. It is equipped with everything you need (hairdryer, coffee machine, fridge, washing machine). Equipped also with air-conditioned for the summer. It is clean and beautifully decorated. The neighborhood is quiet. On the same street walking distance you can find bakery , coffee shops and mini market. Reasonably priced for what it is. Metro (underground) station is walking distance about 450meters away. Problem free communication with the manager.
Nice place. Near is small supermarket and 600 meters to Ampelokipi metro station.
Although the apartment is very nice, neat and clean, in a good area, and with many traffic possibilities since you can go everywhere. And many options for food and coffee in the area
Neat and clean, the rooms are a bit small, but if you're planning on sightseeing, it's a very good place.  Close to the metro and public transport

It’s really the best place in Athens
clean, beautiful place 🫶
Very comfortable and neat apartment equipped with everything you need. In the surrounding area you can find everything. The hostess was very friendly and helpful!

I am very pleased with my stay in this apartment near the center of Athens, it was what we needed, clean, beautiful, quiet and relaxing. Very friendly hosts! I will come again, thank you for the fast service!
A wonderful hospitality very close to the city center. I hope I can visit again.
Poly aneto diamerisma me ola ta aparaithta. Eykolh prosvash se sygkoinwnies.

We had a great time, everything went well, the structure was easy to find, the keys were very simple to find, thanks to the information you receive via Booking, new apartment with a wonderful terrace, clean, everything in order and attention to detail, television with Netflix in the language Italian for some Films, excellent solution for those who need a small, clean and comfortable new apartment. Beatiful!

In a very good location. You can find a bakery, supermarket, cafe, food, pharmacy right in the same block.
Small space, clean with heating and hot water. Large terrace for the warmer months.
I wish it had a cot for infants.

A wonderful apartment with a wonderful terrace and view, new construction, right below it has very nice bars and very close to the center. It is also a very neat apartment and very comfortable. Highly recommend, would definitely go again!
Fantastic terrace, new construction very close to nice bars and restaurants. Very friendly environment and very clean place. I highly recommend it
Excellent view, clean and well-kept space!! Very welcoming and pleasant hostess!!
Very nice hotel, friendy stuff, nice location.
Nice and convenient place to go.
Excellent and clean I will choose it again !!!
Dot!!!

Olive Villa Rentals was great from the first message I sent. Very quick to respond and very helpful in planning our journey. Also the ongoing support during our stay was fantastic and greatly appreciated. Highly professional and great experience.

The villa was amazing (Villa Bliss) and everything we hoped for with beautiful accommodation, well maintained property, sensational views and great amenities.

We rent a villa in Spetses every year, and villa Calisti is by far the best villa we have ever stayed on the island.

We spent a few days in July, and the villa is brand new, with amazing views and a big swimming pool (a rare find for Spetses).

The location is only a 5 min walk from Dapia, and the villa was super clean and spacious for our group (group of 10).

We made the booking through Olive Villa Rentals, and the service provided was outstanding.

I had the pleasure of staying at the wonderful Villa Marelia on the island of Spetses, and it was truly a great experience. The house is beautifully furnished and offers a fantastic seaview. The rooms are spacious, the beds are comfortable, and there’s air conditioning throughout the house, which was very refreshing given the warm temperatures.

On relaxing days, we spent a lot of time by the large pool, which had plenty of space for all my friends and me to lounge comfortably. The kitchen and living room are also tastefully designed, and cooking together was a lot of fun.

The host was extremely friendly and accommodating, and communication with her was smooth and easy.
From friends i know about an existing waterproblem on the island of Spetses, which made me worrying a bit. Nonethless i found out the the villa has a water tank for these circumstances. After all the water in the house worked flawlessly at all times.

The beaches on the island are stunning, with crystal-clear water perfect for swimming and relaxing. The culinary experiences on Spetses were also excellent. Overall, it was a fantastic holiday that I highly recommend and i can recommend everybody a stay at the Marelia villa. I will come again.

I recommend Olive Rentals without any reservation !  They were very present and effective at all stages: before, during and after our stay.  very very responsive, always.  Dimitris and Nantia did everything to make us happy and it was a perfect success. Great holidays in a very beautiful villa. I will deal again with Olive rentals !

Villa Delia near Panormos Bay was absolutely beautiful.  The terrace with seaviews all around was the highlight of our trip to Greece.  The house was in terrific shape and the owner was so friendly and welcoming, helping us whenever we needed it.  All the rooms have a sea view.  We loved being able to walk to Panormos for dinner.  Pyrgos, also close by, was our favorite town on Tinos.  The villa is very private and allows for plenty of relaxation if you want to enjoy the pool and outdoors. We would love to use Oliva Villa Rentals again.  Tinos was our favorite place during our recent trip to Greece.

Rooms are very modern and the suite is very big and clean. Can’t fault any of this! One of the lights over the bath flickered. Balcony was large and great view over the city. Well stocked kitchen. However, if on the balcony the main road is busy and it’s still a 15-20 minute bus/taxi to central parts (eg Plaka/Acropolis/Zeus Statue etc)

We spent 1 night there and there are some areas to improve: 1) The sound proofing doesn’t work too well during the night so it’s a bit noisy with the traffic nearby (I think it’s a main road with quite many vehicles). 2) The bed sheet and towels had stains on it even though they were newly changed. Probably some persistent stains that were hard to wash off by laundry. It will be good if the cleaning staff can check this more carefully beforehand. 3) There is no reception which can be good and bad at the same time. One saves time for checking in and out. But on the other hand, it’s hard to get service during night. We couldn’t manage to get new towels and bed sheet in our case.

Some good points: 1) The location is good. You can find subway, cafes, supermarkets, etc quite nearby (walking distance). 2) The room is new and modern. Equipments are in mint conditions. 3) There is a chat service via which you can get immediate responses from the host.

Enjoyed staying here.

Super nice interior and beautiful view. Good communication with the host.

Nice location near the metro and restaurants.
Very nice and clean room. Great experience in the heart of Athens
It is a very nice place and very pleasant, very friendly and clean, I will definitely come again

Good location. Iron machine, washing machine hairdryer. Nice room and kitchen and big balcony.
Kitchen stuff maybe needs little more things cutting board, knife wooden spoon. 🙂 But definitely deserve 5 stars.

Comfortable apartment for 1/2 people with literally all amenities and at a very affordable price compared to the competition. Immediate service. I will prefer it again and recommend it to others. Access by OASA to and from the center (Constitution). The only "disadvantage" is the relative "bubble" due to L. Mesogion, which is tolerable. In all other fields, I have nothing to say that is not worthy. 5/5
Great apartment, has everything you need for a comfortable stay. Clean, in a good location next to hospitals. Excellent communication and service. I recommend you to choose it.
Second time we chose Elvita Apartments and we were extremely pleased!
The apartment in Ampelokipis near Errikos Dunan on the top floor very good. Clean, quiet, central and easily accessible from main roads 10✔️
The apartment was nice and very clean.The staff was very helpful.  Unfortunately, the location was noise because too close to a big road.

Rooms are pretty nice and the place overall feels like a home instead of a hotel. We came at 8pm although latest check in was at 9pm and nobody opened the door since it was through buzzer. So we had to wait for the owner of the hotel to come and hand us the keys (30 minutes). Other than that it's a good place to take public transportation, walking distance from the metro and many busses run on the road in front of
This place has contacted a broker company that gives fake positive reviews. Do not trust this place
achieved through advertising. they make comments for money
Very good place
Nice owner, no noise, relaxing apartment. Would suggest. Also isn’t too expensive, great value.
Fantastic, absolutely nothing to complain!

Excellent apartments, clean, bright, organized with many amenities, balcony, internet, smart TV, washing machine, kitchen with many utensils, toaster, microwave, kettle, coffee maker, slippers, towels, nice pillows-mattresses! Easy access to subway and nearby supermarket!
And also a great host! I suggest it!
Exactly 1 minute from the house, the underground parking of the president hotel is available for a fee (the first 2 hours 5 euros each subsequent 0.50 euros)
Large apartment in a central location. The rooms are very good. The second bathroom needs a renovation. The kitchen needs improvements. Otherwise a good experience
Perfect for children.. Fresh air.. Coffe and snacks. Open area
It's a nice place to take your dogs for a walk or hangout with your friends, family, or boyfriend/girlfriend. It's really quiet and clean and I hope that it will remain just the way it is or better

Nice flat Park with paved paths and big green lawn. Family friendly place, good for daily excursions and biking, with a small area equipped with ramps for tricks. Has a cafeteria offering refreshments. Trees offer place for resting from the sun.

Nice big open area with a couple of art venues. There are very few (if any) public facilities available, like toilets. Also, there is no proper walkway for pedestrians to use to reach the park but too many too many cars which isn't very safe especially for children.
Best place in the area to have a walk or use the  outdoors free gympark. Great place for children also.

I strongly recommend this real estate agency with a professional team who, with their knowledge of the market, offer in a friendly environment their valuable informations and guidance to obtain the goal every customer is willing to reach.

Theodoris is very efficient, professional and gives great advice. He responds to queries promptly and with great care given to detail. I wouldn't hesitate to recommend Buy2Greece to anyone,as it offers excellent services and has such knowledgeable and reliable members of staff.
Giannis and Thodoris were great! I found my apartment fast and they help me out with everything. They are highly recommend.

A truly professional team that go above and beyond the call of duty to make each transaction problem free and successful.
Thank You Theodoris and Team

We used Buy2Greece to lease a house. The service was super quick, everyone was beyond nice and explained every question we had in english. They even helped us settle the electricity documents. We are very happy with them and we will use their services again.
Excellent space, comfortable apartment and many amenities and in a central location!! Parking is quite difficult in the area!!
Very nice apartment and spotlessly clean.

We came under very stressful circumstances and walked around for hours until we finally ended up at the inn, and in the midst of the covid-19 crisis in Athens, it was a small blessing. The kind, friendly staff made our stay in the city infinitely better.

It's small and clean, but I wish that they would secure the beds to the floors somehow, since they slide away from the headboard at the smallest squirm at night. Other than that it was quite cozy and quiet, which was much appreciated after a whole day of traveling.
Nice hotels. Two days stay in Athens, the landlady is very nice, telling us many useful information.
the best
Very nice bless
Good hotel
Comfortable hospitality, all of them very helpful, thank you very much!

Excellent hostels!
Well done colleagues for the effort
Easy access, cleanliness, large TV, air conditioning, it has nothing to envy from many rental rooms or hotels.
Very admirable effort by SX to create these hostels extremely comfortable, airy, spacious and very clean...if there was access to the Mediterranean through the closed gate, that would be great....
Great rooms
not very good when they charge you a price for a room with breakfast, to offer you a cake and a coffee for breakfast. that's not professional at all
Good location if you want to be close to Pireaus port.  Very hectic trrafic, no parking. Room is ok for a short stay. Breakfast enough for a quick snack, conyinental option.
Perfect 👌
Little hotel, no parking, just at the road,  so its very noisy there, old fashen designs, no big mirrors in the rooms...  But a lot of towels, always they have hot water, polite service
No parking, mediocre rooms, not recommended unless you're in too much of a hurry and you're close by
The best hospitality....

This is a scam, a complete tourist trap. The apartment is stinky and unappealing. When we got there, we expressed our disappointment for what we saw and they immediately offered us a refund, which they didn't give us!!!! They tricked me into not calling booking assistance by saying that they will take care of the issue. After ignoring me for two weeks they sent me a message, blackmailing me, to remove my review in order to refund me. Avoid by all means!!!!!!

The most unprofessional behavior I have ever seen . Property was informed about our late check in since booking. Two hours before our arrival, at 2330 I received a message that they won’t be able to accommodate us . We found our selfs at midnight trying to find somewhere to spend the night.

Excellent apartment, newly refurbished, very clean and comfortable. Plenty of free parking around which is a rare luxury in Athens. Great roof terrace. Very quiet though close to a lively square with excellent restaurants. Very convenient for overnight stay before or after using Piraeus port (15 min drive).

This place is easily in the worst 3 travelling experiences of my life: after I had booked my room, somebody called me right away asking for my arrival time, to which I mistakenly replied 8pm, and saying they will send me an access code soon. Realizing my mistake right after we had hung up, I sent them a message saying I‘ll actually arrive around midnight (I didn‘t see that check-in time was until 11pm according to booking, but then again I actually expected a reception because I filtered by hotels on the app and the place clearly has the word hotel in its name). No answer the entire day. I wrote another message in the evening, no answer. When I arrived at the place shortly before midnight and there was nobody there, I called 12 (!) times without any answer. After a couple of minutes, I received a message saying I should look for another accommodation because this one is cancelled since I arrived outside check-in times. They ignored me the entire day knowing that I said I would arrive outside check-in time and cancelled my stay once I arrived - this is not how you treat your guests, my friends.

We had a bad experience at K8 Athens. The place itself is meager in terms of amenities. Not  clean. Doesn't look like pictures on listing. We had some of belonging stolen and the property made no effort to reimburse us. Look elsewhere if you are staying in Athens. Would never, ever stay here again.
The studios look amazing and they are close to the Petralona metro station, which is very close to the center of Athens (Monastiraki & Syntagma) , supermarket and restaurants.
Very nice studio and the owner is also very kind. The studio is located 7 min from Petralonica station.
Convenient place, quiet neighborhood and clean beautiful rooms. The host is amazing!

Nice place!!! , convenient location, 7 minutes from the metro, next to a park with many restaurants. Clean, lots of supplies, friendly and helpful owner! If you are in Athens for a couple of days, then I recommend staying here.

Amazing hospitality, it had everything, nice place, new rooms, all the money the yard. Good wifi. I highly recommend it and for the value for money, I thought I was staying in a much more expensive place.
The best hospitality....

I had an amazing stay at this apartment! The location was perfect, close to everything I needed, and the neighborhood was quiet and safe. The apartment itself was spotless, well-decorated, and had all the amenities I could ask for. The host was incredibly responsive and helpful throughout my stay. The comfortable bed and beautiful view were definite highlights. I would absolutely stay here again and recommend it to anyone looking for a fantastic place to stay!

I had an amazing stay at this beautiful apartment on Alkimynis 111! The space was spotless, stylish, and had all the amenities I needed for a comfortable stay. The location was fantastic—close enough to the main attractions but still in a quiet and charming neighborhood. The host was incredibly helpful and responsive, making sure I had everything I needed. I truly felt at home and would definitely recommend this place to anyone visiting Athens. Can’t wait to come back!

Took my gf to a once in her life time experience in Greece with me. I avoided the cheesy big hotels and this was exactly what I was looking for:
Attentive and knowledgeable staff. Location was brilliant. Apartment standards were high
And I doubt you can get a similar exclusivity level for the price bracket.
All in all we had a marvellous time, highly recommended!

I recently had the pleasure of staying at this wonderful apartment just steps away from the beach, and it was truly an unforgettable experience. The location is unbeatable — you are literally a stone's throw from the sand, which made it incredibly convenient to enjoy the beach whenever we wanted.
The area around the apartment is filled with beautiful cafes, perfect for enjoying a morning coffee or evening meal.

I visited Athens and had such a wonderful time. To complete my perfect visit was the stay at M & M. The perfect place, walking distance from all the major attractions or just one or two stations by the near by Metro station.
The pleasant room is well equipped and the hot tub on the roof is just amazing.
Highly recommended.
Gorgeous
Perfect stay
Very clean, nicely decorated and equipped with everything you need. The owner is very kind

Great host, really helpful, cozy apartament, amazing communication, many shops in the neigbourghood and very close to the city center, for that price it is everything that you need. We enjoyed our stay very much. I recommend.

We had an outstanding experience staying in the Armoniko apartment! It was a short 5-days vacation for two in Greece. The Armoniko apartment is located within a 10-12 minutes walk distance from the ancient center, Parthenon, in a calm and very authentic district of Athens, with grocery stores, great restaurants, both modern and authentic Greek cuisines, and the major park areas close by. If you are into historical site-seeing, actually almost all the most important museums and historical places are located rather close. It is a nice, tidy, cozy, and a very romantic apartment for two, with all the necessary modern appliances and accessories included. Simone himself is a super Host! He is very friendly, helpful, and always keen on giving some great recommendations regarding places to go and sites to see in Athens. He made our stay indeed unforgettable and I can recommend him and the Armoniko apartment with no hesitation! We, my wife and I, will be happy to stay there next time we are in Athens.

I had a very warm welcome and a restful stay at Armoniko. The host Simone treated me like a family friend and helped me out with so many logistics. He really made my time in Athens run smoothly. He is a host that takes great pride in his work. The apartment had everything I needed - the bed was super comfy and the apartment was quiet and cosy. Highly recommended.

We were an extended family of 6 people, we stayed at some spectacular places in Greece - but staying at Simone's place was like coming home after a long day of sightseeing (Oh the hot showers were the best). The apartment is just walking distance from the Acropolis and Monastiraki. It is a also a very safe residential area (My brother looked like he wanted to settle down there).
The apartment is furnished with every amenity we would need and is a very cozy place.
More then anything else. Simone has such a nice personal touch - he is like Santa, you think of something you want, he gets it for you. Hand map of Athens - GRANTED.  Adaptor for our phones - GRANTED.  He even helped us out with cab bookings a week after we checked out. Rare to find such good-hearted folks these days.

Armoniko apartments it's the best place you can book for your stay in Atene! Close to the heart of the city, the apartment it's fantastic in every way: modern, very confortable and fully equipped! Simone is the best host ever, always smiling and ready to help! hightly recommend ;) I looking forward to come back soon!

Gazi Hostel was one of the best hostels I’ve ever stayed at. George, the owner, really helped me feel at home and well looked after!
Conveniently located a 6 min walk from the train station with heaps of food places around. Very central.
There are 11 beds spread out over the whole space and I felt like I had heaps of room and it was very quiet.

The place was immaculately clean, beautiful modern bathroom with beautiful tiles. Little kitchenette and outside area made it feel cosy and a lovely quiet environment to come back to after a long day of sightseeing. I definitely can’t wait to come back to Athens and will be booking my stay at Gazi if I can!

Gazi hostel was very good. The owners and worker is very laid back. It's a nice place to meet other travellers. And the water is hot, wifi is good and there's free coffee every morning . Also the bed is comfortable. It's in a great location next to good restaurants, and the metro station. I walked to the Acropolis from there
Definitely worth the stay. Thanks guys
The staff is very friendly and smiling.

Booked to stay here very last minute, and couldn’t be happier with the service that we received! Jannis was very helpful and accommodating, sending local recommendations for food and places to visit! The house was clean and welcoming, and in a very friendly area. As two younger girls travelling alone, we felt safe and comfortable during our stay here. 10/10 would recommend and would happily stay here again! :))

Excellent experience! The location is unbeatable—situated in a vibrant, hip neighborhood that truly captures the spirit of the city. The street is filled with great cafes, bars and restaurants that offer a taste of the local culture. Whether you're looking for a cozy spot to enjoy coffee or a trendy place to have dinner, everything is just a short walk away.
Had a lovely stay, would definitely recommend! Easily accessible, in a convenient location, and good food around. Clean space, and hosts made sure our experience was great!

Great overall experience at Troon of Athens Apartments. Simple, clean, and tidy. The bed was very comfortable. The hot shower was amazing. The neighbourhood is great (relatively quiet with good food options close by). Wifi connection and speed was not that great and could be improved. Some loud neighbours in the early a.m. Nevertheless, we give it 5 stars. We stayed 4 nights (May 2024) and will certainly stay again on our next visit to Athens. - S & J

Well located in a beautiful area with many restaurants and bars nearby. The building is well maintained, the apartments are clean and provide everything we needed for a comfortable stay. Everything was as expected and there were no unpleasant surprises. This is our place of choice for our trips in Athens and we keep on coming back.

The space is great, letting us have a comfortable stay in Athens. The employee was very helpful and even explained to us where the closest stores were, as well as recommendations for tourist attractions. Spacious kitchen area, good beds. Our family was content with the space. We had a great stay.

Good people. Everything in order and they provide in paper a lot of info about the area sites. I found it very difficult to find parking as there is only available to park at the street. At the shower, hot water no pressure.
Nice apartament, clean, well equipped, big surface, near metro station
Very cool apartament! Im very happy that I was there :)
Fine accommodation in the heart of Athens.

Lovely place!

The prices are very good and the mattresses together with the pillows are great (cocomat), as is the air conditioning. But the toilet is shared and the people hosted there are not always ideal, and this is a problem since there is no soundproofing and the other person may be drunk. Also, even though the staff is polite, you don't feel particularly safe and the toilet runs. Average price €20 per person
The studios look amazing and they are close to the Petralona metro station, which is very close to the center of Athens (Monastiraki & Syntagma) , supermarket and restaurants.
Very nice studio and the owner is also very kind. The studio is located 7 min from Petralonica station.
Convenient place, quiet neighborhood and clean beautiful rooms. The host is amazing!

Nice place!!! , convenient location, 7 minutes from the metro, next to a park with many restaurants. Clean, lots of supplies, friendly and helpful owner! If you are in Athens for a couple of days, then I recommend staying here.

Amazing hospitality, it had everything, nice place, new rooms, all the money the yard. Good wifi. I highly recommend it and for the value for money, I thought I was staying in a much more expensive place.

Very nice guy , it is like coming home.
Nice place to sleep, close to all you need. Direct connection to metro.
Decent prices.
I would recommend this place 👌

I called up late, there was one room available, so I get there and the door is locked, but luckily some other poor sods had been waiting and the owner came on a bike as soon as I showed up.
The room was very spacious, working A/C and nice bathroom.
Great location right next to the metro line and busses, but I could barely hear any noise at all, it was very quiet at night. And dark, curtains were great.
I do have one complaint and that is that the towels provided smelled like old washing machine, you know the smell you get when the lid is closed all the time. My body had that same odor after drying for about an hour, not so pleasant. The sheets, pillows etc, were perfectly fine, so maybe a different washing machine...
The duvet was nice and thick and a soft and hard pillow was provided, including complimentary food items.

Room was good and the shower was the biggest we had in Greece. Air conditioner and Nesspresso were awesome. We didn't get back to our  room till around midnight, so we didn't notice that there was only one blanket for the two beds.It was too late to call anyone. We looked everywhere but there were no extra blankets or sheets, so I used one of the towels as a blanket. Would suggest the keys be labeled, as we needed 3 different keys to get to our room.
Door Was locked and lights off when we showed up for our stay. Called and the number was not in service. Do not book here.

Lovely place. Have stayed in two of the rooms now and had a comfortable night on both occasions. Extreemely convenient for the metro to the city and airport. €5-8 taxi to long distance bus station. Some great local restaurant 5-10 minutes walk away.

First of all Miranda is a wonderfull warm woman. She waited for us upon arrival. The apartment is well equipped in a nice neighbourhood. Good airconditioning, silent at night en looks way better than in the pictures. Definitely recommend apartment!!! Book direct via mail.

Miranda’s apartment is cosy, comfortable and very well located. It’s walking distance to shops and restaurants. Miranda is the perfect host, she has thought of everything to ensure you have a comfortable stay. The apartment is well-equipped with every little thing you could need. Highly recommend and would definitely stay again!

The apartment is perfectly  cleaned, sheets and towels were smelling great  and is spacious ! mrs Miranda is the best host we have ever  met! Upon arrival we realized that the apartment had a welcome pack that was fabulous! Thank you so much !! We will be back for sure ! Value for money ! Absolutely we do recommend it ! 🙏🙏🙏
Lovely apartment in the heart of Athens. Extremely clean and well equipped. We really like it!
Excellent location, quiet building and neighbourhood, very clean and well equipped.

As a foreigner traveling for work i found the apartment to be gorgeously designed with thoughtful touches and special comforts for guests such a high quality blue tooth speaker, nespresso machine, shampoo, body wash etc. Such a pleasant check in and kind staff and owners from the first contact. Every corner is so clean. I feel at home. 10/10.

My partner called it small. I called it cozy . Stayed on the ground floor. It a small home in a building. Would recommend them . The location is the best . Close to  attractions, public transport and restaurants.

Super friendly staff, amazing location, incredible view, comfort, and very good tips to visit the city!
Vassilis welcomed us with the nicest smile and was super relaxed despite our late arrival. Great experience, definitely recommended!
Uphill and really tiring, but quiet and sweet.
Superb location for visiting the city

Newly renovated apartment, right off the metro line. Bright, spacious common area. The bedrooms are a bit tight but not too bad. Nice kitchen with new appliances. Be aware that it’s on the 4th floor and we couldn’t get the elevator to come, so it’s a hike with luggage. Other than that it was quite nice!

The apartment is really beautiful and the location is more than great. Everything you need is just around the corner - restaurants, pubs, shops. Would be 5 stars, but due to the lack of hot water during almost the whole of our stay, I sadly had to drastically decrease my opinion. No help, no refund, that's really not customer service I'd expect. Otherwise, everything was perfect.

Very nice modern and clean apartment in good location. Easy and flexible check-in - keys were waiting for us in safe box. Metro station is next to the building, but we decided to walk to Acropolis (less than 2 km).
Apartment is very well equipped - kitchen tools, air conditioning, 3 bathrooms, comfortable beds and balcony with morning sun. We stayed there with 10 people group and there was was enough space for everyone.
There are many groceries and a lot of restaurants and cafeterias in 2-5 minutes walking distance.
We really enjoyed our stay in this apartment, it made our Athens trip perfect!

This apartment delivered on its promise. It was comfortable, luxurious and cozy. Everything was top notch.The host was very gracious and responded quickly to every question or request we had. She was very helpful. We enjoyed our stay tremendously. The metro nearby was useful to roam around this beautiful city.We'd definitely return if we happen to visit Athens again.Thank you, Athen's life.

A tastefully decorated flat painted in white - a color Greeks are obsessed with. The flat was extremely comfortable for our group of 8. The most convenient feature of the flat is 3.5 bathroom and the facility of washing machine not to speak of the balcony all around the flat. It is ideally located having super market, restaurant and metro stations all within 5 minutes of walking. The locality is a quiet residential area
Linens , crockery and thoughtfully the detergents for washing Machine provided were adequate and of good quality .
The only thing missing was a welcome bottle of Greek wine. Jokes apart we had a wonderful stay Esmeralda. Thank you for hosting us

What a gem outside the heart of Athens.  The accommodations were spacious with a kitchen. The apartment was great, but the hospitality was amazing.  Alex gave us directions on how to see all the sites by using the Metro. He recommended cafes to eat at, and he gave us tips on how to travel around the area.  This was a wonderful start to our month long vacation.

We were VERY satisfied with this accommodation. The owner was extremely friendly and helpful both in advance and in the location. The apartment is just a few minutes away by metro from the Acropolis, and you can use the rooftop jacuzzi and sunbeds to watch the Acropolis itself anytime you are "home". That is definitely unrivaled! The area has some bakeries, cafés, restaurants, and a supermarket, so that is great too. Even though a train and traffic come and go by the accommodation, you cannot really hear it; it's very serene inside. The apartment is very clean, spacious, and beautiful. Its only downside is - much like almost everywhere in Greece - that you are not allowed to flush the toilet paper, so it has to go in a bin. But the owners did everything they could to make yourself as comfortable as possible, including a lot of food already in the fridge and on the counters that you can eat for breakfast or whenever. And a very generous amount of toiletries too! 10/10 would go again and I recommend it wholeheartedly!

This place was probably a luxury place as the name claims, couple of years ago but not anymore!
In the apartment everything is old and it creaks, beds and mattresses needs to be changed as you barely can turn yourself during the sleep without waking up everyone in the apartment. The bathroom needs renovation as the water seems to be leaking everywhere. Apart from the fact that you can see Parthenon from the 5th floor of the building and the very nice host Alex, nothing to positively rate for this accommodation! The windows are so dirty you can barely see the tram track outside (ya, nothing else to see).
Definitely not what I was expecting from a 9 plus rating! This a poor 6!
Reviews are for apartment 301.

Amazingly friendly service and an incredible value stay in Athens. It is truly a luxury experience and the staff go above and beyond. Super convenient location as well just short walking distance from many major attractions in the city and just moments from the metro station.

We stayed at 47 Luxury Suites on June 6, 2024.  I was travelling with 3 other women, and we booked a 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom suite for one night before flying to Crete.  The suite had everything we could hope for – air conditioning, lots of room, comfortable beds, high quality linens.  The kitchenette was fully equipped with coffee, coffee maker, cutlery, dishes, fridge, stove, and microwave.  Alex and Sotiris were very helpful and responsive.  They arranged a driver to pick us up at the airport and gave us access to our suite as soon as we arrived.
The rooftop area with a view of the Acropolis was perfect after a great dinner at a restaurant Alex had recommended.  We walked everywhere, including to the Acropolis, and used the nearby train to get to the airport the next day.

We spent 3 nights here, and the location of the hotel is great - it's in a quiet and safe neighborhood not far away from city center. The rooms are indeed smaller, but they are renovated and nice (including the bathroom, which has a walk-in shower). Just a heads up - the outdoor lights on the balcony turn on automatically in the evening and can't be turned off manually. You have to go to the reception or wait until the next day for housekeeping. Unfortunately for us, the receptionists forgot about us.
The receptionists were quite okay, but I would have expected a bit more proactivity or attention when there are sick people sitting at breakfast or when someone is loudly on the phone. The breakfast was good, although the selection wasn't that large.

Great location! Very close walking distance to basically everything. Service very polite.
We had an apartment with two rooms. Well, not the cleanest one I am afraid..
Electric stove was not working. Kitchen poorly equipped. Not a proper pan in sight, not to mention other stuff. Hard to prepare a meal. Fortunately many good restaurants nearby. I think I would not be back again. Pictures better than the reality.

The staff was the absolute best part from our shuttle drivers to the front desk. So welcoming. Great, clean and comfortable room and walking distance to all the best sites. Unique style for the decorations and the included breakfast was fantastic.

Extremely wonderful experience with this hotel. The AC was out in part of the room I was staying in with my parents. They put me in my own room for the rest of our stay with no additional charge. Staff was extremely kind and went above and beyond to help. Would highly recommend!
Perfect location! Clean and safe neighborhood! Good size and very clean room and bathroom! Rooftop deck

Just reading some of the other reviews and I'm a little confused if they stayed in the same place. I don't really do Hostels that much, but in this case my travel arrangements required me to do so. If you come to Athens, I highly recommend this Hostel because...
1. The 3 members of staff that I interacted with were all helpful and supportive.
2. Breakfast is part of the price which takes away a lot of hassle of sorting it out for yourself - you get coffee, tea, orange juice, milk, cereal, bread / toast, cake, honey, ham, cheese, eggs...I mean what more do you want, this is enough.
3. The room I stayed in, the bed was clean and privacy curtains covered the whole cubicle, I stayed for 5 nights and asked for new towels and bedding after  3 nights which they did no problem. The bathrooms are in the room, but there are extra toilets off the common room area.
4. Bag of laundry was 5 Euros and done in 4 hours - brilliant!
5. Location: You are 100 metres from the Metro. Oh yes, you are in an area with a few bars etc, so there will be extra noise at night - but 50% you have been out enjoying yourself anyway, so it doesn't matter.
FINALLY..the whole Hostel had an ambience and positive personality about it. I stayed 5 nights and the common room area is also where the reception is, so you met new people coming in and out all the time and it was easy to start chatting with fellow travellers. Every other person I met seemed happy and contented.
SO, come to Athens and come to ICONIC - you will not be disappointed. 😊😊😊

We had to last minute book accommodation in Athens and were pleasantly pleased with our choice. Iconic is a great choice for the price you pay.

The lady on reception was very helpful with top places to visit around Athens. She was very accommodating and friendly, as were the rest of the staff on through the 24 hour reception

A good spread was put out for breakfast each morning and the terrace was a good vibe. The hostel is located in a cool neighborhood, yes the bars go late but we slept like babies (just remember earplugs)

As for previous reviews about bedbugs, good measures are put in place to prevent/control this issue.

Also a bonus being able to store our bags in storage for the day! I recomend this place for backpackers and anyone on a budget :)

The hostel is run by some really nice people, in the fun Gazi area. However, there are bedbugs. And not a few. Please do something radical about it.
The kitchen could need some improvement, for example two of four stovetop plates and the oven didn't work.
The breakfast is very basic. It ends at 10. I could have used  breakfast until 11, as could other guests. There is no gluten-free bread, although that is also not common in Athens. The closest supermarkets are 15 minutes walk away.
Overall cleanliness was fine.
I would stay there again if I were sure to get a bug-free room.

I know that the rooms are shared, and I was actually looking forward to meet some fun people, but Iconic had other plans for me. As I entered the room, I was dismayed by the bad odor. The room stinked, to put it nicely. A minute later I understood why, as my roomate-to-be entered. His clothes were torn from head to toe, and he had almost no teeth. A homeless, I presumed. As much as it is a sad case, I was not expecting that Iconic Athens Hostel caters to that kind of guests.

The staff was not eager to accomodate a room change for me, and initially told me that they were completely booked, which a visit to Booking.com quick disproved. After a very long wait, I was finally offered a different room. The card was broken, the bedding had punctures in it, and I have had enough of their poor sanitary conditions and rock bottom standards. I left and got a much better accomodation somewhere else.

When I approached the management suggesting that we leave this unfortunate event behind us by them refunding me what I paid and didn't use, and me deleting this review, the rude lady accused me for blackmailing them... They then went ahead and lied to Booking.com that I actually stayed in the property, so that I would not receive any compensation from Booking.com. Of course I've recorded a video of my self check out, so they're out of luck.

I guess I shouldn't have expected acceptable standards of service at a hostel that is this poorly ran.

As promising as it looks online, I do not recoemmend Iconic Athens Hostel for any traveler, even as a last resort accomodation. Even for free. You might as well sleep in the streets for a similar experience. Thanks for reading, and take care.

If you like noise until 6 am, dust and dirt everywhere and a breakfast that's basically toast and butter, then Ikonic should be your first choice. One of my roommates found bedbugs, too. Management seemed rather unconcerned, but considering the overall run down condition of what once must have been a nice Hostel, small wonder. Its saving grace was that it was very cheap.

Amazing apartment close to historic sites in Athens. Quiet location within walking distance to Acropolis. Apartment has everything you could possibly need and good air conditioning. Extremely clean and a lovely outside courtyard. Fabulous coffee maker with lots of coffee pods and a well stocked fridge.
Host is very welcoming and speaks perfect English. Her local knowledge is valuable and she is so helpful!
I would definitely stay here again when visiting Athens next.

Amazing host, very kind and always there for you. You feel like you're staying at a friend's place. All the food and drinks in the place are free to take and consume, but most of all, the place itself is AMAZING! It is a nice safe haven to recover from the walks in or around Athens, and you are super close to the Akropolis and centre, but not too close to cause any noise!
Loved this House and enjoyed talking to the landlord:) once back to Athens,  stay here again!
The best Airbnb we have stayed at. Fabulous and generous host Kleio. Look no further.
Seriously the best airbnb host E.V.E.R. love the host, the space and the location!

Stayed two nights in May. Very comfortable and spacious room. The entire premises was very clean and well maintained. Lift to all floors which was very handy considering the weight of our bags. Room had a small kitchenette with everything we needed and more. Shower was excellent.
Staff were very helpful and in contact all the time.
The room over looks the railway lines. I thought this may be noisy but after a couple of trains, I never noticed it.
Would definitely stay again as there are a lot of restaurants nearby and we walked to the Parthenon.

Very clean and comfortable. Ideally located near Petralona metro. I was traveling solo and there's several key/code locked entrances that made me feel safe.

Team were very accommodating and were able to arrange a late check out for me.

Neighborhood is vibrant with lots of good eateries and a variety of cuisine.

I really enjoyed my stay at Pallineon House. Elias and Efi were amazing and sincere hosts.  The rooms were clean and have a beautiful interior design. The size of the rooms is perfect with enough space available in every room. The location is perfect and there are plenty of local cuisines that serve amazing food. The only downside is that the rooms are noisy. However considering the price value it’s hard to compete with. If you bring ear plugs or buy them at the local pharmacy it’s noise is not an issue. Thank you very much Elias and Efi! Regards Alex

A wonderful place, with beautiful design. The apartment is clean and well-kept. the apartment is equipped with necessary things; towels, cosmetics, dishes, iron, air conditioning.
The area is safe and beautiful. When we come back to Athens, we will only stay here :)
This might just be one of the nicest places I've stayed in a long while

Excellent
THE APARTMENT WAS NEW, CLEAN, IN A VERY CONVENIENT LOCATION, THE OWNER SERVED US WITH WHAT WE NEEDED. EVERYTHING IS PERFECT .

The location is close to the metro-train, 5 m on foot. Easy to understand with the metro map. All shops 2 minutes away in the next street. A small neighborhood with bars and very good little restaurants nearby. The apartment is clean and new. There is air conditioning. The bed is very comfortable as well as the sofa.
Everything works very well. You must follow the host's instructions. Too bad we never saw anyone. Contact with WhatsApp works very well and the advice is welcome. Viewpoint of the Acropolis 15 minutes away on foot (sunset Panoramic lookout).....It's a bit of a climb but it's definitely worth the look!
I recommend
Perfect stay
Beautiful, cozy and clean. 2 bedrooms, full equipped kitchen. Super fast wifi.
Very beautiful and warm house!!! For a family like us it was ideal! Spotlessly clean and very close to all our activities, right next to the station! I highly recommend it.

We loved our stay in the apartment! the balcony is very nice and we were quite lucky to experience nice weather and enjoy it. the apartement was very clean, the bed was nice to sleep on and the kitchen fully equipped. the host was always available and made some great suggestions about dinner, moving around the city etc. Thank you very much!
great apartment right in the city center! very clean and tidy and amazing terrace! the host is attentive and quick to help!
An excellent option to stay in Athens with a central location which is quiet and also not far from the main touristic area. And Efi the landlady is such a darling and very helpful and reliable.

The apartment itself is spotless and well-maintained, which immediately made me feel comfortable and at home. The tasteful furnishings and thoughtful decor add a touch of elegance, making the space not only beautiful but incredibly relaxing.

One of the standout features of this apartment is the sense of calm it provides. Despite being centrally located, the surrounding area is very peaceful, allowing for restful nights and stress-free mornings. It's the perfect blend of city convenience and suburban tranquility.

The location is ideal—everything I needed was within walking distance, yet the neighborhood was refreshingly quiet. It’s hard to find a spot that offers both such central proximity and a serene atmosphere, but this apartment manages to do exactly that.

The host was fantastic, always polite, and willing to assist with any questions or requests I had. Their responsiveness and kindness made the stay even more enjoyable.

Considering the quality of the apartment and the exceptional service, this place is an excellent value for money. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a cozy, stylish, and peaceful place to stay in the city!

amazing new apartments, with everything one could ask for!  it feels like you are getting pampered from the moment you step your foot inside the building. great central location close to all tourist attractions, but preserving the neighborhood vibe of Athens. tastful decoration, extremely clean and bright spaces. comfortable beds and sofa, large balconies. easy check-in and wonderfully friendly host. I would go back anytime!

Loved my stay at the Somon Suite! The mix of 70s Athens architecture with modern elements was impressive, and the space was fully renovated, super clean, and very comfortable. The location is fantastic—just minutes from the blue and green metro lines, and a 10-minute walk to Apostolou Pavlou with stunning Acropolis views. There’s a 7/7 mini market right across the street and plenty of great cafes and restaurants nearby.

The small herb-filled balcony added a nice touch, and the host was incredibly helpful and kind. The only minor drawback was that smoking wasn’t allowed inside the apartment, but it was allowed on the balcony. Great value for money, I’ll definitely stay again!
A lovely apartment in a great location! Clean, cozy, and equipped with everything we needed. The host was very helpful and responsive. We had a wonderful stay and would definitely recommend it!
Nice apartment for my business trip! Recommend 🙏

I stayed with a friend at the The Apartment With Garden View, at the upper floor. A beautiful, spacious apartment, with hardwood floor, vey neat and spotless clean. The apartment is located in a great neighbourhood, one minute walk from the metro, and 2 stops by metro to the center of the city. It's also a 25 minutes nice walk to the center. It's a quiet neighbourhood, with great cafes and restaurants. The apartment is very quiet too. The host was very nice and helped in any question we had.
In short, it's a perfect place to stay when coming to visit Athens. We highly recommend it and we'll definitely be back.

Good price and out of our expectations !
The location is just around metro station.Only 2 stop to Athens central.
Bedroom is very clean.private kitchen make us feel surprise .

We stayed at Apartment 2 which is close to the garden. Very comfortable and the garden is nice. It has radiators so we were feeling very relaxed in the house as we visited during winter time.
Highly recommended!
Best Airbnb to slay in Athens. 🇬🇷🏛️Amazing place with great vibes. We stayed for a week and had a great time.

I was here with my friends for a week easy to reach with the metro close to the center and nice area very quiet the apartment was comfortable and nice looking with a good kitchen and facility the host was on spot and very welcoming very recommended 🇬🇷💚

Excellent spot to visit the major attractions in Greece. Top notch breakfast and a very pleasant courtyard to relax after the day sightseeing. Good pastry and restaurants within an easy walk. A directory of local places gets you to some real authentic experiences.

My husband and I arrived around 8 am, and we were allowed to drop off our luggage. We were given the best warm welcome by Stathis who offered us breakfast and showed us on a map where we could take in the local history and views until it was check in time. His mother Eleftheria owns the place, and is very kind and helpful to help with booking a taxi for us to and from the airport. Rena prepared delicious breakfasts and Anna kept everything clean for a wonderful stay. Thank you all for making Athens feel like home!
Very clean and modern styled hotel room. It was only for 1 night stop over between the ferry and airplane however it was one of the accomodation highlights of my recent trip to Athens
Nice apartment, clean, walking distance to Plaka and very Nice staff. I will for sure stay here again om my next visit to Athens.
We like the location of apartment and apratment it self. It was quite, windows turning to the inner yard.
Don't book, you'll have to change plans as soon as you reach the place
Location is great, facilities are good in compactness, easy communication with owner so no hesitation.
The best service

The room very small and very DIRTY. The sheets full of hair as well as the bathroom sink. When we took a bath, the water did not enter the siphon, it left the bathroom and flowed into the room. The central door of the entrance, which is located in the street as the room is semi-basement, is made of warehouse-type iron and does not provide any security. Unacceptable situation!

The room is very small, it's hard for two people to pass each other in the aisle, and there is still a small fridge there. The rooms are located in the basement, on a quite busy street, which generates a lot of noise and vibrations. The bed is not very comfortable, the spring mattress digs into the body when lying down. The room equipment is very poor. No space to store things. There are deficiencies in cleaning. Self-check-in, specific instructions from the owner via Whatsapp.

Very spacious, modern, clean and well equiped apartment.
The street is very quiet and the building in a good condition.
The hostess was super friendly and helpful.
Overall, it was a great choice for our family.

We made a first reservation in this hotel. The place was ok but very poorly located. Just downstairs there is a bar with loud music until 3-4am. Impossible to sleep!!!! Just a horror!!!!. We made a 2nd reservation with free cancellation. We were charged the amount well before the end of the possible cancellation. Unable to recover the money despite the cancellation. 2 contacts with the establishment but they tell lies saying that they are late in reimbursements. Fortunately, booking did what was necessary for us. Thanks to booking and never again book with them!!!
A beautiful place...to stay  ...in the heart of Athens..❣️

I loved it, the room was clean and well equipped (wifi, air conditioning, hair dryer, coffee maker, microwave and dishes)! The hotel is located between two metro stations (30 minutes walk maximum) and it is located behind Sunset Hill with a view of the Acropolis. I really liked the stay! Looking forward to coming back!
Clean rooms but without windows and soundproofing. We heard speeches at all hours from everywhere.

Easy check in and check out.
Good location near a metro , many restaurants and a few supermarket . It is 25 minutes walk to tourist sites. There is a park on hill  nearby (15 mins walk )for sunset view.

Perfect place to stay while exploring Athens.
Great location, less than 5 minutes walk to the Metro, walking distance to all main attractions. many restaurants add coffee shops.
Great spacious clean and designed rooms.
Excellent staff and cool rooftop.
Highly recommended

Nestled amidst the charming streets of Athens' Petralona neighborhood, the Blue House on Dimofontos Street 112 is a true gem waiting to be discovered. From the moment we stepped inside, we were enchanted by its welcoming atmosphere and unique character.

Upon arrival, we were warmly greeted by our gracious host, who ensured that every aspect of our stay was nothing short of exceptional. The Blue House exudes a sense of tranquility and relaxation, providing a much-needed sanctuary in the bustling city of Athens.

The interior decor of the Blue House is a delightful blend of modern comfort and traditional Greek charm. The vibrant blue accents throughout the house add a touch of whimsy, while the cozy furnishings invite you to unwind and make yourself at home. The attention to detail is evident in every corner, from the carefully curated artwork to the thoughtful amenities provided for guests.

One of the highlights of our stay was the spacious terrace, where we enjoyed sipping our morning coffee while soaking in the panoramic views of the neighborhood. It was the perfect spot to start our day, surrounded by the sights and sounds of Athens waking up.

Location-wise, the Blue House couldn't be better situated. Petralona is a vibrant and eclectic neighborhood, filled with charming cafes, local restaurants, and picturesque streets to explore. With the Acropolis just a short walk away, we found ourselves perfectly positioned to experience the rich history and culture of Athens.

But perhaps the most memorable aspect of our stay was the hospitality of our host. Their genuine warmth and hospitality made us feel like we were staying with friends rather than strangers. From providing insider tips on the best places to eat to ensuring that we had everything we needed for a comfortable stay, they went above and beyond to make our time at the Blue House truly unforgettable.

In conclusion, our stay at the Blue House in Petralona was nothing short of magical. From its charming ambiance to its unbeatable location, it exceeded all of our expectations and left us longing to return. If you're looking for a unique and unforgettable experience in Athens, look no further than the Blue House on Dimofontos Street 112.
Amazing stay, amazing apartment triple A service!
Stayed at the Blue House for two nights and highly recommend it. Good, quiet location and very clean, large rooms. Arriving earlier wasn't a problem either. Perfect for a city trip.

We stayed in the Cretan bull apartment perfect for the two of us.  Compact but had everything we needed plus comfort and cleanliness.  A perfect 10/15 walk into the hub being greeted by the awesome sight of the Acropolis.  Eva was a fantastic host with clear instructions and information we couldn’t wish for better other than the wish to stay longer than 3 nights.  Athens was everything and more thank you 🙏 x

We were very impressed with our accommodation at Hercules Residences. It was spacious, modern, immaculately clean, and conveniently located. The staff were proactive and helpful.The apartment was well resourced with a laundry in the building. A mini mart was about 2 minutes walk away. We were able to walk to Monestraki and The Acropolis. Will definitely stay there again. Thank you Eva and team.

Great spot in Athens! Clean, comfy place. AC worked great - saved us from the heat! Loved chilling on the balcony. Having a gym was awesome for keeping up workouts. Best part? It didn't break the bank. Definitely recommend for anyone hitting up Athens! Not the nicest neighbourhood in town but fairly close to the subway and Downtown

My family of 4 stayed in this lovely apartment for 3 nights.  It is very spacious and clean and is perfect to have two toilets.  We also used the gym room once.  We rarely walked to main areas but called taxi using Freenow app as it was super hot during our visit in Aug.  There is a convenience store very close to the apartment which is fantastic.  Eva is super nice and helpful. Highly recommend.

Was there for a week and absolutely loved it. The host, Eva, was very friendly and checking in via text and making sure everything was alright. The apartment was nice and bright. I have no complaints at all.
Gorgeous
Super car wash solution for your car 🤝

We stayed in this apartment with another couple friend for a few nights in Athens. The apartment was very clean, got plenty of light and had all the necessary household items. The unit has an AC in every room and there is a washer in the unit which is a life saver. It’s also 2 blocks away from the metro station. Overall a great stay.

Very clean and comfortable, there are 2 rooms including double beds. There is all kitchen items, all house items. We like very much, we feel like at home. Ancient area is very close. Historical places, restaurants... are around 30 min walking distance.
There is turkish coffee at kitchen (here they say greek coffee but no matter :) this is a perfect and nice idea for Turkish guests, especially for the addicted ones like me :)
We asked to extend check out till 14.00 PM and they accept, many thanks.

We advise eveybody.
Bugs!!!!!
Very good apartment, in a very good area and price
Well located, but the apartment is rudimentary, especially in terms of kitchen. Bad bedding. And the company of thumb-sized cockroaches.

Great location, close to the center and the Acropolis.
Clean but modest
No kettle.
Great apartment, close to everything.

Exceptional and remarkable experience in everything in this amazing guest house in Athens! The hospitality was amazing, providing an excellent service in everything I needed for my stay. The location was very convenient, located right in the heart of Athens in a beautiful and quiet area, but at the same time right by all the busy parts of the city. The guest house’s architecture and aesthetics is amazing, art work, unique furniture and all the equipment to make my stay very comfortable and pleasurable! My stay was unforgettable! Truly recommended and looking forward to returning very soon. Thank you very much Stratos and Antiopi for making my stay unforgettable and providing this exceptional hospitality and experience for my stay in Athens.
