The hotel is located in a small mostly pedestrian street within walking distance of Syntagma Square and the metro. Our room was a very decent size with a lovely bathroom. The service was exceptional - Vasia, Marietta and the whole team were extremely friendly and helpful. We really enjoyed our stay there and can highly recommend it!

Awesome place.
Close to everything centre of Athens
Front desk lady Yota was awesome.
Restaurant staff very attentive.
Would definitely stay there again.

Our recent stay at Hotel Lozenge was nothing short of exceptional. The moment we walked through the doors, we were greeted by a warm and inviting atmosphere that instantly made me feel at home. The attention to detail in every aspect of the hotel, from the beautifully decorated rooms to the impeccable service, was truly remarkable. The staff esp. Jenny at the restaurant and Marietta at the front desk were incredibly attentive, helpful and warm. They went out of their way to ensure that our every need was met. The hotel's central location made it convenient for exploring the city. Overall, our experience at Hotel Lozenge was unforgettable, and I can't wait to return for another incredible stay.

I stayed there for four nights. The design of the rooms is very odd with half side on one side and hand basin in middle. It also needs some upgradation especially the flushing system which was the common problem of the other rooms as mentioned by other residents. The noise at night coming from night club next door makes it questionable.  Though the staff is really friendly and welcoming

A gem of a hotel which is located on the quiet back streets behind the main shopping district. It's a small and intimate hotel, all the staff was very friendly and welcoming. The hotel is for adults only which is great for couples just wanting a nice peaceful stay within the noise of any screaming kids! The breakfast selection was great, there is so much of it that you won't go hungry. All in all a very peaceful and pleasant stay.

Let me start by saying that this was the BEST customer service I’ve ever had. The staff’s hospitality was fantastic and they go above and beyond to make sure you’re ok. The location is in a very nice area, lots of stuff to do locally. The hotel is also so beautiful. I highly recommend this place. Probably my best experience in a hotel ever.
Very nice staff. But rooms are good looking but not functional (lights, toilet flushing time). Also during the night there is loud music coming from the club nearby. I will not go there again.

A really lovely boutique hotel (just outside) the heart of Athens. Well within walking distance. Very modern, clean stylish rooms.

The breakfast is fantastic and so much food we couldn't eat it all, toast, yoghurt and granola, cooked breakfast (ish) and pastries, with coffee and juice.

The employee on the front (Soteria?) is absolutely fantastic, very friendly, will do anything for you and is a credit to the business.

My only criticism was on arrival we had a small stain on our sheets. It was quite noticeable. BUT they changed immediately and couldn't apologise enough

All in I would definitely recommend.

location make it an excellent choice for anyone looking to stay within walking distance of central attractions. Boasting ample space that can easily accommodate up to three couples or a large family, this home provides a comfortable and inviting atmosphere that is perfect for relaxation and entertaining. Key pickup is a breeze, and the landlord is always available to answer any questions or concerns. All in all, this is an ideal choice for anyone seeking a peaceful and hassle-free stay in a prime location.
The host was really pleasant and quite helpful. It directly hits you with the cozyness of a friendly lad's apartment where you can chill and enjoy small talk. Would definitely recommend it.

Canceled the booking claiming a "system error".

System error or not we have had to find something on the spot because of that.

EDIT:
I did not know till the next day. I was on sea around Sporades and the cellular range there is quite intermittent.
Michalis is da man ... Location and comfort canot get any better .. 11 outa 10 ....
Perfect!
Bathroom & shower area is very small. Location is very nice, walking distance to all places
Great hosts, quiet, clean, nice restaurants and bars in the area.
Clean, very good choice for anyone who wants an apartment in the center, very nice staff

Very clean and nice place. Its fresh and you have everything you need in the apartment-and it all works as it should 😃 The building is nice, clean beautiful entrance 👍 near to everything- restaurants, historical places, metro station. Would definitely stay there again. Highly recommended. Thank you for making our stay in Athens so nice 👌

Close to the busy Evangelismos Metro (with excellent access to the city centre and easy to reach from the airport), this apartment on the ground floor was off the main road, so it was very quiet and peaceful. The rooms were large, the beds comfortable and the bathroom very nice. We were met by the host, who gave us a short tour of the apartment. We would definitely choose this apartment again if we planned to have a longer stay in Athens.

What a gem in the center of Athens!  The room was very comfortable, beautifully decorated and clean.  The subway (metro) was very close which was very convenient and only a couple of stops from the Acropolis and Syntagma square.

Our host Greg was very pleasant and responsive and speaks fluent English. We will definitely be back the next time we’re in Athens.  Thank you!

Excellent location, walking distance to Evangelismo metro station, mini market and good restaurants.
Family friendly property.
15min easy walk to downtown Athens and all the main tourist attractions.
Highly recommended place for staying in Athens.
Parking available for small car, not minivan.

One of the best places to stay in Athens.
Huge apartments, elegantly furnished, with all required comforts.
Wide rooms
Very fast wifi
Some plusses like complimentary wine, juice, all toiletries, possibility to use kitchen and laundry.
Easy staff
Moderate prices.
Many places for breakfast and dinner around.
Easily reached with the metro.
Only drawback: no parking and narrow streets around.
9

Beautiful apartment placed in on of the best neighborhoods in Athens, kolonaki, near syntagma square. It's very stylish, clean, decorated with famous paintings and modern furniture. George, the host, was always warm and helpful, giving us tips about Athens. 100% recommended.

The apartment was in a great location. Beautifully decorated with everything I needed. The building is clean with a great gym.  Eva was the best! She helped with arrangements to all the sites I wanted to visit and recommended a few I didn’t know about. She is very responsive and great to talk to. I will definitely stay here again on my next trip to Athens.

I have been to Athens twice and have stayed in the apartments both times and have loved it! It is walking accessible to so many places and great amenities. The host is very attentive to any needs that may arise. I will definitely be staying here every time I visit Athens!

We had a wonderful stay at the apartment in Athens. We are very grateful to our host, Eva, for her attention, the cleanliness of the apartment, and her warmth. The place had everything we needed and is in a perfect location, with everything close by. I will definitely stay here again next time I’m in Athens!

This review is for those travelers who are looking for a home-like stay in Athens then this is the place to be in. It's clean, peaceful, spacious, comfortable, safe and the best part about this place is the amazingly quick & kind responses from the host, Eva. We have also been sending so many of explorers to this place and all of them recommended it. This is how the service should be when you're visiting an unknown destination but you are welcomed as family by the host here. I would like to take this opportunity to thank Eva for her approachable attitude and for always being so careful and helpful with our people. Much love & respect to the entire team of Olympus Residence, especially Eva and thank you for being so amazing! Cheers!

Excellent location for a few days in Athens.  The apartment is in a residential area, and therefore is very quiet.  There are grocery stores and restaurants within 10 minutes' walk.  The apartment is spacious, the air conditioning works well, and the beds are comfortable.  Check in was an easy experience.
Best city hotel in Athens! Great rooftop with acropolis view and a great atrium space on the ground floor to enjoy your coffee! Highly recommended

This was a great place to stay and the location is unbeatable! They were able to set up an airport departure transfer as well who was right on time. I highly recommend staying here if you’re in need of a convenient and affordable spot for your visit!

Rooms tend to be on the low side. Basic accommodation (depends also what room you booked). The location is perfect, near Pagrati, in walking distance for all tavernas and attractions in Athens. The street is very quiet, no noise from the main avenue. I think the rooms and the beds might need a refresh but in the end is not a bid deal breaker

We stayed 4days and 3nights on Pi Athens they were very kindfull and interested with us. Sokratis helped us for shuttle he adviced some good restaurants and gave us maps of athens etc. They have pretty basic breakfast. Rooms very clean and usefull not too big but enough for tourists. Hotel near to everywhere we visited all archeological sites by walking we are impressed and leave very happy thank you for everything from Cyprus.
Poor  hotel, from the room on 1st floor there wasn´t any direct daylight. Breakfast was in the basement and  very simpel. One thing was top and that's the location.

Amazing place to stay while you enjoy Athens.  Very friendly helpful owners (2 brothers) who went out of their way to ensure that all of our needs were met.  Room was large, very clean, and more than spectacular.  Location was great and all the uber rides to get around were less than 10Euros.  excellent food found with 10 minutes walk in most directions.

The room was spacious and very close to the stadium. The only thing is that no clear instructions were given prior checking in with  no reception desk. The apartment is locked and had to ring before getting all information on how to get in which is quite frustrating coming from a long tiring flight. Also, no housekeeping in case staying for longer days.

Lovely apartments in the heart of Athens with everything you need for a short stay in the city. The apartments are located in a quiet inner courtyard, and the place is run by friendly people. I would definitely come back here!

Athens green apartments is run by 2 brothers (very nice men) who are artists themselves. In addition to the fact that the entire building is rented out to artists who can also give their own specific touch to the building, there are about 6 top-furnished rooms in various sizes. Beautiful building and definitely recommended! Good area that is becoming more and more trendy and closer to everything you must see in Athens.

The rooms are very lovely they was clean when we arrived. We was given loads of information on the area by the friendly staff I would highly recommend staying here the location is perfect just outside the busy area so it's not to loud in the evening

The hotel is very well located (30 min walk to the Acropolis) in the beautiful neighborhood of Kolonaki, full of dining options and a handful of bakeries, among other stores. Rooms are very comfortable, fully equipped, and very clean. The breakfast is fantastic, everything is fresh and locally sourced, even the honey. They prepare eggs to your liking on demand, and offer to squeeze a fresh glass of orange juice. All the food we tried was incredibly tasty, and to top it all, the service is exceptional: everyone is super kind, always willing to help with a smile on their faces. They even arranged for us to check in very early (11AM), AND offered us the chance to enjoy the breakfast service while we waited, free of charge. Truly amazing experience, highly recommended.

Amazing top to bottom.  Every single person working at Coco Mat clearly know that their job is caring for their guests.  It has been remarkable!!!  Clean and tidy room, fresh linens every day.  Friendly and completely professional staff.  Beautiful hotel in a lovely and bustling, pretty neighborhood full of good restaurants and nice shops. It has been remarkable.  Delicious, fresh breakfasts with fresh squeezed juice and eggs made to order with plenty of staff on hand to get whatever else you might need.   Amazing value.  Hotels in the US could take a lesson from this chain. Loving every minute here.

Excellent hotel in nice area of Athens with some nearby restaurants. Lovely rooftop for views including the acropolis and taking meals ordered via an app. Staff really helpful and polite. V comfortable and well designed room. Highly recommend.

We stayed at this rather nondescript establishment in Summer 2024. The hotel was somewhat difficult to find because of missing/ confusing signage.

Besides this little hiccup, the experience was great. We were early but the front desk staff quickly corralled our luggage and sent us on a quick excursion to the national gallery which was a few blocks away. In less than an hour, we were informed that our room was ready.

Our room was a larger corner suite to accommodate our family. The beds were comfortable. The decor was very modern and minimalist. The layout of the bathroom/ WC was a bit strange but workable.

When we were away, the rooms were restocked and cleaned promptly.

The free breakfast was quaint but adequate.

The location was great. Situated in a leafy, residential neighborhood with good restaurants. It was sufficiently far away from the tourist attractions to be quiet but close enough to get to them without difficulty.

The service was very friendly. We felt genuinely welcomed and attended to. They made sure to reserve a cab at 2 am for our departure. They took the trouble to prepare breakfast boxes for our travels.

We were pleasantly surprised. Would consider staying there again.

I loved my stay at the Coco-Mat. The whole staff was friendly, helpful, and hard working. I stayed there for 3 weeks because my mother was in the nearby hospital and they made me feel so welcome and they helped me through that tough time in so many ways I will be forever grateful. The breakfast is wonderful, the roof space is amazing and I would watch the sun go down with a view of the Acropolis. Rooms are clean, spacious, and beds are very comfortable. Easy to walk to so many places. Highly recommend.

Prices jumped while booking, pictures aren't what you get, no one is there to show you around they just leave the key somewhere.

Untill I walked in I was sure we are going to be alone in the apartment but it's shared kitchen and bathroom

Didn't liked it

Cosy place in the peaceful part of Athens. Very comfortable check-in, check out. Close to public transport. Quiet, I didn't really hear and meet the neighbors. There are number of little cafes, boulangeries and restaurants in the neighborhood.
Classy and quiet

Great place near cafes and restaurants but still very quiet. So clean and luminous.The owner take care of every details that make a stay comfortable,we found everything we needed. Nice terrace and view and Chrissa is a nice and warm person.
Amazing place and good host. Though breakfast could have been much better.
Nice n comfort stay

New modern loft with details, nothing is missing, completely renovated, penthouse with views, everything new, small mini kitchen, but with the essentials, located in a quiet residential neighborhood, next to the stadium, 15 minutes walk from the center along a very pleasant, illuminated and very safe walk, in the area where the loft is located there are restaurants, supermarkets and all kinds of services, so if you decide to stay and enjoy the penthouse after dinner, you will not need to go downtown.
The Sintagma metro is the best stop.
The owner is very professional and goes out of her way to help her guests.

Small room but ideal for two people with a view of the acropolis, the treatment has been very good, although the best of the whole neighborhood where it is located, very young atmosphere and the Greeks themselves.
Excellent staff and service! Definitely recommend

There is no zero to put. Unfortunately I confirm the comments about rude employees. I wish I had read them before I went to the trouble of visiting them. In fact, there are so many tourist agencies around here. If you don't want to spoil your mood, stay away

Very professional and helpful.
I highly recommend them!

unfortunately there are no zero stars that the system allows me to put. rudest staff i have ever come across. the employee sitting in the background says the following top line: do you want me to come and take you by the hand to serve you? while I patiently waited my turn. i wanted to get a zero ticket fast ferries directed me to go to one of their partner agencies and one of them was LETO. in rudeness and irony and the "lady" sitting in the background says, "I'm listening", "will you talk" "or should I know for myself where you're going?", while the lady sitting in front appeared to be a normal person, then he started yelling and saying that they are doing me a favor by serving me, because they don't earn anything from the zero ticket and only when they make a profit do they serve customers. and not to step on my foot again. I am truly sorry for the staff you have chosen. they hurt you. and the Easter that I had gone before the lady in the background spoke to me again in a bad way and I chose yesterday not to go alone to witness the awful behavior. frankly shame.

Talk about incredible rudeness, I had to leave, while everyone else inside looked down in shame. If I hadn't had such a good time the night before I would have cursed the blonde who "worked" in there. Some people are better off not working with people.

The  hotel in a good place in athens, however, if you are looking for a confortable stay, or you are looking for a hotel for a work trip, this is not the best option that you can pick.
The hotel has no reception, that means that if you have to request something, it will be via e-mail, with a huge delays to respond, im writing this comment while i have requested an invoice for my stay period in the hotel, they took 1 week to give me an incorrect invoice, after requesting a correct one they gave me another incorrect invoice (they did it twice) , no they are not responding to my emails.
This was a simple request that most of 3 stars hotels does it automatically so you can imagine if you will have a problem in the room or something else.

We got a semi basement room and it was good. Very clean, great location. The only one downside was that the Internet was not the best in our room particularly. My friend stayed in other rooms and the internet was good. Beside that they respond very quick to any query you have on Wats app.

A 10min walk to the centre and great restaurants around. Clean and comfortable room. Perfect little mini kitchen was helpful w 1 year old. They also provided us with a crib for our daughter. Would definitely stay again!

Beautiful rooms. The complimentary wine and breakfast snacks were a lovely touch. A little traffic noise in our room from the street but that did not bother us much as our room was lovely prepared with everything we wanted. The location is so good with so many nice restaurants nearby and great shopping

Convenient accommodation for easy access to all the major archaeological sites, restaurants, nightlife ..and transport links. It takes 40mins via metro from the airport to the Syntagma stop then a brief 10min uphill walk to the property (or a short cab ride from the taxi rank at Synagma if you prefer).

The rooms are spread over three floors accessed via lifts or stairs and are nicely decorated, clean and well appointed.  The tvs have Netflix and, when we arrived, there was a bottle of wine waiting and a few other essentials.

During our stay I needed some help from the staff (who are not on site) via email. They proved to be extremely responsive, efficient and courteous..  excellent work guys!

All in all I would wholehearted recommend the Solonus suites to anyone looking for a no-nonsense short stay in Athens.

Loved this little hotel in the wall!! Don't expect luxury, but expect comfort, warm service, and the perfect location to explore Athens! All the kitties outside loved our leftover sardines, and the staff was so helpful with keeping our luggage safe while we ventured out before our next check-in! Definitely recommend ☺️

A small hotel in a very central location but still totally quiet as the street in front of the hotel is a pedestrian zone. The recepion personnel is extremely friendly and helpful. A breakfast is offered for 7€ which I can fully recommend - it must be ordered the day before.

Very friendly staff, 24hr reception and security cameras so felt very safe.  Rooms are basic but have AC. excellent value for money given the great location to the Stadium, the trolley bus stop is only 5 minutes walk and only 15 mins walk to downtown Athens.

The location and service was excellent. Especially the service! They were so kind and friendly.

Their policy for the rooms is that they hold the room keys when you are out of your room.

Unfortunately, the room we had was not very good... As shown in the pictures, their was no way to lock the door securely for it automatically locked when you closed it. Also the fridge nob had to be kept at a certain position, otherwise the freezer part leaked everywhere. The shower had no place to hold the shower head up high so you had to hold the shower head while washing yourself. And lastly, our AC unit leaked. We turned it on and an hour later while we were watching tv, it leaked, almost like water pouring out of a faucet, onto one of the beds. We went down to the desk asking about it and they had no idea why it was like that, and it was too late for a repairman, so they gave us a bucket for the night. They were very apologetic.

Even though the room was so bad, the service was so so nice. This was a difficult review to write.

Friendliness of the staff, always very open to help, excellent location, very safe, I was not afraid to walk at night as it is surrounded by many restaurants and embassies, 100% recommended, thank you very much for your attention, the only thing I would say is that the showers were very small and it was a little difficult to take a bath.

Great spacious apartment on the 6th floor. Came with a small fridge, stove and sink. Modern and perfect location close to the Acropolis, hop on and off buses, shops, dining, flea market and metro station that goes directly to the airport. Two issues: we kept getting bitten by mosquitoes or something. My 6 year old had bites all over his face and hands. My husband and I were constantly itchy at night. Didn’t see bed bugs but not sure what was biting us. There were like a ton of gnats in the shower. Second, the bed was just a box spring with a sheet over it. It was very difficult for me to get comfortable on that bed especially being pregnant. I had to sleep on the couch with my son.

Perfect localisation, close to everywhere, metro to airport, most important buses. I would say it's best spot in Athens for vacation. However, WiFi was crap (max 90-100kbps), i tried to reconnect to another router (on front door), same result. Another drawback was noise from street even when closed window. Rest was fantastic. Great shower, a/c, exceptionally nice staff, some kitechware, wine glasses, corkscrew etc. We might come back in the future, this location was unbeatable:)

Perfect appartments with everything you need. Very quiet. And comfortable. The airconditions of some rooms need to be replaced as very old.but that was not a problem as when you set it to the lower speed you cannot hear them. Very friendly staff and secure. The building outside seems old as the entrance but when you get to the rooms you totally forgot your exterior. I recommend this place. I stayed there 2 times till now.

Absolutely, here's the revised feedback:

"We appreciated the convenient arrangement of collecting the apartment key at a nearby coffee shop. It made our check-in process seamless and allowed us to start our stay promptly. The apartment itself was clean and well-maintained, and its proximity to attractions, train stations, and restaurants made exploring the city incredibly convenient. The bathroom facilities also met our expectations. Overall, a comfortable and hassle-free experience."

The room was great and very clean. There was plenty of space for my husband and I and the hotel staff was so nice. They held our luggage since we arrived early and made sure we had everything we need. The location is set back on a street but once you figure out your way, you realize its close to everything. We really enjoyed our stay!

Very nice, clean and helpful staff.
I was looking for room on Booking but couldn’t find it so i didn’t know if it’s possible to get the room after 12am.
Try to change it please

Very cool hotel. We had a wonderful and sexy time. Use this hotel for what it is meant for, a sexy time with your partner, and you won't be disappointed. They have many theme rooms you can rent by a block of hours. The staff was very nice and helped us pick a room. We didn't do any sleeping here, but our time here was well spent and the atmosphere they create is delightful.

The Priamos Hotel is in easy walking distance to Kolonaki Square, several museums, Aristotle's Lyceum, and Syntagma.  Best of all is the quiet local charm away from the maddening crowd. The multilingual staff is friendly and helpful.  The lavish 70's Vegas Lounge decor grows on you and the pricing is unbeatable.
Crazy fun place to stay, don’t pick a room too close to the elevator if you want to stay the whole night. Room 69 is a blast and well equipped.

Very unique rooms. Staff is very friendly and always offers cold bottles of water. Free breakfast is very plentiful and really tasty. Rooms are very clean, my only complaint is the are a bit run down.

Very well located on a quiet area. We’re a family of five with older kids (16+) and walked to all main sights in Athens. Check in with Maria was good and didn’t need to call her for anything. Everything was in good order and as per the booking. I’ll stay here again when in Athens.

The place is really great. The host is very accommodating. The location is its main selling point. 10min walk from the metro. Walking distance from all the important places to visit in athens. And very good local restaurants nearby
Nice place close to the city center. Really friendly owners.
Excellent stay near the center of Athens. Excellent cleanliness!!
Central clean and functional apartment!!! Communicative polite and trustworthy hosts!!!
Great place to stay. Walking distance to Acropolis, major museums, and Plaka, with lots of restaurants and entertainment. Host very friendly and wants to make your stay enjoyable.

I have stayed with my wife for couple nights it was very nice and clean and very friendly and helpful stuff . The apartment is located in a convenient location with easy access to visit all the city attraction. Definitely recommend. :)
Clean and comfortable apartment, in a quiet area of ​​Athens. Close to Syntagma, Kallimarmaro and Evangelismos. I highly recommend it.
Tasteful, central, quiet, spotlessly clean!
Stellar location and view! Great local eats nearby, easy to walk to the major attractions (like Plaka area). Recieved great and very detailed recommendations from Paula/Billy! Would highly recommend.

Wow, wow, wow. What a VIEW. 😍 We stayed for four nights at Billy & Paula’s, the perfect base for exploring beautiful Athens. From the moment we booked we had proactive communication, Billy and Paula provided all the information we could ever need and were always on hand throughout the trip if we needed to know anything. The apartment was exactly as described, easy to get to and into, it is tiny but had absolutely everything we needed for our stay, we couldn’t have asked for anything better. It’s about 20-30 minute walk to the Acropolis, similar to Lycabettus (busy but beautiful for a sunset) and we even walked up to Kaisariani Monastery and further up to Taxiarchon Monastery from the apartment (perfect sunset view for those that like hiking from the lookout tower Pyrophylákio) but the balcony provided an equally as magnificent view. Watching the sun rise over the acropolis from the bed, what a privilege. Thank you for letting us stay and for being the bestest hosts! ✌️ ❤️
Paula is the best host I ever met. The view over Athens is incredible. The apartment was clean and the location is perfect.

The perfect spot to fall in love again in Athens!

The place is a unique spot in Athens, possibly the most unbelievable view you will ever have from the Parthenon and the sunset falling behind it. Small that’s a fact, but there is nothing else you need if you are looking forward to have an epic time in the city. All amenities are there for you to use, from place to cool to a tv for the movie nights. I would say the best in fact is the view from its unique balcony, the best spot to collect your thought, have an epic brunch with someone you love or just enjoy the landscape while having a hearing music.

Definitely will be back soon!

The best apartment to live in short term. Amazing view of Parthenon and really connected as it is located in the heart of Athens. I spent there a month doing home office in the balcony enjoying this view. Definitely i will be back soon.
Last but not least excellent hospitality!!!
Great location!!!

They suggested it to me and I went. Flawless.  To be honest, I played with the house a bit because it's smart and I've never had such an experience before. Excellent location to do your business in Athens. Brand new, very clean with great taste.  Five stars from me because it doesn't have six.  I will definitely go again.

Awesome location!!!
Fantastic apartment!!!
Regarding the apartment, 5 stars is a bit much!!!
Unique smart functions!!!
Comfortable, clean, easy to use next to the historic Kallimarmaro (you can see it from the balcony of the house).
Just 3 minutes from the national garden and not even 8 minutes from Syntagma Square and the heart of Athens.
We will definitely visit again!

The best there is in Athens. It was recommended by my friend and the stay is a pleasure. All new with great taste. Comfortable for a couple even with a child. We loved it very much. I've been to quite a few on business and I'm not going anywhere else.  The smart functions are an unprecedented experience...unbelievable.  Highly recommended

Fantastic stay in an excellent 5 star apartment! It is located in the heart of Athens next to Kallimarmaro! Extremely comfortable for a couple with a child! Spotlessly clean, tasteful, decorated in a minimal line and without any shortage!! Bonus its smart function that loosens your hands!!

This short term rental flat in Athens was perfect for our stay for two people. The location was fantastic, right in the heart of the city with easy access to all the major attractions. The flat was clean, cozy, and had everything we needed for a comfortable stay. The host was very responsive and provided us with great recommendations for restaurants and things to do in the area. Overall, we had a wonderful experience and would highly recommend this Airbnb flat to anyone looking for a convenient and charming place to stay in Athens.

Beautiful, colourful and spacious apartment decorated with fun little details. It is equipped with high quality appliances. The host was very accommodating and responsive. Pangrati is a lively neighborhood full of nice cafes, bars and restaurants very close to the center.
Amazing apartment conveniently located and fully refurbished. Super accommodating and helpful host.
Great location, highly recommended.

The apartment is located on the 0th floor and is relatively dark. There are daily necessities and spare towels, complete household appliances, and the surrounding transportation and life are very convenient.

A tricky one this.... we stayed in the ground floor, rear flat, the cheapest one. We were after value, as the plan was to spend most of the day out sightseeing.

First, the things the flat does well:
Immaculately clean.
Comfortable bed.
Air-con works well.
Secure.
Shower works well.

The down-side is:
Immediate location is unsuitable for anyone with any mobility issues (steps in all directions), and is a bit run down.
The flat has one window in the bedroom, none in the bathroom, kitchen or second room. There is nothing the owner can really do about this, but it meant the place felt a bit dark at times.
Dodgy wiring and plumbing - everything worked, but there were plenty of weird looking botch jobs in strange places.

It served its purpose, but I cannot help but think that if I had to spend more than a few hours awake in it, it would quickly become unpleasant.

Just had an awesome stay in Athens! The apartment was super cozy and clean.

Loved the convenient location – it was close to everything, making it easy to explore the city.
Host was great and ready with helpful tips about the area. The communication was a breeze, and he was quick to respond to any questions I had.

Overall, a top-notch experience that made my business trip to Athens even more memorable.

Highly recommend it!
Thanks, Andreas!

Very cosy apartment, perfect for two couples. The only thing it can be improved is the bathroom (curtain, towel holders etc)
It’s 15-20minutes from the shopping streets , 30 minutes to the Acropolis and 5 minutes to the Olympic Stadium. The Access is with stairs. We liked this apartment. I recommend it.

UNACCEPTABLE!They cancelled my booking 3 hours before check in without any contact!they confirmed normally from the day before our reservation and we  didn't even spoked to them (to ask smth)so they have no excuses!we was already on the go so we forced to find a new accommodation last min and more expensive.also we paid for the booking and had to find extra 150€ for the new apartment because the money needs days to return to your account!
*My reply to your reply is:
- I made the reservation the day before arrival,you confirmed it and you canceled 3 hours before check in time!
-if your rooms are available in Booking.com for reservation it doesn't matter when the customer will book,so stop saying this
-because you didn't like my comment you threaten me through DM on Booking.com
-you never contact me to ask me for a late check in to have time for your maintenance so imagine how we felt when Booking.com inform us that our reservation was cancelled when we already was on the way to Athens!
Very beautiful, clean and new apartment, great spaces with luxury interior design. Ideal location with walking distance to city centre's attractions. Highly recommend it.
Great Place, wondertull neigborhood
Good, comfortable apartment in a very central location. Nice neighborhood, pedestrian streets, small restaurants, bars.
Spacy and wonderfull apartment next to all you need for a lovely vacation in Athen. We‘ve been for a four day trip in this apartment with two families - seven person. Totally recommendation.
A beautiful apartment, well maintained, spacious and clean.
Great place for big familly or group od friends 20 minutes from downtown. We was here (5 adults 2 teenagers 1 Chile) for 3 nights and have everething to live.
Best place to stay. Clean and beautiful

I loved staying at this hotel! It was in such a nice location- close to the action but tucked away enough to have some peace and quiet. It was also a safer and cleaner part of the city. The staff were phenomenal- friendly, attentive, helpful and knowledgeable about local recommendations for food and fun. The hotel was quaint, cozy, clean, peaceful and very unique. The breakfast on the Terrace was one of my favorites! Robust and delicious. The room was great- super comfy bed and amazing
Shower and clean! Loved the glass bottles of water too. I would stay there again. Walking distance (25 min) to acropolis. Thank you!
A nice stay at a very good location. Everything was good, although the room not too spacious was. Very friendly service, good breakfast and a pleasant roof terrace to have a drink.

Lovely little hotel, cozy and quiet. Being there feels like a treat ❤️ the coco-mat is very comfy and the breakfast is delicious. Staff is kind and attentive and the location is just perfect! The ice on the cake was the amazing massage I got from Dimitra, her deep tissue massage was at the same time relaxing and re-energising. Highly recommended!

Loved everything about this hotel. Comfortable, quaint, friendly service with a very decent breakfast. Beds are very comfortable and spacious area is well kept. The only small disappointment was a malfunctioning steam room that had no steam. Pool is ok despite being in a basement. Overall a great stay in athens

Overall, good stay.
Staff was helpful and friendly.

It's a small detail, but the room lacks drawers or something to store clothes out of your luggage. There is a hanger, though.

Bed is comfortable.

Restaurant is ok, nice option if you don't want to dine out.

Location wise, it's pretty close to the centre, close to interesting museums

The hotel staff were all incredibly friendly and welcoming, especially this lovely lady Miss Xenia who helped me split my day tour into two days according to my flight schedule. She even allowed me to check out later, so I didn't have to rush for the flight. I could come back, take a nice shower, rest, and pack. The breakfast and room service food were delicious, and the rooftop pool offered an amazing view. There were also many great restaurants nearby. Staying here for a week felt just as comfortable as being at home.

We arrived after our early morning flight and the bellman were very polite and took our baggage straight to storage but the front desk was quite rude to us about how early we arrived - I didn’t ask to check in and didn’t expect to, so there was no need to be rude.  We only had 1 day in Athens so being well located to the main sites was important.  This hotel was walkable to everything including the Parthenon.  After a long day of exploring we came back to the hotel for check in and were surprised with an upgrade to a large suite and a welcome drink.  We had to wait in line for quite a while because the front desk decided to let a group of over 10 flight attendants check in before us despite us having been in line before them
And for a long time.  The only good customer service we got was the woman who checked us in.  She was polite, accommodating and apologetic for the wait.

Our upgraded room huge!  Most importantly, it’s clean and comfortable. One thing that bothered me about the room and service though was that while we were out to dinner the cleaning staff came in and made our beds and left waters on our pillows.  We thought that was such a nice gesture.  Upon checkout we learned that the waters were 10 euro each . I was quite annoyed by this and noted to the front desk they should have been at the mini bar or a note included with the price.  I wouldn’t have drank otherwise.  All our other hotels provided complimentary water so we assumed this was the same.  She was very rude about it but ultimately did not charge us for which I was appreciative.

Also, the rooftop view of the city is wonderful!

Terrible experience. This is a 2 star hotel, at best. Let me take you on this stay with us. We arrived 4 hours before check in time and did not expect to be able to get into the room until 3.   Upon arrival the front desk told us they could make that work and it would only take an hour, which was music to our ears after a multiple day travel with no sleep. We headed up to the incredibly mediocre pool to wait for the room. An hour went past and we headed back downstairs to check if our room was ready, we were turned away again with a promise of 30 minutes. Repeat that process another 5 times until our check in time. If they would have told us from the beginning, “no so sorry can’t check in until 3” we wouldn’t have had a problem with that but being lied to for 4 hours straight was not great. On top of that, when we went down to check in at 3 the line was incredibly long and filled with grumpy people with the same issue and the issue of not being able to check in even after 3. Once we finally got into our room the beds were as hard as a rock. In terms of room it was decent. This was just a 2 night stop of our trip, but if the room is booked for 3 people maybe include more than 1 towel? Also perhaps replace the 1 towel when you clean the room? Feels obvious. I was then harassed multiple times by a employee that thought he left his phone in the room. He was aggressive and very creepy. I’m a young woman and he would wait until I was along in the room to knock on the door to ask if I had found a phone. The service workers in the restaurant were decent, until our buffet interaction. The man at the front was working with maybe 1 brain cell. I told him multiple times it was 3 people and he charged for 2. When my boyfriend joined us he was accused of “stealing” because there was a miscommunication. But ya know, obviously we should panic first and be rude to guests and accuse them of stealing gross food while literally sitting at the table. Glad to be leaving.

I recently had the pleasure of staying at Divani Caravel hotel during a business trip, and I wanted to take a moment to express my gratitude for the exceptional service I received.

I would like to extend a special thank you to your concierge, Xenia, who was incredibly helpful with every question and request. Her professionalism and attentiveness truly enhanced my stay.

Additionally, I want to give my sincere thanks to Dimitra, who was the kindest receptionist I have ever encountered. Her warmth and friendliness made a lasting impression.

Thank you once again for making my stay so pleasant.

Excellent experience!  Flight cancelled and sent to Devini Caravel. Gorgeous reception and beautiful room. Greek people so friendly and kind. Took very well care for us. Perfect setting in safe area. View from the pool of Acropolis and St George church. Food and service plentiful and diverse.  Would come back to this hotel over and over.

Its location is its best part. If you take the 2 bedroom, you would find it quite small and cramped, more like a business hotel. Their suites are great, much roomier and with a great view.

We stayed there for 1 night, took a suite and 2 bedroom. Coffee was great, since they had provided a brewing machine in the suite. They only provided basic toiletries, breakfast was just average. I also didn’t found the breakfast area staff quite unfriendly.

Overall, just good for 1 night.

Very clean and modern hotel. Great customer service. Convenient location to the metro and only a few stops from the Acropolis and other major sights. Great continental breakfast included and they hold your bags after checkout if you have a later flight.

We recently had the pleasure of staying at Golden Age Hotel . From the moment we stepped into the lobby, we was impressed by the modern, elegant, welcoming decor and the friendly staff.
Overall, we had a wonderful experience at Golden Age Hotel & we would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a comfortable and convenient place to stay in Athens.
Centrally located hotel in Athens, rooms are clean and well appointed. Shower was fantastic and breakfast was really good. Great value and definitely on the list for the next trip to Athens.
This hotel was fabulous.  So tastefully decorated.  Food was delicious.  Bed very comfy.       Couldn't fault a thing.  Highly recommend

Very nicely located hotel. We had an apartment and double room. Both spotless clean. An apartment with a view, cozy and spacious rooms. There was no washing up liquid, a sponge or a cloth in the kitchen. That would be nice to have when you stay only for a short period of time. Only thing I did not like was breakfast. Eatable but not the best one.

Ideal for families that have 4-6members, decent breakfast with green dishes, close to the most posh area in Athens - near Kolonaki- , metro 5min walk.
I recommend as best option for those also that they like the ‘70-80s- decoration which gives a sense of quality and simplicity!!!
Fair price compared to other hotels around 🤓

Staying at Delice apartments was very pleasant, the apartments were very spacious with everything that you would need. They were cleaned well every day. The location was also excellent, very close to the Evangelismo metro station and only a stop or two to the centre of the city. Would definitely recommend!

Good hotel for a short stay near the metro in Athens.
Rooms are neat although very simple.
The breakfast is good but would need a few improvement touches to make it even better.
Overall the experience was very good although I would expect from a 4* hotel more amenities and a wider variety of products available for breakfast.

Best bedroom mattress I've EVER slept on! Staff were extremely nice!! They got us a taxi when we needed one and the taxi showed up on time! Room was huge! Very happy with Delice and if I'm ever in that neighborhood, I will definitely stay there again!!!

Was put up here by an airline after a cancelled flight, so can’t really complain since I didn’t pay for this. But comfortable rooms, good facilities, and their version of room service is a great idea - a selection of local eateries offering some of their popular dishes available for delivery, with the reception calling you when it’s down there ready for pickup. Unfortunately, only down side is the walls are paper thin, so sounds from hallways and neighbouring rooms are clear as day. Good selection for (inclusive) breakfast, however mini bar options were pretty poor.

Highly recommend this hotel. Fantastic room, spotlessly clean, great staff and a lovely breakfast. Free mini bar and drink voucher for bar. Close to local amenities. Will be re booking next time we are in Athens

I recently had the pleasure of staying at Ilisia Hotel. From start to finish, my experience was exceptional. The staff was friendly, attentive and always ready to assist, the rooms were very comfortable and tastefully decorated, the location is conveniently located at the heart of downtown. I recommend it, it’s a hidden gem that combines comfort, convenience, and outstanding service.

Fantastic location, good rooms and big balcony’s with a table and chairs. My room was very cosy with lots of wardrobe space, tv, desk with usb plugs. This hotel impressed me the most because the staff were absolutely lovely and couldn’t do enough for you.

The staff are very caring and attentive.

Great breakfasts.

Stocked complimentary minibar is a nice touch.

Single rooms are a bit small, and rooms immediately next to the marble stairwell are a bit noisy.

Old style hotel, it has a bidet. Eating breakfast with a nice view of the city (not Acropolis) is the highlight. Located far from Acropolis next to the busy street, not in the tourist area, so you don't get the traditional Athens romantic feel. Gym is in the lower floor, creepy. Overall good full service hotel in the area where most hotels in Athens are locally run with limited amenity. Service is great.

Great location (connected to transportation and walkable).

Check-in experience was tremendous (Nikos and Harry were the best we've ever encountered - their recommendations made our trip phenomenal and we would have missed out without their advice)!

Don't miss their amazing breakfast - one of the best experiences for delicious food, ambiance, and view!

HIGHLY RECOMMEND!

Great hotel in the heart of Athens, close to Syntagma square and the prestigious area of Kolonaki.
Rooms were recently renovated and sparling clean.
Outstanding Service especially by Alexandros at Front Desk.
Breakfast buffet was delicious offering a wide variety of local and international foods. Terrace had a beautiful view.

The hotel was great, the service was nice, even when we arrived at 3 am. The shower was a bit weirdly placed and cramped in the corner of the bathroom. The breakfast on the rooftop was nice but not extraordinarily good. The location is great with a short walk to the metro station.
Great Hotel in a good location. Only 5 minute walk to Metro. Staff was great, especially Nikos who helped me with directions and we chatted a bit about basketball.

Horrible experience (business trip).
1. Rooms are not as depicted in the photos, are way more decadent (3 stars would be honest)
2. Receptionist doesn't spesk english. Hello? 4-stars hotel?
3. The day after I checked in, at night I casually run into the receptionist, who in a rude manner asks me repeatedly "will you pay?". The whole reservation was arranged booked and paid by the travel agency, who provided the credit card details to charge the money. After 2 hours calling the agency and someone else from the hotel who could speak english I could solve the issue.

The hotel isn't matching the expectations for what a 4 star hotel should be. The building is like  screaming 'welcome to the 70s', the furniture in the rooms is outdated, the balconies are big but the view consists of the TV antennas of the opposite buildings, the reception is closed between 11 to 8, but having said that,  the hotel is actually a good deal. Let's see...
The location is very central and easily reached via the subway.
The price is unbeatable for the area, especially for families with children.
Surprisingly, while the rooms display this mismatched furniture and totally lack of decoration, they do have a kitchenette and a jacuzzi!!!!!!!
Only if you experience the summer in the 40C Athens, you can appreciate what a bonus the jacuzzi really is!

The location was really comfortable for taking the bus or the subway. The room was really spacious. As it concerns the service, most of the time there was no one in the reception and we had to call into a specific number for service. I would prefer it if there would be someone on reception.

It is a typical Greek three stars hotel, so don't expect more. Could be cleaner, some things don't work or fall apart. But the staff was very helpful, the breakfast is much better than a "continental" Italian one, and I appreciated haveing a microwave and a kettle in my room. Thus, I give 4 starts to a 3 stars hotel.

I was very pleased with my stay at the Art Suites Athens Hotel. I have chosen it in the past more than once. The hospitality, clearness and kindness of the owners and staff makes me visit it again. One of the best hotels in terms of quality/price and location. Great deal!!!

We stayed the Holiday Suites for 5 nights and were very pleasantly surprised at how nice it was! When checking in, we were offered and shown multiple rooms and choose a basement room with a small covered courtyard area. The room was extremely spacious and the AC worked well which was nice since Athens was in the middle of a hot streak. The staff was friendly and very accommodating. Would definitely stay again!
Wonderful rooms and great ac. Not a ton of hotels got cool enough for us, but this one was amazing!

Well, there are much better hotels in this area in the same price category. The rooms are okay, but little things like no drinking water available or hot water/air conditioning not working or working poorly ruins the stay a little. The food is not great, room service dinner arrived cold, the breakfasts were not included in our reservation, we tried it the first day and did not like it, but at the check out still got charged for all days for breakfasts we did not have 🤷🏻‍♀️ also tried to book the conference room, the staff is very polite but not so helpful for resolving the issues.

Room is clean and comfortable. Kitchen is with all the amenities in order to prepare something.
Breakfast is very good. Position is fantastic, very close to metro and to the city centre.
Gym organization is not comfortable because it is not present in the hotel and a closer hotel's Gym should be used.
Absolute wonderful place to stay. Would recommend to anyone. Looking forward to coming back
Good for the price. A bit far from centre

We stayed here for our two nights for the beginning of our trip to explore Greece and its islands.
This space was perfect for our family with three children.
We are used to walking and to get to the city centre to visit the sites was easy to navigate and only took about 25mins.
The cafe right downstairs was a plus!

Chris was amazing through the entire process, preparing us before, assisting with arrangements for a driver to pick us up from the airport and back.
He also provided great tips for the area and was able to accommodate an earlier check in based on their availability.
We would definitely choose to stay here again if we are ever able to make our way back.
The apartments are very well equipped and well located. They are beautiful. I had a very pleasant stay there. I highly recommend them.

An absolute gem this apartment! The stay was perfect with great preparation and communication leading up to the stay. The apartment is located in a wonderful area of Athens with everything easily accessible. The amenities were outstanding and everything very clean with the best hospitality. Thank you!!
We stayed for 3 nights and it was very comfortable, Chris was very helpful with our needs. I would stay again.
Great selection of coffee and breakfast. The staff is super nice and friendly. Would come again :-)

great alternative to a hotel, in the best place in Athens. Very calm and and easy access to any point of the city, thanks to the nearby Metro station. The prices in comparison to a hotel are very good. Some people may not like the place as the interiors haven't been renovated since the opening in the 70s. I personally love the rosewood elements, it's very authentic and vintage. The apartments are spacious, with a bedroom, a living room and a separate kitchen. The balcony is enormous, with an unobstructed view to the city and mount Emitos. In front of the hotel, there's a church and office building related to it. it's really quiet.

I stayed here while looking for a last minute booking after I had to extend my stay in Athens for 1 more day. Although the location was nice and the staff were friendly, I have to say I was a bit disappointed upon entering the room due to how old the room and furniture were...and I don't mean old as in vintage classic way. The carpet had stains accumulated from 20 years and the furniture/walls/kitchen/overall interior looked like a cheap motel from the 1960's. I made the booking based on the 4-star description I saw on Google. Little did I know, those were user review 4 stars and not classification of the hotel as a 4-star hotel.

It's has good position, but it's still 40min by foot to Acropolis. The biggest problem of this hotel - it's really old: hard to open or close balcony or windows and stuff like that. But it's nice place to crash for few nights.

Large apartment, clean, well-equipped and with 24-hour reception. The location is excellent, walking distance to two train stations, and to the city centre. A safe neighbourhood. I will stay here again.

Very old. No renovation since 19xx? However Room is very big and clean.wifi. Hot water. Kitchen. And balcony over look city. Location is OK. When we stayed may 1. No aircon it's hot daytime. Big problem for us.

Very clean and nice place. Its fresh and you have everything you need in the apartment-and it all works as it should 😃 The building is nice, clean beautiful entrance 👍 near to everything- restaurants, historical places, metro station. Would definitely stay there again. Highly recommended. Thank you for making our stay in Athens so nice 👌

Close to the busy Evangelismos Metro (with excellent access to the city centre and easy to reach from the airport), this apartment on the ground floor was off the main road, so it was very quiet and peaceful. The rooms were large, the beds comfortable and the bathroom very nice. We were met by the host, who gave us a short tour of the apartment. We would definitely choose this apartment again if we planned to have a longer stay in Athens.

What a gem in the center of Athens!  The room was very comfortable, beautifully decorated and clean.  The subway (metro) was very close which was very convenient and only a couple of stops from the Acropolis and Syntagma square.

Our host Greg was very pleasant and responsive and speaks fluent English. We will definitely be back the next time we’re in Athens.  Thank you!

Excellent location, walking distance to Evangelismo metro station, mini market and good restaurants.
Family friendly property.
15min easy walk to downtown Athens and all the main tourist attractions.
Highly recommended place for staying in Athens.
Parking available for small car, not minivan.

One of the best places to stay in Athens.
Huge apartments, elegantly furnished, with all required comforts.
Wide rooms
Very fast wifi
Some plusses like complimentary wine, juice, all toiletries, possibility to use kitchen and laundry.
Easy staff
Moderate prices.
Many places for breakfast and dinner around.
Easily reached with the metro.
Only drawback: no parking and narrow streets around.
9

Great apartment, well equipped only 7 minute walk to tube station and 2 stops to centre but we also enjoyed walking in.  Loved walking down to Iguaza in morning for a coffee, 3 mins.  Shop only 1 minute away.  Is a side street but feel as if staying in Athens not a tourist building experiencing local life.  Really close to lots of embassies so feel really safe walking around at night.  Owner really helpful and responsive.  Great value for money.

Dont be decieved by the pictures, although the rooms are very clean and look modern and good, the location is quite bad. Yes its our own mistake for choosing and we should have looked into it better, but the surrounding area is purely for the residents of Athens. It is very crowded by buildings and has almost no attractions or multicultural/ touristic restaurants. It is not bad for a person looking to stay a couple of nights as the location is safe (although being crowded and dull) but wouldnt recommend if looking for a special experience.

I stayed in the penthouse apartment for one night on a solo trip. The staff was extremely kind and accommodating. The apartment was large, super clean and I felt very safe and comfortable while traveling alone. It’s about a 7 minute walk from the train station and only 45 minutes total for the airport. I can’t recommend this place enough. Thanks to the lovely staff I got to chat with! You guys are awesome!

very nice apartments, lovely minimal decoration and quiet rooms, we had a good time and easy communication with the person in charge. Now we booked for the second time this apartment for my mother who is staying in Athens and their price was again the most compaetitive in the area. Thank you for the good service:)

Beautiful room decoration with well organized furniture. In the kitchen, all needed utensils are available. Also has a nice big balcony. We total 23 students  went from Germany and had great fun there.

Super comfy bed, spacious and extremely quiet room with everything that you may need and really nice owner that gave us plenty of info! You can easily walk your way to the center and leave the car parked along the road, totally safe.
Even if the view of the acropolis has been blocked by recent construction, the huge balcony is still super enjoyable and provides an amazing experience: we could even see Venus while laying in bed!

**Title: A Jewel in the Athenian Sky: Athens View Loft**

From the moment I arrived at Athens View Loft, I was enveloped in a world of unparalleled charm and comfort. The loft paints a perfect picture of Athenian elegance, with its breathtaking skyline vistas that are more than just photographs—they are a promise of the serenity and beauty that await every guest.

The terrace, a sprawling space adorned with comfortable, high-quality furniture, invites you to unwind and dine under the sky, with a convenient kitchen station that becomes a haven for barbecue enthusiasts in the spring and summer months. It's not just a place; it's an experience, where the vibrancy of Athens meets the tranquillity of a personal oasis.

Stepping inside the loft, you find yourself in a space that redefines cosy. It's intimate, making it ideal for couples or small families. The thoughtful inclusion of a full-service kitchen is a delightful surprise, catering to every culinary need, whether you're a seasoned chef or someone who enjoys the occasional home-cooked meal.

The location of Athens View Loft is nothing short of fantastic. Nestled next to Pagrati, you are at the heart of it all, with a magnificent park and myriad attractions just a stone's throw away. The loft's pet-friendly nature makes it a haven for animal lovers, ensuring that every member of the family, furry ones included, feels right at home.

Above all, the warmth and dedication of the host, Cryssa, add an invaluable dimension to the stay. Her willingness to assist with anything and everything makes you feel not just welcomed but truly cared for.

In summary, Athens View Loft isn't just a place to stay; it's a memory waiting to be cherished, a slice of Athens that you'll carry in your heart forever. Whether you're seeking a peaceful retreat or a base to explore the vibrant surroundings, this loft is a choice you'll not just appreciate, but applaud. A stay here is not just good; it's an embodiment of everything splendid about Athens, wrapped up in the cosy, comforting embrace of a place you can call home.

Very nice place, very clean and well furnished. The host is absolutely professional and very helpful to guide you through the city and recommend best places. The bed is huge ans the terrasse also with a a Fan-Tas-Tic view.
was okay for a quick coffee and a cold beer but too expensive for what it offered, service was decent!

I highly recommend this place, it’s really pretty, in great location, very good restaurants around, the owner is great, she’s really nice, gave us a lift to the center even tho we didn’t ask, it’s clean, calm and quiet, about breakfast - it’s not that they make you breakfast everyday, you just have juice, marmalade, honey, coffee and bread in the apartment when you arrive ☺️ Taxi to the center is really cheap from here, just 5€, if you stay for longer than 3days they offer you cleaning ☺️

This apartment is in a great location: with a metro station a few steps away & in easy walking distance from many must visit locations in Athens ... including museums & a variety of good restaurants & cafés.
The apartment is spacious, with 2 bedrooms and all the necessary amenities to make your stay comfortable.
The owner is also very friendly and helpful and ready to give you good suggestions to make your stay in Athens ... a pleasant one!
Although very good clean dance equipped full house is worth....
Comfortable house with direct access to the metro and center

Very nice room, comfortably accommodates a family. Very nice decoration. Rest bed as well as pillows. Great decoration that makes you feel at home. The bedroom is on the inside and does not disturb the street. Easy parking in the area.

I had an amazing stay at Modita Boutique Apartments in Athens! The place was spotless and beautifully designed. I loved how close it was to the city center while still being quiet. The metro made getting to and from the airport a breeze. The staff were welcoming and shared great local recommendations, including the best kebab I’ve ever had! I definitely recommend this place for anyone visiting Athens!

What an apartment!
If you come to Athens that’s certainly the best place to stay.
The apartment is sooo nice, cozy, with amazing rooftop. Location is walking distance to literally everywhere.
Would highly recommend and can’t wait to come again!
Too bad we had such good time we didn’t have time to take photos😅

We had a wonderful time at modita boutique hotel.  We enjoyed the luxury of the beautifully designed room  in which every detail was thoughts of. We enjoyed the spotless cleanes, the good coffee that waited to be used in the coffee machine the wonderful location and all the useful information that was given to
.us about anything we needed in Athens

We spent a few days in Modita Boutique apartment Athens last month and we enjoyed much our staying there. A Cool and comfortable apartment with nice space, pleasant sleeping room and living room, well equipped kitchen and agreeable and functional bathroom, and a terrasse. A lots of day light in the place.
The location is at some way from the Plaka and the center, in a quiet neighborhood with a lot of restaurants, bars and mini markets all around. Thanks to the location, we had some nice walk up to the touristic areas which allow us to discover and feel the vibes of the city, by foot.
We highly recommend the place for your staying in Athens :-)

We had an amazing experience at Modita. The location is great (only 7 min. walk from the metro, in very calm and safe eara, with lots of really good caffes and local restureants), the facilities and atmosphere of the place is inspiring. We were a group of 12, and we took the whole building. The students had their time to work, cook togehter, relax...and work on their papers. Simply WONDERFUL.

Wonderful apartment! I stayed there once, but definitely plan to come back. Cozy, nice atmosphere, equipped with all necessary for the perfect stay. Nice team are serving the appt, happy to help with any request.
Totally recommend!
Though small, the apartment is clean and has a simple kitchen, making it perfect for a short stay. The small terrace was a nice touch for a change of scenery.

Location is very convenient but definitely the worst service I 've received. Rooms were ok I guess. We booked via EXPEDIA and we had no instructions on how to enter and the lock's code. We called the property and they were annoyed (!).

We remained approx. 30 min outside the property till they decided we could have the code to go to our room. By the way the behavior during the phone calls was at least disrespectful.

The room was ok I would say, however there are blinds in all windows and the natural lighting is poor. Would not stay again and do not recommend.

Totally recommend! Nice apartment, only a few minutes by walk from Evaggelismos metro station.
The team was happy to help with any request.

I love the place! The neighbor is very safe and also it's very comfortable. Only issue may be about duvets. Although the weather is good, the duvet was so slender and the first night was cold. They could add additional duvet under the bed base.

But I definitely suggest everyone to stay Bright Eco Studios
Very clean room. Immediate service. Family friendly. Good area. Overall a good environment for someone traveling to Athens. And room rates you won't find anywhere else. I highly recommend it.
Excellent accommodation and helpful owner!

I had a pleasure staying at La Residence for a few days, which is a true gem in Athens. The apartment I booked was beautifully furnished and very well-appointed, giving a sense of cosiness and comfort from the moment I entered it. Panagiotis was an amazing host, readily answering any of my queries, including post-stay (and going as far as purchasing a cervical pillow for us on his own initiative!). I couldn't recommend La Residence more!

1) Flat is located two stations from the city centre. Very quiet and safe area. 5-7 minutes walk to the metro station. About 40 minutes walk to the Acropolis. There are several bakeries in the area where you can have breakfast and a few shops and pubs.
2) Cleanliness - The apartment was very clean and fully equipped with cosmetics and cleaning products. Also slippers, bathrobes, towels.
3) Standard of the apartment - very high - newly renovated. Manual air conditioning in each room. Washing machine, dishwasher, hairdryer, iron available. Fully equipped kitchen.
4) Host - I have never met a host like this. Panos gave us lots of tips about Athens. He even helped us find a real Greek restaurant with Greek music late at night during our trip. We felt very well looked after. He was totally helpful with a great sense of humour. If you are looking for specific attraction (as concert, sports game, restaurant etc) in Athens, he will definitely help you.
Best regards and we will come back for sure!
Great place! Everything was perfect! Highly recommended!! Panagiotis also makes the difference with his professional and kind service!
I would highly recommend La Residence to anyone looking for a comfortable, stylish, and convenient place to stay in Athens. It truly exceeded my expectations. Five stars all around!

Good strategic location to cover all the important tourists attractions; very clean, spacious and modern apartment, very nice host willing to give you all necessary information regarding public transportation, restaurants and tourists attractions.

Excellent place to stay in Athens. Very clean and fully equipped. The hosts are kind and always willing to help. Also an ideal location as it is close to the center of Athens, the metro (Evangelismos Station), the art gallery and Kolonaki.
Beautiful and clean apartment with comfortable spaces in the center of Athens. The hosts were kind and willing to help with anything we needed. The best choice!
I hosted friends and they gave me left impressions TO the point that I wanted to leave Penteli and stay in the center
Excellent, modern and renovated space in an excellent location very close to the center of Athens. Very kind hosts. Excellent cleanliness. I will definitely choose it again.
Amazing hotel, clean rooms, kind staff! I highly recommend it!

GP Shelter is a budget apartment located close to the center of Athens. The apartment is within walking distance from the city’s main attractions, but also just around the corner from the best Athenian gyro place, TAVERN - GRILL MANDRAKI, located  4 minutes away.
The apartment is equipped with very good and pretty new facilities and is very clean and quiet. However, I found that there weren’t enough towels, no kitchen towel at all, no place to dry the washed dishes, and no wine glasses. But these are minor issues
Excellent accommodation! It was spotlessly clean and fully equipped. I had a very pleasant stay and would definitely choose it again!
I had a very nice stay, I highly recommend it! Very beautiful place!!

Great room and the air con was a life saver. The lady let us in quite late as our flight was delayed and we weren't made to feel like a hassle. The room is med size but was perfect for a couple of day stay. I liked that the shower was run off solar and the shampoo and conditioner was great. We also got given water and coffee which was a nice touch 😊 there was a lift to the room is no lugging around suitcases. Around the corner is a restaurant called Oroscopo which was delicious and I highly recommend.

The room I stayed in was fairly small, with really small beds. Room was air conditioned, but not well-ventilated. The staff is friendly and speaks some English, but there isn't always someone at the front desk to assist. The room was quite clean. The hotel is located in a safe area in city, and close to some good restaurants.
Considering the low price in comparison to other hotels in the area, it was a pretty good deal.

We came to this hotel for the amazing reviews, and to our surprise it was anything but amazing. First of all, there was no one to greet us when we first arrived. We waited in the lobby for a long time before someone came down to greet us and check us in. Not to mention the smell of the Lobby and halls was unbearable. Second of all, the bed mattress had springs poppping out and there was only a sheet for a cover. We also saw small bugs crawling on the beds and bathroom, and woke up with bites on outback legs. Thirdly, we booked a one bedroom apartment and that was suppose to have a living area because we traveled in a group and were given a regular room for the price of an apartment. Lastly, the last day on our stay we had NO hot water. After a day of swimming at the beach and driving around the coast, I was forced to take a freezing cold shower. I even waited till the morning we left to try to see if there was warm water, but there was not. I will say though, that the room was very spacious and the view was nice. Other than that, I would not recommend this place to stay in Athens.

A block of flars nicely transformed into separate rooms, next to Hilton Athens. There is no reception coming in or going out, although there are staff available. No breakfast but there is a high variety around from classy restaurants to Starbucks and Goody's. Do not exoect anything more than a hotel room but even this is offered very nicely, clean & modern, with very nice views. The rooms are bigger and nicer than the usual standard hotel rooms. I will visit again.
Amazing room plus the hotel is about 5 min walk to the marathon pick up point and a short walk from the finish line :)

For the price, this place is fine. But be warned that check in is not seamless and if you need anything during your stay, expect a wait. You have to WhatsApp the owner to give you instructions to be let in and it’s just all a bit frustrating/time consuming. The rooms are just the necessities and the AC had a very strange odor. The location is fine but would stay closer to city center if I were to choose again. Also this place said it came with shampoo and conditioner, and there wasn’t any.

Unfortunately, Expedia made a mistake in our booking and booked us into a double room despite us being three people. The hotel was very accommodating and immediately made sure to get us an additional bed free of charge. The room is clean and the rooms are large. We had a couple of problems during our stay (none of them caused by the hotel) and could always contact somebody from Athen‘s Gem to help us out, even late in the evening.
It borders on a nice area of the city to the west, but the city centre is a bit of a walk away, so if you don‘t like using public transportation, you should either be prepared to call a taxi or strap on your hiking boots!

This hotel is not good! The facility itself is basic but fine but the way it is run leaves much to be desired. Seeing all the positive reviews makes me think that they must have changed management recently and the new management is not very professional.

I had significant problems checking in (there is no regular front desk and the building itself is locked) and I was not able to get info from management on the day of my check in about how I would be able to get into the building and into my room, despite confirming with them earlier that they would be in touch with the info that day, and despite my having reached out by email, texts, and calls on my check-in day. In the end I was able to get in okay, after booking it to arrive during the one-hour window that a staff member was supposed to be present and some awkward waiting around with them while they also had trouble getting the internal details from management about my reservation. (Someone who seemed to be a random neighbor who lived there was the one who was able to get a hold of the management in the end.) However, I was worried the whole time during my stay that I might accidentally lock myself out of my room (the door locks automatically if it closes) because I had no idea how I would get a hold of someone to let me back in.

Another totally sketchy thing is that, after I checked out, the hotel  changed my reservation on Expedia (where I had booked) to say that I had cancelled my reservation. I think they did this because they knew I had problems during my stay and this was how they could block me from leaving a bad review on the site! Yikes.

Amateur hour...You're better off staying in a proper hotel.

Management is very unresponsive and there is only staff available to let you into your room for one hour every day. Management said they would send information for getting into a key box the day of my reservation but did not. They had given two phone numbers to call anytime with problems; one was not answered when I called multiple times during the one hour staff were supposed to be available, the other number was disconnected. I raced to check in before the one hour window ended and when I arrived the staff needed me to supply the room number for my reservation, which I had never been given. I eventually got into a room but if I hadn’t arrived during the one hour of staffing, I might have been out of luck. Would NOT recommend.
Small rooms and bathrooms, but good service and excellent location next to Metro.
It was one of the best apartments I have ever stayed! Great location, and the studio was clean and stylish!
I loved this studio ❤️ It was really cozy and quiet with a big bathroom.  Easy to find!
Excellent apartment. Nice and clean place with a kitchen and a fridge.
Fantastic apartment would highly recommend to anyone
Place of excellent aesthetics in a very central location. Perfect communication with the owners!

Amazing apartment. Stylish, clean, spacious and with a nice balcony aswell. All the amenities you need and good service. They are helpful and quick to respond.

Best apartment I have rented for a long long time. Highly recommended.

Excellent property- we stayed there on three occasions, which is a testament to how we liked it the first time. We had the Penthouse apartment that had an amazing setup. The staff were very accommodating and extremely helpful in setting up transportation and special requests. Mary was amazing!
Dr Amesur

Pros:
- huge space, modern design. We took the executive suite.
- great toiletries set
- they changed our towels after 2 days (we stayed for 4 days)
- location is safe and good. A lot of restaurants and mini markets nearby. You can still walk in the late evenings

Cons:
- hispeed wifi is not hispeed wifi at all. We planned to work but couldnt since the internet connection was too slow.

Came across this hotel by chance and what a great choice it was! The room is brand new, made to the highest level, all details taken care of, and there's even a small parking garage that you can book in advance.
The room is spacious, clean, comfortable and the A/C is strong. The shower was great, Just a really really good room in a quiet and nice street. I will definitely stay there again next time I'm in Athens.

Spotless and spacious apartment in a beautiful location, close to the metro (2 min from Megaro Moussikis) and within walking distance of several good restaurants (eg Agora Select). Roof terrace with views of Lycabettus Hill. Breakfast not provided, but excellent baker at the metro entrance (Megaro Moussikis) serving all kinds of pastries, coffee and juice. Eat in or take away.
These apartments are "luxury apartments" - we stayed in 105, which was obviously a wheelchair accessible apartment.
