There were unfortunately a number of things we didn't like; the bathroom was actually a "wet room" - nowhere to put anything so everything (toothpaste, razor brush, creams, etc.) stayed on the desk section of the main room. The shower was a hand held shower with a manual mixer tap - so freezing/hot if anyone else flushed the toilet. Why they didn't invest a little more in a column with a thermostatic valve I don't understand. Water went  everywhere and we had to use a towel to stop it from coming out under the door. You will get your feet wet every time you go to the toilet if someone has used the shower. (maybe put a squeegee in the bathroom). In the main room, someone thought it was a good idea to hang a large TV screen from the ceiling at head height (there was already a TV in the living area!) so you bang your head every time you walk anywhere in the room. (stupid and unnecessary furnishings); at night you will need a face mask - the thermostat is right next to the bed and glows all the time - we couldn't find a way to turn it off.  In the corner of room the fuse box flashes blue and white and you feel like you're  next to a Christmas tree. Inside the wardrobe there is a safe for your personal items - but again, unlike other apartments we have rented, the safe is a small version and not big enough for a laptop.  Choose carefully the room and you'll be ok.
Very nice apartment in good and safe location. Only drawback that there were construction works and it was loud in the morning

Friendly and helpful owner.  The apartment is in an excellent location, nicely furnished and comfortable for 3 to 4 people.  It is extremely clean, has a large terrace and everything necessary for a stay, as well as 2 air conditioners.  The owner provided us with a parking space in the garage, which is 50 m from the apartment.  There are 2 metro stations and a bus stop nearby.  You can reach Syntagma on foot in 20 minutes.  Excellent location and accommodation, highly recommended.

When we first stumbled upon this flat on AirBnB, it seemed almost too good to be true. There must be a catch! But everything was as perfect as it seemed online. Yiannis is the most thoughtful, gracious host.

He provided us with all the information we needed and showed us around. The flat is just perfect! Kitchen is compact and contains everything one needs.

The bed is comfortable, bathroom and terrace are excellent. Location is incredible,close to the center of Athens and 2 sub stations.

Yiannis had excellent restaurant recommendations (Rakkan Athens with the finest sushi i tried, Signor Ventriti  where i loved theis pizza , and Agora Select with Mediterranean cuisine, where we ate on our last night) . He went way beyond to make our long-weekend comfortable and memorable.

Thanks Yiannis and Ventiri Suites for the wonderful hosting!

We will be back
Excelent! Great location, helpful host..everything is o.k..we will back again.
The place is great in a great location and hosts are very nice and extremely helpful people. Thank you!
A great place to stay in the center of Athens.The house is modern,cozy and clean.Definitely 5 out of 5 stars

Clean, efficient, cute & cosy, well serviced and above all, nice people !
Thanks for all!
Great location, cool and functional apartment!
Amazing studios strongly recommend

Very nice experience and perfect hospitality in the place from the owners! very good communication from the beginning of the reservation until the end when we left. Friendly and cozy room and most importantly cool with a comfortable sleep. We had everything we needed from shops nearby. We highly recommend it 😊 😊
Excellent experience!!!!!!
very beautiful apart,i love how it was funished,beautiful view from the balcony of acropolis,very nice area..just love it .thanks fortini and eva for everything

We stayed in this marvellous apartment for a period of two weeks. This apartment is truly luxurious. The apartment is so tastefully decorated and thought has been given to every single detail. The bedrooms are so comfortable, crisp linen and towels, a large very modern and equipped kitchen. We could have stayed here forever. A true definition for a home away from home. Esmerelda is a very attentive and kind hostess. In the area you find a bakery, a supermarket and everything you need. I cannot recommend this place enough. We will be back for sure.

Amazing apartment with great accessibility to the metro. The neighbor also offers good choice of local cafes and restaurants.
The apartment itself is very spacious and comfy.
Fantastic apartment in the heart of Athens. Walking distance to the Metro train station.  Local shops bars and tavernas.  Would highly recommend this place to anyone travelling to Greece

Great location. Great apartment. Fabulous hospitality!

We had an amazing time and we'll definitely book again next time we're in Athens
Apartment very good and very comfortable, spacious. Transportation is nearby, convenient for visiting. Guests are listening. I recommend this accommodation

My stay at the Athens Flower Apartment started with a warm welcome by Maria, the landlady. Although I arrived very late in Athens, she drove late that evening to the apartment to show me how everything worked and even to recommend me places to visit in the city, where to still have dinner at that time, etc.
The apartment was very clean and comfortable. I felt like I was home.
Maria sent me several messages throughout the week to check if everything was fine. I could not ever imagine a better stay in Greece. Ευχαριστώ!

Stayed for two nights.

Apartment in a strategic position, near the Megaro Mousikis stop of the M3 which leads directly to both the airport and Syntagma and Monastiraki. Very quiet one-way street. The apartment is equipped with air conditioning in the bedroom, the bed is comfortable; in the main room there is a well-equipped kitchen with kettle, coffee machine, dishes and induction plate. The bathroom is small but well kept and functional.
Above all, Maria was very kind even from a distance! Not being able to welcome us personally, he sent us all the instructions for entering, as well as information on restaurants in the centre, in the surrounding area and on means of transport.

(If I really have to find some small flaw, I would say: the shower curtain is just too short, so if you are distracted there is the risk of wetting the floor a little, and lack of a soap dish in the shower).
The decoration, cleanliness, treatment of the owner, and the location, it was close to all means of transport, the bus and metro from the airport one minute away.

Great location, centre of Athens near all touristic places.
Amazing great helpfull host, all in place, feeling immediately welcome ! We will go back !
Cosy apartment in a very nice spot in the city! Very friendly hosts,helped us with the check in process and everything we needed. Great value for money!
🤣 Perfect 🤣

I have not encountered more inhuman behavior and treatment, rudeness and unprofessionalism from people! who manage these apartments.
I apologize for the rambling. First let me say that after 9 p.m. an additional 10 euro charge applies for check-in. So far one can say ok, even if this is not written anywhere.
I have been informing since noon that we are arriving late due to a change in the boat's schedule (it left 5 hours later than the schedule) at the last minute and while at first the person in charge does not inform me, later and when I was half an hour from the apartment at 10:30 p.m. she tells me verbatim " take a taxi because from 23:00 the check-in fee is 30 euros". We arrive at the apartment at 23:03, exhausted from a 13-hour journey, and a bodyguard at the entrance simply dismissively, mockingly and rudely closes the entrance and leaves us on the street.
In the end, they canceled our reservation themselves and simply left us on the street, took our money and simply ran away with lies.
Excellent experience.
This is a one bedroom apartment located in central Athens. Nicely furnished. Good mattress. Very clean. Elevator.
Comfortable, clean, spacious and positive atmosphere. Nice suite with comfortable beds, complete kitchen, tv and even a massage chair. Great Place, I would definitely choose it again!

I had a terrible experience with 'Supreme Suite with balcony by Cloudkeys.' Despite confirming my arrival time and already having a prepaid booking, the staff suddenly refused to allow check-in after 9:00 p.m., demanding an extra fee and then canceling my reservation. This left me and my family, including a young child, stranded late at night. The complete lack of professionalism and hospitality was appalling. I strongly advise against booking with this property if you value reliable service.
The host cancelled our reservation 10 days before our stay due to double booking although we have made the reservation 2 months in advance. The host didn’t even apologized for the inconvenience.

Amaizing place at Athens... Have been there for a week..
Very clean place, nice organized,  kitchen and even coffee machine.
Nice lady, Julia, that helped as a lot by advising great restaurants and beautiful places to visit.
I give my 5 stars.  just go and enjoy 😀

Great place to stay !
The stuff are amazing,
The apartments are new and well equipped, even for long period staying.
The area is great very quiet and close to the metro and the center.
Highly recommended!!!

Came to visit Athens for four days stayed in the apartment of Bentzi
clean rooms comfortable bed everything is new the apartment located in the center walking distance to all the sites and coffee shops❤️
Amazing... great location... safe and calm neighborhood, Supreme service by Mrs Youla... rooms are cozy and comfortable...
Really helps children!!!
Scientific and holistic coverage of children's mental health needs
It provides very good services to children
Excellent everyone!
Maybe the best place for all ages, especially for kids. 3 different big playgrounds, two caffe . The only disadvantage is no public wc but only to the cafeterias
The best!
Nice garden for coffee
Excellent surroundings!

A green lung in Athens.  Worth it or visit, playground, soccer field, cafe and walk.
A little care from the Municipality and it will be wonderful.

I strongly recommend this real estate agency with a professional team who, with their knowledge of the market, offer in a friendly environment their valuable informations and guidance to obtain the goal every customer is willing to reach.

Theodoris is very efficient, professional and gives great advice. He responds to queries promptly and with great care given to detail. I wouldn't hesitate to recommend Buy2Greece to anyone,as it offers excellent services and has such knowledgeable and reliable members of staff.
Giannis and Thodoris were great! I found my apartment fast and they help me out with everything. They are highly recommend.

A truly professional team that go above and beyond the call of duty to make each transaction problem free and successful.
Thank You Theodoris and Team

We used Buy2Greece to lease a house. The service was super quick, everyone was beyond nice and explained every question we had in english. They even helped us settle the electricity documents. We are very happy with them and we will use their services again.
Great place to stay

The house is very comfortable, spotlessly clean and renovated. Organized, everything you need was there, from electrical appliances to towels. Would definitely recommend!!
The only negative I could say is that you can't find parking easily. However, I was very satisfied and would definitely prefer it again.
Excellent service, spotlessly clean apartment with all amenities. Ok, the floor creaked a bit, but given the area, no big deal. I would prefer it again without a second thought.

Everything perfect! Thank you
Comfortable, even though we were a family of 5, spotlessly clean, tastefully renovated. Very good quality clothing.
Everything is fine! We will recommend it but we will also come again.
Some detail that would improve the stay would be some wall hangers or monks to hang clothes and jackets

Our experience at the venue exceeded our expectations
It covered our needs for the People's Hospital
And the Children's next door
Welcoming, clean, comfortable, functional, bright
I would also choose it for a multi-day stay

Great apartment, clean, modern (excellent WiFi) and full with amenities, even a hair-dryer!
Very nice view to the park just in front of the building.
I also liked the location, it is 10min from the center of Athens with bus station a few meters away. The metro station is also close.
Mary is very polite and helpful, thank you for the hospitality!

The appartment was amaizing. Excellent value of money. MARY was very cooperative and kind. Every thing was better than in appears in photos
I do highly recommend this appartment. 👌
Great stay, kind hosts, comfortable space. Definitely a place I would stay again and again. Mary, thank you very much.

My stay in this apartment was 10'!!!! it is exactly as in the photos, comfortable, clean and fully equipped!! Mary and I had excellent communication! I highly recommend it and hope it will be available again on my next visit to Athens!

Honestly, if there were 6 stars, I would easily give it.
I used this particular accommodation, during my visit to Athens, in the context of some scheduled medical examinations, at the Laiko hospital.
First of all, let me mention what you find in a strategic point regarding the specific hospital, as well as the Children's hospital.
In an Athens that was baking from the heat, the apartment was cool because of the A/C, which it has.
It is also quiet, sunny, spotlessly clean and in a good location for MMM use.
Communication with the owner was excellent.
I think that even though the photos may not do it justice, it is clearly better in reality.
I recommend it unreservedly and I will definitely visit it again, when there is a reason to come back to Athens.

A family business that respects its customers as a whole. Trusted consistency and straightforwardness. There is no corresponding boat space in the area and those who enter... hardly leave.

Security & trust
Proximity & friendly environment
Highly recommended

Excellent professionals.
Enclosed and secure boat parking

This is a scam, a complete tourist trap. The apartment is stinky and unappealing. When we got there, we expressed our disappointment for what we saw and they immediately offered us a refund, which they didn't give us!!!! They tricked me into not calling booking assistance by saying that they will take care of the issue. After ignoring me for two weeks they sent me a message, blackmailing me, to remove my review in order to refund me. Avoid by all means!!!!!!

The most unprofessional behavior I have ever seen . Property was informed about our late check in since booking. Two hours before our arrival, at 2330 I received a message that they won’t be able to accommodate us . We found our selfs at midnight trying to find somewhere to spend the night.

Excellent apartment, newly refurbished, very clean and comfortable. Plenty of free parking around which is a rare luxury in Athens. Great roof terrace. Very quiet though close to a lively square with excellent restaurants. Very convenient for overnight stay before or after using Piraeus port (15 min drive).

This place is easily in the worst 3 travelling experiences of my life: after I had booked my room, somebody called me right away asking for my arrival time, to which I mistakenly replied 8pm, and saying they will send me an access code soon. Realizing my mistake right after we had hung up, I sent them a message saying I‘ll actually arrive around midnight (I didn‘t see that check-in time was until 11pm according to booking, but then again I actually expected a reception because I filtered by hotels on the app and the place clearly has the word hotel in its name). No answer the entire day. I wrote another message in the evening, no answer. When I arrived at the place shortly before midnight and there was nobody there, I called 12 (!) times without any answer. After a couple of minutes, I received a message saying I should look for another accommodation because this one is cancelled since I arrived outside check-in times. They ignored me the entire day knowing that I said I would arrive outside check-in time and cancelled my stay once I arrived - this is not how you treat your guests, my friends.

We had a bad experience at K8 Athens. The place itself is meager in terms of amenities. Not  clean. Doesn't look like pictures on listing. We had some of belonging stolen and the property made no effort to reimburse us. Look elsewhere if you are staying in Athens. Would never, ever stay here again.
The studios look amazing and they are close to the Petralona metro station, which is very close to the center of Athens (Monastiraki & Syntagma) , supermarket and restaurants.
Very nice studio and the owner is also very kind. The studio is located 7 min from Petralonica station.
Convenient place, quiet neighborhood and clean beautiful rooms. The host is amazing!

Nice place!!! , convenient location, 7 minutes from the metro, next to a park with many restaurants. Clean, lots of supplies, friendly and helpful owner! If you are in Athens for a couple of days, then I recommend staying here.

Amazing hospitality, it had everything, nice place, new rooms, all the money the yard. Good wifi. I highly recommend it and for the value for money, I thought I was staying in a much more expensive place.
Lovely place!

The prices are very good and the mattresses together with the pillows are great (cocomat), as is the air conditioning. But the toilet is shared and the people hosted there are not always ideal, and this is a problem since there is no soundproofing and the other person may be drunk. Also, even though the staff is polite, you don't feel particularly safe and the toilet runs. Average price €20 per person
Superb majestic but above all It is its history that induces the feeling of owe!
One of the best places to live in Athens!!
Strategic location, next to two ISAP stations...Hospitable residents!!
Imposing Mansion with a rich history!

Wow. It's just like home. Apartment decorated with care, impeccable cleanliness and absolute comfort. The geographical location, close to a metro station and the lively neighborhood, make it a perfect base for discovering the city.
A true diamond💎. Close to public transportation,  and the market. Ideal for those arranging sightseeing in Athens. Owners are very kind and supportive. It is fully suggested!
I had a great experience living in this house. Location is great, near everything you will need and close to the metro. Also the owner an absolute pro!
good experience but most important, awesome memories
Very nice space, ideal spot, clean the perfect place to stay in Athens!!!
Very beautiful space good location very clean would highly recommend
Very clean, nicely decorated and equipped with everything you need. The owner is very kind

Great place, my stay was in room number 1, spacious, very clean!
The helpful owner explained to me exactly how to get to the accommodation which ended up being only 20m from Tavros power station!
I will prefer you again soon!!
It’s very close to the Tauro’s station.. Very comfy room and quiet place!! The place was so clean and people was so useful.. I’ll stay there when I visit Athens again
I went with my wife for 7 days, the place was very nice.  The point where he was and very important. Everything was spotless.    I recommend it guys I stayed in room 1
Very nice space and in a very good spot. Next to the train really. Brand new accommodation. Well done and the host very friendly
perfect place to stay for several days as it is located 20 meters from the electricity

I had an amazing stay at this apartment! The location was perfect, close to everything I needed, and the neighborhood was quiet and safe. The apartment itself was spotless, well-decorated, and had all the amenities I could ask for. The host was incredibly responsive and helpful throughout my stay. The comfortable bed and beautiful view were definite highlights. I would absolutely stay here again and recommend it to anyone looking for a fantastic place to stay!

I had an amazing stay at this beautiful apartment on Alkimynis 111! The space was spotless, stylish, and had all the amenities I needed for a comfortable stay. The location was fantastic—close enough to the main attractions but still in a quiet and charming neighborhood. The host was incredibly helpful and responsive, making sure I had everything I needed. I truly felt at home and would definitely recommend this place to anyone visiting Athens. Can’t wait to come back!

Took my gf to a once in her life time experience in Greece with me. I avoided the cheesy big hotels and this was exactly what I was looking for:
Attentive and knowledgeable staff. Location was brilliant. Apartment standards were high
And I doubt you can get a similar exclusivity level for the price bracket.
All in all we had a marvellous time, highly recommended!

I recently had the pleasure of staying at this wonderful apartment just steps away from the beach, and it was truly an unforgettable experience. The location is unbeatable — you are literally a stone's throw from the sand, which made it incredibly convenient to enjoy the beach whenever we wanted.
The area around the apartment is filled with beautiful cafes, perfect for enjoying a morning coffee or evening meal.

I visited Athens and had such a wonderful time. To complete my perfect visit was the stay at M & M. The perfect place, walking distance from all the major attractions or just one or two stations by the near by Metro station.
The pleasant room is well equipped and the hot tub on the roof is just amazing.
Highly recommended.

This was a great stay. Apartment is clean, neighborhood safe and friendly (solo female traveler), close to Metro, lots of places to eat, snack and shop. Host was very responsive. Will definitely stay and recommend.

It's a beautiful apartment and great location but there were massive roaches, giant not one but multiple crawling all over the bedroom and living room. The place looked so clean I would've never expected it to have roaches

I absolutely love it here! Centrally located 8 min walk to the train. The best gyros right on the same corner. Market also around the corner larger one and smaller one. Everything needed for our holiday!

I booked this from Expedia thinking that’s a hotel but it’s not. It is an apartment building.
Check in was so easy, they messaged us few days before check in with all the instructions.
Our room was clean but very small. 3 of us were bumping to each other lol. Our friends , just a couple, were also staying in the same place but they had a two bedroom apartment. Same price. I did my booking through TD Expedia and they did through Expedia so I am not sure if that makes a difference.
The toilet seat was broken, however it was our fault for not reporting it right away otherwise they would have fixed it for us.
We had laundry facilities in our apartment which was great.
Location also was great, 10 min walk to the subway station and two stops to Plaka area.
There is a great restaurant with decent prices right beside the apartment.
Forgot to mention, very close to a supermarket , also you have stove and sink if you prepare to cook.
Great place to hang out in the city for a few days! Perfect location. Clean. Nicely appointed and decorated. I'd stay here again

Terrible experience with the owner of this apartment. They confirmed a check in time at 2 pm. We arrived at 5 pm and the apartment wasn’t ready, the cleaning ladies had just arrived. After having travelled for so many kilometers from Romania, we just wanted to get some rest and the owner was really unprofessional, after confirming a check in time and not having the apartment ready even 3 hours after that time.

We left immediately and booked another apartment in Athens (LUX&EASY Athens downtown apartments)  that turned out to be an amazing one and even cheaper that this one.
They assured us that if we cancel, we would get a full refund, but we only got 50€ from 214€ and of course, the owner stopped responding to our messages. The booking had been paid a month in advance.
We are really disappointed and we don’t recommend this apartment at all. Very unprofessional owner. They just wanted our money and that was it.

AVOID this accommodation.
Lovely place!

The prices are very good and the mattresses together with the pillows are great (cocomat), as is the air conditioning. But the toilet is shared and the people hosted there are not always ideal, and this is a problem since there is no soundproofing and the other person may be drunk. Also, even though the staff is polite, you don't feel particularly safe and the toilet runs. Average price €20 per person

The space is great, letting us have a comfortable stay in Athens. The employee was very helpful and even explained to us where the closest stores were, as well as recommendations for tourist attractions. Spacious kitchen area, good beds. Our family was content with the space. We had a great stay.

Good people. Everything in order and they provide in paper a lot of info about the area sites. I found it very difficult to find parking as there is only available to park at the street. At the shower, hot water no pressure.
Nice apartament, clean, well equipped, big surface, near metro station
Very cool apartament! Im very happy that I was there :)
Fine accommodation in the heart of Athens.

Not sure where to start. Location: Was close to some of the bus lines so that was nice. Not much else is close by. Neighborhood was quiet and seemed safe.
Service: The cleaning ladies were very helpful with helping us check in which was great since there was not a reception desk and we were given no instructions upon booking (we booked through our credit card company so not sure if you book directly with them if you get instructions). We talked to the hotel and then I had to send them my ID over WhatsApp and then they sent the codes for everything. The service was was very quick.
Room: AC was working which was great. The place was spacious. Everything was new but not the greatest upkeep. Some floorboards were pulling apart. There was some hair in the shower. There wasn't hot (or warm) water in the shower. The toilet was broken (but my husband fixed it). There some stains on the floors (not sure if they were permanent or just not cleaned). Overall I would not stay here again. I think it would be good if you are on a hostel budget or looking for those vibes (but with more privacy).

The pictures on the website are NOT representative of reality. A dark and dingy hovel, dirty sofa, rickety furniture, zero decor. The two sparse bedrooms were located in a basement which smelt of bins. We were a family of five and the bed for the fifth person was not prepared nor was there sign of where it would be… praying not on that dirty sofa.

We could have perhaps tolerated the poor location if anything else had been good.

We stayed long enough to put our bags down, look around, take out our phones and book into a central hotel.

I guess you get what you pay for in the end but the photos and reviews gave us false hope.

would not recommend

This place is a dump, and it's being rented as a premium suite. It was disgusting, nothing worked, total disrepair, dead bugs and the Athens stay people didn't care to do anything about it after multiple complaints! The washing machine didn't work, no basic supplies and it was just dirty and broken everywhere!

In one of the apartments now. Very happy with it. Modern and well-equipped. Staff are accommodating.

It's in a good location close to bus routes. Lidl is a reasonably short walk away but there's a small supermarket close by, too. Easy walk to where it's all going on in Athens.

One tip to the manager/owner is some balcony furniture could be a useful addition.

Overall, great place. Very comfortable.

The apartment is beautiful, and well laid out. It was very comfortable for two of us but could easily have taken more. The apartment was perfectly cleaned and fully equipped with everything we needed. Everyone was very welcoming and left thoughtful items in the apartment. Overall, we had a really great stay and would certainly stay there again!

Booked to stay here very last minute, and couldn’t be happier with the service that we received! Jannis was very helpful and accommodating, sending local recommendations for food and places to visit! The house was clean and welcoming, and in a very friendly area. As two younger girls travelling alone, we felt safe and comfortable during our stay here. 10/10 would recommend and would happily stay here again! :))

Excellent experience! The location is unbeatable—situated in a vibrant, hip neighborhood that truly captures the spirit of the city. The street is filled with great cafes, bars and restaurants that offer a taste of the local culture. Whether you're looking for a cozy spot to enjoy coffee or a trendy place to have dinner, everything is just a short walk away.
Had a lovely stay, would definitely recommend! Easily accessible, in a convenient location, and good food around. Clean space, and hosts made sure our experience was great!

Great overall experience at Troon of Athens Apartments. Simple, clean, and tidy. The bed was very comfortable. The hot shower was amazing. The neighbourhood is great (relatively quiet with good food options close by). Wifi connection and speed was not that great and could be improved. Some loud neighbours in the early a.m. Nevertheless, we give it 5 stars. We stayed 4 nights (May 2024) and will certainly stay again on our next visit to Athens. - S & J

Well located in a beautiful area with many restaurants and bars nearby. The building is well maintained, the apartments are clean and provide everything we needed for a comfortable stay. Everything was as expected and there were no unpleasant surprises. This is our place of choice for our trips in Athens and we keep on coming back.

This is a scam, a complete tourist trap. The apartment is stinky and unappealing. When we got there, we expressed our disappointment for what we saw and they immediately offered us a refund, which they didn't give us!!!! They tricked me into not calling booking assistance by saying that they will take care of the issue. After ignoring me for two weeks they sent me a message, blackmailing me, to remove my review in order to refund me. Avoid by all means!!!!!!

The most unprofessional behavior I have ever seen . Property was informed about our late check in since booking. Two hours before our arrival, at 2330 I received a message that they won’t be able to accommodate us . We found our selfs at midnight trying to find somewhere to spend the night.

Excellent apartment, newly refurbished, very clean and comfortable. Plenty of free parking around which is a rare luxury in Athens. Great roof terrace. Very quiet though close to a lively square with excellent restaurants. Very convenient for overnight stay before or after using Piraeus port (15 min drive).

This place is easily in the worst 3 travelling experiences of my life: after I had booked my room, somebody called me right away asking for my arrival time, to which I mistakenly replied 8pm, and saying they will send me an access code soon. Realizing my mistake right after we had hung up, I sent them a message saying I‘ll actually arrive around midnight (I didn‘t see that check-in time was until 11pm according to booking, but then again I actually expected a reception because I filtered by hotels on the app and the place clearly has the word hotel in its name). No answer the entire day. I wrote another message in the evening, no answer. When I arrived at the place shortly before midnight and there was nobody there, I called 12 (!) times without any answer. After a couple of minutes, I received a message saying I should look for another accommodation because this one is cancelled since I arrived outside check-in times. They ignored me the entire day knowing that I said I would arrive outside check-in time and cancelled my stay once I arrived - this is not how you treat your guests, my friends.

We had a bad experience at K8 Athens. The place itself is meager in terms of amenities. Not  clean. Doesn't look like pictures on listing. We had some of belonging stolen and the property made no effort to reimburse us. Look elsewhere if you are staying in Athens. Would never, ever stay here again.

Very nice guy , it is like coming home.
Nice place to sleep, close to all you need. Direct connection to metro.
Decent prices.
I would recommend this place 👌

I called up late, there was one room available, so I get there and the door is locked, but luckily some other poor sods had been waiting and the owner came on a bike as soon as I showed up.
The room was very spacious, working A/C and nice bathroom.
Great location right next to the metro line and busses, but I could barely hear any noise at all, it was very quiet at night. And dark, curtains were great.
I do have one complaint and that is that the towels provided smelled like old washing machine, you know the smell you get when the lid is closed all the time. My body had that same odor after drying for about an hour, not so pleasant. The sheets, pillows etc, were perfectly fine, so maybe a different washing machine...
The duvet was nice and thick and a soft and hard pillow was provided, including complimentary food items.

Room was good and the shower was the biggest we had in Greece. Air conditioner and Nesspresso were awesome. We didn't get back to our  room till around midnight, so we didn't notice that there was only one blanket for the two beds.It was too late to call anyone. We looked everywhere but there were no extra blankets or sheets, so I used one of the towels as a blanket. Would suggest the keys be labeled, as we needed 3 different keys to get to our room.
Door Was locked and lights off when we showed up for our stay. Called and the number was not in service. Do not book here.

Lovely place. Have stayed in two of the rooms now and had a comfortable night on both occasions. Extreemely convenient for the metro to the city and airport. €5-8 taxi to long distance bus station. Some great local restaurant 5-10 minutes walk away.
The studios look amazing and they are close to the Petralona metro station, which is very close to the center of Athens (Monastiraki & Syntagma) , supermarket and restaurants.
Very nice studio and the owner is also very kind. The studio is located 7 min from Petralonica station.
Convenient place, quiet neighborhood and clean beautiful rooms. The host is amazing!

Nice place!!! , convenient location, 7 minutes from the metro, next to a park with many restaurants. Clean, lots of supplies, friendly and helpful owner! If you are in Athens for a couple of days, then I recommend staying here.

Amazing hospitality, it had everything, nice place, new rooms, all the money the yard. Good wifi. I highly recommend it and for the value for money, I thought I was staying in a much more expensive place.

Newly renovated apartment, right off the metro line. Bright, spacious common area. The bedrooms are a bit tight but not too bad. Nice kitchen with new appliances. Be aware that it’s on the 4th floor and we couldn’t get the elevator to come, so it’s a hike with luggage. Other than that it was quite nice!

The apartment is really beautiful and the location is more than great. Everything you need is just around the corner - restaurants, pubs, shops. Would be 5 stars, but due to the lack of hot water during almost the whole of our stay, I sadly had to drastically decrease my opinion. No help, no refund, that's really not customer service I'd expect. Otherwise, everything was perfect.

Very nice modern and clean apartment in good location. Easy and flexible check-in - keys were waiting for us in safe box. Metro station is next to the building, but we decided to walk to Acropolis (less than 2 km).
Apartment is very well equipped - kitchen tools, air conditioning, 3 bathrooms, comfortable beds and balcony with morning sun. We stayed there with 10 people group and there was was enough space for everyone.
There are many groceries and a lot of restaurants and cafeterias in 2-5 minutes walking distance.
We really enjoyed our stay in this apartment, it made our Athens trip perfect!

This apartment delivered on its promise. It was comfortable, luxurious and cozy. Everything was top notch.The host was very gracious and responded quickly to every question or request we had. She was very helpful. We enjoyed our stay tremendously. The metro nearby was useful to roam around this beautiful city.We'd definitely return if we happen to visit Athens again.Thank you, Athen's life.

A tastefully decorated flat painted in white - a color Greeks are obsessed with. The flat was extremely comfortable for our group of 8. The most convenient feature of the flat is 3.5 bathroom and the facility of washing machine not to speak of the balcony all around the flat. It is ideally located having super market, restaurant and metro stations all within 5 minutes of walking. The locality is a quiet residential area
Linens , crockery and thoughtfully the detergents for washing Machine provided were adequate and of good quality .
The only thing missing was a welcome bottle of Greek wine. Jokes apart we had a wonderful stay Esmeralda. Thank you for hosting us

Even before the trip, the host was very responsive and helpful.
The facilities were comfortable and clean. The location is great, easy access to the tourist spots and the neighborhood is safe. There was a grocery store nearby and a couple of great restaurants within 10min walk and even a quaint neighborhood bar ~2min away. We enjoyed the little backyard for fresh air and cooling down in the afternoon.

I stayed here with my family in early August, and we throughally enjoyed our stay. Very clean,comfortable and modern, and spacious. An ou yes AC as it was hot in Athens. Close to great restaurants and 20 minutes walk to the acropolis!!
Checkin was easy, and our host helped with a number of those typical tourist requests. We really appreciate our stay!!!
Very nice apartment with balcony in a nice area. Few minute walk away from nice bars etc. Would recommend!

Very comfortable apartments with all necessary facilities. Clean and tidy. The rooftop has a terrace with the barbecue grill. A bit away from the city centre, but taxi is very cheap (4-5 euros to Acropolis)
I can't say anything bad about this place, quite a good location. A perfect spot for a few days in Athens.

The villa is located in Philopappou, close by to excellent shopping and transport links.

The villa is spacious and has rooms spread over three floors. Unusually, the villa offers a guest a lift service and this is very useful when moving heavy cases at arrival and departure times. The villa was spotless on arrival and the agent arranged for our transportation to and from Athens Airport (80 euros each way / September 2023).

Minor niggles included a broken microwave but the agent replaced it immediately. The knives were all blunt and were replaced a few days later after requests were made to send photographs of them??? Slightly more concerning was an intermittent failing fridge freezer. This caused food in the freezer to melt on more than one occasion which was annoying. We reported the issue to the agent just before we left. Another area of improvement would be for the management company to collate a folder with useful information like, how to use the washing machine and dryer (all in Greek on the machines), where to eat, what to do in the local area, transport etc. There was a folder but it was full of blank sheets and forms for the agent to records occupants’ details. We have never stayed in a villa where this type of information has not been available.

The villa has an excellent outside courtyard however, be careful and watch out for mosquitoes!

We loved the Villa and the agent was extremely helpful. We would definitely stay there again.
Very lovely lodging for a large group of Great communication from management.
Beautiful home, everything you need,  great neighborhood with shops and restaurants walking distance to the Acropplis but on a quiet street below Philappapou Hill.
Wonderful Villa..enjoyed the balcony and lush plants
Spacious, clean and great hosts
Great place to stay, very clean, central and quiet
Spectacular apartment
Wonderful choice for a calm, comfortable and pleasant stay .... Close access to means of transport ...I chose it again and I highly recommend it!!!
Thank you very much for the beautiful stay... The cleanliness and the service were impeccable... The environment is wonderful... We will choose you again on our next stay in Athens...
Comfortable, very clean, good location
Fully equipped, spotlessly clean with very nice decoration! You will feel like your home. The location is very quiet and safe!

Great place, my stay was in room number 1, spacious, very clean!
The helpful owner explained to me exactly how to get to the accommodation which ended up being only 20m from Tavros power station!
I will prefer you again soon!!
It’s very close to the Tauro’s station.. Very comfy room and quiet place!! The place was so clean and people was so useful.. I’ll stay there when I visit Athens again
I went with my wife for 7 days, the place was very nice.  The point where he was and very important. Everything was spotless.    I recommend it guys I stayed in room 1
Very nice space and in a very good spot. Next to the train really. Brand new accommodation. Well done and the host very friendly
perfect place to stay for several days as it is located 20 meters from the electricity
We had an amazing stay! The pace really had the “Athenian vibe”. It was really clean and cosy and the yard is ideal for evening cocktails and snacks! Highly recommend it
Amazing place! Brand new, extremely clean and well decorated
Great apartment. Huge, clean, have everything you need. Walking distance to Monastiriki, if you like to walk. All recommendations.

The property was very well maintained, modern and comfortable. It was clean and the air conditioning was a god send. The roof top terrace was also a nice touch. It is about a 20/30 minute walk to the main attractions in Athens and there are plenty of bars and cafes within a 15 minute walk. We especially liked Koukai and Bite Box (the Poffies were unreal). When we had an issue with some work that was being done the contact dealt with it quickly and in a way that we were happy with.

One night the upstairs neighbours were quite noisy and banged around a lot which disturbed our sleep. However this comes with the territory of being in a city apartment. The other two nights we didn’t hear the neighbours at all.

New and beautiful apartment that is super conveniently located. The apartment is modern, well equipped and stylishly furnished. Quick walk to a coffee shop and 10 minute walk to the Acropolis. Will definitely be back!
Lovely apartment in a great location! We got to enjoy some wine on the roof terrace which was awesome!
Super clean apartment and great host!

Really very good! Beautiful renovation. Welcoming, clean and comfortable. The terrace also offers a very nice aperitif space. Air conditioning in all rooms. The kitchen equipment is basic in the 1st floor condo and therefore not suitable for elaborate meals. Very popular Espresso coffee maker but few capsules and they are impossible to find in the neighborhood. Very very recommendable.
Good view and location. Friendly host. Good value for money.
Worth recommending 👍👍👍

This was a great stay. Apartment is clean, neighborhood safe and friendly (solo female traveler), close to Metro, lots of places to eat, snack and shop. Host was very responsive. Will definitely stay and recommend.

It's a beautiful apartment and great location but there were massive roaches, giant not one but multiple crawling all over the bedroom and living room. The place looked so clean I would've never expected it to have roaches

I absolutely love it here! Centrally located 8 min walk to the train. The best gyros right on the same corner. Market also around the corner larger one and smaller one. Everything needed for our holiday!

I booked this from Expedia thinking that’s a hotel but it’s not. It is an apartment building.
Check in was so easy, they messaged us few days before check in with all the instructions.
Our room was clean but very small. 3 of us were bumping to each other lol. Our friends , just a couple, were also staying in the same place but they had a two bedroom apartment. Same price. I did my booking through TD Expedia and they did through Expedia so I am not sure if that makes a difference.
The toilet seat was broken, however it was our fault for not reporting it right away otherwise they would have fixed it for us.
We had laundry facilities in our apartment which was great.
Location also was great, 10 min walk to the subway station and two stops to Plaka area.
There is a great restaurant with decent prices right beside the apartment.
Forgot to mention, very close to a supermarket , also you have stove and sink if you prepare to cook.
Great place to hang out in the city for a few days! Perfect location. Clean. Nicely appointed and decorated. I'd stay here again
Perfect host ! Highly recommended 100%
Very clean, nicely decorated and equipped with everything you need. The owner is very kind
Super car wash solution for your car 🤝

We stayed in this apartment with another couple friend for a few nights in Athens. The apartment was very clean, got plenty of light and had all the necessary household items. The unit has an AC in every room and there is a washer in the unit which is a life saver. It’s also 2 blocks away from the metro station. Overall a great stay.

Very clean and comfortable, there are 2 rooms including double beds. There is all kitchen items, all house items. We like very much, we feel like at home. Ancient area is very close. Historical places, restaurants... are around 30 min walking distance.
There is turkish coffee at kitchen (here they say greek coffee but no matter :) this is a perfect and nice idea for Turkish guests, especially for the addicted ones like me :)
We asked to extend check out till 14.00 PM and they accept, many thanks.

We advise eveybody.

Ridiculously small room! We booked the rooftop room with private terrace and jacuzzi. It’s on floor 7, the lift only goes to floor 6. The room is tiny - no space for clothes or any kind of luggage and certainly not enough space to accommodate more than one person comfortably! The rooftop room with jacuzzi is really the old maintenance room, the lift shaft is right outside the door to the room, and is left unlocked, so it’s both noisy and dangerous. The selling point of this room is the pictures online - in reality it’s nothing like those…the beanbags are filthy, the hanging egg chair is filthy, the outdoor dining table is dirty and broken, the terrace floor is filthy, the glass surrounding the terrace is also filthy. Quite literally the only saving graces for this shoebox of a room are the air conditioning and comfortable bed. Maybe the other rooms with jacuzzi are ok, but judging by the state of the rooftop room, it’s probably best to avoid the place altogether.

Amazing terrace ! The room itself is pretty small but you'll find everything you need. Hot water doesn't last long in the shower so be quick. You may hear the noise of the elevator but it didn't bother me. Otherwise, the hot tub is great, water was already warm at 37.5°C when I arrived (goes up to 40°C). Entry is by a code given the same day of arrival. Thanks for all.

Terrible customer service. Our door was left open by housekeeping after cleaning in the morning.

We came in the evening to find it open. Took the reception more than 12 hours to respond to the incident.

Also The bathroom is terrible. The shower door dosent  stop the water from getting out causing the floor to be slippery.

Wouldn't reccomendation unless you are out of options.

Very good for the price. I recommend getting the suite with the hot tub! Very relaxing. Some areas for improvement are: including more items in the apartment to make it livable (a kitchen knife, more kitchen items); including shampoo/conditioner. The response of the management needs to be improved, we had trouble with the shower and they did not respond to our question for the entire 5 night stay! Luckily we resolved it ourselves, but what if it had been more serious? There is a nice coffee shop downstairs that makes great coffee and was so friendly to us. The area was walkable for us (about 10min from the Acropolis) and has a more residential feel, definitely not very touristy. Taxi to Plaka/ Flea market was €4.50 and to the airport €35. There are large streets nearby but the noise is minimal from the terrace and we couldn't hear anything from the apartment! Overall we are quite happy with our stay.

The room did not look like the pictures at all. It's a very bare bones, simple accommodation that I would never pay 100+ euros for if I had known. I feel cheated in that front. Additionally, the flat was pretty dirty, with hair everywhere. There was no bathroom mat so we had to use one of the hand towels for that purpose. The aircon is super loud, even on the lowest setting. There was food still in the freezer from previous guests. The windows in the lounge look into the internal "courtyard" so basically other windows and walls. The bedroom looks out to a very busy road that is pretty loud even on the 4th floor. Would never stay again.

The staff was very responsive and polite. The check in was easy. They accommodated a request to change floors with no fuss.
Don't book, you'll have to change plans as soon as you reach the place
Location is great, facilities are good in compactness, easy communication with owner so no hesitation.
The best service

The room very small and very DIRTY. The sheets full of hair as well as the bathroom sink. When we took a bath, the water did not enter the siphon, it left the bathroom and flowed into the room. The central door of the entrance, which is located in the street as the room is semi-basement, is made of warehouse-type iron and does not provide any security. Unacceptable situation!

The room is very small, it's hard for two people to pass each other in the aisle, and there is still a small fridge there. The rooms are located in the basement, on a quite busy street, which generates a lot of noise and vibrations. The bed is not very comfortable, the spring mattress digs into the body when lying down. The room equipment is very poor. No space to store things. There are deficiencies in cleaning. Self-check-in, specific instructions from the owner via Whatsapp.

I stayed with a friend at the The Apartment With Garden View, at the upper floor. A beautiful, spacious apartment, with hardwood floor, vey neat and spotless clean. The apartment is located in a great neighbourhood, one minute walk from the metro, and 2 stops by metro to the center of the city. It's also a 25 minutes nice walk to the center. It's a quiet neighbourhood, with great cafes and restaurants. The apartment is very quiet too. The host was very nice and helped in any question we had.
In short, it's a perfect place to stay when coming to visit Athens. We highly recommend it and we'll definitely be back.

Good price and out of our expectations !
The location is just around metro station.Only 2 stop to Athens central.
Bedroom is very clean.private kitchen make us feel surprise .

We stayed at Apartment 2 which is close to the garden. Very comfortable and the garden is nice. It has radiators so we were feeling very relaxed in the house as we visited during winter time.
Highly recommended!
Best Airbnb to slay in Athens. 🇬🇷🏛️Amazing place with great vibes. We stayed for a week and had a great time.

I was here with my friends for a week easy to reach with the metro close to the center and nice area very quiet the apartment was comfortable and nice looking with a good kitchen and facility the host was on spot and very welcoming very recommended 🇬🇷💚

Terrible experience with the owner of this apartment. They confirmed a check in time at 2 pm. We arrived at 5 pm and the apartment wasn’t ready, the cleaning ladies had just arrived. After having travelled for so many kilometers from Romania, we just wanted to get some rest and the owner was really unprofessional, after confirming a check in time and not having the apartment ready even 3 hours after that time.

We left immediately and booked another apartment in Athens (LUX&EASY Athens downtown apartments)  that turned out to be an amazing one and even cheaper that this one.
They assured us that if we cancel, we would get a full refund, but we only got 50€ from 214€ and of course, the owner stopped responding to our messages. The booking had been paid a month in advance.
We are really disappointed and we don’t recommend this apartment at all. Very unprofessional owner. They just wanted our money and that was it.

AVOID this accommodation.
Beautiful, cozy and clean. 2 bedrooms, full equipped kitchen. Super fast wifi.
Very beautiful and warm house!!! For a family like us it was ideal! Spotlessly clean and very close to all our activities, right next to the station! I highly recommend it.

This is one of the best Airbnbs that I have stayed in. It's tastefully decorated. It has a washing machine, dishwasher ,TV, Netflix, brand new air-conditioning units. Incredibly clean and a good size.
Smart & Cozy indeed! Parking place easy to find around the building.
One best 👌 👍  quality, holiday services, very friendly service, quality apartment, I live one of athens apartment, all you need they will be delivery on time ⏲ 😀
Peaceful place and calm
Western view

We were pleasantly surprised by this hotel. It is very well located and fully equipped with everything we needed. We had an issue with the water heating, but the lovely Liana immediately upgraded us to a new and better room. I highly recommend this hotel and will definitely stay here again on my next trip to Athens.
This place was spotless, comfortable, had a lovely pool on the roof and gym. The neighborhood isn’t great but it’s a short cab ride to everywhere we wanted to go. And the price was right!

I really do not get such a high ratings of this place. Price to quality ratio is very bad:
- location is far away from attractions and public transport. Need to take a taxi every time.
- souranded by high traffic street and homeless people spots
- swimming pool is a joke. It is rather a batch fo 4 people. Water is unclean, tried once, bad experience. Do not count on it.
- apartment is small, no balcony, low quality equipment. It looks good only for photos.
- hosts only contact you when they have a case. If you want to ask something they are not answering.
- we had problems with electricity, they tried to fix it moving our group from apartment to apartment several times.
I do not recommend this place at all.
Great building, with comfortable apartments. This could have been absolutely perfect. Unfortunately, the total experience was ruined by a smoky room that hit us every time we opened the door.

Staying at “The Edge” has been quite appalling. All looks but no substance. The building looks newly built and apartment is spacious. That’s where the good part of this ends. The apartment is far away from any public transportation unless you are willing to walk for a good 20 minutes through a rundown area or along the busy highway linking Piraeus to central Athens while being dotted by all kinds of strip clubs and other adult entertainment venues. Getting to the Acropolis will on average take about 35 minutes and Syntagama Square around 45 minutes. This is not convenient to most travelers. Had to rely on calling cabs using Uber and FreeNow which both would have an average wait time of 10-15 minutes before any driver showing up due to the cab drivers deciding to cancel for much more lucrative drives after accepting the booking already.

Managed by “My Greek Vacations” and their point of contact Liana felt like there was no control over anything. Liana was supposed to be in touch a week before arrival with all the details of the apartment and check-in procedure. Of course, she never got in touch with such details in time that would’ve allowed me free cancellation. Instead, waited until I contacted her the day before checking in to ask about the info.

To my surprise, I was given a basement apartment which had a grand view in their garage with easy access to anybody off the street as the garage doesn’t even have a gate. Any passerby could easily look into the apartment unless the blinds are closed shut the whole time. When I asked why was it not advertised as a basement apartment with no possibility to make use of windows, sunlight or anything you would expect during your vacation stay I was given the silent treatment. There was no advertising anywhere about them having basement apartments to start with nor was she willing to even answer a simple question.

Basement apartments should be advertised as they would fetch a lower price point and some client may want that, I definitely don’t and would’ve happily paid more for something else somewhere else. The apartment I booked was neither the same number of bedrooms nor had a mention of being in the basement. There’s no way of cracking a window for ventilation so had to rely on air-conditioning which is not something I enjoy having anywhere. The dismissive behaviour from Liana is something to be taught as the worst form of examples in customer service. Ignoring your client until 2 days into their stay saying this is what we had available for what you booked and trying to blame me for making the booking.

The furniture in the apartment, while pretty looking, is low end. Candy for electrical appliances for example don’t scream luxury or standard. The cleaning of the apartment left more to be desired with crumbs on the kitchen counter, old ticket stubs and vape filters left behind from previous tenant. Not to mention the amount of dust and trash under the bed which I saw thanks to coin I dropped and had to pick up. The hot water supply would last enough for a 10 minutes shower, anything beyond the 10 minutes and you are looking at an ice-cold continuation of your shower. Between each person showering in a 2 bed-room apartment for 4 adults, one would have to wait for about an hour between each and every single person for the tiny boiler to heat up enough water for a shower for 1 person. Internet was good most of the time.

I am very familiar with Athens and visit quite often, there are plenty of much better places offering a premium product for comparable prices in much better locations with better security measures in place. The area didn’t feel safe, it was remote, the finishing and furnishing of the apartment was done on the cheap, My Greek Vacations resort to false advertising and cover themselves with a disclaimer that states that they are not responsible for the information they themselves present on their very own website. The worst of all is having to deal with someone like Liana who has no understanding of basic communication or customer service skills. What a shame!

We have spent a few days in one of Athens Elegant Apartments and the experience has been lovely. The apartment was very nice and really well located (at a few minutes walk from Acropolis, Monastiraki, Plaka, and most of the other touristic spots in the city). In addition to that it was very clean and the person in charge of us (Nikos) has been very kind and responsive to our needs. We will, no doubt, repeat with them if we travel again to Athens.
Localizado a cerca de 2,5 km fas atrações. Em frente a um super mercado. Muito bem decorado e com uma cozinha equipada e maquina de lavar/secar. Faz falta uma maquina de lavar loiça.
Beautiful location in the center of Athens. The owners served us in everything and were very kind. On our next trip to Athens we will definitely prefer it.

Easy check in and check out.
Good location near a metro , many restaurants and a few supermarket . It is 25 minutes walk to tourist sites. There is a park on hill  nearby (15 mins walk )for sunset view.

Perfect place to stay while exploring Athens.
Great location, less than 5 minutes walk to the Metro, walking distance to all main attractions. many restaurants add coffee shops.
Great spacious clean and designed rooms.
Excellent staff and cool rooftop.
Highly recommended

Nestled amidst the charming streets of Athens' Petralona neighborhood, the Blue House on Dimofontos Street 112 is a true gem waiting to be discovered. From the moment we stepped inside, we were enchanted by its welcoming atmosphere and unique character.

Upon arrival, we were warmly greeted by our gracious host, who ensured that every aspect of our stay was nothing short of exceptional. The Blue House exudes a sense of tranquility and relaxation, providing a much-needed sanctuary in the bustling city of Athens.

The interior decor of the Blue House is a delightful blend of modern comfort and traditional Greek charm. The vibrant blue accents throughout the house add a touch of whimsy, while the cozy furnishings invite you to unwind and make yourself at home. The attention to detail is evident in every corner, from the carefully curated artwork to the thoughtful amenities provided for guests.

One of the highlights of our stay was the spacious terrace, where we enjoyed sipping our morning coffee while soaking in the panoramic views of the neighborhood. It was the perfect spot to start our day, surrounded by the sights and sounds of Athens waking up.

Location-wise, the Blue House couldn't be better situated. Petralona is a vibrant and eclectic neighborhood, filled with charming cafes, local restaurants, and picturesque streets to explore. With the Acropolis just a short walk away, we found ourselves perfectly positioned to experience the rich history and culture of Athens.

But perhaps the most memorable aspect of our stay was the hospitality of our host. Their genuine warmth and hospitality made us feel like we were staying with friends rather than strangers. From providing insider tips on the best places to eat to ensuring that we had everything we needed for a comfortable stay, they went above and beyond to make our time at the Blue House truly unforgettable.

In conclusion, our stay at the Blue House in Petralona was nothing short of magical. From its charming ambiance to its unbeatable location, it exceeded all of our expectations and left us longing to return. If you're looking for a unique and unforgettable experience in Athens, look no further than the Blue House on Dimofontos Street 112.
Amazing stay, amazing apartment triple A service!
Stayed at the Blue House for two nights and highly recommend it. Good, quiet location and very clean, large rooms. Arriving earlier wasn't a problem either. Perfect for a city trip.

Very pleasant apartment!
Clean and comfortable.Quiet place,cool neighbours.
Mr Mike is an incredible host.
Value for money,near the center of Athens (10 minutes).Kallithea is an area with a lot of every kind shops.
Really,a good choice.
I ll visit you again for sure!

Every single staff member was obliging and helpful. The restaurant was amazing. The location perfect. The Divani Acropolis hotel had lovely energy..
That iced water station in the entry was the perfect touch after coming in from the scorching Athens heat!

We recently stayed here and loved the location and enjoyed the pool. The room was clean and comfortable and a clear priority. The cleaning and support staff were genuinely friendly and helpful.
The only issue was the attitude and demeanor of many of the staff members; a few front desk staffers, the breakfast servers, and bar tenders. They were short and unfriendly. It was very strange to be received this way.  We were practically yelled at when we shared our disappointment about something. Even though the problem was rectified, I felt embarrassed by the person shaming us for a complaint. The breakfast servers avoided bringing us coffee and getting our own wasn’t an option. Finally, on the last day there was a taxi strike, but we received no notification. An email would have been nice. I’m guessing this review will make little difference, but it honestly left such a bad impression, I was happy to leave.

Big shout out to Bell Captain Michael for saving our trip! We dropped our bag with all our money, credit cards and passports in it. We were 1/2 way up the hill and he came running after us to see if it belonged to someone in our group. Not only did he chase us down but also asked us to verify the contents to confirm it was getting to the rightful owner. Also want to give commendation to Maria in the restaurant who has the sweetest smile and friendly demeanor.  Such a great stay in this beautiful hotel with a very honest and friendly staff. We will stay here every time we return to Greece thanks to them.

Stayed 3 nights and was impressed with this hotel. The most wonderful experience in Athens was the restaurant on the roof of the hotel as the view of the Acropolis at night has to be seen to be believed. Don't go by the website reservations as tables were available even when they weren't shown. We visited this restaurant each of our 3 nights there and received wonderful service even if just asking to have drinks. The photos we took of the Acropolis where so good that friends accused us of using a postcard or the web. It's really that good. Breakfasts at their downstairs restaurant were also excellent. The hotel is very conveniently located to tour both the Acrpolis and the Acropolis museum by foot. I can't recommend it enough.

Michael, the Bell Captain was a highlight of our stay.  Genial and professional, he made us feel more at home and comfortable. Helpful in information about surrounding area. Here’s an asset to your hotel.

Thermis at the desk, an extraordinary ambassador! Welcoming and helpful to an all of us traveling from Hawaii!

Dinning waitstaff is superb!

I had a very late flight out of Athens. The reception staff were very warm and caring looking after my luggage and giving me a quiet place to relax until my transfer arrived. The decor is beautiful, and the hotel is situated very close to the Acropolis. They opened the rooftop bar before I left and made me a snack. Simply breathtaking!! 🥂♥️

Stayed for two nights post a cruise.

Good location, rooms a good size and I enjoyed a bath.  We were in an executive room.

Breakfast was good.

Unfortunately we didn't get to the rooftop due to a wedding.

Easy walking distance to Acropolis and Plaka.

Staff were very friendly and helpful.

This hotel is absolutely outstanding, especially in terms of the service provided.  From the moment we checked in, every single person we encountered was incredibly friendly and helpful.  We especially appreciated the help with our luggage, something that is rare these days unless you are staying in a much more expensive hotel.  The rooftop restaurant has a beautiful view of the Acropolis, and the staff there was amazing as well.  I would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone staying in Athens.  You will not be disappointed.

This hotel meet our needs and is located in an area that allows you to seek out and see many of Athens tourist highlights. It is located approx. 30 minutes away from the Ports and approx. 40 mins from airport dependent on traffic (there is a lot of traffic in Athens). Rooms were very clean and appointed nicely with the bed mattress being comfy. The staff were both pleasant and helpful, making sure we had a box breakfast on the morning of an early morning departure to catch a ferry. The restaurant and bar on the roof top with a spectacular view of the Acropolis at night is worthy of at least a cocktail visit.

We decided to have dinner at the Athenian Callirhoe Hotel Restaurant while visiting Athens. The staff was friendly and even though we did not have a reservation they seated us at a table with a view of the Acropolis and the Parthenon which was absolutely beautiful.  The menu included lamb chops, fresh fish--tsipoura (sea bream) and salads; we ordered one of each and we were not disappointed! They were delicious and plentiful! Will definitely consider it again when we find ourselves in Athens.

Truly in the heart of Athens, just blocks from the Acropolis. Our room was spacious considering the size of the hotel, and the service has been outstanding! We arrived well before check in and the hotel staff did what they could to get us in early (our flight landed nearly an hour ahead of schedule). From that point on, the front desk staff attended to all of our needs. This excellent level of service is especially meaningful, as we are on the first leg of our honeymoon. I highly recommend this hotel for its location, quality and service, hope to stay here again on our next visit to Athens!

Hotel is in a great location convenient for the Acropolis site and Acropolis museum, but in a relatively quiet location. Many good bars and restaurants close by. Rooms are comfortable with a high standard of housekeeping. Great lounge/bar area on the ground floor and fabulous roof terrace bar and restaurant with great views of the Acropolis. Service was friendly and extremely helpful.

My husband and I had the pleasure of enjoying The Herodion Hotel on our recent trip to Athens. We had never been to the city before and were spending a short time there before departing for a cruise. Our decision to stay here was based on reviews online and we could not be more impressed. My husband and could not stop singing the Herodions praises, I lost count of how many times he would just sit back and say what a great choice the hotel had been and how much he enjoyed everything about it.
The location could not have been better. A short walk from the Acropolis, located in a quiet area of a vast city just bordering the historic Plaka neighborhood. Metro was located nearby making access to other districts simple.
The hotels rooms were absolutely pristine, with a wonderful shower and comfortable bed. We had the pleasure of booking a room with a view of the Acropolis and enjoyed morning coffees on our balcony. We used the hotels service to book transportation from airport to hotel and arrived before check in but they staff was wonderful. From the moment we arrived and had a member of staff rush down to the street to help with our luggage, to the front desk securing our bags while we took lunch and explored the area prior to check in.
We were told we could also utilize the hot tubs (which have fantastic views as well) even before our room was ready if we liked.
We had lunch in the conservatory room which was delicious and dinner at the rooftop restaurant which was probably the most delicious food I had on my vacation.
When we left the hotel we were able to once again enjoy the ease of having the welcoming staff arrange our transport to the Port.
We can not recommend this Hotel more, from cleanliness to hospitality there was no fault to be seen and we plan to stay here on any future stays as well as recommend it to family and friends.

We had a great stay at this hotel. Very friendly and welcoming staff. The room we had was great and could fit a crib in for our little one. Easy walk to Acropolis (5mins) and plenty of restaurants and bars close by. They also offer a great breakfast in the morning. Would definitely stay here again.

The hotel staff have been wonderful the entire stay. Every staff member is warm and exceptionally friendly. No task is too difficult and every request is met with a smile. The hotel restaurant on the roof top has phenomenal views of the Acropolis, with a spacious rooftop bar and restaurant. Our party of 4 enjoyed gourmet food, with each dish looking more like art than the last. The rooms are stylish and well maintained. We would highly recommend the Herodion hotel, we could not fault it. Overall, an exceptional experience.

Such a beautiful hotel. If youre on the top floors with a suite, you get an AMAZING large LARGE balcony with a view of the Acropolis. Also some of the most friendly warm and extremely beautiful/attractive staff/guests as well. This place is high class indeed and welcomes travelers from all over. Its close to the city center as well with lots to see and do around the area.

This well-known hotel features modern rooms with a well-stocked minibar—definitely a pleasant surprise compared to the empty minibar at the Intercontinental Vienna. If your budget allows, I highly recommend choosing a room with a view of the Acropolis; the sight of this ancient landmark in the distance is truly breathtaking. However, be aware that your view might be slightly obstructed by some odd yellow structures nearby. Additionally, the soundproofing in the rooms could be improved, as it's easy to be disturbed while trying to sleep. Overall, it’s a great choice for those wanting a comfortable stay with a touch of history.

雅典還行的住宿

I’m an IHG loyalist. I can tell you the difference between the breakfast buffet at the Intercontinental hotels in Rome and Athens (sheeps milk yogurt vs honey in the comb) and quality is a hallmark of the experience. It’s a luxury hotel. That’s what you are paying for. The locations, the ambiance, and the service. Generally, everything is as close to perfect as one can get.
We checked in last night. The desk staff was incredibly accommodating, the bellmen first rate, housekeeping perfect.
When we encounter someone who isn’t personable it’s frankly jarring. And when the incident is repeated you know it’s a pattern of behavior and not just someone having a bad day.
The officious gentleman with reading glasses who asks for your room number when entering the breakfast cafe near the pool is difficult. The first time we came, we were not yet guests, and he was rude.
Today, when we gave our room number, he practically spat, “Breakfast is not included with your room!” in a condescending and brisk manner which seemed to imply that it was out of our price range.
Everyone else here is absolutely tops! The servers and wait staff anticipate your needs, are friendly and helpful. It’s just this one guy who you have to get past, like a troll on a bridge.

Had a great stay at this hotel while visiting Athens, the location is ideal for exploring the city center and Acropolis using the nearby trams, buses, or metro. Staff were courteous and extremely helpful. They always went out of their way to be friendly and welcoming. Although the immediate surroundings look a bit dire the view from the rooftop restaurant and bar was absolutely stunning and more than made up for it. Speaking of the Premiere Bar, it was our favorite part of our stay. We had the pleasure of being served by Stella who was incredibly attentive and friendly, she even spoke spanish which greatly helped my family communicate their orders! All in all this was a great place to stay during our visit and I would absolutely stay again.

My wife and I just stayed here for two nights. This is a fantastic Hotel with outstanding service. It was located perfectly for us and what we wanted to see. Today was our last day there. We left our bags with the doorman, as we were going to an island for the day and were going to return in the afternoon to collect our bags as we were heading to the airport this afternoon. When the taxi dropped us off at the port for the ferry, my wife realized she left her cell phone in the taxi. My phone wouldn’t work as we were trying to call the taxi company. We decided to head back to the Intercontinental and talk to the doorman who we had left our bags with. He got on his phone immediately and started trying to locate the taxi. After a few minutes, he said go have a good time, when you come back, i will have your cell phone for you, the taxi driver has found it and he will be bringing it here. We went to the island and returned to the Intercontinental. Unfortunately, the same doorman wasn’t there, but as promised, my wife’s cellphone was there waiting for us. I hope management can reach out to me. I would like to thank him for his outstanding service and send him a token of our appreciation. This was outstanding customer service we really appreciate how we were treated. If ever in Athens again, we already know where we will stay.

Just stayed here with my daughter while in Athens. The hotel is very clean and comfortable. The staff is friendly and helpful. The rooftop bar has a wonderful view of the Acropolis as well. While it’s not the closest to the main sites, it is close for walking to the metro to get where you want to go. Also, the bus is close to get you around as well. We used both, the metro to get to the sites we wanted and the busy to get to the beach.

Clean, comfortable and SO CLOSE to the acropolis. It took us about 20 mins to walk there from the hotel. We loved the rooftop terrace too, it has a beautiful view of the parthenon. We booked it for our last night in Greece. Super easy check in, beds were really comfortable and the room was perfectly clean. Found it at a great price on booking.com. Look no further.

The lobby of the hotel is absolutely beautiful. But the rooms give a strong 80's vibe, stuffy carpet dark interior and pretty much a hospital bathroom. The breakfast is absolutely atrocious, if you take a small walk of 10 to 15 mins you have much much better breakfast for less money. The staff was quite helpful and willing to help. Overall the hotel is not worth the money and it should not be a four star hotel, but if you are in a pinch the hotel is fine and the location is good enough

The location is great near the main bit of everything around 15 to 30 minutes walk to acropolis and lidle around same distance, the staff are wonderful, very kind and welcoming. They also have a rooftop bar with food and drinks serving. Room is okay considering how cheap it was, it has a spacious bathroom, air conditioning is nice and the addition of a fridge made sure we were hydrated with cold water 😁 would recommend

Very good hotel with excellent food. The rooms are very clean. The top restaurant has a view of the acropolis, which is a big plus for the atmosphere. Near the hotel there are a lot of cheap fast foods, shops, bars and nice walks around the city. Great recommendation for this hotel.

Took me a while to find this hotel while looking for one with a pool.
Location is top marks very close to all the sites Plaka, Acropolis, hop on busses, etc.
The hotel made an effort to give us a room with a view of the Acropolis which made our stay brilliant.
Breakfast is minimal but good.
Pool is small but ok.
Rooms are small and be careful with doors, open outwards and I pulled a toenail off.
Roof terrace is amazing the view is superb.
All in all will return. Thank you.

Just for the location alone it’s easily 5 stars. I visited for my 30th birthday last November, the room was lovely & big considering it seemed it would be small from the outside. Staff were lovely (gave the guy on the front desk the rest of my cat biscuits for his kitty when leaving & he showed me photos of it). Super easy to walk to all the main sights even for a pair of fatties like my mum & I

The staff were very friendly and helpful with any questions we had.
