The self check-in and out is easy to handle!

We had the three room apartment on the first floor with balcony, perfectly equipped kitchen and living room. Everything was clean and nicely arranged. The elevator was appreciated for the luggage. Only 5 min from metro station an 1 min from bus stop line 227, the apartment was perfectly quiet during the night, when windows were closed. Very efficient mosquito defence for all windows. 20 min to Akropolis by metro, 30 min by foot. Irene was very kind and helpful with our questions and needs. Thank you very much for this pleasant stay.

Nice accommodation and a warm welcome from Greece:) Irene was super nice and eager to help with any questions about my stay here in Athens. Facilities were well equiped and i was surprised to see a wine in the dining room☺️and it was so great to have prepared icy water in the refrigerator after one hot long trip back from the outside!

We enjoyed two weekends at Casa D'Irene rustic appartment. There's plenty of space, so you feel like at home. By the way, it's full of details, like the wine everyone mentions. Irene also makes everything easy to help you with your stay.
The area is very quiet, and although it may look a bit scary at night, seems to be safe, at least, we didn't have any trouble, and we could see other people walking alone, and didn't look worried at all.
It's very well connected by metro line, and quite close to the city center, so you can get to the Achropolys in about 20 minutes on foot.
We are really happy to have chosen it for our visit to Athens!

A cozy and very nice appartment, located a bit away from strickt city center of Athens, is a very quality choice in case you are looking for staying in appartment during your holidays or other obligations you may have in this ancient Greek city. The apartment has two bedrooms, quite nice balcony (with a street view), bathroom with bath, and spacious living room presented together with kitchen. The appartment is clean and has all neccessary equipment for comfortable stay and cooking, together with some food items and spices you can use right away with your meals preparation - the owners are very accessible and open and are in general taking care that in appartment is all that is needed - a nice welcome touch from them is also presented as gift for newcomers in a form of a bottle of home made wine.
Otherwise, the appartment is just 350 m away from the nearest metro station (there is also a bus option), so the journey to other spots in city is simple and not far from main city attractions. In neighbourhood you can find bakeries and small shops with basic food and other basic equipment, while for those who are more demanding, the visit to supermarket would be essential - unfortunately there is no larger supermarket in vicinity of appartment, so you will have to search for it within at least 10 - 15 min walking distance.
The appartment is otherwise in the building on the first floor, and is easy accessible by stairs or by elevator, while the main entrance in the building itself is however a little bit clumsily, especially for people with disabilities, who could have some difficulties with entering to building.
The apartment has also an AC unit and free WiFi system.
In general, highly recommended for staying if you do not mind to not be in strickt city center of Athens.

I stayed at the Poseidon Residence in Athens with my friends.
The flat was very nice and the landlords helped with minor problems within hours. The location is very central and the kitchen has most of what you need. We felt very comfortable and would come back again.
We had a wonderful time. The accomodation is spacious and clean, and within walking distance of most of the main sites of Athens.
It's in a walking distance from the centre. There was some issue with the cleanliness - it could be much better. Free parking is available on the streets around the block.

Rooms look great, very cosy atmosphere in the backyard - everything was wonderful 😍
Our host Carolina is a very nice person ☺️ Thank you for all your advices! All questions were answered:)
Highly recommended!
Great place to stay,  I highly recommend it !

Great hotel and great location. This was recommended by a Youtuber. The location is in close proximity to Acropolis, with beautiful views, comfortable beds, and just enough space for 2. The restaurant adds an elevated aspect to the whole experience. Their free breakfast is amazing, they offer so many fresh and delicious options to include fruit, pastries, eggs, ham, etc. Going to the restaurant in the evening allows for a beautiful view. Would def. stay here again!

Mixed Feelings with Great Potential

During my recent week-long stay at the hotel, I experienced a mix of highs and lows that shaped a unique visit. Here are my thoughts, which I hope will be helpful for both potential guests and the hotel management.

Pros:

1.	Exquisite Dining: The restaurant is truly exceptional. The culinary team offers delightful meals that rival the city’s finest. I highly recommend trying the dinner menu for a pleasant surprise!
2.	Convenient Location: While not centrally located, the hotel is well-situated with easy access to key attractions, making exploration convenient.
3.	Accommodating Management: The hotel manager deserves special mention for their dedication and kindness. They consistently went out of their way to assist guests, adding a personal touch to the experience.

Cons:

1.	New Section Feels Disconnected: I was accommodated in a newly opened section of the hotel located in a separate building. Unfortunately, this area lacked the traditional hotel vibe and felt more akin to an Airbnb. Given the price, I believe guests might find better value elsewhere.
2.	Reception Challenges: Interaction with the reception staff was often less than pleasant, marked by a confrontational attitude that detracted from the welcoming atmosphere typically expected at a hotel.

In conclusion, while [Hotel Name] has several strengths, particularly in its dining and management, improvements in staff hospitality and the integration of new sections could enhance the overall guest experience. I look forward to seeing how this hotel evolves and addresses these mixed aspects in the future.

I have mixed feelings about my stay at this hotel. On the positive side, the staff was friendly and welcoming, which helped improve our experience. However, several issues left us disappointed. First, the pictures on the website were misleading. While the metropolis was visible from the rooftop, the location itself wasn’t as romantic as it seemed online.

The room size was another drawback—they were really, really small. While that might not have been a huge issue, the cleanliness definitely was. There was noticeable fungus in the bathroom, which made us uncomfortable. We were only staying for three nights, so we didn’t focus on it much at first.

What really disturbed us happened on the last day. We had traveled all the way from the U.S. and were exhausted when we first arrived, so we didn’t check if the sheets were clean. During our stay, we spent most days exploring Athens and only realized a major issue on the final morning. As we were packing, we found bloodstains on the side of the bed where my husband had been sleeping. This blood was not ours—my husband checked himself, and I am physically unable to have periods, so it was clearly from a previous guest. It was shocking and unsettling to think my husband had been sleeping on bloodstained sheets for days. When we approached the front desk about it, the receptionist seemed skeptical, almost as if questioning if the blood was ours, which made the situation even more frustrating.

Finding someone else’s blood on our bed was not only gross but also potentially dangerous. It raised concerns about hygiene and safety that shouldn’t be overlooked.

We feel that when we approached the front desk to address what happened, the hotel should have immediately offered a sincere apology. Instead, it felt like they were questioning our account of the situation. At the very least, they should have apologized and offered some kind of compensation, whether a full refund or another gesture to make up for the discomfort. I even considered pushing for a refund, but given how uncomfortable my husband was with the whole experience, we decided to just leave.

No, I don’t recommend this hotel. And, NO! This is not a 4 stars hotel!!!!

Bad experience in this hotel, we were accommodated in an uninhabited building 50 meters from it.
We arrived at the hotel at 9 pm, we liked the entrance and reception and the nightmare began as soon as the room was paid: the employee told us that the room was outside the hotel but that we did not worry, that it was safe. They accompanied us and our surprise was that it was an uninhabited building, without lights to climb, the broken elevator, there were no cameras ... See my photos as a test that reaffirms what I say. It was scary if you go up just because it seemed like there were squatters in the building.
Well, after 3 hours of discussion we got us to give us a 20% discount. They wanted to ignore everything and the worst of all is that a room is reserved and as they see fit you are lodged inside or outside the same hotel.
Luckily, we stayed only 1 night. The room was new but where it was was insecure. Breakfast quite well and its helpful employees. The best thing about the hotel is its location, it is located right next to the Plaka neighborhood and the Parthenon of Athens: the neighborhood is safe but it passes a main avenue where you have to be careful to cross it if you don't want to be hit by cars.
I don't recommend it, be careful with this hotel.

A really good place, super comfortable and the rooms are super good compared to other places in terms of space, the views are super nice, I recommend that if you can, you try to get a room on the 6th floor with a path to the Acropolis.

I have stayed in Marble House for 3 nights and it was very good experience. The place is very nice and clean, lobby has a lot of mirrors which I like a lot. Staff is very friendly and helpful. Our room had two bed, small fridge, closet and balcony. The restroom with shower was shared with one other room.

Within 3 minutes of walk, you have plenty of bars, coffee places and restaurants. There is also subway station 5 minutes walk away. Acropolis museum is about 15-20 minutes away.

I highly recommend this place for short stays near city center of Athens.

I stayed at Marble House for 6 nights. And I am happy that I did.
Marble House is located in a good neighbourhood, close to Metro station, and other services.
The rooms are clean, comfortable and satisfactory.
The staff are knowledgeable, courteous, helpful and friendly.
I would certainly stay at Marble House again.

I've got been 2 nights this week in Marble House. I've seen it in Lonely Planet, and after the seek I choose this place. Great choice, easy to reserve, welcome suggestions by email really useful. The place is nice, comfortable, clean, quiet (maybe in high season it changes, don't know). Very well located, the staff, they seems more like the owners or really friendly people, give me all information I needed. I can only speak well. If I have the change to come back to Athina sure repeat. Thanks, Rosa from Madrid.

We loved staying at Marble House! Such kind and accommodating staff. And fabulous AC! There were some nice cafe/restaurants in the area and it was a nice walk to the acropolis. Probably not the best if anyone in your group has a hard time with stairs, although it depends on what level your room is on. And the staff can carry your bags for you. They were also very accommodating for a late check out even during a busy time of year! Of course that can't always happen but we so appreciated the attention to detail on their end! The only suggestion I would have is a TV we could cast to.

We recently spent five nights at the Marble House Hotel in Athens, and it was an absolute delight. From the moment we arrived, we were struck by how impeccably clean our room was, and the warm, welcoming nature of the staff made us feel right at home. They went above and beyond, offering us insider tips on the best local restaurants and authentic Greek taverns. Thanks to their fantastic recommendations, we avoided tourist traps and enjoyed delicious meals daily, immersing ourselves in the true flavors of Athens.

The hotel’s location is perfect—nestled in a genuine Athens neighborhood that’s within comfortable walking distance of the city center, yet away from the hustle and bustle. If you’re looking for a cozy, family-run boutique hotel experience and prefer to steer clear of the larger chains, Marble House is the perfect choice. Our stay here was nothing short of wonderful, and we will definitely be returning whenever we find ourselves in Athens again!

Highly recommended!

The good: Big appartment in an amazing location very close to the metro, coffee shops and markets. We never interacted with anyone and it everything was easily talked via chat. We were given codes to enter both the building and the apartment. They even booked a transfer for us from the airport (it's expensive as the airport is very far, but if arriving late at night, it's a blessing).

The bad: - Most of the times the code to open the apartment door wouldn't work. The first time it opened after 5min but the next days stopped working. I had to contact via booking to find a solution which was very quick even late at night.
- There's a key in a lockbox protected by a code. This code was inserted already!! Major security breach. Of course someone from outside would have to get into the building and know there's a key but still, felt unsafe after knowing that so I randomised the code and notified the hotel.
- The bathroom was not very clean. We found some hairs on the floor and even a contact lens... 🙄
- There's a stereo speaker connected... Apparently anyone can connect via Bluetooth. We thought it was off but it wasn't. At 5am some funny people decided to connect to it and blast music, which scared us a lot. Now we laugh at it but wasn't funny when it happened.

These few issues could have been isolated and only happen once but we're enough to bring the rating down but I WOULD comeback there if we comeback to Athens as overall it was good!

Great stay!!!! Clean, spacious and comfortable apartment, very close to the subway and within walking distance from major tourist attractions; it took us 25' to get to the Acropolis on foot. Very good air-conditioning, new home appliances, awesome mattress and the best of all; free access to the jacuzzi and sauna area on the 5th floor!! We are definitely coming back!!!

Everything was great! The room was comfortable and fully equipped, close to metro station and shops. The staff was very kind and helpful, and room was super clean. What else to ask for? We will be back on our next trip to Athens for sure!!!

One of the best accomodations I have been in.

The apartment looks way smaller on the pictures so you will really be suprised on how big it is.

There are literally no issues with the apartment.
It has a jacuzzi which is available to all Tennant's which was great and had.some privacy in.

It's all accessible by codes that you receive which is amazing as this really supports the current pandemic issues we have.

The house was really clean.
The staff was extremely nice and helped a lot.
Overall great experience 💛
Perfect stay, building full automated, clean and value for money! Staff everything that i needed reply to my messages and calls! Ill come back soon, see you and thanks for everything

I've stayed at Neratzia in Februari and June (3 and 6 days). If I return to Athens I do not doubt to book at Neratzia again. I would recommend my friends to go here too. The rooms, including bathroom, are clean and suit your needs. The breakfast, served at the cafe below is perfect. Personnel are perfect. Always helpful and friendly. Keep up the good work :)

Myself and my dad stayed at Neratzia Rooms recently - perhaps the best stay of our trip. The staff were great, very friendly and accommodating, the inclusive breakfast was delicious, and the room was spacious and modern. I would highly recommend to anyone looking to stay in Athens.

A hotel that is an experience, mainly thanks to the owner and staff. Everyone wants to help and provide a good experience. Yanis the owner accompanied us with good advice and a warm attitude. The hotel also has a pleasant bar with a good atmosphere. We received exceptional service and a hug from Yannis even after we left. For sure we will come back again
Merav and Hanit

Well situated and in walking distance to restaurants and shops.
The rooms are as shown on the website. Room service is every day and very good.
Breakfast and it's selection of dishes are excellent
The cafe bar is open late at  night and you need to close the window, not be disturbed by the noise when sleeping. However, you have to close the window because of  the outside temperature/AC

We loved our stay at the Neratzia Rooms! This place is truly a hidden gem. The room was adorable and very clean. The beds were the most comfortable we slept in on our whole trip through Italy and Greece. Plenty of towels, coffee, bottled water, and even a toothbrush if you need it! The owner was so nice and all the employees were accommodating. Violet especially was so kind and on top of everything. She was so helpful! The food at the cafe was incredible! We were very happy with our stay here.

I arrived at the place I booked through "Booking", the conditions were not as stated in the description, the place was dirty, with insects in the beds, I don't know if they were bedbugs or ticks, the bathroom was unpresentable, dirty and had a bad smell. I hope they close this place, I understand that it is not a hotel, the price was very cheap, but the least that is asked is a little bit of cleanliness and order.

I booked for the entire apartment through booking, but when I got there all I was given were two beds in a shared room. And the room looked nothing like the pictures, filled with stuff and very dirty.

Don t even think about booking for such a trash hole! Below decent and basic hygiene and it is a big shame for this accomodation to be allowed in booking and other big travel platforms! I regret not taking photos! I ve traveled and stayed in cheap places and hostels all around the world but what i have seen there exceeded by far my worst expectations ever!

Had a VERY BAD EXPERIENCE!!!! Waited 1 hour outside this hostel hoping someone could open the gate for me, coz aparently the doorbell isnt working. Called and message many times the host but didnt come out! So decided to leave the place because its getting dark and the area looks not very safe. I have asked for a full refund but they havent refunded me at all!! Dont stay here as service and communication is not very good! They have left me alone and dark outside without anywhere to stay in Athens!!

The worst house I've ever seen, like the first thing you notice is the smell around like the house hasn't been cleaned in the past century, then you notice it's like house for ilegal imigrante cause we sleep 12 people all together, then if you actually move inside the house you will find garbage everywhere like no one cleans they just throwing everything on the floor and they are holding to every trash then the owner comes to you and say who ever makes trash needs to clean but he doesn't clean his own.
Very nice and lovely apartment. Best location in the center of Historical Athens. Well done guys perfect job!
Nice and fancy. Only one toilette so thats why only 4 stars.
Rude host
Nice, clean comfortable and close to  the main tourist attractions.
Your Homme in Athens !!!

Great place and super value. Make sure you spend some time in the evening on the balcony to see lit up Zuess Temple and Parthenon. Walk to both. Nice pizza and breakfast place next door. AC works and is quiet. TV is good. Comfortable beds. Large family room.

Best view you can buy at this price! I got the middle apartment and i spent much more time at the accommodation  then I normally would in a city break just because the terrace is amazing. Very clean and top location in a safe part of the city center. The bathtub needs some work. Highly reccomend

This was by far the worst experience I ever had!!!
First day of arrival as I was in the room 4 strangers entered the room at 10p.m. Imagine!! The owner sent the entrance code of my room to other people! It's a matter of privacy and security!
Of course I immediately informed the owner that I would leave as I could not feel safe anymore.
The owner did not even mention of returning funds for this huge mistake. I requested a refund and never received anything. She does not even reply to my calls and messages.
Not professional behaviour at all! Very disappointing!

Don't waste your money!!

We stayed for 4 nights and it was awful. Firstly, you expect privacy when paying for accommodation, however we had workmen on our "private balcony/terrace" who peered into our bedroom and lounge area every day. This meant we had to keep the shutters constantly closed so the "view" was pointless. They also started work at 8am every day and were very noisy, banging, leaning ladders against our door and shouting to each other - the chance of a relaxing lie in on holiday was impossible.

Not only this but they spilt drinks and food on the balcony. (Photos attached)

The shower also did not work. There was no shower holder and the bathtub had no plug which worked. There were no curtains around the shower either so you had to wash yourself sitting down in the bath (which had peeling paint all over the base) to shower whilst hand holding the shower head. (Photos and video attached)

The shower also turns scolding hot when someone uses the tap/toilet and this burnt me.

The images of the bathroom were nothing like it and it was very below the standards of a hostel, let alone a booking.com place.
The company offered us a partial refund but they have not paid this and I wouldn't have even paid that half for the experience we had.

Absolutely awful.

We felt like we had the best view in town! Lovely apartment with massive terrace. Def recommended ♡

Liked · Stunning traditionally decorated apartment at the top floor of lovely building in perfect location in city centre. Massive corner terrace facing 2directions - both stunning views - sunset of Acropolis ♡ Big dining table on the terrace. Small functional kitchenette, 2good AC units in apartment. Modern bathroom.

Disliked · Lack of storage space to open suitcases. One of the advertised photos wasn't the actual apartment we stayed in.

This loft is wonderful! Very clean and modern, with an amazing porch view of the Acropolis. The owners are extremely helpful and friendly, and they even gave me Greek cookies and a loaf of bread when I showed up.  Coffee and espresso were available in the room as well.

The location is right next to a metro stop and within easy walking distance of all of the shops/attractions/restaurants. Highly recommended if you're looking for a nice place to recharge before hitting the sights of Athens.

the loft is very nice, new, modern and contemporary design and well equipped even for longer stays!! the view is amazing and you can easily chill on the big balkony!! the location is great as it is close to the metro and a walking distance from Acropolis and the city center! moreover the hospitality was very nice and the hostess was very helpfull and always stand by to help us!

Excellent location. There's a lift, saves you climbing stairs to 6th flr. Great views, from top floor. Lots of fab cafes and restaurants nearby. Lovely apartment - comfortable, warm, small kitchen so you can prepare simple meals. Complimentary snacks - toast, honey, nutella. Owner was helpful and available through whatsapp.
Fabulous location and gorgeous apartment. Super clean, very pretty and close to all major attractions in Athens.
Beautiful apartment. Well situated. Only negati e is a couple flights of stairs to carry luggage not accessible by elevator. Staff very pleasant and helpful.

Great balcony view of the Acropolis
Wondeful place to sit.
Apartment had everything needed incl washing machine, fridge, iron and cooking things.

Host helpful.
Bedroom nice and comfortable. Bathroom very nice.
Kitchen and living room are very small but you are coming here for the Balcony living space really.

What an horrible experience… The manager’s communications skills are lacking, to say the least. More importantly, our booking was cancelled by the manager before the agreed upon meeting time at the property. No calls, no messages. Just a closed door after a 8 hrs flight. There are great hotels in Athens, anyone of them is a better than this one.
Couldn't stay in a nicer apartment
A nice view of Acropolis !!!

Μικρό σχετικά προσεγμένο με όμορφο μπαλκόνι με θέα την Ακρόπολη.
Περισσότερο όμως για καλό καιρό ώστε να μπορείς να καθίσεις έξω.
Εύκολη πρόσβαση στο κέντρο σε μια ήσυχη γειτονιά.

The location is amazing, close to everything but not in the very noisy tourist area. The view from the balcony is amazing, you see the Acropolis from close. The apartment is cute, well furnished, very modern and high-tech. The host is very kind and helpful.

Extremely cozy and modern loft with a lovely, lovely view and a beautiful terrace!! It's very clean, well equipped and close to the subway which is a huge plus. Just beautiful, I truly enjoyed my stay!!

Also, the neighborhood is pretty quiet and safe so that's another huge plus! Overall, just absolutely lovely!!

Konstantina the manager was very nice, hospitable and super helpful. She suggested us a lot of places all of which were excellent. The loft itself is in a very good location, nicely decorated and well equipped. It's a bit too small for a couple especially during bad weather when the use of balcony is limited. However we enjoyed our stay a lot.

Everything was perfect! The loft is located near the museum of contemporary art, an area, where you find everything you need and the transportation to all the spots of interest was very easy! The loft is modern, cosy, felt like home. The terrace is wonderful! We sat every night enjoying the beautiful view of Athens and Acropolis! Many thanks to Konstantina who was super helpful and caring our during our stay making sure we have everything we need! I recommend you stay at the loft!

Excellent loft very nice view on Athens Acropolis
well designed, Comfortable, clean safe place
Excellent location, it has coffee machine and small refrigerator ,television,
Very big trace
Need to contact them before arrival to arrang the check in
Very helpful manager

Great little hotel, close to the Acropolis and good restaurants. We stayed in room #10, the rooftop terrace. The room isn't huge but it doesn't need to be. Everything was clean and well maintained. Only drawback is there's no people elevator (there is one just for your luggage), so you get a little workout climbing 4-5 flights of steps.  While the view from the rooftop terrace isn't as grandiose as from some other hotels, it's still very nice.  You can see the parthenon a little bit between two other buildings.  Room was very reasonably priced and to us, well worth the price.

OMG - these hosts go out of their way to make you happy. Comfortable as possible. We met the general manager and owner upon our stay.

We had booked directly with the hotel on the hotel site. When we arrived they did everything to get us a fast check in. After international flights one is always ready to get some rest!

Feel free to ask them about anything. If they don’t have the answer they will get it for you!

Very cozy and nice place to stay in Athens. Location is perfect, close to center, subway and car rentals. Not overpriced and has good breakfast package selections. Rooms are very clean and modern. Staff was always welcoming and smiling. Definitely recommended.

Had a lovely stay!  Staff was so very helpful and kind.  The apartment was exceptionally clean and modern and quiet. It was located close to dining, shopping and sight seeing. Definitely want to stay here again!!

Spotless and modern rooms that are well-furnished. Great location and price too. I appreciate the strong security of the hotel too. Check in service was great - we got our room early and the lady was friendly and polite. There was free coffee and juice at the reception too. Overall fantastic hotel stay experience!

Elena went above and beyond to make our stay unforgettable. From the moment we arrived, she greeted us with warmth and a friendly smile, instantly making us feel at home. Her local knowledge was invaluable, recommending hidden gems and the best dining spots nearby. Elena consistently checked in to ensure we had everything we needed, showing genuine care and professionalism. Thanks to her exceptional service, our trip was seamless and enjoyable. She truly made our stay special!

The room was clean and neat.

The shower would back up and cause slight flooding and there’s mold issues for sure.

The Kitchenette was great although the cooking items were old, dirty and scratched.

The noise from the road below is very loud. It felt like we were sleeping in the middle of the road. The windows didnt close well.

Location was otherwise a convenient short walk to Acropolis and some less touristy restaurants.

The highlight of our stay was undoubtedly the friendly and attentive staff. Upon arrival, they took the time to recommend top tourist attractions and local dining favorites, which added a personal touch to our visit. My wife and I stayed in the Attic Suite, the largest room in this seven-story hotel. Located on the 7th floor as the only room on that level, it features a private Wi-Fi network and daily breakfast delivery. The room was clean, spacious, and offered a spectacular view of the Acropolis through floor-to-ceiling glass panels. Blackout curtains ensured a restful night.

The hotel is conveniently located within an 8-minute walk from Plaka, one of Athens’ main hubs. While the old-style elevator, common in European buildings, can feel tight for two people with luggage, it efficiently serves up to the 6th floor. Guests staying in the Attic Suite will need to take a short flight of stairs to reach the 7th floor.

The suite includes a large bedroom, European and USB outlets for easy device charging, and a Nespresso machine with small portion cups. The bathroom, while functional, has limited counter space and a slightly awkward showerhead.

Additional conveniences include a 24/7 front desk, a secure entrance accessible with the room key, and a nearby gas station for snacks and essentials. The hotel’s location on a main road also makes it easy for taxis and Ubers to find.

The location is good, but the hotel's maintenance is terrible. Our room have a serious problem with the pipes. They give us a room with a blocked sink in the toilet and only fixed on the other day. While using the kitchen sink it bubbled into the bathroom drain. The shower was dirty with water liking from everywhere and also blocked, provoking a flood into de room. The sofa bed is super uncomfortable. The windows are massively dirty to the point that you can barely see outside. The curtains also needs maintenance as it goes outside the trail and can't block the sun properly. The hotel is an old residential building adapted to a hotel but with very low maintenance and only one staff available.

We stayed in this hotel for 4 nights in Sept 2024 and was big mistake.  We are very surprised and disappointed that there was NO HOT WATER most of the time.  We'd wake up to find no hot water, and then we would have to go to lobby to complain, and each time they said "OK we will turn on the hot water and please wait 30+ minutes".  After waiting the water would be only warm.  Very odd they would turn on water heater by request! Bathroom also very dirty and moldy see pictures.

Absolutely perfect accommodation. These guys have thought of everything, and the quality is excellent. Perfectly clean and wanting nothing more, except a toaster. It was cool (2 air conditioners), quiet,  dark (shutters), dual big tvs, everything is new and works perfectly. They are friendly,  helpful (carried bags and there is a lift) and we loved the location. Extremely happy.

Fantastic location, beautifully presented, exceptionally clean, has everything you could ask for including 2 big screen tv's with Netflix, Bluetooth sound bar to enjoy your tunes, great kitchen, bathroom, laundry with dryer etc. Great service from Alex, these guys have thought of everything.  I loved  Bill and John's development. Top quality fit out, dual air conditioning, limitless hot water, etc etc.Dud i mention it was also a good price!

There is no better way to describe it than absolutely EXCELLENT!  We loved everything about it. Alex was our host and he met us when we arrived, showed us around the apartment and took us to the roof to see the amazing view. It was close to shopping, food, and attractions. I loved, loved, loved this place!

This suite is perfect, the house owner Bill and John are super nice. They introduced us the must visit places in the city and some good restaurants for sure!
And the hardware and location of the suite are perfect as well
Great suite, superb location to Acropolis, dining and shopping.  Everything perfect all the way to the coordinated transportation to airport.
It was a great experience. All the positive reviews were actually true. I advice everyone and especially families of it. Thank you for welcoming us
Wonderful place to stay.  Great service.  Will stay here next time. Great location.
Right next to Acropolis, a great apartment to stay!
Great hosts. Everything was perfect.
yummy

The property is absolutely pretty and central to everywhere in Athens. HOWEVER, reason for 1 star is due to the frustration and inconvenience caused by the check-in and check-out process. During check-in, there was no one at the property, you will need to contact them for them to make their way to the property to hand over the key - this was still acceptable.
The major frustration came when we checkout and left the luggages at the property for them to transfer it to their storage place as they told us that late check-out at 12.30pm was not doable which is understandable. We had to change our airport transfer to pick us up from a different address instead. We left the property at 9.40am and texted the guest relation person ASTERIS that we will pick it up from the storage at 12.30pm. At 12.40pm when we went to the storage place to pick up our luggages, there is no office and we had to call ASTERIS again. That’s when I was told that our luggages were still at the property. When I asked why was I not informed earlier so that we could have changed the airport transfer pick up, he simply brush it off by saying that it was a busy day for them and luggage storage was a free service. If you had bothered, it will be a simple WhatsApp or Call. We had an unpleasant argument over the phone while standing around waiting for our airport transfer to be sorted as the storage place and property was 20mins drive away although walking takes around 7mins. But imagine us having to walk to the property and drag the luggages back to the storage just to board the airport transfer, not to mention that we are already running late for the pickup. This is an absolutely unpleasant experience made worse by ASTERIS. If you can’t manage your guests, don’t be a guest relation person, you are supposed to help solve an issue and not argue to insist your point.
Thankfully, Harry, another staff of the property came and spoke with our airport transfer driver who eventually spoke to his company and mange to drive us back to the property to pick up the luggages. We arrived at the airport late but managed to still catch our flight. I will definitely think twice about staying at this property in future.

Amazing hotel. Well-decorated with modern architecture. The living room and master bedroom offer the view of Temple of Zeus, the rooftop also provided Acropolis view with temple of Zeus on the other side. Centrally located, close to Metro and shopping area. Fully-equipped and well-prepared with full amenities. The host is very friendly, well-communicated and super helpful. Definitely I will stay here again when I revisit Athens.

This hotel was AMAZING. We stayed here on a family vacation in a group of seven. The entire apartment is beautifully furnished, easily one of the nicest places that I have EVER stayed. The best part is that it's in walking distance to many of the local attractions (Plaka, Acropolis etc.). The property manager George was very attentive and when my mom fell ill towards the end of the trip brought medicine for her.

Highly recommend!

Awesome apartment in Athens.
Highly recommend. We just stayed 4 days in Athens, and this was great with 3 bedrooms and 2 1/2 bath apartment. John was very helpful and nice. Couldn't ask for better location and place to stay.
Beautiful apartment with lots of space for a large family or group of friends, exceptional location and top level comfort! Would absolutely stay here again, especially for the reasonable price!!!

Do not order from this store, be careful. they send products in duplicate, but not the ones you ordered in the hope that you will not go through the return process, filling in a product return form, etc. This form is definitely impossible to fill in because it is disabled

If you’re going to Athens, this is absolutely the best place to stay. The staff were very friendly, accommodating, knowledgeable, and prompt, and professional. The hotel and room were modern, well maintained, clean, well equipped. The breakfast was incredible and honestly, one of the best parts of staying here. The location CAN NOT be beat either! I could not recommend this place more! Best place we stayed in our 3 weeks trip across the Mediterranean.

Our 3 night stay at your hotel capped a wonderful 2 week vacation in Italy and Greece. Our room was clean, the beds comfortable and the daily room cleaning service was much appreciated.  The front desk personnel were very courteous and helpful with a special shout out to Margarita! The complimentary breakfast featured a variety of quality offerings as well as very helpful and gracious service. Of course, the view from this rooftop location was amazing! Your personnel handled our luggage on arrival and departure and also arranged for taxi pickup from Piraeus and on our departure day to the airport. We had a wonderful stay at your hotel! 5 Stars all the way! Thank you so much! John and Sue Delapa

We just spent 2 nights here, and it was incredible. The room is quiet and so comfortable and nice. The staff was super kind and helpful. The breakfast is fantastic. We had dinner one night at their rooftop restaurant - the food is great, and it provides uninterrupted views of the Acropolis lit up at night. The entire stay was magical, and we would 10/10 stay here again.

Service was A+. Friendly front desk and bell staff.

Breakfast was included and the restaurant was great. Big menu, fast and friendly service, great food.

Rooms were clean and comfortable. Nice balcony with chairs too. Shower was a bit tiny, and awkward to use due to size , but not a deal breaker.

Location can’t get much better. Right near most of the attractions.

If you’re looking for a quiet, restful night, avoid this hotel at all costs. After a long day, I was hoping to get some sleep, but I was informed that the bright LED lights on the balcony, which illuminate the building, cannot be turned off. The lights are glaring, and the room stayed brightly lit all night. When I raised this issue with the staff, they suggested using the three layers of curtains in the room as a solution, which shows that management is aware of the problem but clearly uninterested in the well-being of their guests. While the staff really tried to work through the problem and even offered me a bottle of sparkling wine for the inconvenience, it just demonstrated the tone-deafness of the organization. If you value your sleep and want a peaceful hotel experience, this is NOT the place for you.

The apartments are located in the very center. Everything is very clean and cozy. The kitchen has everything for cooking (oil, spices, coffee, pasta), and the bathroom also has everything. The owner is friendly, speaks good English. We went by bus to the beach every day. There is an excellent coffee shop nearby. The Acropolis is 800 meters from the apartments.
A little far from the center but nice apartment
Meh..

My daughter and I visited Athens in August 2023 and spent 3 nights at this hotel.  The hotel staff were all kind and helpful.  I felt like we were staying with family.  I am thankful their English was spoken perfectly for us Texas girls.  Breakfast on the rooftop was very good with a lovely variety of choices.  The room was cleaned nicely every day.  I was delighted that the hotel is located in a lovely area tourist area with overwhelming number of choices of high quality restaurants and fun shops.  I would love to stay here again if we should travel to Athens again.

Dimi is the nicest hotel employee you can imagine. But all her colleagues are also warm and very friendly. Location is perfect. Only minus: The thin walls - you can hear every sound from the guests in the room next door.

Stayed here for new years 2023/4. Home and poetry hotel is in one of the best locations in central Athens. Situated at the foot of the Acropolis, everything is within easy walkable reach. Rooms are well appointed, clean and welcoming with a complmentary bottle of wine in your room on arrival. Breakfast is excellent, plentiful and is served on the rooftop restaurant which has great views of the acropolis. Staff are outstanding and can't do enough to help you. Fanis on reception gets a special mention because of his help when my son left his IPhone in the taxi from the airport. After several calls it was found and retrieved, much to our great relief. 5 stars from us, we will certainly book again next time we are in Athens.

Had a lovely 3 day visit to Athens and couldn’t be happier with our accommodations. Clean and comfortable room that they refreshed daily.  The staff was really nice and welcoming. Our stay included daily breakfast. It was so good! I don’t think we could have found better at any restaurant really. Perfect central location for all of the sights. Great place!!

Our room was amazing, and the breakfast—all home-cooked—was the best we had anywhere in Greece! Our hosts were incredibly gracious, and the location was perfect, right in downtown Athens with the Acropolis and everything else walkable. Highly recommended!
Great staff

Are you Dutch and living in Athens? Or a Greek with something Dutch in your heart?  Come here every second Friday of the month (we call it casual friday)

Gezellig plekje voor Nederlanders of gewoon Nederland gangers die in Athene wonen. Iedere 2e vrijdag avond van de maand is de tent open.
Clubhouse of the Dutch Association in Greece. See websites NVIG.GR
If you want to be in the Netherlands for a while, this is the right place to be
nice place of the Dutch association.

Fantastic Weekend Stay at Athens Residence Apartments!

I recently stayed at Athens Residence Apartments over the weekend, and I couldn’t have been more pleased with my experience. The location is unbeatable—nestled in a quiet neighborhood but still within walking distance to the Acropolis and many other major attractions in Athens. It made exploring the city so convenient and stress-free.

The apartment itself was spacious, modern, and impeccably clean. It felt like a home away from home with all the amenities you could need, from a fully equipped kitchen to a comfortable living area. The bed was incredibly comfortable, ensuring we had restful nights after long days of sightseeing.

What really stood out was the attention to detail and the hospitality of Mr. Albert. He was welcoming and helpful, providing great recommendations for local restaurants and attractions. Check-in was smooth, and they even offered a handy guidebook with tips for making the most of our stay.

Overall, Athens Residence Apartments is perfect for anyone looking for a blend of comfort, convenience, and value. I highly recommend it for both short and extended stays. I’ll definitely be coming back next time I’m in Athens!

Albert is the best! This place is a great value for the money and was in a more residential area. Albert recommended places and we ate at a few. He provided cold water in our fridge and the ac was great. It is up a big hill  but is a great spot being 10 minutes from the Acropolis. Would stay again!

Albert is a legend, hats off to him. He helped us with everything, including the delivery of our lost luggage from an erratic airline company, he also relocated us in the best room for the same price because of an unexpected pipe problem in the basement. He’s an absolute gentleman and we were treated as kings. I would highly recommend this nice, modern, clean and tidy apartment so close to the Acropolis and Plaka areas (5 minutes walk)

Fantastic location in a peaceful area around 10 mins walk to the Acropolis. Stunning apartment with all the usual amenities, nice touches with the complimentary bathroom toiletries and flip-flops, and the bottle of water chilled in he fridge upon arrival. Lovely host who was very accommodating with our late check in, and also gave us fantastic recommendations on local places to eat and drink.

We have just spent 3 nights at the Apartment. Everything was great - from the initial arrangements over messages to organizing transfer from the airport, to meeting and greeting us and helping with information and all other needs. A huge thank you to Albert and Xenofon for such a wonderful first time experience in Athens!

Just amazing. The view from the balcony was stunning at all times of day or night.

Neighbourhood was pretty quiet, with the exception of market day. But, honestly, that just added to the charm of the trip!

Would 100% recommend staying here for any trip to Athens. So well located to transport links, historical sites, great restaurants.
Excelent view. Nice host and very kind. The apartment is very beautifull.
Nice place beautiful view!

Average apartment for the price.

The view from the balcony is great, especially in the evening. And it's close to everything, on foot. We were able to enter the apartment before the scheduled check-in time, a flexibility that was appreciated.

The neighbor downstairs shouted at us from her balcony not to rub the chairs.... however, we hadn't really made any noise and we had been on the balcony for 1 minute. It was quite unpleasant.

See nice and cozy accommodation with a view of the Acropolis. CRAZINESS! Everything was there from A to Z in the apartment. Everything within walking distance.  Parking spaces in front of the house are always available. Despite the proximity to the Acropolis and the center, quiet location. Landlord very very friendly and answered immediately. Ephcharisto

Spacious apartment.  4th floor, The view on the backyard(at least for the apartment for 4 people) I don't know about the others. Small but nice balcony. Very nice style of the apartment. Very Quiet air-cons. Well equipped kitchen. Beds are comfortable, but I think the mattress soon should be changed for the big bed :) The host was very nice and welcomed us well. Close to shops,bakery downstairs, relatively cheep restaurants downstairs. Safe neighborhood. 15-20 min. walking to Acropolis and to the center. No problem finding parking places on the streets.  The only thing which bothered me was that It was hard to open the doors when you enter to the building, you need a bit to struggle with it.  I think the lock should be changed.

It's 2am, and music outside is not loud, it's LOUD. Closing the windows doesn't help.
Don't stay here if you plan to sleep at night.
Really close to everything. The owner is so lovely and Helpful!
Nice apartment, everything you need is there. The center is just a stone's throw away. There are many cafes nearby where you can eat inexpensively and deliciously.

We stayed here for a long weekend break and it was absolutely perfect for us. We got the studio as all the other rooms were full and it is a small room but perfectly functional for a couple. Bed was very comfy, room and bathroom modern and clean.

Breakfast was served outside on in the seating area just outside the hotel lobby and served from one of the bars. We had perfect weather for this but not sure how that would be if it were cold and wet. Also there were a few birds that kept flying in to finish off peoples left overs when they were too lazy to move their plates to the clearing area.
Breakfast was great for us with a choice of hot or cold food and drinks.
The staff were very polite and helpful too.

Location is excellent as it’s just a five minute walk into the Main Street next to the acropolis museum. Loads of amazing restaurants and little shops right on your doorstep.

Loved this place and great pricing. Staff explained everything and were friendly upon arrival. Amazing views from room of the acropolis. Clean and spacious room. Location fantastic to walk to many sights. Loved our stay here. Only downside was the cleaners make noise in morning (I was trying to sleep in well past 9am) but they have a job to do and I am probly the only one sleeping that late 😅 great place!

Sooooo, interesting experience. We needed 5 beds, so our room had a Hostel feel. 1 bedroom with queen/bunk, and 2 single beds in the studio area. 1 bathroom, which isn't ideal with 3 teenagers.
Staff were great. Location was excellent. That's why we stayed here. Within walking (10 min) to Acropolis entrance.
Parking was an experience. Drove around block of hotel 4x until I could park.

Almost a perfect stay! The hotel truly has an incredible location, offering quick access to a lot of restaurants, and sites. The staff was very kind and the breakfast was good.

Unfortunately,we got bitten by a bedbug which we found and killed on our bed during our second night at the hotel.

Hoping the administration takes the necessary measures to inspect and sanitize the rooms properly. And a reminder to travellers to always check your rooms no matter where you go.

Wonderful position at less than 5 minutes walk from the Akropolis and the lively nearby area where very good restaurants are waiting for you.
Rooms are a bit small but clean and comfortable and the bathroom is bigger than you would expect.
Staff is very kind and gentle and shows a genuine will to help make your stay better.
Defnitely the hotel of choice for short stays in Athens.

It is a very nice hotel, and the rooms are clean. There is no reception, but they provide you with very good information, and you do not encounter any problems. We were satisfied during our stay. Having coffee in the courtyard was quite enjoyable. There is a street market set up on the street where the hotel is located. It happened on Friday during our stay, but I'm not sure if it's there on other days. Because of the market, you might wake up a bit early on Friday due to the noise from the stalls being set up.

They said not to use internet but buy from website. I ended up paying $150 more. I was so annoyed and they tried to offer a crap explanation, but saw through their BS. Very tired. Light bulbs out. Black hair in bath plug hole. Front door like Fort Knox very difficult to open, their attention to detail is very poor and would definitely not recommend it. Left a very sore and bitter taste in my mouth
We were only there for one night but they were very friendly and very attentive to our needs. We were able to walk to the Acropolis.

This was my very first time in Greece(Sept 2022) and I was alone. I couldn’t have  picked a better place to stay! First, the hotel was quiet and clean. Second, it was within walking distance to many of the sites or a short taxi ride(Acropolis was an 8 minute walk tops). But what set this hotel apart, was how wonderful Konstantinos was! He did a great job communicating with me before I arrived. And when I did arrive, he sat down with me to let me know where to go and where not to go. He gave AMAZING recommendations for area bars, bakeries, and restaurants. Lastly, he set up cab rides for me whenever I needed them. Seriously, my stay was perfect here. I believe he is the reason why I am dying to go back to Greece. You will not be disappointed with this location, trust me, especially if you are traveling solo.

I stayed in the Blue Lilly room in Oct 2023. Beautiful well kept property. I was very happy, enjoy every minute I was there. Great location, food and restaurant everywhere! Mr K the host was fabulous! Loved my stay, miss it now!!!

Stayed at the Acropolis View for 3 nights before heading off to the Greek Islands. The hotel was clean, breakfast was good, and the rooftop views were excellent. The front desk staff were great, provided good insights into the city and answered any questions we had. The room was small but the bed was comfortable. The hotel is about a 10-15 min walk to all the hot spots, which we did a few times per day! We walked back to our hotel at 2AM one night and felt quite safe.

The BEST location for easy access to the Acropolis and museum in a quiet setting.  Great and extremely helpful staff.  Low traffic making for lower noise setting.
Rooftop dining and seating area offers a beautiful view of the Acropolis and city

Exceptional views of The Acropolis. The rooms were modern, very clean, the rooftop facilities (viewing The Acropolis and breakfast) were airy and bright. The staff, particularly on reception, were exceptional. We stayed there on 30 Sept/1 Oct 2024 and would be our first pick again when staying in Athens.

Absolutely fantastic stay. Staff was very helpful and hospitable. They provided a map and restaurant recommendations. 24hr bar is a plus. The view of the acropolis at night is spectacular. They even made us breakfast boxes and cappuccinos at 6am since we had to leave for the airport early. Thank you!

Stayed here for 4 nights while in Athens. Rooms are small but very comfortable. Beds are VERY comfortable. Our room had a queen size and twin bed with a patio facing the back. When making reservations make sure your room has a balcony. Not all rooms have a view of the Acropolis. Staff is incredible - welcoming, attentive, answer all your questions and take care of any need. Location is perfect…just a few minutes walking distance to the Acropolis, Plaka, and other choice locations.  Price is worth it and very reasonable. Roof-top patio has an incredible view of the Acropolis. Breakfast buffet is awesome. I would definitely stay here again on my next trip to Athens. Thank you!

Nice hostel, it’s small and the atmosphere is really cool. The location is good, you can walk to the city center and you can also take the bus. We had an amazing welcoming and lot of advices (thanks to you George you’re amazing). I recommend this place, people are lovely !

A very cool spot just outside of the city centre. The hang out social space is awesome for cooking and getting to know the rest of the guests and closes at an appropriate time to allow everyone to sleep comfortably.

The staff were very helpful and welcoming. George and Terry were always up for a chat and full of information and ideas about Athens and life in general.

I stayed for 3 nights at the end of a cycle tour through Greece and it was the perfect way to finish my trip. The rooms were well set up, had plenty of fans and locker space. Bathrooms were clean and there are laundry facilities if you need them.

I highly recommend this place and will be visiting again!

I recently stayed at this hostel in Athens, and overall, it was a pleasant experience. The place was cozy, friendly, and exactly as described online. Most of the staff were kind and helpful, but I had an uncomfortable experience with one employee named George.

George seemed to have a habit of drawing attention to himself, interrupting guests, and engaging in what felt like a strange flirtation with younger female guests. While these behaviors were off-putting, the situation that most affected my rating occurred on my last day.

A girl had fainted in the kitchen, and I stayed to help her until the emergency patrol arrived. George, however, insisted that I leave the room. I understand that the kitchen was small and crowded, so I eventually complied. However, the way he demanded it was disrespectful and abrupt, which made me feel unappreciated despite trying to help.

When I was leaving the hostel, George approached me at the exit door, and we began discussing what had happened. I calmly explained that his attitude might discourage guests from returning. In response, he violently slammed the heavy metal door in my face. While I can understand reacting emotionally in a stressful situation, such violence is inexcusable.

I initially planned to give this hostel a 4-star rating, but due to this incident, I’m giving it 2 stars instead. I hope George takes the time to work on managing his emotions and avoiding such aggressive actions in the future.

I’ve stayed in over a hundred hostels during my travels, and this is the first time I’ve ever experienced something like this.

Great hostel! Easy to get to with public transport or walking from the centre of Athens. The staff are super friendly, approachable and easy to talk to. Rooms are clean and it’s not noisy at night. Would definetly stay here again!!!

one of the best hostels i’ve stayed at. The staff really makes the place. Me and my friend stayed over a year ago and still regularly wonder how george and terry are doing. (hence why i’m leaving this review)

AMAZING FUN SAFE WELCOMING,, warm vibes all around

Nice details!!! A little chocolate on your pillow, Nescafe, tea, drinks, air freshener, everything new, well thought out, I liked it. The wifi works perfectly, the hot water wonderful, the mattress divine. Cons, the bathroom gets all wet and when you come back in after showering, it's a disaster.
Good for the price. A bit far from centre

I stayed at the Poseidon Residence in Athens with my friends.
The flat was very nice and the landlords helped with minor problems within hours. The location is very central and the kitchen has most of what you need. We felt very comfortable and would come back again.
We had a wonderful time. The accomodation is spacious and clean, and within walking distance of most of the main sites of Athens.
It's in a walking distance from the centre. There was some issue with the cleanliness - it could be much better. Free parking is available on the streets around the block.

Rooms look great, very cosy atmosphere in the backyard - everything was wonderful 😍
Our host Carolina is a very nice person ☺️ Thank you for all your advices! All questions were answered:)
Highly recommended!
Great place to stay,  I highly recommend it !

We had a really good time at Irene's apartment! It's clean, spaciouse apartment for 2 people, very well equipped, there was everything you need like coffee machine, toaster, equipements for cooking. The neighbourhood is calm and safe! The hisotrical city center is half an hour walk. The metro line 2 is a 5 minutes walk. Irene was really communicative and helpful! The self check-in and out is easy to handle!

We had the three room apartment on the first floor with balcony, perfectly equipped kitchen and living room. Everything was clean and nicely arranged. The elevator was appreciated for the luggage. Only 5 min from metro station an 1 min from bus stop line 227, the apartment was perfectly quiet during the night, when windows were closed. Very efficient mosquito defence for all windows. 20 min to Akropolis by metro, 30 min by foot. Irene was very kind and helpful with our questions and needs. Thank you very much for this pleasant stay.

Nice accommodation and a warm welcome from Greece:) Irene was super nice and eager to help with any questions about my stay here in Athens. Facilities were well equiped and i was surprised to see a wine in the dining room☺️and it was so great to have prepared icy water in the refrigerator after one hot long trip back from the outside!

We enjoyed two weekends at Casa D'Irene rustic appartment. There's plenty of space, so you feel like at home. By the way, it's full of details, like the wine everyone mentions. Irene also makes everything easy to help you with your stay.
The area is very quiet, and although it may look a bit scary at night, seems to be safe, at least, we didn't have any trouble, and we could see other people walking alone, and didn't look worried at all.
It's very well connected by metro line, and quite close to the city center, so you can get to the Achropolys in about 20 minutes on foot.
We are really happy to have chosen it for our visit to Athens!

A cozy and very nice appartment, located a bit away from strickt city center of Athens, is a very quality choice in case you are looking for staying in appartment during your holidays or other obligations you may have in this ancient Greek city. The apartment has two bedrooms, quite nice balcony (with a street view), bathroom with bath, and spacious living room presented together with kitchen. The appartment is clean and has all neccessary equipment for comfortable stay and cooking, together with some food items and spices you can use right away with your meals preparation - the owners are very accessible and open and are in general taking care that in appartment is all that is needed - a nice welcome touch from them is also presented as gift for newcomers in a form of a bottle of home made wine.
Otherwise, the appartment is just 350 m away from the nearest metro station (there is also a bus option), so the journey to other spots in city is simple and not far from main city attractions. In neighbourhood you can find bakeries and small shops with basic food and other basic equipment, while for those who are more demanding, the visit to supermarket would be essential - unfortunately there is no larger supermarket in vicinity of appartment, so you will have to search for it within at least 10 - 15 min walking distance.
The appartment is otherwise in the building on the first floor, and is easy accessible by stairs or by elevator, while the main entrance in the building itself is however a little bit clumsily, especially for people with disabilities, who could have some difficulties with entering to building.
The apartment has also an AC unit and free WiFi system.
In general, highly recommended for staying if you do not mind to not be in strickt city center of Athens.

DO NOT BOOK HERE. In addition to most of these photos being fabricated, the listing lies outright about the availability of WiFi. This is not a hostel, but an apartment crammed with as many beds as possible. It is dirty and dark, there is no lockbox, no towels, no evidence that the bathroom has been cleaned in the last 6 months, and the bed I stayed in was so jammed into the room that my head was next to the door handle that opens out into the street. The proprietoress is an opportunistic grifter with no interest in hospitality, only making money off tourists and young kids who don’t know better. If you are unfortunate enough to be dissatisfied with these conditions, you will not get your money back.

Had an amazing time here. Staff was so friendly and helpful. Pretty easy to get from hostel to center of city with busses. Very close to cafes and restaurants. Amazing views of the sea/ aegina island and also the surrounding mountains. Beds were very comfy and everything was kept very clean regularly.

Most of the times reception is deserted. Beds in dorms are uncomfortable and without any blankets. We were charged 6 euros only for waiting for an hour and not allowed access dorm beds.  Staff hardly speaks English. Washrooms are very uncomfortable to use with indefinite hot water.
Good place to stay as it is very near to the city centre. But there is no air conditioner here. So, think twice if you are looking for a dormitory with an air conditioner in the summer.

only on certain parts of the building
Cleanliness is not good
television old model and hubby have only one room is not smart tv

Prices jumped while booking, pictures aren't what you get, no one is there to show you around they just leave the key somewhere.

Untill I walked in I was sure we are going to be alone in the apartment but it's shared kitchen and bathroom

Didn't liked it

Cosy place in the peaceful part of Athens. Very comfortable check-in, check out. Close to public transport. Quiet, I didn't really hear and meet the neighbors. There are number of little cafes, boulangeries and restaurants in the neighborhood.
Classy and quiet

The good: Big appartment in an amazing location very close to the metro, coffee shops and markets. We never interacted with anyone and it everything was easily talked via chat. We were given codes to enter both the building and the apartment. They even booked a transfer for us from the airport (it's expensive as the airport is very far, but if arriving late at night, it's a blessing).

The bad: - Most of the times the code to open the apartment door wouldn't work. The first time it opened after 5min but the next days stopped working. I had to contact via booking to find a solution which was very quick even late at night.
- There's a key in a lockbox protected by a code. This code was inserted already!! Major security breach. Of course someone from outside would have to get into the building and know there's a key but still, felt unsafe after knowing that so I randomised the code and notified the hotel.
- The bathroom was not very clean. We found some hairs on the floor and even a contact lens... 🙄
- There's a stereo speaker connected... Apparently anyone can connect via Bluetooth. We thought it was off but it wasn't. At 5am some funny people decided to connect to it and blast music, which scared us a lot. Now we laugh at it but wasn't funny when it happened.

These few issues could have been isolated and only happen once but we're enough to bring the rating down but I WOULD comeback there if we comeback to Athens as overall it was good!

Great stay!!!! Clean, spacious and comfortable apartment, very close to the subway and within walking distance from major tourist attractions; it took us 25' to get to the Acropolis on foot. Very good air-conditioning, new home appliances, awesome mattress and the best of all; free access to the jacuzzi and sauna area on the 5th floor!! We are definitely coming back!!!

Everything was great! The room was comfortable and fully equipped, close to metro station and shops. The staff was very kind and helpful, and room was super clean. What else to ask for? We will be back on our next trip to Athens for sure!!!

One of the best accomodations I have been in.

The apartment looks way smaller on the pictures so you will really be suprised on how big it is.

There are literally no issues with the apartment.
It has a jacuzzi which is available to all Tennant's which was great and had.some privacy in.

It's all accessible by codes that you receive which is amazing as this really supports the current pandemic issues we have.

The house was really clean.
The staff was extremely nice and helped a lot.
Overall great experience 💛
Perfect stay, building full automated, clean and value for money! Staff everything that i needed reply to my messages and calls! Ill come back soon, see you and thanks for everything

Great place near cafes and restaurants but still very quiet. So clean and luminous.The owner take care of every details that make a stay comfortable,we found everything we needed. Nice terrace and view and Chrissa is a nice and warm person.
Amazing place and good host. Though breakfast could have been much better.
Nice n comfort stay

New modern loft with details, nothing is missing, completely renovated, penthouse with views, everything new, small mini kitchen, but with the essentials, located in a quiet residential neighborhood, next to the stadium, 15 minutes walk from the center along a very pleasant, illuminated and very safe walk, in the area where the loft is located there are restaurants, supermarkets and all kinds of services, so if you decide to stay and enjoy the penthouse after dinner, you will not need to go downtown.
The Sintagma metro is the best stop.
The owner is very professional and goes out of her way to help her guests.

Small room but ideal for two people with a view of the acropolis, the treatment has been very good, although the best of the whole neighborhood where it is located, very young atmosphere and the Greeks themselves.

The apartment was in a great location. Beautifully decorated with everything I needed. The building is clean with a great gym.  Eva was the best! She helped with arrangements to all the sites I wanted to visit and recommended a few I didn’t know about. She is very responsive and great to talk to. I will definitely stay here again on my next trip to Athens.

I have been to Athens twice and have stayed in the apartments both times and have loved it! It is walking accessible to so many places and great amenities. The host is very attentive to any needs that may arise. I will definitely be staying here every time I visit Athens!

We had a wonderful stay at the apartment in Athens. We are very grateful to our host, Eva, for her attention, the cleanliness of the apartment, and her warmth. The place had everything we needed and is in a perfect location, with everything close by. I will definitely stay here again next time I’m in Athens!

This review is for those travelers who are looking for a home-like stay in Athens then this is the place to be in. It's clean, peaceful, spacious, comfortable, safe and the best part about this place is the amazingly quick & kind responses from the host, Eva. We have also been sending so many of explorers to this place and all of them recommended it. This is how the service should be when you're visiting an unknown destination but you are welcomed as family by the host here. I would like to take this opportunity to thank Eva for her approachable attitude and for always being so careful and helpful with our people. Much love & respect to the entire team of Olympus Residence, especially Eva and thank you for being so amazing! Cheers!

Excellent location for a few days in Athens.  The apartment is in a residential area, and therefore is very quiet.  There are grocery stores and restaurants within 10 minutes' walk.  The apartment is spacious, the air conditioning works well, and the beds are comfortable.  Check in was an easy experience.

Amazing place to stay while you enjoy Athens.  Very friendly helpful owners (2 brothers) who went out of their way to ensure that all of our needs were met.  Room was large, very clean, and more than spectacular.  Location was great and all the uber rides to get around were less than 10Euros.  excellent food found with 10 minutes walk in most directions.

The room was spacious and very close to the stadium. The only thing is that no clear instructions were given prior checking in with  no reception desk. The apartment is locked and had to ring before getting all information on how to get in which is quite frustrating coming from a long tiring flight. Also, no housekeeping in case staying for longer days.

Lovely apartments in the heart of Athens with everything you need for a short stay in the city. The apartments are located in a quiet inner courtyard, and the place is run by friendly people. I would definitely come back here!

Athens green apartments is run by 2 brothers (very nice men) who are artists themselves. In addition to the fact that the entire building is rented out to artists who can also give their own specific touch to the building, there are about 6 top-furnished rooms in various sizes. Beautiful building and definitely recommended! Good area that is becoming more and more trendy and closer to everything you must see in Athens.

The rooms are very lovely they was clean when we arrived. We was given loads of information on the area by the friendly staff I would highly recommend staying here the location is perfect just outside the busy area so it's not to loud in the evening

Do not order from this store, be careful. they send products in duplicate, but not the ones you ordered in the hope that you will not go through the return process, filling in a product return form, etc. This form is definitely impossible to fill in because it is disabled
Best city hotel in Athens! Great rooftop with acropolis view and a great atrium space on the ground floor to enjoy your coffee! Highly recommended

This was a great place to stay and the location is unbeatable! They were able to set up an airport departure transfer as well who was right on time. I highly recommend staying here if you’re in need of a convenient and affordable spot for your visit!

Rooms tend to be on the low side. Basic accommodation (depends also what room you booked). The location is perfect, near Pagrati, in walking distance for all tavernas and attractions in Athens. The street is very quiet, no noise from the main avenue. I think the rooms and the beds might need a refresh but in the end is not a bid deal breaker

We stayed 4days and 3nights on Pi Athens they were very kindfull and interested with us. Sokratis helped us for shuttle he adviced some good restaurants and gave us maps of athens etc. They have pretty basic breakfast. Rooms very clean and usefull not too big but enough for tourists. Hotel near to everywhere we visited all archeological sites by walking we are impressed and leave very happy thank you for everything from Cyprus.
Poor  hotel, from the room on 1st floor there wasn´t any direct daylight. Breakfast was in the basement and  very simpel. One thing was top and that's the location.

Great balcony view of the Acropolis
Wondeful place to sit.
Apartment had everything needed incl washing machine, fridge, iron and cooking things.

Host helpful.
Bedroom nice and comfortable. Bathroom very nice.
Kitchen and living room are very small but you are coming here for the Balcony living space really.

What an horrible experience… The manager’s communications skills are lacking, to say the least. More importantly, our booking was cancelled by the manager before the agreed upon meeting time at the property. No calls, no messages. Just a closed door after a 8 hrs flight. There are great hotels in Athens, anyone of them is a better than this one.
Couldn't stay in a nicer apartment
A nice view of Acropolis !!!

Μικρό σχετικά προσεγμένο με όμορφο μπαλκόνι με θέα την Ακρόπολη.
Περισσότερο όμως για καλό καιρό ώστε να μπορείς να καθίσεις έξω.
Εύκολη πρόσβαση στο κέντρο σε μια ήσυχη γειτονιά.

Loved this little hotel in the wall!! Don't expect luxury, but expect comfort, warm service, and the perfect location to explore Athens! All the kitties outside loved our leftover sardines, and the staff was so helpful with keeping our luggage safe while we ventured out before our next check-in! Definitely recommend ☺️

A small hotel in a very central location but still totally quiet as the street in front of the hotel is a pedestrian zone. The recepion personnel is extremely friendly and helpful. A breakfast is offered for 7€ which I can fully recommend - it must be ordered the day before.

Very friendly staff, 24hr reception and security cameras so felt very safe.  Rooms are basic but have AC. excellent value for money given the great location to the Stadium, the trolley bus stop is only 5 minutes walk and only 15 mins walk to downtown Athens.

The location and service was excellent. Especially the service! They were so kind and friendly.

Their policy for the rooms is that they hold the room keys when you are out of your room.

Unfortunately, the room we had was not very good... As shown in the pictures, their was no way to lock the door securely for it automatically locked when you closed it. Also the fridge nob had to be kept at a certain position, otherwise the freezer part leaked everywhere. The shower had no place to hold the shower head up high so you had to hold the shower head while washing yourself. And lastly, our AC unit leaked. We turned it on and an hour later while we were watching tv, it leaked, almost like water pouring out of a faucet, onto one of the beds. We went down to the desk asking about it and they had no idea why it was like that, and it was too late for a repairman, so they gave us a bucket for the night. They were very apologetic.

Even though the room was so bad, the service was so so nice. This was a difficult review to write.

Friendliness of the staff, always very open to help, excellent location, very safe, I was not afraid to walk at night as it is surrounded by many restaurants and embassies, 100% recommended, thank you very much for your attention, the only thing I would say is that the showers were very small and it was a little difficult to take a bath.
It was an amazing apartment! I would definitely recommend it! Luxury and classy!
door switches are unique to figure out
Terrible experience! It was like going to a 5 star hotel! I highly recommend it
Very nice spacious place, close to the center, many options for food and drink with easy access even on foot. Suitable for families.
Spacious, bright and clean apartment in the center of Athens!!! Excellent choice and very helpful hostess!!!
I highly recommend! Very clean and comfortable! The hostess very helpful and communicative!
So clean and cosy studio at one of the hot spots of Athens!
I loved my time in this apartment!! ❤️
Beautiful space with refinement! You are close to everything, shopping, nightlife, food. Transport literally at your feet. Excellent hosts in everything we needed!
Very beautiful, well-kept, very clean and aesthetically pleasing space in the center of Pagratio. The hosts are excellent, very friendly, pleasant, and with immediate response.

Flawless and immediate communication with the managers Maki and Elena, spotlessly clean space with minimal details, in a focal point for anyone to wander and enjoy their walk and their food! I highly recommend it!
An excellent apartment- everything you need for a stay is available,  it is immaculately clean, supermarkets close by and on trolleybus route nr 4.
Great place to stay in Athens.
Large and well-equipped apartment. One and a half km from the historic center, reachable via various bus lines. Advised
Clean, spacious and comfortable.
Very cool
Great apartment. Although older equipment and furniture, everything is fully functional and equipped. Accommodating host.
Cozy place, good host and cute apartment. Of the minuses - noise insulation is terrible and problems with hot water (only one evening)

Apartment offered for short term rental in the center of Athens in the area of ​​Pagratio. It is located in the basement of an elevated apartment building and is completely renovated. Its space is relatively small but very functional. It can comfortably accommodate 2 people and has everything you need. It is offered at a very good price!!
That will be an amazing stay🔱✨️💎💫🌞
