I had an amazing stay at this Airbnb! The apartment's charming garden was a true heaven, offering a peaceful and relaxing environment that was simply delightful. The cleanliness of the place was impeccable, and the host went above and beyond to ensure I had a comfortable stay. With its convenient location near Athens city center, I was able to explore the city's attractions with ease. I highly recommend this Airbnb to anyone looking for a tranquil and well-located accommodation!

Such a cozy spot! The place was clean, comfy, and had a really nice vibe. Great location too – close enough to everything but tucked away in a quiet neighborhood. The host was super helpful and made sure we had everything we needed. Would definitely stay here again!

Secret Garden Downtown exceeded all my expectations! The apartment's enchanting garden created a serene ambiance that instantly made me feel at ease. The cleanliness of the place was remarkable, and the host's warm hospitality made my stay truly special.
Being situated near Athens city center was a huge advantage, as it allowed me to easily explore the city's vibrant atmosphere. I highly recommend this place for a memorable stay!
Lovely place quite centrally located clean safe a
Great place.
Spotlessly clean space, fully equipped, with a unique view.

I had a fantastic stay at Yantra. The property was beautifully decorated and equipped with all the amenities needed for a comfortable stay. The location was perfect, close to local attractions and restaurants.

The highlight of my stay was the host, Apostolos, who was incredibly friendly, always available and went above and beyond to ensure I had everything I needed, making me feel truly at home.

Highly recommend this property for anyone looking for a great place to stay with an exceptional host!
Excellent place nearby downtown, metros, supermarkets museums etc! The best spot for visiting Athens

Avoid getting the bus in Athens unless you really need to!! It honestly was one of the worst experiences of my life, pushed up against the windows the bus was so full, people just kept getting on! No air conditioning & very dirty! Do not recommend! Only plus was that it was free however that was still overpriced for what we had to go through!

I had the opportunity to stay in this rental room for a few days and I can say that it exceeded all my expectations. The room was perfectly clean, spacious and very well equipped, with all the amenities one would need for a comfortable stay.

The bed was extremely comfortable, offering a restful sleep, while the room decor was warm and thoughtful. The space had natural lighting and gave a sense of calm and relaxation, which we greatly appreciated after our activities during the day.

The location is ideal, with easy access to local attractions, shops and restaurants. In addition, the neighborhood is quiet, which adds to the sense of calm and safety.

One of the biggest pluses was the friendliness and helpfulness of the owner. He was always available to answer any questions or give suggestions for local places worth visiting.

Overall, this is an excellent choice for accommodation in the area and I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a combination of comfort, location and good service. We will definitely be back in the future!

Our stay at the hotel was excellent! The room was comfortable, clean and tastefully decorated, offering all the amenities we needed for a pleasant stay. The location was ideal, with easy access to the area's points of interest. An added bonus was the bus stop right outside the house, which in just three stops took us straight to Syntagma, making our commute particularly easy and quick.

We would like to thank Christos for his wonderful hospitality. He was always available to help us with anything we needed and made our stay really special. We will definitely be back and highly recommend to anyone looking for an unforgettable experience!

Our stay was perfect! The room was spotlessly clean, comfortable and well equipped. The location is also excellent, with a bus stop outside the house that takes you to Syntagma in three stops. Many thanks to Christos for his excellent hospitality. We will definitely come again!
The room was fantastic, very clean and very beautiful! The one who had the back was very good! Well done

Clean apartment with fridge, hob, oven, air conditioning,...
No cleaning service but sheets and towels provided.
The location is very good: restaurants for all tastes, real Greek district, plenty of places to park all around...
Too bad the bathroom is too small but hey, we don't spend the day there...
Good communication with the establishment which manages the apartments (following vouchers not received, they must be returned to me quickly).
Autonomous and super fast entry...
Very small bathroom and the water comes out everywhere when you want to shower which is a negative point, the location is a little far from the center
Excellent!!!

Immaculate apartment, clean, in a very convenient location, close to transport, shops, restaurants, supermarkets, quiet, fully equipped, suitable for singles, couples, etc.
Highly recommended.

A wonderful place. Clean great bed and nicely air conditioned. The service was excellent and the location was conveniently  located within simple walking distance to local transit routes. 5 stars in all things in my opinion.

I checked in a couple of hours ago and I totally regret the money I paid. There is nothing loudly wrong but this place is in what is now considered a bad neighborhood. The apartment is relatively clean but everything is so cheap inside,  the facilities are not as described and the photos are deceptive. Despite the high prices they charge it is evident they are cheapskates. The toilet paper is from lidl, the linen probably the same the towels are worn out, there is not gym and well being facility as they advocate on their website. They do not even have two cups for a two person's apartment. As for the soap it should come with a warning. To summarize the whole place sounds now we got your money enjoy. No complains accepted as there is nobody around. This place should be half the price in my opinion and definitely it is not 4 star accommodation.

It was the worst stay ever. The emplacement is horrible, it is too far from everything, you have to walk at least 30min or better yet rent a véhicule to visit anything. We stayed over a week and the cleaning service would only come once a week even if we didn't have cleaning supply to make up for it. The bathroom smelt really bad so they must had a sewer' issue and the door of our shower was badly glued so there were water everywhere when we showered. The chambers are either facing the road or the elementary school so it is noisy. And to top it off EACH morning they doing works on the top floor. I wouldn't recommand

Worst possible experience. We were promised and paid a bigger room and got another smaller room for four persons. The communication was bad. We got the details while we were driving there 1 hour before check in. There was no code to check in at the main door. There was only one magnetic card for four persons. Overall very unorganized. I would not recommend to anyone.

The location is awful, every touristic places are in 1h on feet.
The worst thing, the NIGHTMARE was the work/repairs. You can hear the drill at 8 AM. It's not even a joke. It lasted during our whole stay (10 days). It's totally disrespectful, non professional. They should warn us before coming or at least give us a discount because I wasn't aware of that.
The whole 4th floor is under work so it'll last very long.
They clean the rooms every five days lol, you live in the dirt for a few days.

Change the hotel while you can. ASAP.

It’s a perfect place with a fantastic 360 degree balcony. Very calm area and 15 min to walk to syntagma. The airbnb is very clean and new. I really love the modern bath. I would come definitely again.
Great airbnb, clean, tool set up
Excellent choice for accommodation in Athens! Unique professional service, incredible large modern spaces, huge roof overlooking the Acropolis and the sea, truly a gem in Pagrati behind Kallimarmaro!
New building, comfortable accommodation. I recommend this place.
Spacy and wonderfull apartment next to all you need for a lovely vacation in Athen. We‘ve been for a four day trip in this apartment with two families - seven person. Totally recommendation.
A beautiful apartment, well maintained, spacious and clean.
Great place for big familly or group od friends 20 minutes from downtown. We was here (5 adults 2 teenagers 1 Chile) for 3 nights and have everething to live.
Best place to stay. Clean and beautiful

A tricky one this.... we stayed in the ground floor, rear flat, the cheapest one. We were after value, as the plan was to spend most of the day out sightseeing.

First, the things the flat does well:
Immaculately clean.
Comfortable bed.
Air-con works well.
Secure.
Shower works well.

The down-side is:
Immediate location is unsuitable for anyone with any mobility issues (steps in all directions), and is a bit run down.
The flat has one window in the bedroom, none in the bathroom, kitchen or second room. There is nothing the owner can really do about this, but it meant the place felt a bit dark at times.
Dodgy wiring and plumbing - everything worked, but there were plenty of weird looking botch jobs in strange places.

It served its purpose, but I cannot help but think that if I had to spend more than a few hours awake in it, it would quickly become unpleasant.

Just had an awesome stay in Athens! The apartment was super cozy and clean.

Loved the convenient location – it was close to everything, making it easy to explore the city.
Host was great and ready with helpful tips about the area. The communication was a breeze, and he was quick to respond to any questions I had.

Overall, a top-notch experience that made my business trip to Athens even more memorable.

Highly recommend it!
Thanks, Andreas!

Very cosy apartment, perfect for two couples. The only thing it can be improved is the bathroom (curtain, towel holders etc)
It’s 15-20minutes from the shopping streets , 30 minutes to the Acropolis and 5 minutes to the Olympic Stadium. The Access is with stairs. We liked this apartment. I recommend it.

UNACCEPTABLE!They cancelled my booking 3 hours before check in without any contact!they confirmed normally from the day before our reservation and we  didn't even spoked to them (to ask smth)so they have no excuses!we was already on the go so we forced to find a new accommodation last min and more expensive.also we paid for the booking and had to find extra 150€ for the new apartment because the money needs days to return to your account!
*My reply to your reply is:
- I made the reservation the day before arrival,you confirmed it and you canceled 3 hours before check in time!
-if your rooms are available in Booking.com for reservation it doesn't matter when the customer will book,so stop saying this
-because you didn't like my comment you threaten me through DM on Booking.com
-you never contact me to ask me for a late check in to have time for your maintenance so imagine how we felt when Booking.com inform us that our reservation was cancelled when we already was on the way to Athens!
Very beautiful, clean and new apartment, great spaces with luxury interior design. Ideal location with walking distance to city centre's attractions. Highly recommend it.

The apartment is located on the 0th floor and is relatively dark. There are daily necessities and spare towels, complete household appliances, and the surrounding transportation and life are very convenient.
A beautiful, cozy city with antiquities and nice shopping streets and lovely terraces.

This short term rental flat in Athens was perfect for our stay for two people. The location was fantastic, right in the heart of the city with easy access to all the major attractions. The flat was clean, cozy, and had everything we needed for a comfortable stay. The host was very responsive and provided us with great recommendations for restaurants and things to do in the area. Overall, we had a wonderful experience and would highly recommend this Airbnb flat to anyone looking for a convenient and charming place to stay in Athens.

Beautiful, colourful and spacious apartment decorated with fun little details. It is equipped with high quality appliances. The host was very accommodating and responsive. Pangrati is a lively neighborhood full of nice cafes, bars and restaurants very close to the center.
Amazing apartment conveniently located and fully refurbished. Super accommodating and helpful host.

Great appartment in Athens. Perfect for a family or a group of friends. The roof top is amazing with a view to Akropolis. There’s plates and wine glasses for more than 6, really a plus for a Big family. There’s also candles and everything you need when staying in Athens.
Great location, highly recommended.

We stayed in apartment 6, the building is well presented and stylish on entry. Our apartment was a good size and the terrace was a nice bonus, a good addition would be a full length mirror in the room as there's only one in the bathroom. The room was comfortable and we were really pleased with our stay. The apartment had everything we needed and was lovely and clean on arrival.
We had booked the apartment for 5 nights and our only miscommunication was that they don't clean the rooms/refresh towels unless you request this, which we didn't know so were disappointed this hadn't been done. However I messaged the owner and he corrected this immediately, brought us fresh towels and arranged a clean for the following day. So definitely request this if that's something you'd want.
Location was perfect, a short walk to a lot of attractions and popular areas and not too far from the airport either.
The Peruvian fusion restaurant nearby (Huaca Nikkei Resto Bar) was amazing too, definitely recommend.
Antonis the owner was very friendly and so helpful, especially when we realised we had left some valuable items in the drawers once we had checked out and he got them and shipped them to us, we're very grateful! Thank you so much!

The best place to live in Athens.

Amazing rooms - amazing staff.

Kind Regards,

Theodoros

This is a fabulous remodeled structure in a very cool part of the Mets neighborhood. The apartment we stayed in was well provisioned, clean, and tastefully designed. The owner was very gracious and responded right away. I would highly recommend staying here as a couple, family, or group of friends.
Very good accommodation! Close to city center, quiet area.

Fantastic apartment, only thing it was missing was a toaster oven. The terrace outside was so nice to sit and relax at, barely spent any time inside when I was home. Not very noisy at all aside from basic city noise.
Stellar location and view! Great local eats nearby, easy to walk to the major attractions (like Plaka area). Recieved great and very detailed recommendations from Paula/Billy! Would highly recommend.

Wow, wow, wow. What a VIEW. 😍 We stayed for four nights at Billy & Paula’s, the perfect base for exploring beautiful Athens. From the moment we booked we had proactive communication, Billy and Paula provided all the information we could ever need and were always on hand throughout the trip if we needed to know anything. The apartment was exactly as described, easy to get to and into, it is tiny but had absolutely everything we needed for our stay, we couldn’t have asked for anything better. It’s about 20-30 minute walk to the Acropolis, similar to Lycabettus (busy but beautiful for a sunset) and we even walked up to Kaisariani Monastery and further up to Taxiarchon Monastery from the apartment (perfect sunset view for those that like hiking from the lookout tower Pyrophylákio) but the balcony provided an equally as magnificent view. Watching the sun rise over the acropolis from the bed, what a privilege. Thank you for letting us stay and for being the bestest hosts! ✌️ ❤️
Paula is the best host I ever met. The view over Athens is incredible. The apartment was clean and the location is perfect.

The perfect spot to fall in love again in Athens!

The place is a unique spot in Athens, possibly the most unbelievable view you will ever have from the Parthenon and the sunset falling behind it. Small that’s a fact, but there is nothing else you need if you are looking forward to have an epic time in the city. All amenities are there for you to use, from place to cool to a tv for the movie nights. I would say the best in fact is the view from its unique balcony, the best spot to collect your thought, have an epic brunch with someone you love or just enjoy the landscape while having a hearing music.

Definitely will be back soon!

The best apartment to live in short term. Amazing view of Parthenon and really connected as it is located in the heart of Athens. I spent there a month doing home office in the balcony enjoying this view. Definitely i will be back soon.
Last but not least excellent hospitality!!!
Clean and comfortable apartment, in a quiet area of ​​Athens. Close to Syntagma, Kallimarmaro and Evangelismos. I highly recommend it.
Tasteful, central, quiet, spotlessly clean!
Great Place, wondertull neigborhood
Good, comfortable apartment in a very central location. Nice neighborhood, pedestrian streets, small restaurants, bars.

Nice hostel, it’s small and the atmosphere is really cool. The location is good, you can walk to the city center and you can also take the bus. We had an amazing welcoming and lot of advices (thanks to you George you’re amazing). I recommend this place, people are lovely !

A very cool spot just outside of the city centre. The hang out social space is awesome for cooking and getting to know the rest of the guests and closes at an appropriate time to allow everyone to sleep comfortably.

The staff were very helpful and welcoming. George and Terry were always up for a chat and full of information and ideas about Athens and life in general.

I stayed for 3 nights at the end of a cycle tour through Greece and it was the perfect way to finish my trip. The rooms were well set up, had plenty of fans and locker space. Bathrooms were clean and there are laundry facilities if you need them.

I highly recommend this place and will be visiting again!

I recently stayed at this hostel in Athens, and overall, it was a pleasant experience. The place was cozy, friendly, and exactly as described online. Most of the staff were kind and helpful, but I had an uncomfortable experience with one employee named George.

George seemed to have a habit of drawing attention to himself, interrupting guests, and engaging in what felt like a strange flirtation with younger female guests. While these behaviors were off-putting, the situation that most affected my rating occurred on my last day.

A girl had fainted in the kitchen, and I stayed to help her until the emergency patrol arrived. George, however, insisted that I leave the room. I understand that the kitchen was small and crowded, so I eventually complied. However, the way he demanded it was disrespectful and abrupt, which made me feel unappreciated despite trying to help.

When I was leaving the hostel, George approached me at the exit door, and we began discussing what had happened. I calmly explained that his attitude might discourage guests from returning. In response, he violently slammed the heavy metal door in my face. While I can understand reacting emotionally in a stressful situation, such violence is inexcusable.

I initially planned to give this hostel a 4-star rating, but due to this incident, I’m giving it 2 stars instead. I hope George takes the time to work on managing his emotions and avoiding such aggressive actions in the future.

I’ve stayed in over a hundred hostels during my travels, and this is the first time I’ve ever experienced something like this.

Great hostel! Easy to get to with public transport or walking from the centre of Athens. The staff are super friendly, approachable and easy to talk to. Rooms are clean and it’s not noisy at night. Would definetly stay here again!!!

one of the best hostels i’ve stayed at. The staff really makes the place. Me and my friend stayed over a year ago and still regularly wonder how george and terry are doing. (hence why i’m leaving this review)

AMAZING FUN SAFE WELCOMING,, warm vibes all around
Good for the price. A bit far from centre

We stayed here for our two nights for the beginning of our trip to explore Greece and its islands.
This space was perfect for our family with three children.
We are used to walking and to get to the city centre to visit the sites was easy to navigate and only took about 25mins.
The cafe right downstairs was a plus!

Chris was amazing through the entire process, preparing us before, assisting with arrangements for a driver to pick us up from the airport and back.
He also provided great tips for the area and was able to accommodate an earlier check in based on their availability.
We would definitely choose to stay here again if we are ever able to make our way back.
The apartments are very well equipped and well located. They are beautiful. I had a very pleasant stay there. I highly recommend them.

An absolute gem this apartment! The stay was perfect with great preparation and communication leading up to the stay. The apartment is located in a wonderful area of Athens with everything easily accessible. The amenities were outstanding and everything very clean with the best hospitality. Thank you!!
We stayed for 3 nights and it was very comfortable, Chris was very helpful with our needs. I would stay again.
Great selection of coffee and breakfast. The staff is super nice and friendly. Would come again :-)

Nice details!!! A little chocolate on your pillow, Nescafe, tea, drinks, air freshener, everything new, well thought out, I liked it. The wifi works perfectly, the hot water wonderful, the mattress divine. Cons, the bathroom gets all wet and when you come back in after showering, it's a disaster.

Super comfy bed, spacious and extremely quiet room with everything that you may need and really nice owner that gave us plenty of info! You can easily walk your way to the center and leave the car parked along the road, totally safe.

**Title: A Jewel in the Athenian Sky: Athens View Loft**

From the moment I arrived at Athens View Loft, I was enveloped in a world of unparalleled charm and comfort. The loft paints a perfect picture of Athenian elegance, with its breathtaking skyline vistas that are more than just photographs—they are a promise of the serenity and beauty that await every guest.

The terrace, a sprawling space adorned with comfortable, high-quality furniture, invites you to unwind and dine under the sky, with a convenient kitchen station that becomes a haven for barbecue enthusiasts in the spring and summer months. It's not just a place; it's an experience, where the vibrancy of Athens meets the tranquillity of a personal oasis.

Stepping inside the loft, you find yourself in a space that redefines cosy. It's intimate, making it ideal for couples or small families. The thoughtful inclusion of a full-service kitchen is a delightful surprise, catering to every culinary need, whether you're a seasoned chef or someone who enjoys the occasional home-cooked meal.

The location of Athens View Loft is nothing short of fantastic. Nestled next to Pagrati, you are at the heart of it all, with a magnificent park and myriad attractions just a stone's throw away. The loft's pet-friendly nature makes it a haven for animal lovers, ensuring that every member of the family, furry ones included, feels right at home.

Above all, the warmth and dedication of the host, Cryssa, add an invaluable dimension to the stay. Her willingness to assist with anything and everything makes you feel not just welcomed but truly cared for.

In summary, Athens View Loft isn't just a place to stay; it's a memory waiting to be cherished, a slice of Athens that you'll carry in your heart forever. Whether you're seeking a peaceful retreat or a base to explore the vibrant surroundings, this loft is a choice you'll not just appreciate, but applaud. A stay here is not just good; it's an embodiment of everything splendid about Athens, wrapped up in the cosy, comforting embrace of a place you can call home.

Very nice place, very clean and well furnished. The host is absolutely professional and very helpful to guide you through the city and recommend best places. The bed is huge ans the terrasse also with a a Fan-Tas-Tic view.

We had a reservation for September 2023. We paid approximately 400 Euros in advance. 2 days before the travel date, I went to the hospital due to an urgent illness, and a decision was made for emergency surgery. I reached the hotel and explained the situation clearly. I guaranteed that I would send all reports and documents if necessary. I requested a postponement or refund of the reservation. However, they said in a very rude and arrogant way that this would not happen. They took all the money and it was not refunded. A new date was not offered.
Money is not everything in life. Sometimes you need to show your human side. I never liked the zero understanding approach to an important issue like illness. People and companies with this understanding should not survive. Therefore, you should definitely avoid establishing a commercial relationship with this hotel.

Probably due to the lack of supervision, apartments are often rented for parties. And in the apartments for two guests, stay companies for 10-15 people. There is no soundproofing and it is not possible to sleep in neighboring apartments course of loud music and drunken screams until 6 am.
Good for night parties, bad for usual stay.

Carpets and walls of rooms were disgustingly dirty . Hotel needs a complete refurbishment . Beds were like sleeping in boards.   I complained to the girl at the desk and was given a plate of fruit and wine as an apology .   But this hotel is definitely not 4 star .

This hotel is good a lot ! the location is conveniently close to all that we wanted on our days in Athens, and the interior and atmosphere of this house is gorgeous! The rooms are cosy The bathroom are GOOD, the water in the bath are wonderfully warm when that is needed, and the breakfast is all okay great also Truely recomendable !

If you want to avoid any disappointments, avoid this hotel when you travel for business.
I have no idea who gave them 4 stars, but I would give them 3 with difficulties.
Breakfast I can rate as even 1 star hotel.
And by any chance, if you have to leave earlier, they will ask you to pay the full reservation, without any understanding that when traveling for business some times the plans are changed rapidly.

Terrible hotel. Really outdated and unkept. The room carpets are disgusting. There is no air-conditioning and the staff were very impolite. This definitely should not be a 4 star hotel. This hotel is also not suited for families.

Positives:
- good location
- pool was good
Negatives:
Everything else
The breakfast was inedible
Rooms were disgusting and bathroom had mould
I was expecting noise as it is close to the airport however the walls are paper thin and you can hear everything on the entire floor
Mattresses are rock hard
Dietary requirements are basically ignored “ask us about dietary allergies” so I asked about gluten free options “no”
Stay somewhere else

Great price, great location, great staff… There is also a restaurant downstairs but I only ate there once. It was really good though and reasonably priced. Though I did see ashtrays in hallways, I did not smell any smoke at all. With the exception of some loud talking from the people across the hall a few times, the place was very quiet. There was a heavy plastic “shade” door(which made the room pitch back in the middle of the day) and a heavy interior sliding glass door that drowned out most of the street noise. The parking situation is pretty bad. It’s in a neighborhood that is all street parking. It’s free and has very few no parking areas which is great but it can be difficult to find spaces. I did not deduct any stars because this is hardly the hotels fault. Just something to keep in mind if you intend to rent a car as I did. To be honest, unless you’re making a day trip at some point, you probably don’t need a car. Everything’s pretty close. I intend to visit again someday and I will absolutely look here first.

We were very disappointed with our room for the 3 day stay! AC didn't work, the very small bathroom fan didn't work, the vent pipe was broke in bathroom causing the whole small room to smell like sewer. We had to open our Slider to air out everything when we came back to the room. The room and the small balcony were in need of many repairs. Just was not a good start to our first Athens vacation. Remember, you get what you paid for!
How true. We would not recommend this place to anyone traveling.
I don't know how it was rated at  3 1/2 stars???

It's worth the money you pay. The hotel is dated and there are deficiencies all around. In one room the fridge did not work and in another the safe didn't work. The street facing rooms can be noisy-- especially if you keep the balcony door open, but there is an A/C unit in the room. Floor surfaces need replacement in and outside the rooms. The rooms are clean and with adequate linens. Friendly service and good breakfast.

Had to change multiple rooms to find the least odorless in terms of smoking, looks like smoking is permitted in the outdated rooms. Toilets and cleanliness are the worst. Would have changed the hotel but I had to stay due to location and proximity to my relatives. 1 star just for the acceptable breakfast and morning Greek coffee.

Our stay at the Grand Hyatt Athens was nothing short of spectacular! The hotel exudes luxury from the moment you walk through the doors. Our room was beautifully appointed, with modern decor and a comfortable bed that made for a restful night’s sleep. The rooftop pool and bar offer breathtaking views of the Acropolis – a perfect spot to relax after a day of sightseeing. The breakfast buffet was outstanding, with a wide variety of fresh, delicious options. What truly set our experience apart was the impeccable service; the staff were attentive, welcoming, and always ready to help. If you’re looking for a luxurious stay with exceptional amenities in the heart of Athens, the Grand Hyatt is the perfect choice!

Wow what a great hotel! The location is ideal it’s out of the busy acropolis area of the city but still close enough to walk to most of the sites if you wanted. They have a complimentary shuttle bus that will take and pick you up to the national gardens area from there you can hit everything pretty easily. We found the food and beverage offerings to be outstanding from the food to the service it was top notch. The breakfast buffet is one of the best I’ve had in Europe, seriously, it’s pretty incredible. The dinner menu is equally amazing it has a little bit of everything even sushi. The views from this place are worth just coming up for a drink but I would definitely eat here again. We also ate downstairs at the bar/lounge which had even more offerings and it was delicious. The service and the food at these places make it one of the better options to eat at in Athens we stopped by a few spots in the city and felt the offerings at the hotel were much better. The hostess at the dinner restaurant 9th floor was very kind she made sure my wife’s birthday was acknowledged which we really appreciated. The food and beverage manager was also very much on top of things we were very impressed with him and his team. The rooms are really nice great balconies with views of the city it was clean and well maintained. Reception was helpful and nice to deal with each time as well as the bell/valet team. When we’re back in Athens we’ll be staying here again for sure.

Thanks for the amazing event at Cyclades Hall yesterday!!! Beautiful and elegant space! The large screen and the high ceiling was giving the feeling of luxury and simplicity at the same time!!! The banquet exquisite, in compliance with the standards of Hyatt!!! But, above all, the employees were the key to the success!! Excellent service, all the staff was extremely polite, helpful and to the point! All the departments, from sales to banquet, from IT to the reception and the concierge! Congratulations to all the people of Grand Hyatt Athens!

What an amazing location!  The hotel is very lovely and the views from the restaurant on the 9th floor AMAZING!  The rooms are extremely ample, clean and the mattress and pillows outstanding.  The staff we encountered were very friendly and helpful. Don’t pass up their restaurants…Best Greek salad ever, breakfast buffet has the largest selection and the food extremely tasty.  Worth the stay for safety, location and service.  Memorable stay!!

For the price you really cannot beat this hotel. It's got a great modern vibe, huge luxurious rooms, and an absolute A+ spa that is free to visit (pool, jacuzzi, sauna, cold plunge etc) - comes in very handy after long days of walking and hiking). Service is really amazing, Erinda at the front desk was so nice and helped us get settled when we arrived a bit early before check-in. You're about 20 minutes from the city center but they have a free shuttle that gets you there and back in 5.

We asked the owner in advance if we could leave our luggage prior to check-in. He told us yes. We arrived in the morning to leave our luggage, after an intense and long trip. The owner greeted us, very angry. I told him that he had told us we could leave our luggage and very reluctantly, he tells us to follow him. In a garage, he tells us to leave our luggage and leave quickly. I urgently needed to go to the bathroom, so l asked him for that. While he looked at us to leave. He told me not very aggressively and shouting, making a gesture with his hands in the shape of a cross, and that we should leave. We left very uncomfortable due to his treatment and waited outside to find somewhere to go to the bathroom. The owner comes out after 10 minutes and tells us to come with him. I thought he was going to lend me the bathroom, but he took us to the top floor of it, to show the view it had of the Acropolis. My partner got upset and asked him again that we were not interested in that, that we had only asked for the bathroom (the owner was trying to be nice and show off the amenities of his apartment), but when my partner asked him that, he got upset and. He rudely took us to the bathroom, while waiting next to the bathroom door for him to enter and exit quickly. I felt very uncomfortable, so without entering, I told him that I did not expect such treatment towards a human being and that it no longer mattered, that we could look for other accommodation. He got so upset that he didn't even let me explain anything to him and started yelling at me to keep my voice down, because other people were sleeping, while he told him that he was speaking softly and couldn't treat me like that. To which he begins to silence me with his finger. When we got down, I told him that he was a terrible person and he waved us off. I called booking, with poor handling and wasting all my cell phone minutes, I still haven't seen them respond to me at such a bad time we are experiencing. His name is Sergio

The shared bathroom on level 2 is very unclean and unhygienic, lots of mould on the ceiling. But for the low price the accommodation is decent and very fine for a short stay. The rooftop is a nice addition with views of the acropolis! :) Also a very nice man who received us at check in.
If you want cheap price this is the accomodation, the room of fine but very poor in cleaning, kitchen is very dirty…has everything but dirty.
The person in charge is really kind and helpful😊 big and comfortables rooms

hospitality 5/5  rooms 5/5 price 5/5  location 100% safe
it is the best.
some will say it is not  perfect clean, but its only 20/night. for its price it is the best it can be.   clean sheets towels the room is clean enough for the money you pay
Well located and comfortable
Dot
Comfortable Apartment in Athens Kallithea is a perfect apartment for a stay in Athens.  Very kind hosts, always ready to help.  Beautiful

Nice spacious budget apartment in a quiet location.

Thanks to the owners for the juice in the refrigerator - it was nice!

There's a lot of space - we've assembled a new scooter)

Knowledgeable, professional and attentive, GYC provides excellent service to all who want to charter a yacht in Greece. They work hard to find your particular needs and make your yacht experience as unique as you are!

Greece Yachts Charters is a 100 % guarantee when it comes to cruising around the Greek Islands and making your dream itinerary come true.
The places we have seen onboard our charter were truly idyllic and beautiful. Our charter itinerary was a dream come true!
Awe inspiring & magical. Thank you GYC! :)
dirty, air condition not working, heavily smelly bathrooms, no storage room, no WiFi (although we paid for it), bad organization,  unfriendly staff, just the skipper was nice
Not helpful at all

When we came in the room there was a smell of cigarettes like someone was smoking a lot in there. I am asthmatic i can’t sleep there, so i called immediately straight to the booking and asked for refund. I didn’t stay in this apartment. They didn’t answer to booking on the request with the refund. They didn’t answer to my messages. The worst experience ever! Room doesn’t look like on the photos they have in the profile and plus you will get a smell of cigarettes in NON SMOKING ROOMS

Been here 3 times. Biggest double room on the upper floor very comfy and alot of space! Big balcony! Everything you need! But sound from rooftop makes it for light sleepers on highest room not great.  Room 103 also beautiful designed....but only thing to mention is it was not so clean. Hairs around and bathroom was smelling like mold :( this hotel is good located, easy checkin without reception, rooms are modern and comfy....but they could work on the cleaning a bit.

Convo 212 is a very nice located place. If you want privacy. This is a good stay. No reception. All goes via phone. Even the payment. They all speak very good English.

+ I had the penthouse. Lots of room. But for 3 persons is best ? (Not 4) you have 2 levels :-)
+ big screen TV and a sofa
+ kitchen

- the road noise. It’s on the free way. For me not a big problem, after all. It’s Athens
- the penthouse. On top of the roof is the airco. If the switch on you hear a humming sound.

In beginning I had issues with warm water. But that was fixed with a phone call.

I even asked for late check out. No problem.
Great stay. Good price. Close to centre

Liked:
- Good location
- fast access to restaurants and supermarkets

Disliked:
- the hosts weren't prepared for my arrival even though they had plenty of days ahead to get the room cleaned up and to prepare my access key

- I had to stay more than half an hour in a phone call with the receptionist to get an access key. Because the key wasn't in the locker in the end I had to take a temporary one.

- at my arrival the room was dusty, finger nails on the floor and smelly and one of the windows wasn't closing properly. Because it is located near a large boulevard the noise from cars and scouters made it impossible to sleep.

- they call the room a studio, but is actually a regular small room where they crowded a a bed, a so called sofa, a desk and kitchen cabinets. When you enter the room you have to pass through a 30-40 cm space between the desk and the bed.

- after a few days the shower drain has blocked and and all the water from the shower got into the room. Me and my wife spent two hours trying to absorb the water with towels. After I called the reception to ask more towels and a mop until somenone will fix the shower, nobody provided extra towels that night. The next day I had to call again for this issues and a receptionist was polite enough to give us another room and he actually made an upgrade for us.

Overpriced and poorly serviced.

Room was of good size but furniture has damages and floor was stained.

I arrived late and had to call many times until someone picked up the line and gave me entrance codes.

Easy check in, rooms are compact but have everything you need, well presented and comfortable. Breakfast is fairly basic but good. The roof top pool and bar is the real selling point, it's lovely. We used this hotel as a relaxing few days before our sightseeing truly began and was perfect for this otherwise would have been a lot of taxis back and forth from the main areas.

The rooms are very modern and well kept. Decent size as well but could be larger. The roof top pool is very nice. It's very busy so it's difficult to get a place to sit in the sun. You really aren't close to anything here and not close to the subway. There are a decent amount of local restaurants to walk to that are very affordable.
I realized after 1 nights stay that they put me in the wrong room. When I spoke to the front desk they said I had to come back to speak to a manger which doesn't make sense to me. I had to come back the next day. I told them that I booked a king size bed and they said that they don't have any available.
I over heads someone having the same issue. It seems they book people with a nicer room and then give them a regular room and don't say anything and don't offer any compensation. That's not a good way to run a hotel.

Short stay in Athens, initially own error when booking, as misdirected on website: Reservation was registered for another location. After discussion we found a compromise, for which we were very (!) grateful.
The hotel, which is still quite new, is very pleasant, the view from the rooftop restaurant is great: thanks to the location halfway between the city centre and the coast, the Acropolis on one side and the sea on the other. The pool above the rooftops is also great, just a little shallow. The staff were courteous. We would love to stay again. And above all, many thanks for the constructive, customer-friendly approach!!!

Loved this hotel. New, modern and clean. Rooms were spacious and comfortable. The rooftop pool and restaurant were very nice and the gym was nice. Not a huge gym, but enough for a workout. The staff were very nice. The location isn't central, but it was easy enough to get an uber. I'd definitely stay here again.

There were some good and some bad points  about this hotel, but overall, we wouldn’t stay there again, especially for the price.

Negative Points:
The location was the biggest letdown. We should have done more research, as there’s nothing within walking distance. It took at least 30 minutes to reach anything near the center, and the area around the hotel was dirty and felt unsafe, especially at night, with homeless and disoriented people in the area. We ended up using taxis for every trip, which cost 7-10 EUR each way, adding around 20 EUR extra to our daily expenses.

The rooms were another disappointment. The first room we booked was so incredibly small that we upgraded to a Premium double room, but even that wasn’t much bigger. After one night, we had to switch rooms again because the walls were so thin, making it feel like we were sharing the space with a stranger. We could hear every word and sound coming from next door. All the rooms we saw were very dark, with no natural light or view. A large building was just 2-3 meters away from the windows. Also, there’s no separate bathroom—the sink is right next to the bed, and the shower is just a step away, meaning the room constantly felt humid. When we moved the armchair, we saw mold on the walls. I also found the smell in the room unpleasant—it had a damp, tobacco-like odor. When I mentioned it to the receptionist, I was surprised to learn that it’s the hotel’s “signature scent,” intentionally used in all the rooms.

The pool area was generally nice, but it felt awkward to be half-naked while people in the restaurant watched, as the dining area and pool are in the same space.

Positive Points:
On the upside, the staff was very friendly and helpful throughout our stay. The gym was well-equipped with high-quality Technogym machines, and the breakfast was fantastic, with a great variety of fresh food, including plant-based milk options like oat and soy, as well as fresh vegetables, fruits, and pastries.

Conclusion:
Overall, given the price (over 1,100 EUR for 4 nights), this hotel did not meet expectations. The location, in particular, was a huge inconvenience, and the quality of the rooms was below what we expected.
Localizado a cerca de 2,5 km fas atrações. Em frente a um super mercado. Muito bem decorado e com uma cozinha equipada e maquina de lavar/secar. Faz falta uma maquina de lavar loiça.

Erta made our stay warm and very inviting, nothing was too much trouble, The rooms were spacious and clean, bathrooms and kitchenette were fully stocked. Very comfy bed and couch and the cafe up the road even delivered breakfast at a discounted rate through a deal PNOĒ has with Peggy Sue. If I could give more than 5 stars I would.
Thanks for having us :)
-Mel

Gorgeous Hotel with a stunning view! The rooms are big and everything is so clean. The staff is super friendly and helpful in any matter. We really enjoyed our stay here and will definitely pick this hotel again for our next visit in Athens!

This place is absolutely fantastic!  Brand new with a modern aesthetic, super clean, and spacious rooms. The staff is outstanding. They were extremely helpful and friendly, always greeting us with a smile and asking what they could do to improve our stay. I'd give them ten stars if I could!

We stayed for three nights and had a great time. The service was excellent; the staff is extremely friendly and goes out of their way to assist as much as possible. There are cafes and restaurants nearby, and the hotel is generally very accommodating! I wholeheartedly recommend it!
Such a beautiful place. Spacious rooms with a connection to a local place (Peggy Sue’s) to deliver a beautiful breakfast to your room

Great location, right between the centre of Athens and the sea. Bus stop 1min from hotel, amazing helpful stuff, they helped us with transport, told us everything important. They also sell bus tickets at the reception. Everything we needed was within 5min, market, bakery, restaurants... Clean modern rooms, quiet neighbourhood, definetely will come back.

Superb!!! Nice clean apartment with very comfortable mattress and minimal decoration. Felt like home. All personnel I met, couldn’t be more helpful, friendly and kind!
I would be happy, to stay there again. Highly recommended!

It was an excellent experience. The people working there were extremely helpful and eager to help with whatever you needed,very well mannered too.Everything was clean and the place was hygienic.Overall I loved the place and I left satisfied.

There are no words for this hotel ! Everything is new, very very clean, the location is just perfect, and the staff very very friendly! They really helped us a lot ! We highly recommend you to stay here if you come to Athens !
Spacious rooms, comfy bed, good room amenities.

Very pleasant apartment!
Clean and comfortable.Quiet place,cool neighbours.
Mr Mike is an incredible host.
Value for money,near the center of Athens (10 minutes).Kallithea is an area with a lot of every kind shops.
Really,a good choice.
I ll visit you again for sure!
Beautiful apartment, fully equipped, clean and well located. The pictures were as shown in reality. It only needs to maintain the bathroom shower and install some electrical points.
Εxcellent communication with the company, the house was spotless and beautiful. I recommend it 100%. Thanks for the great experience!
Although very nice location, next to everything, and the house is excellent. The guys at Gtrip were very knowledgeable.
Exceptional hospitality! Very clean, cosy and great spot!

The small suite 2 was just perfect! Clean, nicely decorated, and fully equipped with everything we needed. The bed was very comfortable, while the location was quiet and close to everything needed. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and would choose it again without a second thought!

5 stars is not enough!!
Thank you very much for the wonderful hospitality. Cleanliness and style dominated every corner of the house. The response to any of our questions or requests was immediate. Your professionalism made us want to choose the same apartment again for our next stay.
Great place to stay! The spaces are spotlessly clean and beautiful! All new and in a central spot to have access to whatever you need.....

Fantastic space with high aesthetics, clean and comfortable.
Very close to the center of Athens.
The host is very helpful. The first Unreservedly.

Terrible experience with the owner of this apartment. They confirmed a check in time at 2 pm. We arrived at 5 pm and the apartment wasn’t ready, the cleaning ladies had just arrived. After having travelled for so many kilometers from Romania, we just wanted to get some rest and the owner was really unprofessional, after confirming a check in time and not having the apartment ready even 3 hours after that time.

We left immediately and booked another apartment in Athens (LUX&EASY Athens downtown apartments)  that turned out to be an amazing one and even cheaper that this one.
They assured us that if we cancel, we would get a full refund, but we only got 50€ from 214€ and of course, the owner stopped responding to our messages. The booking had been paid a month in advance.
We are really disappointed and we don’t recommend this apartment at all. Very unprofessional owner. They just wanted our money and that was it.

AVOID this accommodation.

Very comfortable hotel. Spacious and clean room. The breakfast was amazing for variety and quality. Very useful car parking included (beware of the roof which is very low in the underground levels). Good position if you arrive late into the night at Piraeus port and you need a one night stay before your plane (check in available 24h). I don't know if it's located in a good position to reach the center

Try to avoid at all costs. The hotel is located in one of the worst locations (nothing around the hotel except strip clubs) and the rooms are extremely dirty. I had to stay here only for a few hours ahead of my flight and I truly regret not booking another place. The staff is also not very friendly which I found to be quite rare compared to anywhere else across Greece.

Although this place was recently renovated it happens to be located in a section of Athens surrounded by strip bars and studios as they call them here. We booked this trip through Costco and I’m kicking myself about not doing a little more homework. The housekeeping department in my view after three nights has a lot to learn. No face cloths, one bath towel for two guest, they don’t replenish the soap or toilet paper and a toilet that ran all day and night. The bedding has a flat sheet over the mattress pad and no top sheet. Just a comforter? Room is very small. My advice would be look in another direction for booking a hotel.

20 to 30 mins ride from the main attractions. Beautiful to look at, but beds in the suite were uncomfortable for all 3 of us. The front desk staff was nice when we arrived, but not as helpful the next day.

I stayed here for one night prior to my cruise which is the reason I was able to tolerate it. Had my stay been longer my family and I would have gone elsewhere. The check in staff was friendly but the breakfast staff was rude and clearly hated her life as if she woke on the wrong side of the bed. She would not accommodate families sitting together in open empty tables and was extremely nasty without providing any explanation. It seemed as though she was only catering to the Greek tourists. The rooms are TINY and NOISY. The windows don’t have a good seal in any room as my family had occupied 5 rooms in total and each room had loud traffic noises emitting from
Every window as if they were open. My bathtub was arranged so awkwardly that it was impossible to shower without getting water outside of the tub since there was only a half glass door and the shower head was in the middle of the tub. I also found dirt on the floor of my room which looked similar to mouse droppings. AVOID at all costs and spend a little more and stay at the Hyatt (which we would have done if they weren’t sold out) up the block.

This is one of the best Airbnbs that I have stayed in. It's tastefully decorated. It has a washing machine, dishwasher ,TV, Netflix, brand new air-conditioning units. Incredibly clean and a good size.
Smart & Cozy indeed! Parking place easy to find around the building.
One best 👌 👍  quality, holiday services, very friendly service, quality apartment, I live one of athens apartment, all you need they will be delivery on time ⏲ 😀
Peaceful place and calm
Western view

I had to book this property as an emergency stay for two nights for business reasons. Its access to the center as well as to the southern suburbs is very easy and was one of the main reasons for choosing it. The second reason was the configuration of the space that allowed me to work in the mornings comfortably. The neighborhood, despite being in the center, was quiet and the bed very comfortable. The owner was very friendly and quick to help me with directions and advice for food and transportation in the surrounding areas. It was the best stay I had on a business trip. I recommend it!

Young couple for a 6 night stay.

Checked in hassle free, earlier than check in we received an SMS with instructions on how to download an app to be our room key onto our phone so check in was almost optional.

The service throughout the whole stay was very professional and friendly. We don't normally turn off the do not disturb sign until the room needs cleaning and the staff were attentive to this and would even offer to clean the room as late as 2pm.

The room is very fresh and open. Feels very modern and the air conditioning works very well. Microwave oven and fridge/freezer means self catering is a breeze. Some small breakfast items and drinks were provided when we checked in to last untill we got to a shop.

Location is very good. 25 min walk to the Acropolis and the most we had to walk from the furthest attractions was 1hr. Normal in Europe.

Lots of restaurants around either 5 mins across the avenue or 20 mins in one of the more commercial aereas. Plenty of small shops, one 24hr one nearby too. Ordering food for delivery was no problem too.

++ high tech room, clean and big room, polite staff, near to Acropole ( 30 minutes by foot), parking on the street or 10 eur per day if you wish safe parking lot.
Cofee capsules, tea, water on the room
Cleaning was done every day
Luxury shower gel, towels.
Best accommodation , I recommend them
Price / value 👌  perfect
Small market at 5 minutes
Elevator for luggage
This accommodation have everything that you need. The best 👌!!

very pleasant and luxurious apartment with advanced technologies.  parking is in the garage and is charged €10 per day.  There is free parking around the apartment and plenty of free parking.  the apartment is highly recommended.
Beautiful and very high quality finishes! The staff is very nice. If you don't care about being far from the center or the beach, then it's great. Metro stop also far.

Neat. I didn’t know about asking for special room service- towels were not replaced even though she said it will be replaced the next day. Our beds were made but not really dusted or even shaken. There were no real place to dry our clothes after the towels were all laid in the bathroom to dry, not even a hook pending as it was 4 of us who stayed.

It said that Check in starts after 3 on Booking.com and we got out of airport at 4. At 5, the receptionist was about to leave when we just arrived. But there’s no information on this. Best way to reach them is call. I didn’t get any replies on Booking.com.

Overall nice stay though as the location is not too remote, quiet and family-friendly. You can get Uber easily. Also, just a few minutes walk you will access main road.

The room was always on optimal temperatures. You need an app to access the doors, so no worries of losing access card or forgetting pins.

Service I wouldn’t say luxurious.

Definitely a nice hotel here in Athens. Breakfast that was included with the stay was very nice, great selection. The view on the rooftop is absolutely breathtaking, was worth it to stay here for that alone. In addition the staff was very helpful + the rooms were clean and modern. Fair prices as well even without a reservation. The only  downside was the elevators were very small and a little sketchy, but seems to be common in Europe:).

Exactly what we were looking for. Mr. Dimitrios is an excellent host, caring, resourceful and knowledgeable. A place away from the hustle and bustle of downtown Athens, with an impressive view, clean and located in a not so touristy area but with excellent access. The service is impressively efficient, warm and helpful. The rooms are spacious and comfortable. Lovely views to the Acropolis from the terrace. Breakfast is delicious.Yes, you are next to a highway but it is well insulated and the noise is minimal, at least on the fifth floor. Highly recommended. Warm, welcoming, and comfortable. I’d come back anytime. Thanks to all the staff for your support and kindness.

We had an amazing experience with this hotel. Right when we came in, lobby is clean and the receptionist, his name is Demitrius. He's such a patient person as the group before us don't have a reservation yet he tried to be patient and accommodating to these group of elderly people.

Location is great! Close to city center like 7-10 mins via cab, same minutes going to one of the mall.

Our room is very clean and not only that, we're graced by our own view of the Acropolis.

It was very smooth and lovely experience for us. Thanks to Demitrius for making a good impression and it definitely lasted even after we checked out.

Will recommend this hotel and will sure come back to stay once in Athens!

Quick review. Why to book this place? A)Location proximity to nearly all touristy things B) Knowledgeable assistance at front desk.
Why to not book this place? A) in a night club area. Crystal Queen is a club across from the hotel that plays music until 4am which shakes the building from across the street. B) you can forget sleep because it is on a busy freeway.
Make a smart choice.

Very clean, modern and beautiful hotel. The room has modern decor with hard wood floors. The roof top terrace has cafeteria that is wonderful. The breakfast is very good with lots of choices for vegetarians alike.
Wonderful choice for a calm, comfortable and pleasant stay .... Close access to means of transport ...I chose it again and I highly recommend it!!!
Thank you very much for the beautiful stay... The cleanliness and the service were impeccable... The environment is wonderful... We will choose you again on our next stay in Athens...
Comfortable, very clean, good location

We had a reservation for September 2023. We paid approximately 400 Euros in advance. 2 days before the travel date, I went to the hospital due to an urgent illness, and a decision was made for emergency surgery. I reached the hotel and explained the situation clearly. I guaranteed that I would send all reports and documents if necessary. I requested a postponement or refund of the reservation. However, they said in a very rude and arrogant way that this would not happen. They took all the money and it was not refunded. A new date was not offered.
Money is not everything in life. Sometimes you need to show your human side. I never liked the zero understanding approach to an important issue like illness. People and companies with this understanding should not survive. Therefore, you should definitely avoid establishing a commercial relationship with this hotel.

First, ignore most of not all of the one stars. They are locals unhappy that this place is sometimes used for parties.

We stayed in the terrace on top floor. It gave an incredible view of surrounding area including Acropolis. There are stairs that go to the roof that allow for a 360 degree view of the city. The hot water seems to be a common thing at AirBnBs and other booking places in Athens. Wasn't that much of a hassle. Hot tub gave great relaxation after a full day of walking. Metro was maybe a ten minute walk. Bus came right outside of apartment.

Very nice apartment to stay for a weekend in Athens! It is exactly close to supermarket, 15-20’ minutes walk to the Train Station of Kallithea and close to cafés, etc…
Moreover, the apartment was somehow clean and easy to access from the road which there is a lift outside (it takes ages to go up to the last floor!!!😂)!
Some ants 🐜 in the kitchen but overall OK! One thing was the shower water was all over the bathroom because of no fence/wall to cover it.
Nice veranda, sofa, living room etc.
At last, you pay what you get for!

The location is far from the main attractions. Metro is 20 minutes walk. By metro  the way to center takes about 30 minutes. The bus is nearby it takes about 30 minutes to the center. Taxi one way costs 10-15 euros. So its better to choose other place to stay if  the main goal in Athens is to visit main attractions.
Hot water  is not convenient. Every time before taking a hot shower, you need to turn on the water heater, after 20 minutes the water will be ready (it will turn off later automatically). When you return tired to the apartment, you won’t be able to immediately take a shower.
There is no administration in the building. Communication is remotely, via messengers. The administration do not always answer sometimes for 6 hours of waiting or ignore you and  have to ask twice.
Probably due to the lack of supervision, apartments are often rented for parties. And in the apartments for two guests, stay companies for 10-15 people. There is no soundproofing and it is not possible to sleep in neighboring apartments course of loud music and drunken screams until 6 am.
Good for night parties, bad for usual stay.

We had a very good experience! Kallithea area is amazing and the position of the apartment is really comfortable for everything. Our apartment was very big, full equipped, with a comfortable bed and beautiful toilet (that is not so common in Athens). I appreciate the big refrigerator and the quietness of the internal apartment. VERY GOOD, I’LL BE BACK SOON

Small room,but great service.  We forgot our plug adapters & receptionist lent us one. Asked for coffee late at night & coffee machine was activated just for us. Cant fault this place. Breakfast is plentiful & All the receptionists we met are amazing. Always helpful.

Quite far from center, but possible to reach center by 20 minutes walk.
Impossible to sleep at night because it is very noisy from street and from night club.
Breakfast without coffee because coffee machine was broken.

Arrived late difficult entry due to stairs no ramp for assistance with luggage  greeted by Alexander, big smile , very friendly,  assisted us with location of eateries, arrived at our room, two single beds were expected, we had one queen bed, notified Alexander at reception who promptly resolved the situation, well done Alexander, you are an asset  to Athenian Montazza Hotel,

Not sure how this place gets all the good reviews. Incredibly overpriced, I paid over 85 EUR/night during low season for a tiny room with only a bed and desk, old and tacky curtains, and a room key that worked 50% of the time.
Expect to hear music from the nearby ‘clubs’ until 3/4am. When I asked the front desk about this, I was told it’s basically everyday.
I was also kept awake by students slamming doors and screaming in the hallways past 2am, and instead of apologizing for it the staff told me it’s a school trip.
The water in the shower was maybe 80% normal heat.
Nothing special about the location, it’s off a highway and although you can walk to the city center, it’s not at all a nice location.
Overall this is more of a nice hostel than a hotel. Not at all worth the prices they charge.

Room is clean. Staff very friendly.
Close to the public transportation although the metro is 15 mins walking distance but there is a bus at 5 mins walking. Breakfast is good with a good variety. Even though there is a club next to the hotel, the room was very quiet but we were on the other side not facing the club.
Inconvenient: The room is a bit small
Magnificent stay in Greece thanks to the quality of the accommodation and its owner, Maria. Efkaristo polite!
Great place to stay, very clean, central and quiet
Spectacular apartment

Athens Chic House is one of the best places I have ever stayed! The apartment is super nice! fully equipped, clean and very cozy! You can feel at home ! Maria and Themis, the owners, are wonderful people who have helped me in everything! they inform you about everything in detail. In addition, they recommend and inform you on how you can enjoy your stay in this wonderful city of Athens.
The apartment is in an excellent location, you have access to supermarkets, bus stops, tram, bars, pharmacies, bakeries, cafes, typical Greek restaurants!
100% recommendable! I would come back again without hesitation !

This place lives up to the name.  There is everything you need to stay for any period.  The apartment is very cozy, like a small palace.  Absolutely calm and quiet area.  Security is ensured by outdoor video surveillance.  Transport infrastructure in the nearest access.  The hosts are very welcoming, smart intellingent persons, and are always ready to give advice on what to do in Athens and are very attentive to guests.  The hotel is new, everything that is offered to guests works perfectly.  Next time I hope to stay here.

Clean and spacious apartment, with kitchen supplies and everything you need for your stay. The hosts were extremely helpful and kind! What is more, on their website there is everything you need to know about Athens, where to go, what to eat and what to visit during your stay!
A great place for a comfortable stay.  Everything is clean, comfortable, polite.  Excellent quality for your money!  We came back here, and I hope to come back again.
I spent a month in here and it was incredible. Amazing and comfortable apartment. Highly recommended ☺️

If I could give this place zero stars I would. I’m honestly shocked it has 4 stars. The apartment was filthy when we checked in, it smelled of urine and mildew.  We didn’t feel comfortable walking with our shoes off. There were scuff marks all over the walls. This place is advertised as a hotel but it’s run more like an Airbnb. The whole vibe of the place was really unsettling. Save your money and stay at a real hotel.

Elevator didn’t work in 3 days . I lived in 5 th floor
Rooms are good with many facilities even washing machine .

Horrible experience.
Booked this thinking I’m going to a hotel. It’s a private building. We arrived early thinking we could leave our bag somewhere. The guy at the front desk said he doesn’t have us in the list and I must call some phone number to check what’s happening. It all seemed like a scam. I called company I booked with they told us to call at 3pm some number as we can’t check in before it. At 3pm we called. They sent code for the door. The apartment was just okay. Nothing luxurious about it. So disappointed in the whole booking. Also they only provided body wash- no shampoo no conditioner. Just poor service after all.

Very good room with nice views of the acropolis.

Quiet ambient and service very up to the standards.

The area looks a bit rough at the beginning, but people around is very friendly.

The main photo is from the roof which I assume comes with the penthouse and perhaps slightly misleading as a result, but these are nice and big apartments in Athens. It’s easy to get around from here to the heart of town by Uber for £3-4. This is a lot bigger than standard hotel rooms and I totally recommend staying here instead of a hotel.

The staff are helpful and a phone call away, it’s a basic apartment which is clean and cleaned by staff on a daily basis.

Don’t worry too much about the location - you’re getting better value for your money here instead of a hotel in town.

My only complaint would be that there’s some dogs in  both the apartments next door and that poor dogs seems to go nuts when people come in.

The place is very decent with a great value of money. Yiannis was very helpful and allowed me for an early check in and also helped me find a place on the day I was leaving. The apartment was very clean and spacious.
A very clean, calm street, recommended for couples,
Good place to stay, near to a lot of touristic places. I like this flat and spent one week here.

Nice, spacious apartments equipped with all comforts. Excellent both for a short stay and for something longer. The non-central location doesn't favor it, but you can get to the center quickly with a walk. The value for money and the possibility of arriving at any time once you have received the entry instructions are also excellent.
Πολύ όμορφο κατάλυμα σε εξαιρετική τοποθεσία, πολύ βολικό για μετακίνηση τόσο προς το κέντρο της Αθήνας όσο και προς τον Πειραιά. Τα διαμερίσματα είναι πολύ λειτουργικά και πεντακάθαρα.

If you're looking for a more inexpensive hotel in Athens, this is the place. It's about a 30 minute walk to the Acropolis or a 5 minute/6 Euro taxi ride. The rooms are simple but nice, restaurant is great, and service is excellent. It's right on the avenue so it's a little loud with the cars and bells from the church across the street but that was no issue for me. There are some excellent local spots nearby to eat that are way cheaper than in the downtown Acropolis area as well. I would definitely stay there again!

Carpets and walls of rooms were disgustingly dirty . Hotel needs a complete refurbishment . Beds were like sleeping in boards.   I complained to the girl at the desk and was given a plate of fruit and wine as an apology .   But this hotel is definitely not 4 star .

This hotel is good a lot ! the location is conveniently close to all that we wanted on our days in Athens, and the interior and atmosphere of this house is gorgeous! The rooms are cosy The bathroom are GOOD, the water in the bath are wonderfully warm when that is needed, and the breakfast is all okay great also Truely recomendable !

If you want to avoid any disappointments, avoid this hotel when you travel for business.
I have no idea who gave them 4 stars, but I would give them 3 with difficulties.
Breakfast I can rate as even 1 star hotel.
And by any chance, if you have to leave earlier, they will ask you to pay the full reservation, without any understanding that when traveling for business some times the plans are changed rapidly.

Terrible hotel. Really outdated and unkept. The room carpets are disgusting. There is no air-conditioning and the staff were very impolite. This definitely should not be a 4 star hotel. This hotel is also not suited for families.

Such a beautiful hotel. If youre on the top floors with a suite, you get an AMAZING large LARGE balcony with a view of the Acropolis. Also some of the most friendly warm and extremely beautiful/attractive staff/guests as well. This place is high class indeed and welcomes travelers from all over. Its close to the city center as well with lots to see and do around the area.

This well-known hotel features modern rooms with a well-stocked minibar—definitely a pleasant surprise compared to the empty minibar at the Intercontinental Vienna. If your budget allows, I highly recommend choosing a room with a view of the Acropolis; the sight of this ancient landmark in the distance is truly breathtaking. However, be aware that your view might be slightly obstructed by some odd yellow structures nearby. Additionally, the soundproofing in the rooms could be improved, as it's easy to be disturbed while trying to sleep. Overall, it’s a great choice for those wanting a comfortable stay with a touch of history.

雅典還行的住宿

I’m an IHG loyalist. I can tell you the difference between the breakfast buffet at the Intercontinental hotels in Rome and Athens (sheeps milk yogurt vs honey in the comb) and quality is a hallmark of the experience. It’s a luxury hotel. That’s what you are paying for. The locations, the ambiance, and the service. Generally, everything is as close to perfect as one can get.
We checked in last night. The desk staff was incredibly accommodating, the bellmen first rate, housekeeping perfect.
When we encounter someone who isn’t personable it’s frankly jarring. And when the incident is repeated you know it’s a pattern of behavior and not just someone having a bad day.
The officious gentleman with reading glasses who asks for your room number when entering the breakfast cafe near the pool is difficult. The first time we came, we were not yet guests, and he was rude.
Today, when we gave our room number, he practically spat, “Breakfast is not included with your room!” in a condescending and brisk manner which seemed to imply that it was out of our price range.
Everyone else here is absolutely tops! The servers and wait staff anticipate your needs, are friendly and helpful. It’s just this one guy who you have to get past, like a troll on a bridge.

Had a great stay at this hotel while visiting Athens, the location is ideal for exploring the city center and Acropolis using the nearby trams, buses, or metro. Staff were courteous and extremely helpful. They always went out of their way to be friendly and welcoming. Although the immediate surroundings look a bit dire the view from the rooftop restaurant and bar was absolutely stunning and more than made up for it. Speaking of the Premiere Bar, it was our favorite part of our stay. We had the pleasure of being served by Stella who was incredibly attentive and friendly, she even spoke spanish which greatly helped my family communicate their orders! All in all this was a great place to stay during our visit and I would absolutely stay again.

My wife and I just stayed here for two nights. This is a fantastic Hotel with outstanding service. It was located perfectly for us and what we wanted to see. Today was our last day there. We left our bags with the doorman, as we were going to an island for the day and were going to return in the afternoon to collect our bags as we were heading to the airport this afternoon. When the taxi dropped us off at the port for the ferry, my wife realized she left her cell phone in the taxi. My phone wouldn’t work as we were trying to call the taxi company. We decided to head back to the Intercontinental and talk to the doorman who we had left our bags with. He got on his phone immediately and started trying to locate the taxi. After a few minutes, he said go have a good time, when you come back, i will have your cell phone for you, the taxi driver has found it and he will be bringing it here. We went to the island and returned to the Intercontinental. Unfortunately, the same doorman wasn’t there, but as promised, my wife’s cellphone was there waiting for us. I hope management can reach out to me. I would like to thank him for his outstanding service and send him a token of our appreciation. This was outstanding customer service we really appreciate how we were treated. If ever in Athens again, we already know where we will stay.

Just stayed here with my daughter while in Athens. The hotel is very clean and comfortable. The staff is friendly and helpful. The rooftop bar has a wonderful view of the Acropolis as well. While it’s not the closest to the main sites, it is close for walking to the metro to get where you want to go. Also, the bus is close to get you around as well. We used both, the metro to get to the sites we wanted and the busy to get to the beach.

Clean, comfortable and SO CLOSE to the acropolis. It took us about 20 mins to walk there from the hotel. We loved the rooftop terrace too, it has a beautiful view of the parthenon. We booked it for our last night in Greece. Super easy check in, beds were really comfortable and the room was perfectly clean. Found it at a great price on booking.com. Look no further.

The lobby of the hotel is absolutely beautiful. But the rooms give a strong 80's vibe, stuffy carpet dark interior and pretty much a hospital bathroom. The breakfast is absolutely atrocious, if you take a small walk of 10 to 15 mins you have much much better breakfast for less money. The staff was quite helpful and willing to help. Overall the hotel is not worth the money and it should not be a four star hotel, but if you are in a pinch the hotel is fine and the location is good enough

The location is great near the main bit of everything around 15 to 30 minutes walk to acropolis and lidle around same distance, the staff are wonderful, very kind and welcoming. They also have a rooftop bar with food and drinks serving. Room is okay considering how cheap it was, it has a spacious bathroom, air conditioning is nice and the addition of a fridge made sure we were hydrated with cold water 😁 would recommend

Very good hotel with excellent food. The rooms are very clean. The top restaurant has a view of the acropolis, which is a big plus for the atmosphere. Near the hotel there are a lot of cheap fast foods, shops, bars and nice walks around the city. Great recommendation for this hotel.

Our stay at the Grand Hyatt Athens was nothing short of spectacular! The hotel exudes luxury from the moment you walk through the doors. Our room was beautifully appointed, with modern decor and a comfortable bed that made for a restful night’s sleep. The rooftop pool and bar offer breathtaking views of the Acropolis – a perfect spot to relax after a day of sightseeing. The breakfast buffet was outstanding, with a wide variety of fresh, delicious options. What truly set our experience apart was the impeccable service; the staff were attentive, welcoming, and always ready to help. If you’re looking for a luxurious stay with exceptional amenities in the heart of Athens, the Grand Hyatt is the perfect choice!

Wow what a great hotel! The location is ideal it’s out of the busy acropolis area of the city but still close enough to walk to most of the sites if you wanted. They have a complimentary shuttle bus that will take and pick you up to the national gardens area from there you can hit everything pretty easily. We found the food and beverage offerings to be outstanding from the food to the service it was top notch. The breakfast buffet is one of the best I’ve had in Europe, seriously, it’s pretty incredible. The dinner menu is equally amazing it has a little bit of everything even sushi. The views from this place are worth just coming up for a drink but I would definitely eat here again. We also ate downstairs at the bar/lounge which had even more offerings and it was delicious. The service and the food at these places make it one of the better options to eat at in Athens we stopped by a few spots in the city and felt the offerings at the hotel were much better.
