The hostess at the dinner restaurant 9th floor was very kind she made sure my wife’s birthday was acknowledged which we really appreciated. The food and beverage manager was also very much on top of things we were very impressed with him and his team. The rooms are really nice great balconies with views of the city it was clean and well maintained. Reception was helpful and nice to deal with each time as well as the bell/valet team. When we’re back in Athens we’ll be staying here again for sure.

Thanks for the amazing event at Cyclades Hall yesterday!!! Beautiful and elegant space! The large screen and the high ceiling was giving the feeling of luxury and simplicity at the same time!!! The banquet exquisite, in compliance with the standards of Hyatt!!! But, above all, the employees were the key to the success!! Excellent service, all the staff was extremely polite, helpful and to the point! All the departments, from sales to banquet, from IT to the reception and the concierge! Congratulations to all the people of Grand Hyatt Athens!

What an amazing location!  The hotel is very lovely and the views from the restaurant on the 9th floor AMAZING!  The rooms are extremely ample, clean and the mattress and pillows outstanding.  The staff we encountered were very friendly and helpful. Don’t pass up their restaurants…Best Greek salad ever, breakfast buffet has the largest selection and the food extremely tasty.  Worth the stay for safety, location and service.  Memorable stay!!

For the price you really cannot beat this hotel. It's got a great modern vibe, huge luxurious rooms, and an absolute A+ spa that is free to visit (pool, jacuzzi, sauna, cold plunge etc) - comes in very handy after long days of walking and hiking). Service is really amazing, Erinda at the front desk was so nice and helped us get settled when we arrived a bit early before check-in. You're about 20 minutes from the city center but they have a free shuttle that gets you there and back in 5.

We asked the owner in advance if we could leave our luggage prior to check-in. He told us yes. We arrived in the morning to leave our luggage, after an intense and long trip. The owner greeted us, very angry. I told him that he had told us we could leave our luggage and very reluctantly, he tells us to follow him. In a garage, he tells us to leave our luggage and leave quickly. I urgently needed to go to the bathroom, so l asked him for that. While he looked at us to leave. He told me not very aggressively and shouting, making a gesture with his hands in the shape of a cross, and that we should leave. We left very uncomfortable due to his treatment and waited outside to find somewhere to go to the bathroom. The owner comes out after 10 minutes and tells us to come with him. I thought he was going to lend me the bathroom, but he took us to the top floor of it, to show the view it had of the Acropolis. My partner got upset and asked him again that we were not interested in that, that we had only asked for the bathroom (the owner was trying to be nice and show off the amenities of his apartment), but when my partner asked him that, he got upset and. He rudely took us to the bathroom, while waiting next to the bathroom door for him to enter and exit quickly. I felt very uncomfortable, so without entering, I told him that I did not expect such treatment towards a human being and that it no longer mattered, that we could look for other accommodation. He got so upset that he didn't even let me explain anything to him and started yelling at me to keep my voice down, because other people were sleeping, while he told him that he was speaking softly and couldn't treat me like that. To which he begins to silence me with his finger. When we got down, I told him that he was a terrible person and he waved us off. I called booking, with poor handling and wasting all my cell phone minutes, I still haven't seen them respond to me at such a bad time we are experiencing. His name is Sergio

The shared bathroom on level 2 is very unclean and unhygienic, lots of mould on the ceiling. But for the low price the accommodation is decent and very fine for a short stay. The rooftop is a nice addition with views of the acropolis! :) Also a very nice man who received us at check in.
If you want cheap price this is the accomodation, the room of fine but very poor in cleaning, kitchen is very dirty…has everything but dirty.
The person in charge is really kind and helpful😊 big and comfortables rooms

hospitality 5/5  rooms 5/5 price 5/5  location 100% safe
it is the best.
some will say it is not  perfect clean, but its only 20/night. for its price it is the best it can be.   clean sheets towels the room is clean enough for the money you pay

Positives:
- good location
- pool was good
Negatives:
Everything else
The breakfast was inedible
Rooms were disgusting and bathroom had mould
I was expecting noise as it is close to the airport however the walls are paper thin and you can hear everything on the entire floor
Mattresses are rock hard
Dietary requirements are basically ignored “ask us about dietary allergies” so I asked about gluten free options “no”
Stay somewhere else

Great price, great location, great staff… There is also a restaurant downstairs but I only ate there once. It was really good though and reasonably priced. Though I did see ashtrays in hallways, I did not smell any smoke at all. With the exception of some loud talking from the people across the hall a few times, the place was very quiet. There was a heavy plastic “shade” door(which made the room pitch back in the middle of the day) and a heavy interior sliding glass door that drowned out most of the street noise. The parking situation is pretty bad. It’s in a neighborhood that is all street parking. It’s free and has very few no parking areas which is great but it can be difficult to find spaces. I did not deduct any stars because this is hardly the hotels fault. Just something to keep in mind if you intend to rent a car as I did. To be honest, unless you’re making a day trip at some point, you probably don’t need a car. Everything’s pretty close. I intend to visit again someday and I will absolutely look here first.

We were very disappointed with our room for the 3 day stay! AC didn't work, the very small bathroom fan didn't work, the vent pipe was broke in bathroom causing the whole small room to smell like sewer. We had to open our Slider to air out everything when we came back to the room. The room and the small balcony were in need of many repairs. Just was not a good start to our first Athens vacation. Remember, you get what you paid for!
How true. We would not recommend this place to anyone traveling.
I don't know how it was rated at  3 1/2 stars???

It's worth the money you pay. The hotel is dated and there are deficiencies all around. In one room the fridge did not work and in another the safe didn't work. The street facing rooms can be noisy-- especially if you keep the balcony door open, but there is an A/C unit in the room. Floor surfaces need replacement in and outside the rooms. The rooms are clean and with adequate linens. Friendly service and good breakfast.

Had to change multiple rooms to find the least odorless in terms of smoking, looks like smoking is permitted in the outdated rooms. Toilets and cleanliness are the worst. Would have changed the hotel but I had to stay due to location and proximity to my relatives. 1 star just for the acceptable breakfast and morning Greek coffee.

Not sure where to start. Location: Was close to some of the bus lines so that was nice. Not much else is close by. Neighborhood was quiet and seemed safe.
Service: The cleaning ladies were very helpful with helping us check in which was great since there was not a reception desk and we were given no instructions upon booking (we booked through our credit card company so not sure if you book directly with them if you get instructions). We talked to the hotel and then I had to send them my ID over WhatsApp and then they sent the codes for everything. The service was was very quick.
Room: AC was working which was great. The place was spacious. Everything was new but not the greatest upkeep. Some floorboards were pulling apart. There was some hair in the shower. There wasn't hot (or warm) water in the shower. The toilet was broken (but my husband fixed it). There some stains on the floors (not sure if they were permanent or just not cleaned). Overall I would not stay here again. I think it would be good if you are on a hostel budget or looking for those vibes (but with more privacy).

The pictures on the website are NOT representative of reality. A dark and dingy hovel, dirty sofa, rickety furniture, zero decor. The two sparse bedrooms were located in a basement which smelt of bins. We were a family of five and the bed for the fifth person was not prepared nor was there sign of where it would be… praying not on that dirty sofa.

We could have perhaps tolerated the poor location if anything else had been good.

We stayed long enough to put our bags down, look around, take out our phones and book into a central hotel.

I guess you get what you pay for in the end but the photos and reviews gave us false hope.

would not recommend

This place is a dump, and it's being rented as a premium suite. It was disgusting, nothing worked, total disrepair, dead bugs and the Athens stay people didn't care to do anything about it after multiple complaints! The washing machine didn't work, no basic supplies and it was just dirty and broken everywhere!

In one of the apartments now. Very happy with it. Modern and well-equipped. Staff are accommodating.

It's in a good location close to bus routes. Lidl is a reasonably short walk away but there's a small supermarket close by, too. Easy walk to where it's all going on in Athens.

One tip to the manager/owner is some balcony furniture could be a useful addition.

Overall, great place. Very comfortable.

The apartment is beautiful, and well laid out. It was very comfortable for two of us but could easily have taken more. The apartment was perfectly cleaned and fully equipped with everything we needed. Everyone was very welcoming and left thoughtful items in the apartment. Overall, we had a really great stay and would certainly stay there again!

I arrived at the place I booked through "Booking", the conditions were not as stated in the description, the place was dirty, with insects in the beds, I don't know if they were bedbugs or ticks, the bathroom was unpresentable, dirty and had a bad smell. I hope they close this place, I understand that it is not a hotel, the price was very cheap, but the least that is asked is a little bit of cleanliness and order.

I booked for the entire apartment through booking, but when I got there all I was given were two beds in a shared room. And the room looked nothing like the pictures, filled with stuff and very dirty.

Don t even think about booking for such a trash hole! Below decent and basic hygiene and it is a big shame for this accomodation to be allowed in booking and other big travel platforms! I regret not taking photos! I ve traveled and stayed in cheap places and hostels all around the world but what i have seen there exceeded by far my worst expectations ever!

Had a VERY BAD EXPERIENCE!!!! Waited 1 hour outside this hostel hoping someone could open the gate for me, coz aparently the doorbell isnt working. Called and message many times the host but didnt come out! So decided to leave the place because its getting dark and the area looks not very safe. I have asked for a full refund but they havent refunded me at all!! Dont stay here as service and communication is not very good! They have left me alone and dark outside without anywhere to stay in Athens!!

The worst house I've ever seen, like the first thing you notice is the smell around like the house hasn't been cleaned in the past century, then you notice it's like house for ilegal imigrante cause we sleep 12 people all together, then if you actually move inside the house you will find garbage everywhere like no one cleans they just throwing everything on the floor and they are holding to every trash then the owner comes to you and say who ever makes trash needs to clean but he doesn't clean his own.
Loved this studio apartment, very clean and well presented. Host could not have been more helpful
Good location, attentive host, well stocked, A/C, fast WiFi, great value.
Perfect for an overnight

Cozy studio located in a central area from which it is easy to reach the main tourist attractions of Athens on foot, however a 10 minute walk from the nearest metro station.
Despite being located in a busy area it is not noisy and this is very good for sleep.
The studio is essentially furnished and is equipped with the necessary material to be able to cook and eat freely, the spaces are sufficient for a decent stay.
For breakfast, everything you need is left available (sweet, savory, fruit and drinks).
The wifi is fast and accurate.
As soon as you arrive you are a little disoriented as the building where the studio is located is quite dilapidated on the outside, but as soon as you enter the studio the disorientation stops.
The only flaw of the studio is the bathroom which is small and not easily usable, the shower is equipped with a shower curtain (common to almost all Greek bathrooms), so while taking a shower, if you are not careful, it tends to get all over the place wet. bath.
Furthermore, there is a persistent slight smell of sewage in the bathroom, so much so that it is advisable to always keep the bathroom door closed.
Considering the location, the quality/price ratio is quite high.

The apartment was comfortable, spotlessly clean and had literally everything. Space enough for one person as well as a couple. The location is very practical/convenient as it is located near a central hub, with the result that all transportation is available (taxi, trolley buses, Metro, etc.). The area (Kukaki) is well organized. In addition to the nearby shops, there are pedestrian streets with catering & entertainment shops at a distance of 5-10 minutes. For someone who likes to walk, Monastiraki and the Acropolis are about 15' away on main shopping streets. Finally, the owner is kind and completely cooperative. Overall the accommodation is an excellent choice and I will definitely prefer it again.
Great staff

Are you Dutch and living in Athens? Or a Greek with something Dutch in your heart?  Come here every second Friday of the month (we call it casual friday)

Gezellig plekje voor Nederlanders of gewoon Nederland gangers die in Athene wonen. Iedere 2e vrijdag avond van de maand is de tent open.
Clubhouse of the Dutch Association in Greece. See websites NVIG.GR
If you want to be in the Netherlands for a while, this is the right place to be
nice place of the Dutch association.

Spacious apartment.  4th floor, The view on the backyard(at least for the apartment for 4 people) I don't know about the others. Small but nice balcony. Very nice style of the apartment. Very Quiet air-cons. Well equipped kitchen. Beds are comfortable, but I think the mattress soon should be changed for the big bed :) The host was very nice and welcomed us well. Close to shops,bakery downstairs, relatively cheep restaurants downstairs. Safe neighborhood. 15-20 min. walking to Acropolis and to the center. No problem finding parking places on the streets.  The only thing which bothered me was that It was hard to open the doors when you enter to the building, you need a bit to struggle with it.  I think the lock should be changed.

It's 2am, and music outside is not loud, it's LOUD. Closing the windows doesn't help.
Don't stay here if you plan to sleep at night.
Really close to everything. The owner is so lovely and Helpful!
Nice apartment, everything you need is there. The center is just a stone's throw away. There are many cafes nearby where you can eat inexpensively and deliciously.

Athens Chic House is one of the best places I have ever stayed! The apartment is super nice! fully equipped, clean and very cozy! You can feel at home ! Maria and Themis, the owners, are wonderful people who have helped me in everything! they inform you about everything in detail. In addition, they recommend and inform you on how you can enjoy your stay in this wonderful city of Athens.
The apartment is in an excellent location, you have access to supermarkets, bus stops, tram, bars, pharmacies, bakeries, cafes, typical Greek restaurants!
100% recommendable! I would come back again without hesitation !

This place lives up to the name.  There is everything you need to stay for any period.  The apartment is very cozy, like a small palace.  Absolutely calm and quiet area.  Security is ensured by outdoor video surveillance.  Transport infrastructure in the nearest access.  The hosts are very welcoming, smart intellingent persons, and are always ready to give advice on what to do in Athens and are very attentive to guests.  The hotel is new, everything that is offered to guests works perfectly.  Next time I hope to stay here.

Clean and spacious apartment, with kitchen supplies and everything you need for your stay. The hosts were extremely helpful and kind! What is more, on their website there is everything you need to know about Athens, where to go, what to eat and what to visit during your stay!
A great place for a comfortable stay.  Everything is clean, comfortable, polite.  Excellent quality for your money!  We came back here, and I hope to come back again.
I spent a month in here and it was incredible. Amazing and comfortable apartment. Highly recommended ☺️
Magnificent stay in Greece thanks to the quality of the accommodation and its owner, Maria. Efkaristo polite!
Very comfortable and clean apartment. Has got whatever you like to make you feel like home. Close to tram and metro. Congratulations to the owner. I highly recommend
Very clean Apartment with all the basics you need for your stay

Definitely a nice hotel here in Athens. Breakfast that was included with the stay was very nice, great selection. The view on the rooftop is absolutely breathtaking, was worth it to stay here for that alone. In addition the staff was very helpful + the rooms were clean and modern. Fair prices as well even without a reservation. The only  downside was the elevators were very small and a little sketchy, but seems to be common in Europe:).

Exactly what we were looking for. Mr. Dimitrios is an excellent host, caring, resourceful and knowledgeable. A place away from the hustle and bustle of downtown Athens, with an impressive view, clean and located in a not so touristy area but with excellent access. The service is impressively efficient, warm and helpful. The rooms are spacious and comfortable. Lovely views to the Acropolis from the terrace. Breakfast is delicious.Yes, you are next to a highway but it is well insulated and the noise is minimal, at least on the fifth floor. Highly recommended. Warm, welcoming, and comfortable. I’d come back anytime. Thanks to all the staff for your support and kindness.

We had an amazing experience with this hotel. Right when we came in, lobby is clean and the receptionist, his name is Demitrius. He's such a patient person as the group before us don't have a reservation yet he tried to be patient and accommodating to these group of elderly people.

Location is great! Close to city center like 7-10 mins via cab, same minutes going to one of the mall.

Our room is very clean and not only that, we're graced by our own view of the Acropolis.

It was very smooth and lovely experience for us. Thanks to Demitrius for making a good impression and it definitely lasted even after we checked out.

Will recommend this hotel and will sure come back to stay once in Athens!

Quick review. Why to book this place? A)Location proximity to nearly all touristy things B) Knowledgeable assistance at front desk.
Why to not book this place? A) in a night club area. Crystal Queen is a club across from the hotel that plays music until 4am which shakes the building from across the street. B) you can forget sleep because it is on a busy freeway.
Make a smart choice.

Very clean, modern and beautiful hotel. The room has modern decor with hard wood floors. The roof top terrace has cafeteria that is wonderful. The breakfast is very good with lots of choices for vegetarians alike.
Apartment with everything necessary for a long stay. Access to all means of transport in minutes. Clean and quiet. Easy check in and detailed instructions from the hosts
Great apartment, close to the center, clean and quiet!
Nice apartment in a convenient area. The owners take care of their clients.
In a very close place to transportation networks. Very close to the metro, tram and bus stops. The balcony of the house is great.

Excellent apartment, equipped with everything including washing machine, dishwasher, iron and ironing board, very clean, welcoming and very knowledgeable manager, congratulations. Possibility of moving around by public transport... as soon as we arrived the owner made some things available, such as water , coffee, bread not indifferent for those arriving directly from the airport. Thanks again

Just the right accommodation for a short holiday for two in Athens.
The location is great for getting around the city on foot, but also by tram or metro. Despite the urban location, it is very quiet. So you get a good night's sleep before you throw yourself into the urban action. The shower room is small but functional and can also be easily ventilated through a tilting window. The terrace, which is great to hang out on, is great and essentially doubles the size of the living room. The landlord is very personable, helps with all questions, provides very personal support and even arranged an excellent taxi ride to and from the airport for us (€48 at night, €45 in the morning). Otherwise, we used the 5-day public transport ticket for our stay, which was extremely cheap and practical for €8.20. We can only recommend this.
But a very nice house. The owner is very kind. There was breakfast and 1 bottle of wine in the fridge

Small room,but great service.  We forgot our plug adapters & receptionist lent us one. Asked for coffee late at night & coffee machine was activated just for us. Cant fault this place. Breakfast is plentiful & All the receptionists we met are amazing. Always helpful.

Quite far from center, but possible to reach center by 20 minutes walk.
Impossible to sleep at night because it is very noisy from street and from night club.
Breakfast without coffee because coffee machine was broken.

Arrived late difficult entry due to stairs no ramp for assistance with luggage  greeted by Alexander, big smile , very friendly,  assisted us with location of eateries, arrived at our room, two single beds were expected, we had one queen bed, notified Alexander at reception who promptly resolved the situation, well done Alexander, you are an asset  to Athenian Montazza Hotel,

Not sure how this place gets all the good reviews. Incredibly overpriced, I paid over 85 EUR/night during low season for a tiny room with only a bed and desk, old and tacky curtains, and a room key that worked 50% of the time.
Expect to hear music from the nearby ‘clubs’ until 3/4am. When I asked the front desk about this, I was told it’s basically everyday.
I was also kept awake by students slamming doors and screaming in the hallways past 2am, and instead of apologizing for it the staff told me it’s a school trip.
The water in the shower was maybe 80% normal heat.
Nothing special about the location, it’s off a highway and although you can walk to the city center, it’s not at all a nice location.
Overall this is more of a nice hostel than a hotel. Not at all worth the prices they charge.

Room is clean. Staff very friendly.
Close to the public transportation although the metro is 15 mins walking distance but there is a bus at 5 mins walking. Breakfast is good with a good variety. Even though there is a club next to the hotel, the room was very quiet but we were on the other side not facing the club.
Inconvenient: The room is a bit small
Big apartment, comfortable, two bedrooms, well equipped, and well located, near Neos Cosmos metro station.

Very comfortable hotel. Spacious and clean room. The breakfast was amazing for variety and quality. Very useful car parking included (beware of the roof which is very low in the underground levels). Good position if you arrive late into the night at Piraeus port and you need a one night stay before your plane (check in available 24h). I don't know if it's located in a good position to reach the center

Try to avoid at all costs. The hotel is located in one of the worst locations (nothing around the hotel except strip clubs) and the rooms are extremely dirty. I had to stay here only for a few hours ahead of my flight and I truly regret not booking another place. The staff is also not very friendly which I found to be quite rare compared to anywhere else across Greece.

Although this place was recently renovated it happens to be located in a section of Athens surrounded by strip bars and studios as they call them here. We booked this trip through Costco and I’m kicking myself about not doing a little more homework. The housekeeping department in my view after three nights has a lot to learn. No face cloths, one bath towel for two guest, they don’t replenish the soap or toilet paper and a toilet that ran all day and night. The bedding has a flat sheet over the mattress pad and no top sheet. Just a comforter? Room is very small. My advice would be look in another direction for booking a hotel.

20 to 30 mins ride from the main attractions. Beautiful to look at, but beds in the suite were uncomfortable for all 3 of us. The front desk staff was nice when we arrived, but not as helpful the next day.

I stayed here for one night prior to my cruise which is the reason I was able to tolerate it. Had my stay been longer my family and I would have gone elsewhere. The check in staff was friendly but the breakfast staff was rude and clearly hated her life as if she woke on the wrong side of the bed. She would not accommodate families sitting together in open empty tables and was extremely nasty without providing any explanation. It seemed as though she was only catering to the Greek tourists. The rooms are TINY and NOISY. The windows don’t have a good seal in any room as my family had occupied 5 rooms in total and each room had loud traffic noises emitting from
Every window as if they were open. My bathtub was arranged so awkwardly that it was impossible to shower without getting water outside of the tub since there was only a half glass door and the shower head was in the middle of the tub. I also found dirt on the floor of my room which looked similar to mouse droppings. AVOID at all costs and spend a little more and stay at the Hyatt (which we would have done if they weren’t sold out) up the block.

I stayed 3 nights in Athenaeum Grand Hotel.

Room was so spacious and very clean.
Also, it has a balcony to see a magnificent view of Greece.

Breakfast was American style, but it provides a lot of selections.

Staffs are very friendly and I personally thanks to the male staff, helping me to search the lost cellphone for my colleague.

I’ll definitely use the hotel again.

Our room was amazing. Great view. The staff were on point
The complimentary breakfast was a full buffet. Would definitely stay again. Five mile drive to city center will cost about $5 for taxi

What a beautiful hotel, but what makes its more amazing is their staff! So courteous, friendly, professional, and kind. I can’t say enough great things about all of their staff. We will definitely stay here again.

The staff were fantastic, very helpful and accommodating. The room was nice with a fantastic view, as promised.  What I didn't realize when I booked the hotel was that it sits between 2 "Gentlemens Clubs".  So it felt a bit sketchy at night.

First the positives. The breakfast area and the breakfast itself were great. The beds were very comfy and the bathroom looked classy. The staff were all very friendly.

Now the negatives. We had a room with a veranda but unfortunately it stunk out there of sewage so we could not even use it and had to keep the door always closed. We opened the window on the veranda to try and get some fresh air in but it didn't help. A complete waste of money upgrading to that room.

Also, the air conditioning always seemed to blow out very cold air despite trying to increase the temperature. The worst part was when we turned the air conditioning off, there was a constant buzzing sound coming from the air conditioning which was strange and very annoying. So it was either freeze or have a constant noise at night...

The hotel location was also in a pretty seedy area with strip clubs all around it and fair walk away to the closest Metro station. Whilst we never felt unsafe in the area, it was not a nice vibe to be in unless you want to be around that sort of thing.

This is not somewhere I will be staying again...
Beautiful apartment, fully equipped, clean and well located. The pictures were as shown in reality. It only needs to maintain the bathroom shower and install some electrical points.
Εxcellent communication with the company, the house was spotless and beautiful. I recommend it 100%. Thanks for the great experience!
Although very nice location, next to everything, and the house is excellent. The guys at Gtrip were very knowledgeable.

Rooms slightly on the small side, not as quiet as they could be, overall good.
Service from the staff was very good, they were pleasant and friendly.
Location is easy to get to the central sites, nice views from the roof top breakfast bar, it is unfortunately on a main road.

Don't stay there!  We stayed on a Friday and Saturday night and couldn't sleep at all.  The front desk claimed that a university across the street was having a function.  Loud music and a Dj talking from 9 p.m. until 6 a.m. both mornings.  The hotel was well aware of the noise and has done nothing to accommodate their guest to prevent hearing the noise.  Their attitude is that it has nothing to do with them.  If you are aware of a problem then you should do something to fix it.  I can not recommend this hotel because of noise and the hotel not caring about it, or doing something about it.
Clean and modern rooms. Amazing, friendly and professional staff. Everyone was very welcoming and polite, especially Sofia at the breakfast!

I have loved my experience here. My wife and I stayed here for 9 days and loved every day of it. The people at the front desk are awesome and very helpful. The views are gorgeous, and it really puts you far enough from the Acropolis to be perfect for a cultural and tourist experience. The breakfast was lovely. Every morning, we would go to the rooftop and enjoy a delicious meal. The girls that ran the breakfast area were very kind and made us feel welcome. Side note, I would be eating with the amazing view of the Acropolis, and all I could focus on was this fat bumble bee flying to eat flower on the rooftop garden. It was a sense of beauty, relaxation, and a calming pleasure that made my stay so much more enjoyable. My stay was amazing. Thank you to all that made it possible.

Very good hotel for price and location.  Don't understand why there was just a standing mirror in the room and that too hidden behind the blinds - so you had to open the blinds to use the bathroom mirror.

Young couple for a 6 night stay.

Checked in hassle free, earlier than check in we received an SMS with instructions on how to download an app to be our room key onto our phone so check in was almost optional.

The service throughout the whole stay was very professional and friendly. We don't normally turn off the do not disturb sign until the room needs cleaning and the staff were attentive to this and would even offer to clean the room as late as 2pm.

The room is very fresh and open. Feels very modern and the air conditioning works very well. Microwave oven and fridge/freezer means self catering is a breeze. Some small breakfast items and drinks were provided when we checked in to last untill we got to a shop.

Location is very good. 25 min walk to the Acropolis and the most we had to walk from the furthest attractions was 1hr. Normal in Europe.

Lots of restaurants around either 5 mins across the avenue or 20 mins in one of the more commercial aereas. Plenty of small shops, one 24hr one nearby too. Ordering food for delivery was no problem too.

++ high tech room, clean and big room, polite staff, near to Acropole ( 30 minutes by foot), parking on the street or 10 eur per day if you wish safe parking lot.
Cofee capsules, tea, water on the room
Cleaning was done every day
Luxury shower gel, towels.
Best accommodation , I recommend them
Price / value 👌  perfect
Small market at 5 minutes
Elevator for luggage
This accommodation have everything that you need. The best 👌!!

very pleasant and luxurious apartment with advanced technologies.  parking is in the garage and is charged €10 per day.  There is free parking around the apartment and plenty of free parking.  the apartment is highly recommended.
Beautiful and very high quality finishes! The staff is very nice. If you don't care about being far from the center or the beach, then it's great. Metro stop also far.

Neat. I didn’t know about asking for special room service- towels were not replaced even though she said it will be replaced the next day. Our beds were made but not really dusted or even shaken. There were no real place to dry our clothes after the towels were all laid in the bathroom to dry, not even a hook pending as it was 4 of us who stayed.

It said that Check in starts after 3 on Booking.com and we got out of airport at 4. At 5, the receptionist was about to leave when we just arrived. But there’s no information on this. Best way to reach them is call. I didn’t get any replies on Booking.com.

Overall nice stay though as the location is not too remote, quiet and family-friendly. You can get Uber easily. Also, just a few minutes walk you will access main road.

The room was always on optimal temperatures. You need an app to access the doors, so no worries of losing access card or forgetting pins.

Service I wouldn’t say luxurious.
Unbelievable dirt and awful musty smell

Great place with good location.
Everything was very clean and well maintained. For an extra charge you can rent a car park for your stay. If your car is too big, there is no way to park it, but there is a paid car park near one metro station.
There is a subway nearby to the hotel, with which you can reach the central hour of the city and all the sights in 15 minutes. There is also another type of transport, many shops and restaurants. If we visit Athens again, we would come back here again.

We stayed here for a week. The room since arrival was NOT clean. Room service mainly includes changing towels (which are rough) and just dusting the bed (not changing the linens) Floors were never swept, there was a lot of dust. The location is in the center. Uber finds it easily and is a relatively close distance to various parts of the city. The landlord is helpful and replies quite quickly. It is convenient with fast check in.

There is no reception in the building but the emails are clear about the check-in procedure and you receive the building code and apartment code by email on the day of your arrival.

I found the staff - especially manager Miltiadis - very responsive. I received email responses quickly and never needed to followup or make a phone call.

The apartment was clean and spacious, and the temperature was already quite cool when we arrived which was nice after being out in the heat. The area is quiet and safe. You need to head to the Neos Kosmos metro to get most places but I knew that before booking and I'm sure it is one of the reasons these apartments are so affordable.

I enjoyed my stay and would recommend Lux&Easy.

Pros:

• When you go up from the street, there's a hill nearby where you can see almost all the Athens from.

• Gym is ok for a quick pump.

• Temperature control in rooms is great. The balconies are nice.

• Bunch of coffee places, restaurants and shops nearby

Cons:

• Would like an access to a waching machine.

• Kitchen would like some better appliences but that's nitpicking.

Good : Location + nice gym

Bad : it looks like a airbnb disguised as a hotel
No reception, the cleaning is bad (they don’t clean dishes, they leave dust on the ground and don’t come to clean daily)
You have to pay extra to be able to use the jacuzzi
Very expensive for what it is
Very small fridge for a pricey room

If I could give this place zero stars I would. I’m honestly shocked it has 4 stars. The apartment was filthy when we checked in, it smelled of urine and mildew.  We didn’t feel comfortable walking with our shoes off. There were scuff marks all over the walls. This place is advertised as a hotel but it’s run more like an Airbnb. The whole vibe of the place was really unsettling. Save your money and stay at a real hotel.

Elevator didn’t work in 3 days . I lived in 5 th floor
Rooms are good with many facilities even washing machine .

Horrible experience.
Booked this thinking I’m going to a hotel. It’s a private building. We arrived early thinking we could leave our bag somewhere. The guy at the front desk said he doesn’t have us in the list and I must call some phone number to check what’s happening. It all seemed like a scam. I called company I booked with they told us to call at 3pm some number as we can’t check in before it. At 3pm we called. They sent code for the door. The apartment was just okay. Nothing luxurious about it. So disappointed in the whole booking. Also they only provided body wash- no shampoo no conditioner. Just poor service after all.

Very good room with nice views of the acropolis.

Quiet ambient and service very up to the standards.

The area looks a bit rough at the beginning, but people around is very friendly.

The main photo is from the roof which I assume comes with the penthouse and perhaps slightly misleading as a result, but these are nice and big apartments in Athens. It’s easy to get around from here to the heart of town by Uber for £3-4. This is a lot bigger than standard hotel rooms and I totally recommend staying here instead of a hotel.

The staff are helpful and a phone call away, it’s a basic apartment which is clean and cleaned by staff on a daily basis.

Don’t worry too much about the location - you’re getting better value for your money here instead of a hotel in town.

My only complaint would be that there’s some dogs in  both the apartments next door and that poor dogs seems to go nuts when people come in.

The place is very decent with a great value of money. Yiannis was very helpful and allowed me for an early check in and also helped me find a place on the day I was leaving. The apartment was very clean and spacious.
A very clean, calm street, recommended for couples,
Good place to stay, near to a lot of touristic places. I like this flat and spent one week here.

Nice, spacious apartments equipped with all comforts. Excellent both for a short stay and for something longer. The non-central location doesn't favor it, but you can get to the center quickly with a walk. The value for money and the possibility of arriving at any time once you have received the entry instructions are also excellent.
Πολύ όμορφο κατάλυμα σε εξαιρετική τοποθεσία, πολύ βολικό για μετακίνηση τόσο προς το κέντρο της Αθήνας όσο και προς τον Πειραιά. Τα διαμερίσματα είναι πολύ λειτουργικά και πεντακάθαρα.

My wife and I love this place. This is our first time in Greece and in this hotel. We were staying for two nights at room 901. The hotel is small but cute. The hotel is clean, modern, and service is fantastic and simple. From my room we can see Acropolis. We love it. We strongly recommend this place. Yes, it was a little bit pricey $350/night compared to some hotels around here. But as we all said, you get what you pay for!

Our stay in Athens at this hotel was wonderful.  Staff was very helpful and friendly.  We were able to walk to the Acropolis and interesting neighborhoods for great local food.  We were about a 10 minute walk to a local brewery/taproom if you like that sort of thing (I do).  The rooftop restaurant was amazing with a great view of the Acropolis.  We had dinner there one night, and went for drinks another.  Both experiences were fantastic.  Grilled squid was excellent.

Amazing hotel! Very clean and modern and great location in the Acropolis.

Every single staff member at this hotel is incredible! They are so friendly, welcoming and go out of their way to provide the best service imaginable. They truly made our stay in Greece amazing. This hotel has a very bright future ahead!

Also have to mention, the breakfast and rooftop restaurant "Opposite 507" are top notch. The view of the Parthenon from the rooftop is beautiful.

Would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Athens.

Thank you again 507 Athens!

I cannot say enough good things about the 507 Athens. Everyone is helpful, friendly, and understanding. We had an issue with my mobility device and Cleopatra went above and beyond to help me resolve the issue. Also, if we had an issue with our room they were so quick to answer our question or come up and resolve that problem.

Be sure and stay here when visiting Athens

We stayed at 507 Athens for two nights prior to leaving for our cruise. Due to our wonderful stay there, we made reservations for the night we return from our cruise.  The location is within a nice walk (or 5 minute Uber) to The Acropolis.  Kleopatra and Pano are very friendly, communicative, and gracious hosts.  The rooftop restaurant has a delicious menu and a spectacular view of The Parthenon on the Acropolis.   The rooms are modern and comfortable.  We encourage everyone to stay at 507 Athens!

Our experience at Fix Divine Apartments was fabulous. The living space, bedroom, bathroom,  kitchen and the small balcony are renovated and well equipped. The host Kosmas made the checkin and check out process flow very smoothly. He even offered us a bottle of wine upon arrival which was very kind of him.

The location of the flat is very close to the main tourist attractions and entertainment districts. We didnt have to use public transport at all since one could walk to all the major spots at the city centre.

Excellent choice!! Nice, clean like your home!! Near Acropolis!! A place to be!!

I ll come again next year!! Thank you for your hospitality!!
The best in Athens!
Amazing apartment with all amenities!!! Beautiful space and spotlessly clean..Friendly atmosphere and very good organization..I highly recommend!!!!

Nice place, clean environment, careful details. Easy access to transportation. Good place to stay to visit places of interest in the city. Finally, kind owners ready to serve. It is a good choice in the center of Athens.
a simple and beautiful hotel, also Paola at the reception gives you a perfect guide for the city, a friendly service, thank you for everything 🙏

They have BEDBUGS and being fully aware about it keep accepting guests and make them suffer. I was beaten by them so badly that even got allergic reaction and had to buy medication. My whole vacation was ruined! I can’t go to the beach being in Greece. They’ve changed my room, but new bites kept appearing on my body. So, I decided to leave and went to talk to the manager. While I tried to explain my situation he was texting with someone on the phone and not even giving me full attention. Lastly I said that I want to leave and get money back for the last 3 nights that were paid and was not going to stay. At this moment he became super angry shouting at me and running around. He was agressive to the extend that I barricaded in my room and only with the booking.com help was able to leave the building safely. They said that this place decides that they will not give any refund. The minute I left the building they cancelled my reservation on the hotel’s end stating that I didn’t show up (with all the booking.com recorded calls while they were trying to get me out of there). They do it, so people, won’t leave them reviews on booking platform.

PROS:
- easy access right next to a metro station and ok distance to the center - nice size room and balcony - good price - checked in earlier than the normal hours - room was clean except for the reasons below (BEDBUGS)

CONS:
1. BEDBUGS...so go at your own risk. I have attached a photo of the sheets which were washed but dried up blood stains were visible. During the last night after turning on the light I also found a bedbug on the headrest of the bed. Towels were also not the cleanest.
2. Should had went to another couple which booked an identical room 2 minutes before my reservation a few months before arrival. We had our flight at 6AM which arrived at 8AM in Athens and we were in the city at around 10AM. Our friends with the other room got up at 3AM and went to the airport only to realize that their reservation was cancelled a few hours before and only received an email from Booking...Although we checked in, we had to spend the entire first day to find other accommodations for my friends on such short notice.

That was awful - there were bedbugs in rooms. One room was a coincidence, I thought, but after moving into another one there were more and more bedbugs. Rezeption guy was not polite in solving this problem and I felt not safe even standing next to this guy cause he was shouting at me and running around… a BIG NO to this place!

The hotel can turn your vacation into a nightmare.  There is a MASSIVE amount of bedbugs and extremely rude personnel who think it's not a problem. Besides everything in the room was dirty and old—the worst possible recommendations for the hotel.

When we came in the room there was a smell of cigarettes like someone was smoking a lot in there. I am asthmatic i can’t sleep there, so i called immediately straight to the booking and asked for refund. I didn’t stay in this apartment. They didn’t answer to booking on the request with the refund. They didn’t answer to my messages. The worst experience ever! Room doesn’t look like on the photos they have in the profile and plus you will get a smell of cigarettes in NON SMOKING ROOMS

Been here 3 times. Biggest double room on the upper floor very comfy and alot of space! Big balcony! Everything you need! But sound from rooftop makes it for light sleepers on highest room not great.  Room 103 also beautiful designed....but only thing to mention is it was not so clean. Hairs around and bathroom was smelling like mold :( this hotel is good located, easy checkin without reception, rooms are modern and comfy....but they could work on the cleaning a bit.

Convo 212 is a very nice located place. If you want privacy. This is a good stay. No reception. All goes via phone. Even the payment. They all speak very good English.

+ I had the penthouse. Lots of room. But for 3 persons is best ? (Not 4) you have 2 levels :-)
+ big screen TV and a sofa
+ kitchen

- the road noise. It’s on the free way. For me not a big problem, after all. It’s Athens
- the penthouse. On top of the roof is the airco. If the switch on you hear a humming sound.

In beginning I had issues with warm water. But that was fixed with a phone call.

I even asked for late check out. No problem.
Great stay. Good price. Close to centre

Liked:
- Good location
- fast access to restaurants and supermarkets

Disliked:
- the hosts weren't prepared for my arrival even though they had plenty of days ahead to get the room cleaned up and to prepare my access key

- I had to stay more than half an hour in a phone call with the receptionist to get an access key. Because the key wasn't in the locker in the end I had to take a temporary one.

- at my arrival the room was dusty, finger nails on the floor and smelly and one of the windows wasn't closing properly. Because it is located near a large boulevard the noise from cars and scouters made it impossible to sleep.

- they call the room a studio, but is actually a regular small room where they crowded a a bed, a so called sofa, a desk and kitchen cabinets. When you enter the room you have to pass through a 30-40 cm space between the desk and the bed.

- after a few days the shower drain has blocked and and all the water from the shower got into the room. Me and my wife spent two hours trying to absorb the water with towels. After I called the reception to ask more towels and a mop until somenone will fix the shower, nobody provided extra towels that night. The next day I had to call again for this issues and a receptionist was polite enough to give us another room and he actually made an upgrade for us.

Overpriced and poorly serviced.

Room was of good size but furniture has damages and floor was stained.

I arrived late and had to call many times until someone picked up the line and gave me entrance codes.

This is one of the best Airbnbs that I have stayed in. It's tastefully decorated. It has a washing machine, dishwasher ,TV, Netflix, brand new air-conditioning units. Incredibly clean and a good size.
Smart & Cozy indeed! Parking place easy to find around the building.
One best 👌 👍  quality, holiday services, very friendly service, quality apartment, I live one of athens apartment, all you need they will be delivery on time ⏲ 😀
Peaceful place and calm
Western view

We recently stayed at Kyma Apartaments for two nights, and it was truly a delightful experience. From the moment we stepped into our room, we were impressed by the level of comfort and cleanliness it offered. The room was not only spacious but also equipped with all the amenities we needed for a cozy stay. The staff were incredibly friendly and accommodating, ensuring that our needs were met promptly. Their professionalism and hospitality made us feel welcome throughout our stay.
The location of the place was convenient, allowing us easy access to nearby tram, metro and dining options. Whether we wanted to explore the area or simply relax in our room (big TV with also access to Disney+) everything was within reach.

Amazing apartment with great proximity to Athens Metro & tram that can take you anywhere you like in Athens.
It’s also located within a short walk distance from Acropolis and Acropolis museum which are main attractions to visit. The apartment is clean/comfortable and our host Manos, helped us with all questions and queries we had. They also provide a luggage service in case you have a few spare hours after your checkout.
Highly recommended 👍🏻
Check their website as they have a wide range of apartments based on the numbers of your family/party.
Wonderful place, helpful owner, close to good restaurants (Vasilis grill house), and close to public transport.
The apartment is very spacious, fully equipped and spotless! The owner was very friendly and helpful. We really enjoyed the large balcony! Excellent choice!

Superb! What sets it apart is the over and above hospitality and care of the host, Kyriakos. I have never come across a more hospitable host. Excellent for families. Perfect for conferences at venues in the area. Well connected to the centre of Athens and the sea side. Stavros Niarhos Foundation centre and park, and Flisvos marina (5 playgrounds) are stunning landmarks nearby and perfect for families. Best value for money in Athens. Everything you need for a pleasant stay.

Discover new renovated 2-bedroom apartament just a few minutes walk from the Acropolis area. Floral House can became your own home during your trip to Athens. It will be ideal place for your business trip, for a couple or for the family with children.
Very nice apartment! It contains everything necessary for a comfortable life. Recommend!

Knowledgeable, professional and attentive, GYC provides excellent service to all who want to charter a yacht in Greece. They work hard to find your particular needs and make your yacht experience as unique as you are!

Greece Yachts Charters is a 100 % guarantee when it comes to cruising around the Greek Islands and making your dream itinerary come true.
The places we have seen onboard our charter were truly idyllic and beautiful. Our charter itinerary was a dream come true!
Awe inspiring & magical. Thank you GYC! :)
dirty, air condition not working, heavily smelly bathrooms, no storage room, no WiFi (although we paid for it), bad organization,  unfriendly staff, just the skipper was nice
Not helpful at all

author_name: Dr. Radu BALANEAN, PhD, MSc Med, BSc,MSc Psych
text:
ROMANIAN/ ENGLISH:
I booked this apartment on airbnb. It was hard to choose but honestly I don't regret it. The apartment has a nice living room, a bedroom with a large and comfortable bed, a kitchen with all the necessary equipment.
The apartment is modern and very finely finished and cared for.
It has a gorgeous terrace with table and chairs, but also beautiful plants and modern lighting for a gorgeous atmosphere in the evening.
ENGLISH:
I booked this apartment on airbnb. It was hard to choose but honestly I'm not sorry. The apartment has a nice living room, a bedroom with a large and comfortable bed, a kitchen with all the necessary equipment. The apartment is modern and very finely finished and cared for. It has a gorgeous terrace with tables and chairs, but also beautiful plants and modern lighting for a gorgeous atmosphere in the evening. The bathroom is modern and has a smart washing machine. It has Wi-Fi similar to the internet in Athens. The host is kind and responds promptly to requests. The price/quality ratio is very good.

Our experience here was a very positive one. Communication with the host was quick and easy, self check in too. The apartment was clean, spacious for 8 persons and comfortable. There are 4 real bedrooms (not sofa beds) 3 bathrooms and guest WC. Fully equipped kitchen, fully airconditioned and a very big terrace.

Room was clean, but ants, mosquitoes all over the place,  ad says for 6 people? Lol... not true at all. 1 full size bed and 2 twin beds... show me how you can fit 6 people? No hot water, heater was off and cold. AC don't even cool the room, I  am not going to recommend anyone for this appointment. I got bit by ants and mosquitoes like hell. OMG...
Very nice appartment, easy contact with the owner. Perfect situated to visit Athens.
Quiet location, comfortable flat.
Nice!!
Nice, clean and spacious apartment, well located, close to a metro stop.

We had a really good time at Irene's apartment! It's clean, spaciouse apartment for 2 people, very well equipped, there was everything you need like coffee machine, toaster, equipements for cooking. The neighbourhood is calm and safe! The hisotrical city center is half an hour walk. The metro line 2 is a 5 minutes walk. Irene was really communicative and helpful! The self check-in and out is easy to handle!

We had the three room apartment on the first floor with balcony, perfectly equipped kitchen and living room. Everything was clean and nicely arranged. The elevator was appreciated for the luggage. Only 5 min from metro station an 1 min from bus stop line 227, the apartment was perfectly quiet during the night, when windows were closed. Very efficient mosquito defence for all windows. 20 min to Akropolis by metro, 30 min by foot. Irene was very kind and helpful with our questions and needs. Thank you very much for this pleasant stay.

Nice accommodation and a warm welcome from Greece:) Irene was super nice and eager to help with any questions about my stay here in Athens. Facilities were well equiped and i was surprised to see a wine in the dining room☺️and it was so great to have prepared icy water in the refrigerator after one hot long trip back from the outside!

We enjoyed two weekends at Casa D'Irene rustic appartment. There's plenty of space, so you feel like at home. By the way, it's full of details, like the wine everyone mentions. Irene also makes everything easy to help you with your stay.
The area is very quiet, and although it may look a bit scary at night, seems to be safe, at least, we didn't have any trouble, and we could see other people walking alone, and didn't look worried at all.
It's very well connected by metro line, and quite close to the city center, so you can get to the Achropolys in about 20 minutes on foot.
We are really happy to have chosen it for our visit to Athens!

A cozy and very nice appartment, located a bit away from strickt city center of Athens, is a very quality choice in case you are looking for staying in appartment during your holidays or other obligations you may have in this ancient Greek city. The apartment has two bedrooms, quite nice balcony (with a street view), bathroom with bath, and spacious living room presented together with kitchen. The appartment is clean and has all neccessary equipment for comfortable stay and cooking, together with some food items and spices you can use right away with your meals preparation - the owners are very accessible and open and are in general taking care that in appartment is all that is needed - a nice welcome touch from them is also presented as gift for newcomers in a form of a bottle of home made wine.
Otherwise, the appartment is just 350 m away from the nearest metro station (there is also a bus option), so the journey to other spots in city is simple and not far from main city attractions. In neighbourhood you can find bakeries and small shops with basic food and other basic equipment, while for those who are more demanding, the visit to supermarket would be essential - unfortunately there is no larger supermarket in vicinity of appartment, so you will have to search for it within at least 10 - 15 min walking distance.
The appartment is otherwise in the building on the first floor, and is easy accessible by stairs or by elevator, while the main entrance in the building itself is however a little bit clumsily, especially for people with disabilities, who could have some difficulties with entering to building.
The apartment has also an AC unit and free WiFi system.
In general, highly recommended for staying if you do not mind to not be in strickt city center of Athens.

Good apartments for a good price! We had a basement apartment with a terrace, which doesn't have a good view, but it is really nice for just sitting there and having your breakfast. This apartment has everything you need for cooking, also clean room and comfortable bed. Highly recommend!

The apartment is situated at a reasonable distance from the main attractions- about 15 min walk. It is small but clean and averagely quiet. The check-in/out was super easy. Great option for a weekend stay.

Few apartments and rooms for rent. Very clean and loaded with everything needed, dishes, good coffee, wine and juice. Misses some tea and maybe explanation which exactly place do you get since some are with windows and living area while other are basement type. Overall well furnished and comfortable.

Location central ✔
Walkable✔
Comfortable Studio & bed✔
Gas leak in the apartment across the hall that prompted an evacution of building & 2 Fire Trucks✔
Made the best of the gas leak situation ✔
Slight lingering smell of gas in my bathroom for next 2 days✔
No nice Welcome Basket in room til mentioned it to owner✔
Got Basket later✔
Easy walk to metro✔
Restaurants and coffee walkable distance ✔
Very Good value. Small, but very charming & clean, quite central, and a welcome basket. Thumbs up!

I arrived at the place I booked through "Booking", the conditions were not as stated in the description, the place was dirty, with insects in the beds, I don't know if they were bedbugs or ticks, the bathroom was unpresentable, dirty and had a bad smell. I hope they close this place, I understand that it is not a hotel, the price was very cheap, but the least that is asked is a little bit of cleanliness and order.

I booked for the entire apartment through booking, but when I got there all I was given were two beds in a shared room. And the room looked nothing like the pictures, filled with stuff and very dirty.

Don t even think about booking for such a trash hole! Below decent and basic hygiene and it is a big shame for this accomodation to be allowed in booking and other big travel platforms! I regret not taking photos! I ve traveled and stayed in cheap places and hostels all around the world but what i have seen there exceeded by far my worst expectations ever!

Had a VERY BAD EXPERIENCE!!!! Waited 1 hour outside this hostel hoping someone could open the gate for me, coz aparently the doorbell isnt working. Called and message many times the host but didnt come out! So decided to leave the place because its getting dark and the area looks not very safe. I have asked for a full refund but they havent refunded me at all!! Dont stay here as service and communication is not very good! They have left me alone and dark outside without anywhere to stay in Athens!!

The worst house I've ever seen, like the first thing you notice is the smell around like the house hasn't been cleaned in the past century, then you notice it's like house for ilegal imigrante cause we sleep 12 people all together, then if you actually move inside the house you will find garbage everywhere like no one cleans they just throwing everything on the floor and they are holding to every trash then the owner comes to you and say who ever makes trash needs to clean but he doesn't clean his own.

The good: Big appartment in an amazing location very close to the metro, coffee shops and markets. We never interacted with anyone and it everything was easily talked via chat. We were given codes to enter both the building and the apartment. They even booked a transfer for us from the airport (it's expensive as the airport is very far, but if arriving late at night, it's a blessing).

The bad: - Most of the times the code to open the apartment door wouldn't work. The first time it opened after 5min but the next days stopped working. I had to contact via booking to find a solution which was very quick even late at night.
- There's a key in a lockbox protected by a code. This code was inserted already!! Major security breach. Of course someone from outside would have to get into the building and know there's a key but still, felt unsafe after knowing that so I randomised the code and notified the hotel.
- The bathroom was not very clean. We found some hairs on the floor and even a contact lens... 🙄
- There's a stereo speaker connected... Apparently anyone can connect via Bluetooth. We thought it was off but it wasn't. At 5am some funny people decided to connect to it and blast music, which scared us a lot. Now we laugh at it but wasn't funny when it happened.

These few issues could have been isolated and only happen once but we're enough to bring the rating down but I WOULD comeback there if we comeback to Athens as overall it was good!

Great stay!!!! Clean, spacious and comfortable apartment, very close to the subway and within walking distance from major tourist attractions; it took us 25' to get to the Acropolis on foot. Very good air-conditioning, new home appliances, awesome mattress and the best of all; free access to the jacuzzi and sauna area on the 5th floor!! We are definitely coming back!!!

Everything was great! The room was comfortable and fully equipped, close to metro station and shops. The staff was very kind and helpful, and room was super clean. What else to ask for? We will be back on our next trip to Athens for sure!!!

One of the best accomodations I have been in.

The apartment looks way smaller on the pictures so you will really be suprised on how big it is.

There are literally no issues with the apartment.
It has a jacuzzi which is available to all Tennant's which was great and had.some privacy in.

It's all accessible by codes that you receive which is amazing as this really supports the current pandemic issues we have.

The house was really clean.
The staff was extremely nice and helped a lot.
Overall great experience 💛
Perfect stay, building full automated, clean and value for money! Staff everything that i needed reply to my messages and calls! Ill come back soon, see you and thanks for everything

Do not order from this store, be careful. they send products in duplicate, but not the ones you ordered in the hope that you will not go through the return process, filling in a product return form, etc. This form is definitely impossible to fill in because it is disabled

Lovely stay at the Sky Inn. Great spacious well equipped apartment. Very clean and quiet with the added bonus of an amazing view of the Acropolis, especially from the rooftop terrace.
Air conditioned, WiFi, kitchen area if you wanna self cater.
Agios Ioannis Metro station is around 5 minutes walk away (Red line)
From there the Acropolis is just 3 stops away. A metro day ticket costs €4.20
You can also change lines at Syntagma and get the Blue line to the airport or Piraeus Port.
Very helpful friendly host who arranged transport for us.
Would definitely recommend and stay here again.
One point to note is there is quite a steep hill and stairs to climb to reach the building so anybody with limited mobility may struggle. We had luggage and managed ok.
Quiet, calm, clean with an outstanding view. Very recommended.
very quiet and comfortable, I will recommend to friends
best view and amaizing hosts

My husband and I have been lucky enough to spend a few days in this apartment. The views from the terrace are unbeatable, as is the treatment from the landlady who has been very friendly. Highly recommended
Very beautiful place with an amazing view.

Great house.
Spotless.
Beautiful surroundings.
The Owners very welcoming. It is in the center and accessible by metro. I highly recommend it.

Central apartment, 10 minutes from the metro in a quiet neighborhood.
It is carefully decorated, very well maintained, the air conditioning works perfectly, the beds are very comfortable, it has everything you need for a comfortable stay.
The charming owner takes care of you professionally and provides you with all the information and help you need.
We will definitely recommend it and if we return to the city, we will return to this accommodation.
Congratulations Heleni for your great work!!

Spotlessly clean, in a very central location and with easy 24-hour parking.
Incredibly warm and ideal apartment for a getaway to the capital.

Modern, comfortable, "warm" and five-room apartment, quiet neighborhood and at the same time two steps away from transport and the market!! And the owners kind willing and discreet. Unreservedly 5 Stars!!
Excellent house! Located near the Dafni metro station! Perfect communication with the host! I would choose it again for a stay

Very nice, very clean, very kind owners. Like your home.
I will definitely go again

Such an ideal place for those who appreciate the home atmosphere. The place is not luxury, but very homey and full of friendly atmosphere on the part of the host. I recommend to everyone who does not care about 5 stars, but well spent time.

Nice, comfortable appartments. Hospitality, chearfuĺl, patient owners. We were in a warm family atmosphere all days with full support in all our questions. There's an incredible view to all Athens hills in 2 mins, an interesting and nice street market with fresh fruits, vegetables, fish, olives, herbs in 3-5 mins.
Great atmosphere, very nice, hospitable people. Beautiful views and places filled up the stay in this place. I highly recommend it because you will not find it in any hotel.
Good value for money: nice spot, close to metro in a safe area, the host is very kind! Ask him about the secret view spot on the rock!
Very, very nice, helpful hosts, delicious breakfasts, quiet and peaceful surroundings, well-equipped rooms. I definitely recommend it.
It was great, clean, tidy, courteous service, parking, in short, everything?
Cozy apartment, good location, very friendly host Thanos
The best place for meditation in Greece
Best Osho Meditation Center for me  !!!
The best place to breath and relax

A place where, with the help of various techniques of working with the body (the main of which is bioenergetic breathing) and meditation, you can return Life to the body and feelings, and find Joy in all its manifestations. This is where the path home begins...
The best meeting place in Athens. Where hearts open 😇
Great apartment, everything clean and renovated with very good taste. It has everything you need to spend a few days comfortably in Athens. Super recommended.

My stay in the apartment was really excellent and left the best impressions! Its location was ideal, a stone's throw from everything you need, with easy access to the main attractions and transport. The apartment was very comfortable and neat, decorated with elegance and aesthetics that makes you immediately feel at home. In terms of amenities, it was fully equipped with quality electrical appliances, which made our stay even more enjoyable. The level of cleanliness was excellent and the details taken care of. The host was welcoming and very helpful, always willing to help us and give suggestions for local points of interest. I highly recommend this apartment to anyone looking for a special and comfortable stay!

Nice and clean aparments, have all for visitors.... location is between centre and  sea coast.

Owner is good and provide all you needed for pleasant stay.  Wi fi is ok.

Noise is a bit higher because everyone drive a motorcycle in Athens (!? 🥶).

Honestly, it's alright, got a price to quality ratio you probably get what you pay for, it's located directly in the middle of two metro stations both a 9 minute walk (Dafni is the easier to get to). The room itself was modern, clean and was generally very nice. However  only the 1st and 4th floors have apartments the other floors are building sites which if the cleaner has disabled the lift you'll need to walk up and down the stairs!  And I'm not convinced that an extract fan going directly into a cupboard is going to extract much.

The biggest issue was the lack of sound proofing, you could hear everything from neighbours to the never end stream of mopeds.

Amazing apartment! Super clean and easy to check in. The building look old from the outside and the balcony is facing the main road . But once all doors close you can’t hear anything else.
Location is very good , about 5 min walk there is a metro station where you can take it to all the main attractions in Athens, takes us about 20 min to reach acropolis museum in one metro ride which I find it super convenient. Also there is supermarkets and restaurants within walking distant as well.

The best price-quality ratio. Very nice, even luxurious, recently renovated apartments with rich equipment. Well-functioning free Wifi. Air conditioning in every room. Very nice and helpful staff. I got answers to all my questions quickly.
Disadvantages: Not an interesting, poor district, 3km from the center. The only advantage of the location is close to the metro station (350m). What may not be ideal in an apartment (especially for a longer stay) is the lack of a dishwasher, washing machine and cabinets for clothes. And what surprised us the most (it was our first time in Greece) was that you can't throw toilet paper into the toilet. But this is apparently normal in Greece. For us it was a big surprise and a bit bothersome.
very clean, pristine rooms, all-new construction. I got my apartment, with special price, so it was even more great. Definitely i recommend it.
a simple and beautiful hotel, also Paola at the reception gives you a perfect guide for the city, a friendly service, thank you for everything 🙏

They have BEDBUGS and being fully aware about it keep accepting guests and make them suffer. I was beaten by them so badly that even got allergic reaction and had to buy medication. My whole vacation was ruined! I can’t go to the beach being in Greece. They’ve changed my room, but new bites kept appearing on my body. So, I decided to leave and went to talk to the manager. While I tried to explain my situation he was texting with someone on the phone and not even giving me full attention. Lastly I said that I want to leave and get money back for the last 3 nights that were paid and was not going to stay. At this moment he became super angry shouting at me and running around. He was agressive to the extend that I barricaded in my room and only with the booking.com help was able to leave the building safely. They said that this place decides that they will not give any refund. The minute I left the building they cancelled my reservation on the hotel’s end stating that I didn’t show up (with all the booking.com recorded calls while they were trying to get me out of there). They do it, so people, won’t leave them reviews on booking platform.

PROS:
- easy access right next to a metro station and ok distance to the center - nice size room and balcony - good price - checked in earlier than the normal hours - room was clean except for the reasons below (BEDBUGS)

CONS:
1. BEDBUGS...so go at your own risk. I have attached a photo of the sheets which were washed but dried up blood stains were visible. During the last night after turning on the light I also found a bedbug on the headrest of the bed. Towels were also not the cleanest.
2. Should had went to another couple which booked an identical room 2 minutes before my reservation a few months before arrival. We had our flight at 6AM which arrived at 8AM in Athens and we were in the city at around 10AM. Our friends with the other room got up at 3AM and went to the airport only to realize that their reservation was cancelled a few hours before and only received an email from Booking...Although we checked in, we had to spend the entire first day to find other accommodations for my friends on such short notice.

That was awful - there were bedbugs in rooms. One room was a coincidence, I thought, but after moving into another one there were more and more bedbugs. Rezeption guy was not polite in solving this problem and I felt not safe even standing next to this guy cause he was shouting at me and running around… a BIG NO to this place!

The hotel can turn your vacation into a nightmare.  There is a MASSIVE amount of bedbugs and extremely rude personnel who think it's not a problem. Besides everything in the room was dirty and old—the worst possible recommendations for the hotel.

Great place with good location.
Everything was very clean and well maintained. For an extra charge you can rent a car park for your stay. If your car is too big, there is no way to park it, but there is a paid car park near one metro station.
There is a subway nearby to the hotel, with which you can reach the central hour of the city and all the sights in 15 minutes. There is also another type of transport, many shops and restaurants. If we visit Athens again, we would come back here again.

We stayed here for a week. The room since arrival was NOT clean. Room service mainly includes changing towels (which are rough) and just dusting the bed (not changing the linens) Floors were never swept, there was a lot of dust. The location is in the center. Uber finds it easily and is a relatively close distance to various parts of the city. The landlord is helpful and replies quite quickly. It is convenient with fast check in.

There is no reception in the building but the emails are clear about the check-in procedure and you receive the building code and apartment code by email on the day of your arrival.

I found the staff - especially manager Miltiadis - very responsive. I received email responses quickly and never needed to followup or make a phone call.

The apartment was clean and spacious, and the temperature was already quite cool when we arrived which was nice after being out in the heat. The area is quiet and safe. You need to head to the Neos Kosmos metro to get most places but I knew that before booking and I'm sure it is one of the reasons these apartments are so affordable.

I enjoyed my stay and would recommend Lux&Easy.

Pros:

• When you go up from the street, there's a hill nearby where you can see almost all the Athens from.

• Gym is ok for a quick pump.

• Temperature control in rooms is great. The balconies are nice.

• Bunch of coffee places, restaurants and shops nearby

Cons:

• Would like an access to a waching machine.

• Kitchen would like some better appliences but that's nitpicking.

Good : Location + nice gym

Bad : it looks like a airbnb disguised as a hotel
No reception, the cleaning is bad (they don’t clean dishes, they leave dust on the ground and don’t come to clean daily)
You have to pay extra to be able to use the jacuzzi
Very expensive for what it is
Very small fridge for a pricey room

Great location, however I found the shower rooms smelling like pee, I would change the shower curtains more often. The beds were alright, each of them had a power socket. The garden is not that nice, it's just an area surrounded with walls with 4 tables and few seats, there are no plants or trees. I'm disappointed because someone stole my shoes which I left next to the bed because I couldn't fit them in my locker as I had too much luggage. You need to be careful when opting for a hostel but next time for my own comfort I'll get Airbnb instead.

I reserved one female dorm... and they gave me a mixed gender dorm... I tried... but it was really smelling like a dead corpse... and a lot more stories here (they was like get refund and go find other place now in the evening, or just stay... they didn't help me with card refund so I called to the company by myself...) I didn't wanna waste more of my time writing all about this problem which made me waste time and emotions... But even room image of ad is very far away from the reality. Not modern, very bad stinky molded mood... 🤢 if you hold the pillar of the bed, the black paint stick to your hand

Location is the best thing about this hostel. Easy to get here from the airport by  subway, 3 mins walking from the subway station Neos Kosmos, 3 mins walking from Carrefour, 10 mins walking from Lidl supermarket, 15 mins walking from a hill where you can go and enjoy some amazing views, 25 mins walking from the Acropolis and like 5 mins by subway to the Acropolis metro station. Absolutely perfect. Some say this area is a bit sketchy, but I couldnt disagree more. Everybody is super friendly in Athens.

The hostel is still in good condition, the rooms are nice and beds are comfortable. You get your own locker. Bathrooms are relatively clean and well-maintained. The staff really do their best to keep it clean the rest really depends on the people staying there. Dont make a mess and it wont be messy.

The self check-in went ok. All important info was sent via Whatsapp or mail. You can chat with the reception if you need anything.

Kitchen was large and equipped just enough. Maybe a larger fridge would be fine.

I would appreciate if the recycling situation was better, because right now there is no recycling system established in the hostel and it would be such an easy fix.
